chapters.title: Chapter 902 That Was Too Fast, I Didn'T Feel It Clearly
chapters.body:
Chapter 902 That Was Too Fast, I Didn'T Feel It Clearly

Chapter 902: That Was Too Fast, I Didn’t Feel It Clearly

When Drunken Cat Yu Jie saw that Yue Yang completely knocked down Lord Black Flame and dug out the Black Flame Soul Crystal that had been refined for thousands of years from the opponent’s body, she couldn’t help it anymore. She stepped forward and touched him with her fingers, “Why did you tell him so much? Wouldn’t it be better to just kill him and take everything away?”

Yue Yang ignited the Nirvana Flame, purifying the Black Flame Soul Crystal.

After it was refined, the crystal diminished from the size of a big fist to a clump that was just slightly bigger than a forefinger. He then handed it to Drunken Cat Yu Jie and motioned to her to look, “If I didn’t say anything and just killed this guy, then the Black Flame Soul Crystal that we might have dug out would just be a Sub-Holy Soul Crystal and it would not be very useful. However, after his excitement, he was exhausted and his soul was severely injured. Even though he was naturally connected with the Black Flame Soul Crystal, my Supreme Will was able to give him a good scar. So, I can easily dig it out without any loss. As you can see, it is now completely unharmed and its purity levels even evolved to a Holy Level!”

Drunken Cat Yu Jie did not deny the benefits of doing so, but still, she felt like something was wrong, “Is it really alright to do this?”

Yue Yang smiled, “Kitty, don’t treat it as a human being. If you think of it as a monster, things would be much easier— defeating monsters to obtain the treasure is a natural process in this life of ours!”

“But he is clearly in human form…” Drunken Cat Yu Jie didn’t contradict Yue Yang’s opinion, but she just couldn’t accept it for a while.

“Then, treat it as a ‘humanoid monster’. Well,let’s not discuss this issue. Simba! This guy’s flame body is still good. Alright, I’ll reward you with this, drag it outside for a good meal!” Those who died in the hands of Yue Yang had a rather gruesome end— either you turn into fertiliser of you’d be animal feed.

“I think this guy will die without peace!” Drunken Cat Yu Jie murmured to herself.

“It’s dead already, do you think it will still care if he doesn’t die in peace? Come on, let’s continue mining, there are still so many Di Yan Ores that can’t be wasted and we can’t leave even a piece of it to others!” Yue Yang casually started to mine. Drunken Cat Yu Jie was stunned— this kid was greedy to the point where he would not let go of the most trivial things. If someone else had the same identity like him, doing stuff like this was practically just overboard! And yet, sometimes he would be too generous. He granted thousands of flying dragons as soon as they were needed without blinking his eyes, not even the slightest care or annoyance about gifting away Heaven Ranked beasts either.

What an incomprehensible contradiction.

“Oh, by the way, why did that Di Gui Yin Flame disappear?” Drunken Cat Yu Jie remembered something.

“What do you mean disappear? I flickered it off because it’s actually an illusion in my domain. I collected the real Di Gui Yin Flame early on. It took a lot of effort to wrap it up carefully with the Nirvana Flame, close it and then enter it into the Grimoire World. I almost failed at that time, and now that I think about it, it was kind of dangerous,” Yue Yang replied without raising his head.

“Di Gui Yin Flame was particularly difficult to store, wasn’t it?” Drunken Cat Yu Jie could imagine that kind of difficulty without guessing.

“Nonsense, of course it was difficult; it took me ten minutes to get it done,” Yue Yang hummed triumphantly.

“You picked the Vulcan Soul Refining Herb and you had the time to harvest the Di Gui Yin Flame?” Drunken Cat Yu Jie felt that he was rather deceitful. He could have told me that he was already harvesting the herb, then I wouldn’t have been that worried or scared!

“It only took a minute or so to harvest the herb, the main point was collecting the Di Gui Yin Flame…” Yue Yang accidentally exploited a big secret.

“What are you talking about?” Drunken Cat Yu Jie got angry. You couldn’t bother to tell me that you finished the harvest? You made me so worried that I almost lost my life! I thought the illusion was real and even rushed to protect you! I was going to live or die along with you, but I guess I was the one who made the wrong choices!

She punched him and Yue Yang avoided it, but fell backwards onto his back. Straddling his waist she lifted her fists to punch him.

“Don’t be impulsive; the impulsiveness is the devil!” Student Yue Yang quickly grabbed her fist.

“I’m not impulsive, I just want to beat you up!” Drunken Cat Yu Jie wanted nothing more but to bite on a piece of his flesh just to let him taste the feeling of being bullied.

“Actually, it’s not that I didn’t want to tell you, but that you were just immersed in your sentiment at the time and you were constantly improving. Of course, I couldn’t wake you up in that state…” Yue Yang explained and Drunken Cat Yu Jie remembered.

It seems like things were really like that.

“So according to your words, it’s my fault for wrongfully blaming you?” After blaming him without listening to his reason, she felt a bit embarrassed.

“No, blame me for not picking the medicine fast enough. If it could have been done in one second, then there would be no such misunderstandings, blame me!” Student Yue Yang pretended to blame himself and said wittyly, putting her in an awkwardly anger-subsidizing position. She gave him a sullen look and then struggled slightly, “Well, let go then, I’m getting up!”

Before letting go, Yue Yang asked cautiously, “You’re really not going to hit me?”

Drunken Cat Yu snorted angrily, “I’m not that bored to do something like that!”

Yue Yang asked again, “Are you sure?”

She couldn’t get angry when he saw his fear of death as she gave him a blank glance, “Coward, I promise not to hit you, let’s go!”

Student Yue Yang breathed a sigh of relief and patted his chest, “Thank God, I thought you were going to use torture like ‘chest suffocation’ to torture me. As you know, my willpower is very weak and I can’t bear the chest suffocation torture at all!”

Torture of chest suffocation?

With such a new term, Drunken Cat Yu Jie’s forehead popped with visible blue veins— she was no fool, she understood it as soon as she heard it.

However, what was the content of the torture behind the chest suffocation lady, I wonder?

Drunken Cat Yu Jie immediately raised her fist, “Say, what else are you hiding from me, brat?”

Yue Yang reacted extremely quickly.

He caught her fist and had the look of a hero who dedicated his life to the revolution— the gaze of someone who would rather die than surrender, “As the best secret keeper in the entire Tong Tian Tower, do you think that I will tell you that you used too much force when you sat down just now? Do you think I would speak of a big secret like your pants having a small hole in them after you sat too forcefully?”

Drunken Cat Yu Jie was shocked after hearing this.

She looked down at her body and found that the ‘door’ to the ‘cave’ was truly opened, even revealing a faint layer of ‘grass’ that was visible to the world.

She couldn’t help being stupid on the spot. When she reacted, she saw that the kid Yue Yang was smirking. She suddenly became angry and on impulse, she made a move that was impossible for her to do normally. She lowered her entire body and with a towering frame, she pressed herself on the face of this little thief who was snickering. You good boy, weren’t you afraid of the so-called ‘chest suffocation torture’? I’ll let you try the taste of suffocating happiness!”

Who told you to get horny? Who said you could just bully me?

“Kitty, forgive me, I surrender. You know, one could really die from suffocation…” A certain transmigrating man who pretended to be struggling was actually screaming.

“Well, he deserves to die!” said the big-chested Yu Jie who had already decided to punish him with anger and eagerness!

After one day.

Drunken Cat Yu Jie who returned to the Tian Luo Palace warned the transmigrated man for the hundredth time, “If you dare to so much as mention it to the others, I will kill you!”

Student Yue Yang took advantage of it naturally and pretended to be a good boy. Patting his chest, he said, “You can rest assured, unless Qian Qian and the others use the same torture, I will never say it!”

Drunken Cat Yu Jie was already too powerless to be angry. Well, it is wrong to be angry with this kind of pervert.

Direct hits are the most practical, after all!

Before they could even raise their fists, Princess Qian Qian and Yue Yu greeted them. Tigress smiled and asked her quietly,”That bad guy didn’t bully you, right?”

She nearly wanted to cry, but she denied it, “No. If he dared to, I would have peeled his skin off!”

Yue Yang cooperated to make the ‘I am a gentleman’ expression.

Although everyone did not believe it.

“Sister Yu and I are going to take Bing Er to the ancient forest to get the energy of ancient runes tonight, so we will have to rely on your help!” Princess Qian Qian said that she will leave Yue Yang to her cousin to take care of him. Drunken Cat Yu Jie couldn’t refuse either as she wanted to cry without tears— how in the world was she expected to keep an eye on him? No matter what her answer was, she hoped that she wouldn’t be bullied by him for the day as that would be a blessing in itself!

“Okay, I will watch him. Even if I’m going to the Heaven Realm to purchase some ores, I will watch him!” Drunken Cat Yu Jie sighed, biting down a forced agreement.

“I will obey your commands!” Yue Yang expressed another persona who bore the policy of listening to his wife and following the flow of things as if his dedication remained unchanged for 50 years.

“Shut up!” Drunken Cat Yu Jie was angry. Although the late stage of torture with chest suffocation made the kid feel like a rascal for a while, but there was confusion clouding her thoughts at the time. Hence, it was not counted and she hadn’t officially agreed.

What kind of wife are you talking about now? It’s too early for that!

“Cousin is very mighty. If you marry in the future, the family rules must be very strict…” Princess Qian Qian clapped her hands and praised her. Embarrassed, Drunken Cat Yu Jie turned around and left.

At night.

Drunken Cat Yu Jie tossed and turned but she just couldn’t sleep.

She originally thought that Yue Yang would come to attack her at night. If it was true, then she would punch him and make him fly out of the clouds. At least, she would shut him out and let him eat the door. But what the hell, this kid didn’t even bother her. Qian Qian and the others weren’t here and His Majesty refused to see him again so he had no place to go. But how could he just go to bed early?

Truly being unable to sleep, she put on her clothes.

Pushing the door of Yue Yang’s room lightly, she found that he was not resting on the bed at all.

At first, Drunken Cat Yu Jie thought that he had embarked on a happy trip to some land. Who would have thought that from the door that was left ajar, there was a sliver of light coming in from the laboratory.

The Di Yan Ore, arranged like a small hill, was refined piece by piece in Yue Yang’s hands. The smallest became a bean-sized crystal and the largest was only the size of an egg. The same hill-like Liquid Crystal Di Yan was piled up on his other side as well— an overwhelming tens of thousands of them.

Everyone else only saw his luck and prestige, but how many people could see his efforts?

How many people could really understand his heart?

Drunken Cat Yu Jie’s eyes were moist and her throat seemed to be blocked by something. She was very uncomfortable as her tears slipped silently. Seeing his lonely and hardworking figure, she quickly wiped away her tears. Showing a soft smile, she stepped forward. When he was about to pick up the Di Yan Ores, she took the lead and handed a piece of ore into his hand. It was too late to grab a towel at this point, so she used her pyjamas directly, “You just came back, so why don’t you take a break?” Yue Yang looked back at her strangely as he thought she had fallen asleep.

“You are the only one who works hard, won’t you allow anyone to help you?” Drunken Cat Yu Jie couldn’t help making an action that she never thought she could and it was very natural. She leaned down and kissed his lips gently as a reward for him.

But after the kiss, both of them were stunned for an instant.

Both pairs of eyes were on the same level, unsure of what to do.

Drunken Cat Yu Jie suddenly reacted and turned his head back, not allowing him to look at herself again as it was full of embarrassment.

How did that even happen? Th-this is really dizzying. I actually took the initiative to kiss him,and I even kissed the lips! What’s worse is that, including the last time he kissed himself and this time, he didn’t feel it clearly. The time, my true first kiss was completely gone as well, but I still didn’t feel it clearly. It was a failure…

“Kitty, it was too fast just now, I didn’t feel it clearly!” A certain transmigrated man proposed to initiate it formally.

“If you keep talking I’ll kill you!” A certain big-breasted elder sister who was too embarrassed, weakly and shamefully rejected his proposal.

[TL note]:

At this point there’s more new characters that are emerging so I’m kind of making the glossary instead of referring to it. I’ll try my best to provide them as accurately as I can, so let me know if any of the names seem awkward or don’t flow all that well!

At any rate, enjoy the chapter! Hope you guys have a great day/night ahead of you!

-Sterling

chapters.title: Chapter 903 Push Of The Inverted Cross
chapters.body:
Chapter 903 Push Of The Inverted Cross

Chapter 903: Push Of The Inverted Cross

The refining of the Di Yan Ore was extremely difficult for others and it was impossible to smelt one piece in a month.

Refining the ores into Molten Di Yan was already the limit of many warriors in the Heaven Realm.

Refining from the flow of Molten to the state of Liquid Crystal was an even more difficult process when every single one of them was refined with the utmost purity. Of course, for Yue Yang who possessed the Nirvana Flame, this was a trivial matter. In his eyes, only the Black Flame Soul Crystal dug out from the body of Lord Black Flame that bore a strong will and soul imprint was considered to be a slightly more complex matter.

As for the strange fire of the Di Gui Yin Flame that would explode once the balance is broken— that was the truly tricky one to deal with.

Using the evaluation of difficulty based on the traversing man’s standards, the refinement of Di Yan Mine could be considered as G-level difficulty at most as it was a trivial matter that could be done with the raise of his hand. The difficulty of purifying the Black Flame Soul Crystal was not high either and it could barely be regarded as D-level. As for the Di Gui Yin Flame that Yue Yang wanted to absorb and refine the abnormal flame, its difficulty would be regarded as AAA-level, which was only a little bit lower than the S-level difficulty of the Vulcan Soul Refining Herb… Moreover, if the Vulcan Soul Refining Herb could not be refined, at most he would only fail again. However, if the Di Gui Yin Flame failed in the purification process, there was going to be a really chaotic explosion!

In the laboratory of the Tian Luo Palace, it was impossible to absorb the refined Di Gui Yin Flame.

Once it exploded, the entire palace would be razed to the ground. Except for the buildings in the mirage protection layer, there will probably be nothing left as everything proceeded to become completely wiped out.

Taking risks was in Yue Yang’s nature.

If he brought it back just to be made into a decoration, Yue Yang wouldn’t have gone through all that trouble. It has to be useful to him before he decides its worth.

Sister Drunken Cat Yu Jie proposed to try refining in the ruins on the fifth floor of the Heaven Stairway. Even if it exploded there, there would be nothing much for them to worry about.

“Kitty, you should stay away. Even if I fail, nothing will happen to me,” Yue Yang tried to persuade her to leave, but she insisted on staying. Her reason was, “I want to stay! This way, you won’t fail anymore! That’s right— I’m going to be your biggest motivation! In the Hei Yan Canyon, a certain someone even lied to me and said it would take at least half an hour. In the end, it scared me to death but even so, I managed to adapt to the situation and obtain a breakthrough…”

“I’m different from you— I’m very sensible and I won’t be as big-headed as you. Ah, I was wrong, I meant impulsive! Don’t get me wrong—what I said just now was just a slip of the tongue, it’s totally not my inner voice at all. It was just a slip of the tongue!”

“Well, since I don’t appear pleasing to the eyes, I don’t mind exploding to death!”

“Don’t be too arrogant, Kitty!”

“…”

One day passed, and student Yue Yang had unfortunately failed three times. His whole body was scorched, leaving only a row of white teeth and the whites of his eyes.

He fell into the arms of the Drunken Cat Yu Jie as he gasped for breath.

Although it was a heaven-sent chance at this time, it was such a blessing to roll around on such a broad chest! It’s a pity that he was so tired to the point where his fingers were cramping and he didn’t have the strength to blink, wasting this great opportunity.

Every time, he just needed something more and was so close to success.

Yue Yang was still a little short of being able to find a balance, but in the end, every attempt of his had failed. As Drunken Cat Yu Jie stayed with him, he had no choice but to absorb the brute force of the explosions to protect her. Hence, that was the reason why he looked absolutely scorched… “Are you dead?” Drunken Cat Yu Jie asked suddenly.

“Soon.”

Yue Yang sighed softly.

If he could stay with this broad chest forever, he would be happy even if he were to suffocate and die!

Drunken Cat Yu Jie picked him up and carried him on her shoulders. She then unrolled the teleportation scroll with one hand and passed through the teleportation gate, returning to the small garden on the first floor. Because all the other women were cultivating in the World Tree, the manor here in the small garden had been uninhabited for a long time. Only occasionally, some maidservants came by to clean the cobweb dust and keep it fresh so that the master could come back to stay at any time.

She did not enter the house as she flew to a lake not too far away and placed Yue Yang into the water. Just like a young wife welcoming her husband’s return from afar, she graciously started to scrub Yue Yang’s body.

This behavior made Yue Yang confused. Taking advantage of the small sliver of strength that he managed to regain, he caught her slightly trembling hand, “Kitty, what are you trying to do?”

Drunken Cat Yu Jie lowered her eyes, suppressing her shyness before she hummed in a gnat-like voice, “I know what I want to do— you need help and I have the time, so it’s time for me to help you out!”

“I thought you weren’t ready yet?” Yue Yang said again in disbelief.

“I’m going to prepare now!” Suddenly, Drunken Cat Yu Jie stood up and bravely took off her clothes in front of Yue Yang, revealing a perfect and hot, fair-skinned body. Then, she turned her head to the side, “Don’t look; otherwise, I’m going to regret it.”

“Kitty, you don’t need to be like this…” Yue Yang’s voice suddenly became softer, “We can do that, but it doesn’t need to be because of anything.”

“What nonsense, I don’t have any reason to do this!” She forced herself to resist the shame as she pointed at him once more to prevent him from peeking.

“Do you really want to do that? Kitty?”

“Fine then, I will put on my clothes!”

“Don’t…”

When the two hugged each other and laid on the bed, Drunken Cat Yu Jie suddenly said, “It seems like we haven’t been in much of a relationship? Is ours going too fast?”

Yue Yang almost died of over perspiration.

When you were knocking on my doorstep, did you stop to think that these words are a little too late to be mentioned? The milk was already spilled! [1]

T/L Note[1]: Comes from the origin of ‘ no use crying over spilt milk’, implying that what’s happened had indeed happened so there is no use fussing/ regretting it

He quickly reassured her, “In fact, it’s not really considered fast. The fastest way was to do it upon sight— now that would be considered really fast. Our progress was just nice! Besides, if nothing else, we could always improve our relationship after marriage!”

Although Drunken Cat Yu Jie appeared calm on the surface, she was filled with a turbulence of emotions and anxiousness, “Now that this is the current situation, where you have completely seen my bare body as I have seen yours, I think we understand each other enough. Now, how do we proceed? You’re full of experience so tell me how your plan goes, but the final decision making will belong to me; if it hurts too much, the plan should be terminated immediately!”

“You can decide, but you being the one to take charge will definitely not work because you’re unsure of how to do it…” Student Yue Yang suggested, “I’ll take charge of it and ensure that there will be no problems.”

“I’m warning you, you only have the right to make suggestions. Otherwise, you will be severely punished!” A certain elder sister touched the large hand of a transmigrated man. She did not shy away as she would usually do besides lacing her tone with a tinge of warning and urged him to carry out the plan.

“To do this, you don’t need any sort of shitty planning at all— just do what you want!” A certain transmigrated man implied that he was really occupied to the point where he had no time to think.

“Then what should I do?” asked Yu Jie, who was helpless and gasping.

“Try out your chest suffocation torture!” He suggested.

“…”

About ten minutes later, the beautiful prelude made her feel like things went pretty well, unlike what she had initially imagined.

Under the advice of her beloved one, she showed him her raw beauty to the greatest extent. Then, she observed his naughty thing from a distance, even trying to kiss it a few times according to his advice. She listened to his advice, holding the burning bulge with shyness but refusing to swallow it like the others. She didn’t state that the main reason for her actions was not because she was afraid of getting dirty, but because she was afraid that bad skills might hurt him with his teeth or give him the impression of an idiot.

There was anticipation, but there was also tension and excitement.

She suggested for the first time, “Although this is very comfortable, you should lie down if you are exhausted. I will do it!”

A certain transmigrated man suppressed the smile in his heart and asked, “Do you know how? Let me do it. It’s not a question of whether I’m tired or not— it doesn’t matter even if I tire myself out for you”

Seeing the beloved wolf’s contempt, she snorted in annoyance, “Isn’t that just doing this? Although I don’t know the exact procedures, I have a natural female instinct. Would this stump me? Stop moving your hands; they’re making my entire body laxed. Let me catch my breath so I can deal with you… No one had their first time like this, right? I’m going to be the first one who initiates this among us sisters!”

Student Yue Yang supported her ideals, but he was afraid that she would regret it if she failed.

He attached his lips to her ear, like a military adviser offering advice.

“I can’t work hard underneath. I’d rather be on top, so you can just lie down and enjoy it directly. The angle is probably the same, I guess. Aiya, that’s wrong, I think something’s amiss… Stop looking, you’re making me weak! Or, let me try to turn this way, this should probably work!” A self-righteous Yu Jie tried three times and failed twice. In the end, with tears in her eyes, she finally succeeded in involving her beloved..

It was so painful for a minute that she couldn’t speak. The first sentence that came back to her was, “Can’t you make it a little smaller?”

A transmigrated man was sweating profusely as he answered, “I only have the ability to grow bigger…”

Sitting in this way is not a solution, so a certain sister with zero experience was not ashamed to ask, “What should I do next?”

“Huh? Doesn’t it still hurt?”

“It hurts, but I’m scared of you getting sick. Doesn’t it mean that you will get sick if you stop moving?”

“Who said this? Forget it, let me go to the top. Actually, Kitty, there are many more things you have to learn. Let me teach you slowly!”

“It turned out to be like this— it’s so simple, I can do it too… Oh, don’t be so fierce, you’re like a cannibalistic tiger. Oh my God, I’m dying, don’t be like this, I feel uncomfortable…Damn, you’re so fierce, how does Wu Hen deal with this? No I can’t, if you keep going, I’ll… Ow, ow, please, just let me be on top; I can’t keep up if you continue being like that…”

“Actually, this is just the beginning, alright? It’s just a little warm-up!”

“This is still just the beginning? Oh my God, I feel like I’m going to die! It’s no good! Let me rest for a while, otherwise I will be dead because my body almost exploded just now!”

“How could your body explode… it may be that you have a particularly sensitive physique. So just now…” The man whispered a string of knowledge that she couldn’t learn from books into Yu Jie’s ear. She became so embarrassed that she buried her head in his chest, raising her fists and beating him indiscriminately as she tried to deny it, “No, I am not of that physique. Who said so? I’m just uncomfortable…”

The long night passed and Drunken Cat Yu Jie opened her eyes, finding herself asleep in his arms.

This kid was simply a greedy ghost as he would not be satisfied at all.

She was reluctant to hit him, so she finally hesitated for two seconds before kissing him with a bit of ‘hate’. The fierce movement awakened him as he just grabbed her, suffocating her with a lingering kiss.

As Drunken Cat Yu Jie was kissed, she suddenly pushed Yue Yang away and exclaimed, “It’s over, I forgot about the Double Cultivation yesterday! I remembered it at the beginning, though; this is all because of you!”

Yue Yang laughed, “It’s okay, I forgot to do it yesterday too. We can just make up!”

The slightly confused drunk cat Yu Jie thought for a long time before she suddenly turned her mind. Now, they were husband and wife, should she even be worried about not having enough chances to practice the Double Cultivation? She realized it in her heart and gave him a shameful look, “Are you thinking of that again? No, yesterday’s not counted; this time I must be on top…”

[TL note]:

Hey guys! It’s your translator here!

Though I haven’t exactly missed posting the chapters according to quota (once every 2-3 days), I have definitely laxed in posting cuz I was in a bit of a pinch in the past month. College semester finals was the tip of the iceberg of the problems while I balanced two other side jobs and translated LLS. To summarise, studying a course that is really subjective is not cheap and with the pandemic, it’s been a bit stressful so things were pretty crazy and I can’t say they’re that okay now.

However, I’m still going to continue translating . It would be unfair of me to just stop due to my shit and y’all don’t deserve to put up with that. I have read so many books that were left half finished and though it’s not author/translator’s fault to have to deal with something on their end, the feeling still kinda sucks as readers.

At any rate, enjoy the chapter! Hope you guys have a great day/night ahead of you!

-Sterling

chapters.title: Chapter 904 Creation, Beast Bracelet
chapters.body:
Chapter 904 Creation, Beast Bracelet

Chapter 904: Creation, Beast Bracelet

It was already five days later when Princess Qian Qian and Yue Yu came back.

Yue Yang had successfully developed the Beast Bracelet earlier and brought the Flame Condor, who was temporarily categorised under the lead of the Reaper Mantis, as the first experimental product of the Beast Bracelet Contract Beast.

Becoming the first experimental product was quite risky. There was a chance for you to die instantly, but should you survive, the rewards would be great.

Yue Yang merged the Di Gui Yin Flame purified by the small heap of Nirvana Flame and the White Splendid Frost into the body of the Flame Condor, allowing it to break through the realm of Level 3 of the Heaven Rank and rise to the peak of Level 4, infinitely close to the 5th. At this time, the flames all over remained quiet. When it was not officially fighting, it could hardly feel its heat, but once it was angered, it was ten thousand times more terrifying than a volcanic eruption! It could be said that the Flame Condor at this time had completely integrated and inherited the characteristics of Di Gui Yin Fire.

Because of this, Drunken Cat Yu Jie gave it a name: Iris.

This was to commemorate a pot of irises that she planted when she was a child. Of course, it was also because the flames of the Flame Condor now evolved into a faint purple-blue hue, which looked like a cluster of irises in full bloom from a distance.

“Is this the Beast Bracelet made by Liquid Crystal Di Yan? Oh, it’s pretty!” Princess Qian Qian asked again, “Why don’t you make one with the Moon Gem?”

“Do you think that the Moon Gem is something that you can pick up by the side of the road!” Yue Yang was going to be speechless— of course, you wouldn’t know the importance of grain, salt and oil if you weren’t the head of the house! [1]

T/L Note: [1] Implies that the head of house uses their salary/funds to care for the family, so without bearing that position, one wouldn’t know how to empathise with the one shouldering the responsibility.

“Didn’t you manage to get a lot of good things from that double-headed silly dragon last time?” Princess Qian Qian smiled.

“For the time being, there is no way to make the best Beast Bracelet… That would only waste materials, so I’d better explore the experience of it first,” Of course, Yue Yang also wanted to use the Sun Jewel, Moon Gem and Star Stone to make the ultimate Beast Bracelets, but there was still a certain distance between ideas and reality. It was impossible to reach the sky in one step, so he had to restrain his ambitions.

“It’s pretty good, this treasure that has surpassed the Gold Rank and reached the Platinum Rank. If you soar higher and give it a bit of research, it might become a Holy Rank!” Yue Yu quickly praised her brother as a sign of encouragement.

In fact, she was right. When Yue Yang succeeded in studying the Beast Bracelet, His Majesty, who heard the good news, sent three waves of envoys to praise him excitedly.

Each wave of envoys brought His Majesty’s unrelenting congratulations and praise.

This showed how moved His Majesty was.

Although His Majesty still refused to see Yue Yang, he had already spoken and promised to encourage Yue Yang vigorously. When Yue Yang used the Sun Jewel to develop a Holy Ranked Beast Bracelet, it was said that His Majesty would personally reward him! Student Yue Yang couldn’t wait to reach the goal immediately. Unfortunately, with his current perception, for the time being, he could only make a Platinum Ranked Liquid Crystal Di Yan Beast Bracelet.

Needless to say, Si-niang was naturally proud of San Er.

There was a grand celebration on the Yue Clan’s side.

Jun Wuyou was sleeping, but upon hearing the surprising news, he didn’t even have time to put on his shoes and immediately ran out barefoot. He got drunk with the old man Yue Hai, the old fox and others…The Three Guilds— the Warrior Guild, Mercenary Guild and Thief Guild also announced the good news to the world for the first time.

Although it is not as good as summoning a Grimoire, with this kind of Beast Bracelet that grows up with the master, many warriors who have no chance to make a contract with the Grimoire will no longer feel helpless. Descendants who have an uncultivated and uncontracted Grimoire would also have a safer life guarantee. ‘Promising disciples who were talented ended up dead in accidents caused during training’—there have been so many cases of a similar kind. It would always become a huge toll to the family, especially if the deceased children were designated to take over a part of the family succession line.

Now, the problem that has been causing headaches in various families can finally be resolved.

The Third Young Master of the Yue Clan had already declared to the world: In the Soaring Dragon Continent, any disciple with the potential of the becoming a Heaven Ranker will be given the same level of effort and contribution to the companions of the Heaven Ranked Beasts for growth; those with the strength of the Earth Ranks will be given the equivalent Earth Ranked Beasts as companions to grow together. That is to say, as long as they work hard enough and have enough potential, no matter how high or low their status is, they are likely to grow into Innate, Heaven Ranked, or even higher and stronger levelled warriors!

Jun Wu You’s Forbidden Army Commander ‘Feng Kuang’, Eagle Eye Xia Hou Wei Jie, Feng Qi Sha, Yan Po Jun and other well-known warriors, plus more than a hundred formal members who have reached the qualifications of the Dragon Knights were called. For the first time ever in the Warrior Guild, they displayed and registered their Beast Bracelets with different attributes. According to the style and quality, the open Beast Bracelets are divided into three grades. One was the Fine Gold Beast Bracelet, which was inlaid with the energy of magic crystals below Level 3 of the Heaven Ranks; another one was the Mithril Beast Bracelet, inlaid with the magic crystals for Level 5 Earth Rankers and above; whereas the last one was a Bronze Beast Bracelet, inlaid with magic crystals for those below the 5th Level of the Earth Ranks.

Members of the Dragon Knights must at least be able to contract the Mithril Beast Bracelet, unless the beasts possess extremely special expertise.

“There are still close to 3000 empty spots in the Dragon Knights and 10,000 places in the Dragon Blood Guard Legion. If you want to become stronger, what are you waiting for?” When the three major guilds posted Yue Yang’s statement, the blood of the warriors of the world were boiling.

“I must become a Dragon Knight!”

So many youngsters pledged that way.

Both the Flying Dragon and the Beast Bracelet were right in front of their eyes.

This opportunity was an unprecedented and open apportionment to everyone in the world. For a warrior who has pursued power throughout their lives, this was simply a ladder opened up for them to reach the sky!

Two days later, Yue Yang brought back Fatty Hai, Ye Kong, and Xue Tan Lang who were very intensely trained from the Conqueror City. Even Hui Tai Lang had a large Fine Gold Beast Bracelet made from the Liquid Crystal Di Yan.

The Battle Beasts contracted were not the most suitable for him at all. Hence,Hui Tai Lang did not contract with merely anyone, but instead contracted with the golden dragon that was determined to be Yue Yang’s mount in the future. The hapless golden dragon had previously been caught by Yue Yang from the town, thrown to Jun Wu You before being arranged to be displayed as a model in the Martial Arts Square. It thought that it could finally escape from its grasps, but who would have ever thought that .Although Yue Yang did not use Hui Tai Lang as his mount, the jealous wolf would definitely not allow any golden dragons to be his dearest Master’s mount. Therefore, he contracted with the golden dragon the first opportunity he got.

Did you want to be my Master’s mount?

Well, that’s not your job anymore because you are now my mount!

What could the golden dragon do? Hui Tai Lang was the most favored beast of Yue Yang. If he got angry, it was possible for him to swallow it in one bite. In addition, Hui Tai Lang spit out a cloud of ancient dragon flames to tempt the golden dragon, indicating that it should be an obedient little brother. Hui Tai Lang as your big brother will cover you; otherwise, you’ll become dog food… Finally, for the sake of that ancient dragon flame, the golden dragon lowered its pride and recognized him.

Although it was contracted to a dog, at any rate this dog was still an awesome world-destroying Demon Wolf. If the owner’s thighs can’t be held, then the owner’s beast’s legs must be embraced [2] !

T/N:[2] Implies if you can’t suck up to the one in charge, you should at least do so for the second-in-line.

“Hui Tai Lang, no way! You already have your Heaven Ranked Beast whereas this Lord is still empty-handed— what kind of logic is that? No, no, no, I better take action quickly. I have to find myself a beautiful Heaven Ranked Beast to keep, damn you!” Fatty Hai blushed with excitement and danced.

“Pretend that you don’t know about this stuff!” Ye Kong and Xue Tan Lang turned around tacitly.

“A beautiful Heaven Ranked Beast, was it? Who would have thought that you could still have such a disgusting mouth! Let me knock you back to your senses!” Wind Breath Seabird had evolved a human head at this time, but her legs were still bird feet. There was now an extra pair of wings behind her back and her strength was approaching the level of a Holy Beast as she spoke with extreme etiquette. However, her jealousy was soaring— she was the smartest Wind Breath Seabird, after all.

Poor Fatty Hai was beaten up all over again as Hui Tai Lang watched the fight. Feeling an urge to join in, he went over to beat up the guy as well.

Ye Kong and the others were used to it, so they all pretended not to see anything.

They were shocked to know that Yue Yang made the Beast Bracelet possible despite them owning the Summoning Grimoire. What does it mean to have one more war beast that directly communicated with the soul? It was equivalent to having one more Guardian Beast. Although the beast of the Beast Bracelet Contract was not as good as a proper Guardian Beast, it was very close.

Yue Yang didn’t make the process easy for them. First, he couldn’t find a suitable Heaven Ranked Beast Contract for the time being, and second, he wanted them to bring the Dragon Knights around here in the Soaring Dragon Continent.

“If you don’t have any contributions, you can’t do it. In other words, it’s also called walking out of the Tong Tian Tower. After you have trained to raise your level to the Heaven Ranks, you will take the initiative to help those who have potential and do your duty as a new generation of genius young warriors in the Tong Tian Tower. Training every day is not enough—you must combine work and rest or take a break. You have to wait until I challenge the 6th Valley, Demon Valley, before I take you to the Conqueror City!” Yue Yang arranged a mission for Fatty Hai. In fact, Fatty Hai, Ye Kong and the others have eager family members who wanted to see them after their long period of training. It was important because what would the world think if they did not participate in such a major event as the formation of the Dragon Knights?

“We understand,” Ye Kong listened to Yue Yang and never questioned him.

“Recently, it seems that a lot of people have come to the Conqueror City…” Before leaving, Xue Tan Lang revealed a piece of news to Yue Yang.

Unless they were from the Central Palace?

It’s impossible— the people of the Central Palace will definitely not infiltrate the Conqueror City. Could it be that the snake-haired demon man had discovered his identity? It’s also quite impossible. He clearly said he was waiting in White River City of the Heavenly Splendour Territory. Could it be that the Poisonous Queen Bee, Ryoma and the Sickle Weasel from Beast Valley led the tribe to vote?

Thinking of the snake-haired demon man, Yue Yang suddenly became interested.

This guy was an official descendant of the Four Major Families. He heard that the man was looking for Yue Yang as well. Perhaps it was a good thing then, since there was no need to seek him out himself and he could obtain a bit of information from him anyway.

Pondering again about the Mirror of Pain, a sub-divine artifact, Yue Yang wondered if it was related to one of the six artifacts?

In the Virgo Temple, Yi Nan had also obtained a Spiritual Mirror.

Maybe there was some connection between the two… The six artifacts have been lost for too long. HopefulLy, I can find some useful information through this trip! Thinking of this, Yue Yang immediately ran to find Princess Qian Qian, “Tigress, let’s go, let’s travel to the White River City of the Heaven Realm!”

“No, you and Sister Ye can go!” Princess Qian Qian refused.

“How sour! Tigress, you’re jealous!” Student Yue Yang used his invincible stalker skill.

“Not at all, I just need time to enlighten my sword. When I turn the Prison Emperor’s Divine Sword into my own Divine Sword, I will be able to go anywhere with you!” Princess Qan Qian hadn’t finished speaking, she had already let Yue Yang take it away, “I’m the best at that, so let’s go and study together… Ayy, Miss Xue, are you looking for me? Or the ancient rune sensed by the Storm Goddess? Wait for a bit, alright? Tigress and I will sign up to explore it!”

“Hey, don’t make decisions on my behalf!” Princess Qian Qian was angry.

“Let’s go!” Student Yue Yang pretended not to hear, but just grabbed Tigress’s little hand and held on to it.

She’s just angry now, so she’ll be okay after a while. Besides, she’s not really mad either!

[TL note]:

At this point there’s more new characters that are emerging so I’m kind of making the glossary instead of referring to it. I’ll try my best to provide them as accurately as I can, so let me know if any of the names seem awkward or don’t flow all that well!

At any rate, enjoy the chapter! Hope you guys have a great day/night ahead of you!

-Sterling

chapters.title: Chapter 905 Unintentional Enlightenment
chapters.body:
Chapter 905 Unintentional Enlightenment

Chapter 905: Unintentional Enlightenment

If Yue Yang didn’t go to White River City with Princess Qian Qian, he would have asked Xue Wu Xia to explore the ancient runes.

After all, a world of two was proven to be warmer than one.

But she was indeed invited.

If Princess Qian Qian was left behind and he just went out with Xue Wu Xia, Yue Yang estimated that Tigress would be so angry that she could not eat well and couldn’t sleep for three days and nights. Although the Tigress Princess Qian Qian was rather rogue, Yue Yang still loved the girl to death in his heart. So he grabbed Princess Qian Qiani’s little hand and didn’t let go.

“Okay, I’ll go alright?” Princess Qian Qian was not a fool as she could understand Yue Yang’s intentions.

“Tigress is so obedient!” Student Yue Yang was overjoyed when he heard this as that was what he was waiting for.

“The Third Young Master’s method of picking up girls is really clever. I’m impressed, so impressed…” Xue Wu Xia was slightly annoyed and couldn’t help but tease him. Yue Yang replied with a smile on his face, “Bro, I just want a meal, you know? Let me make a living!” When it came to tactics, who else could be as skilled as the Third Young Master of the Yue Clan? That said, Xue Wu Xia felt as if her fist was hitting against a lump of cotton. Feeling helpless against his charms, she had no choice but to reward him with an eye roll, which was regarded as forgiving him for the little protest before. Princess Qian Qian gave Xue Wu Xia a slightly apologetic look, saying that she didn’t intend to destroy their ‘two-person world’ and it was the kid who insisted on dragging her along.

Xue Wu Xia smiled indifferently.

This was nothing to her. If she didn’t want Princess Qian Qian to join them, she wouldn’t have waited until Yue Yang ‘blocked her way and invited her midway on their journey’.

It would be better for Tigress to follow us—there would only be improvement if there was competition. Luo Hua, Wu Hen, Yi Nan and the others were not deemed competition. Only someone who had the Six Records could compete with me— which was none other than Tigress!

At the 10th floor of the Tong Tian Tower.

Xue Wu Xia led the way to a unit world full of ice and snow.

In the entire unit world, there was no life and no vitality. Looking around, there was an endless snowy field.

All of the mountains and rivers were made of ice. There was no soil, no sand, no rocks and no life. The entire unit world was merely filled with heaps and chunks of ice!

“This world is weird, how did you find it?” The well-informed Yue Yang has never seen such a peculiar world of ice and snow. Even if it was cold, there would still be life in a normal ice-filled world. However, there were no signs of life here, not even ice elemental beasts or beings that would normally exist in an icy area. It was absolutely unimaginable.

“This was the case. Night Empress mentioned a book, saying that there were many miscellaneous books in the Innate Alliance. For example, there was a book that introduced strange things and strange stories recorded by different explorers from different eras. Elder Nan Gong was coincidentally going to the Soaring Dragon Continent as well, so I requested him to bring in some books. I did not go in depth about the other strange occurrences, but the description of this Ice World piqued my interests a lot. Hence, when you were refining the Beast Bracelets with Night Empress, I came here alone for an observation. I realised that here, there was an unexplainable type of ice energy present. And through three days and three nights of searching, accompanied by the Storm Goddess, we were finally able to find an ice mountain that is about 6000 kilometers from here. I suspect that there should be a Frost Type Ancient Rune there!” Xue Wu Xia explained about what had happened.

“With the Frost Type Ancient Rune, I believe you can be promoted to the Innate Supreme realm, but I don’t know when my time will come!” Princess Qian Qian couldn’t help but sigh. With the Prison Emperor’s Divine Sword in her hands, how could her progress be inferior to Xue Wu Xia?

“This is just luck!” Xue Wu Xia said that it had nothing to do with strength.

“Luck is also a part of strength.” Princess Qian Qian took a deep breath and put aside the problem in her heart. The stronger Xue Wu Xia was, the less likely would she concede defeat.

“Actually last time…” Yue Yang extorted a seemingly astonishing White Tiger Pearl from Lord Black Flame. He didn’t care about it, but when he was free, he used the Nirvana Flame to purify it and then used his Innate Sword Qi to finish the job. With a shock, he unlocked the seal and discovered that it turned out to be an Ultra Holy White Tiger Sacred Pearl.

Yue Yang deliberately took Princess Qian Qian to White River City of the Heaven Realm as he already had the intentions of initiating the Double Cultivation among the two in their own world.

It’s just that Xue Wu Xia’s plan to find the ancient runes postponed the plan slightly.

Princess Qian Qian not only knew that he had harvested Vulcan Soul Refining Herb, Di Gui Yin Flame and the Di Yan Ore, she was also aware that Yue Yang had successfully obtained a Duo Luo Pearl Necklace through blackmail.

Because she was too surprised that Yue Yang had managed to extract the Vulcan Soul Refining Herb, she didn’t pay attention to hearing that there was a White Tiger Pearl that was left behind.

At that time, Yue Yang didn’t realize that the unbelievable White Tiger Pearl was a Holy treasure, so he didn’t say much. It wasn’t until the research on the Beast Bracelet was successful that he had discovered its true appearance. With that, he also thought of giving Princess Qian Qian a surprise.

He was about to speak about the White Tiger Sacred Pearl when he felt that there was a sudden energy fluctuation.

It seemed like there was a certain power that extracted a trace of pure energy from the bodies of Yue Yang, Xue Wu Xia, and Princess Qian Qian. Among them, Xue Wu Xia, who possessed ice energy, had her power drawn the most, nearly taking 10% of it away. Princess Qian Qian came in second and Yue Yang’s energy was least absorbed because of his special physique. Even so, it was close to absorbing 1/1000 of his total energy.

“We are at a distance of 6000 kilometers away, yet it could still extract our strength?” Yue Yang was shocked.

“This, I am afraid, has surpassed the ordinary power of the Law!” Princess Qian Qian also felt that it was unfathomable. Extracting her energy was no big deal, but to be able to extract Yue Yang’s energy was shocking— he was an Innate Supreme after all!

“When you get to the destination, you will feel more emotional after reading it,” Xue Wu Xia smiled.

“Let’s go then!” Yue Yang originally wanted to use the Quintet Golden Puppet Mice to explore, but now he felt like it might be a wrong move. Being reluctant to summon the Quintet Golden Puppet Mice, he grasped onto the thin waists of the two women and used a large amount of his energy to teleport them in the direction where Xue Wu Xia was indicating towards.

In this kind of snowfield with almost no barriers to the plains, Yue Yang could cover the 6000 kilometer distance with just ten minutes of teleportation.

Teleporting for more than 600 kilometers per time.

After 60 or 70 teleportations, a majestic mountain with a height of 10,000 meters was in front of Yue Yang’s eyes.

The peak of the mountain was as sharp as a sword piercing the sky, seeming like it was making a crevice form in the sky. The whole mountain was made of ice and snow without a grain of sand, soil, grass or trees. The sky was cold and quiet as there was no trace of wind, whereas the snowy field on the ground produced layers of ripples that were made of heaps of snow waves. The strangest thing was that these snow wave ripples spread out from all around to the iceberg, constantly becoming a part of the iceberg as it increased in size and thickened.

When Yue Yang used his Heaven Eyes Transverse, he scanned with all his strength.

He found that the entire ice and snow world was like this as all of the cold energy was converging on this iceberg. He didn’t know how long it took to fill a mountain full of ice energy, but he guessed that it must have taken at least a few millennia to do so.

Why was there no life?

Because this iceberg will constantly absorb energy from the outside world. Hence, it was impossible for any life to survive here… Ordinary icebergs would not be like this, so there must be ancient runes here that were exerting their power—Xue Wu Xia’s previous judgment was correct. Now, the only problem was how to transform this ancient rune of the Frost Type, which has been around for millions of years, for his own use!

This was the hardest part.

However, if he succeeded in doing so, Xue Wu Xia would easily break through the Innate Supreme Realm and become the second person to break through after Yue Yang!

“Tsk!” Princess Qian Qian lifted the Prison Emperor’s Divine Sword, blessed with the power of the four directions, and slashed at the iceberg with all her strength.

The power of this sword could completely kill a heaven Ranked martial artist in seconds.

The Sword Qi soared.

The powerful slash of the blade directly split the space, as even the sky has drawn an invisible rift.

Under the gaze of Yue Yang and Xue Wu Xia, the Sword Qi of the Prison Emperor’s Divine Sword was brought down heavily onto the iceberg.

Boom!

The entire iceberg seemed to be shaking.

However, it turned out that Princess Qian Qian was discouraged… With such a powerful slash, not a trace of a scar was left behind. With her eyes, she carefully searched on the ice wall of the iceberg and found a small cut that had the thickness of a strand of hair. The scar was still a small scratch and it was slowly recovering! This iceberg was simply the ‘10,000 Years of Profound Ice’ formed from pure energy for millenia. Therefore, it was not an existence that could be shaken by humans!

“If this continues, we will have direct access to the core in another ten thousand years,” Princess Qian Qian felt powerless for the first time, seeing that the iceberg was too strong.

“Brute force definitely won’t work, we have to find a way,” Yue Yang has never been a person who solves problems purely with brute force.

“Perhaps, I can try to sense it from the bottom, but I need your Supreme Will to help,” Xue Wu Xia did not finish speaking before both Yue Yang and Princess Qian Qian strongly opposed. To sense that ancient rune with the will was extremely dangerous. Without caring whether or not it could be sensed, the energy of the ancient runes will regard this ‘sense’ as an attack. Then, it would immediately launch a counterattack, ranging from physical injury to severe annihilation of the soul.

“No, no! Even with my will to help, this is a stupid behavior,” Yue Yang refused, “There must be another way!”

“I’ll just give it a try. If it doesn’t work, we will all go back. It’s the best case scenario to have ancient runes, but I won’t risk it with everyone else’s lives,” Xue Wu Xia smiled at Yue Yang slightly. Yes, she was definitely eager to advance to the Supreme Innate realm, but she definitely didn’t want Yue Yang to take such a risk because of herself.

“If you want to try, I will try!” Yue Yang wouldn’t let her take the risks.

“Both of you calm down, this iceberg will not be going anywhere. We can slowly figure out a way because we have time,” Princess Qian Qian hurriedly persuaded, “If we can’t think of a way, then we’ll have a talk with the Night Empress and Zhi Zun to see if they have some good alternatives or suggestions. The method of sensing is not good indeed— the ancient runes are definitely not that easy to sense. What’s more is that it was now protected by the entire iceberg of 10000 Years of Profound Ice. Sit down, let’s think about it. In fact, why don’t we try something one by one or use World to absorb and fight for energy? It will be stronger than our brute force since it has limitless amounts of energy!”

The last sentence was like a flash of light, directly hitting the depths of Yue Yang’s mind.

Yue Yang trembled and looked at Princess Qian Qian as he yelled, “Wait, you-what did you just say? World? Are you talking about the World?”

Xue Wu Xia found it a little strange— she hadn’t thought about using World to absorb the energy through this method. However, the slow speed is a concern and she was afraid that it would not be effective even after ten thousand years. Yet, why was Yue Yang so excited? Was he going to borrow this method and come up with a suitable countermeasure?

She was as excited as she was speechless.

Her little hand gripped Yue Yang’s arm tightly, while on the other side, Princess Qian Qian stammered and replied, “Ah, I-I seem to be- that’s what I said, right? This method is not very good, either, I guess.It’s too slow, I know. Just now, it was just a sp-spur of the moment kind of statement. Wh-why are you looking at me like that? Did I say something right?”

“It’s so right!” Yue Yang hugged Princess Qian Qian tightly, patting her waist with his hand and kissed her excitedly, “Tigress, taking you along to have an adventure together was the right call. You inspired me, yes, your last sentence! I’m so stupid— I have always had one of the best ways, but I’ve been so useless. Oh wow, I’m such an idiot! It’s such a good plan, yet I have been idling like this. My goodness! If only I’d realised that earlier, things wouldn’t have turned out like this! Hahahaha, I’m lucky that you reminded me, Tigress!”

“I didn’t say anything!” Princess Qian Qian herself felt puzzled.

“Quick, speak up, what is the solution?” Xue Wu Xia couldn’t calm down now because she was already convinced that Yue Yang had really thought of a way to crack it. Besides, this was all because of the unintentional inspiration stated by the rogue Princess Qian Qian.

“This is how the plan works best… Before that, I would like to ask her first. You guys can go into the Grimoire World for a bit, I’ll be back soon!” Yue Yang couldn’t wait to let Xiao Wen Li take care of Xue Wu Xia and Princess Qian Qian. After introducing the Grimoire World, he circled the iceberg at a very fast speed, trying to collect as much information as possible.

Xiao Wen Li came out and nodded to indicate that she was ready.

Yue Yang picked up the little baby, “Come on, let’s go see mom again!”

[TL note]:

At this point there’s more new characters that are emerging so I’m kind of making the glossary instead of referring to it. I’ll try my best to provide them as accurately as I can, so let me know if any of the names seem awkward or don’t flow all that well!

At any rate, enjoy the chapter! Hope you guys have a great day/night ahead of you!

-Sterling

chapters.title: Chapter 906 Sixth Sense
chapters.body:
Chapter 906 Sixth Sense

Chapter 906: Sixth Sense

At the Black Hole Seal Space.

After listening to Yue Yang’s description, Fei Wen Li couldn’t help but exploit a wave of surprise that flashed in her eyes, despite trying her best to suppress it and not show it.

Finally, there was a chance to break free of this Black Hole Seal Space and see the sun again… Maybe this process will take some time.

It might not be able to come true in a day.

But she could finally see a flashing shimmer of hope!

For a long time, she didn’t speak either—she didn’t praise Yue Yang for this bold and amazing idea, nor did she express her gratitude through countless words of thanks. This was because she knew that both of them were one soul. No matter how moved she was, she didn’t need to use words to express it. In her heart, he could sense his true feelings, and he could fully understand her as well.

Empress Fei Wen Li opened her arms and hugged Yue Yang tightly.

Even Xiao Wen Li was affected by the emotional atmosphere as she reached out to hug Empress Fei Wen Li and Yue Yang, her small face happily leaned against their own. This was the first time that she had truly expressed a comfortable smile in this dark Black Hole Seal Space.

“If I was stronger, I wouldn’t need to use other’s powers to save you,” Yue Yang kissed fei Wen Li’s cheek apologetically. On her face, tears were streaming down, but the Black Hole Seal Space quickly absorbed it as the water droplets turned into nothingness and dissipated. As if to kiss away the remaining tears, Yue Yang kissed all the psychological shadows that resulted from the Empress Fei Wen Li being sealed… Actually, he had most hoped to rescue this conquering queen through his own power. But because he was unable to do so now, he had to rely on other sources of powers to help her.

“What a stupid thing to say—one day, you will surpass me for sure; it’s just a matter of time!” Empress Fei Wen Li comforted Yue Yang in turn, stroking Yue Yang’s tall nose with her white porcelain-white fingers. The slightly warm cherry lips of hers left a mark on his lips.

“Do you have any good suggestions?” Just after Yue Yang asked, he suddenly felt Xiao Wen Li tugging him downwards, anticipating with her little face tilted upwards.

He quickly bowed his head knowingly and kissed the child on the forehead.

To show that he was fair and would not favor one over the other.

Xiao Wen Li happily rewarded him with two resounding kisses. Only in front of Fei Wen Li would she opt to behave like a child with Yue Yang. To the outside world, she was the cold and ruthless killer, Xiao Wen Li.

Empress Fei Wen Li smiled as soon as she saw it,”You are going to spoil her!” However, she was happy to see this kind of warmth between them and even joined in as she pressed soft, butterfly kisses onto Xiao Wen Li’s brows and forehead, making the girl become shy before she stopped. After the small commotion, she once again resumed the momentum of The Conqueror Queen as she thought about Yue Yang’s questions, “If the situation is really as optimistic as you said, then, I think I am not in such a hurry to go out.”

When Yue Yang heard this, he was stunned, “What?”

Xiao Wen Li was also in a slight panic. Her little hand desperately pulled onto Fei Wen Li, hoping that she would change her mind.

Empress Fei Wen Li laughed, “I am trapped in this Black Hole Seal Space and I have been through enough suffering to know that it would be impossible for me to leave that easily! Maybe you can understand my point of view a little. Yes, that’s what I think— I want this Black Hole Seal Space to become my world! To be completely under the control of my will! Here, it used to be my prison; but if I have to resort to external forces to escape from here, it wouldn’t be relying on my skills, then…I am Fei Wen Li, the Queen of Conquest who is determined to conquer the entire Heaven Realm. If I leave like this, it means that this level will be my biggest and highest peak of my life. No, I will never be satisfied to be a Queen of Conquest; I want to be like you and become a higher being! I hope that I can be with you in the future, where we can climb a higher realm together, explore the limits of Divine Supremacy and explore the limits of martial arts. I hope that, like you, I can create the entire world and control everything at the same time one day!”

“This Black Hole Seal Space is my starting point. If I can’t even change it, then I won’t think about anything else. Escaping is no longer my biggest goal!” Fei Wen Li not only recovered her former aura, her beliefs and ideals have become more lofty because of Yue Yang’s thought resonance.

“I understand, but…” Yue Yang certainly understood Empress Fei Wen Lii’s ambition, but still, he hoped that she would go out soon.

“Even if my attempt fails this time, with your entry, I believe it will soon save me,” Fei Wen Li smiled with confidence.

“Okay, you persuaded me,” Yue Yang was moved by Empress Fei Wen Li’s bold vision. She really deserved to bear the identity of the Queen of Conquerors; her thoughts were even more braver and more daring than his!

“You would do the same if the one stuck in here was you as both of us have a fearlessness factor in our blood. With your support, well, I decided that I’m going to go all out. I will not lose to this Black Hole Seal Space again! This cage will definitely become a world of ice and snow that is under my control— it will be my paradise and my home!” Empress Fei Wen Li’s eyes flashed with an unshakable resolve of light as she clenched her fist with one hand. Her oath was only heard by Yue Yang and Xiao Wen Li.

10,000 years ago, on the day she set foot into the Heaven Realm, she too, had swore an indestructible oath.

After that vow was issued.

She became the Conqueror Queen that was feared by the entire Heaven Realm.

In front of the iceberg.

When Yue Yang left the Black Hole Seal Space and returned to the outside world, he summoned Princess Qian Qian and Xue Wu Xia from the Grimoire World and told them everything.

“So that’s how everything came to be!” Xue Wu Xia and Princess Qian Qian suddenly realized.

“What do you two have to add?” Yue Yang asked the two women for their opinions again. Their delicate supplements were the basis for the perfect implementation of the plan.

“One, if you guide the energy of the iceberg into the Black Hole Seal Space, would there be any sort of danger directed towards yourself?” Xue Wu Xia felt that if this action would pose a risk for Yue Yang, then she wouldn’t agree to it no matter how precious the ancient runes in the iceberg were. Besides, she believed that Empress Fei Wen Li would not pass. Empress Fei Wen Li was trapped inside and she didn’t know anything about the outside world, so she had to ask for everyone’s sake. After Yue Yang nodded seriously and confirmed that there was no danger, Xue Wu Xia let out a sigh of relief and asked the second question, “Second, are you working alone on this, or do you need us to cooperate with you?”

“It’s enough to have the two of you, I don’t want too many people to know about this,” Yue Yang didn’t want to disturb the people in the Soaring Dragon Continent. He didn’t even want Si-niang to worry about him either.

“Third, according to the estimated time, if it takes too long, I would suggest putting it down temporarily,” Xue Wuxia looked at Yue Yang.

“I can’t predict this, because I can’t imagine what the rate of absorption in the Black Hole Seal Space is like. It could take a second or it could take a year— I can’t judge this,” Yue Yang shook his head. For this prediction, he couldn’t offer a standard answer.

“Let me try…” Princess Qian Qian, who was silent on the side, took the initiative.

With the Six Records, it wasn’t only her features that were heightened, she also possessed the strongest sixth sense among the women of the world.

Although she seldom used it, especially since she practically never used her sixth senses on Yue Yang, she was more willing to be a glaring Tigress towards him, but it didn’t mean that her sixth senses had been weakened. On the contrary, under the World Tree, for someone who got a glimpse of the Divine Realm in the spiritual sublimation of cultivation together with Yue Yang, the biggest increase of her powers were her sixth senses.

With the absence of a clue, her intuition and her sixth senses were even more accurate than anything else.

Today, this is the first time that she has grandly sensed Yue Yang.

In order to increase her power, Princess Qian Qian kissed Yue Yang like there was no tomorrow, taking advantage of his energy and soul blending realm to improve to carry out the strongest premonition.

Their Linked Heart Knot was like a Sword Qi.

Soaring in its element.

All kinds of mysterious patterns were woven in a beautiful and endless way. When Princess Qian Qian opened her eyes and withdrew from her sixth senses, she did not speak and stayed still for a few seconds.

“Tigress, what’s the matter with you?” Yue Yang was shocked. When she had a premonition in her mind, she would not allow herself to share it with the others. On the contrary, she was trying to shoulder it alone. Could this incident cause any harm to her? This seems unlikely, right?

“Ah, I’m okay. I feel that the iceberg will crack and Sister Xue will definitely benefit from it. Things will exceed our imagination, but it seems like I’m going to cry… Is it excitement? Well, forget it; we are not in danger, so it must be something good!” Princess Qian Qian told the truth, not hiding anything from Yue Yang and Xue Wu Xia. The two looked at each other and were puzzled— what did the iceberg cracking and the mission being successful beyond imagination have anything to do with her crying? Besides, Qian Qian was very strong; she seems to seldom cry, right?

“Let’s take a break first. When you feel better, we’ll just try to feel it again,” Yue Yang felt sorry for this Tigress. He was feeling a bit apologetic towards her, but ultimately, he decided to handle things carefully.

Anyway, this matter can’t be handled in a hurry, so it’s better to let it go first.

Perhaps after the rest, there will be more and clearer feelings!

Xue Wu Xia also opened her own Book of Truth, but she didn’t get anything from it. It seems that she needed Qian Qian’s sixth sense to have a premonition that is above all else!

Facing the Wan Ren Iceberg, Yue Yang, Xue Wu Xia and Princess Qian Qian forcefully suppressed their excitement. Under its feet, they set up a small tent and laid side by side with their adjacent hands holding onto each other. The energy was quietly communicated and at the same time, it was quietly sensed, hoping that when the aura appeared again, so it could be successfully captured.

It wasn’t until the darkening night that Yue Yang was the first to break free from that kind of induction.

The young slave of the Grimoire World had prepared dinner and hot water for Yue Yang and the two mistresses.

She couldn’t help Yue Yang in the battle, but in life, she took care of him meticulously, trying not to let him be distracted in these aspects. After returning to the Grimoire World, Yue Yang put aside all his previous worries. Xue Wu Xia and Princess Qian Qian also nodded to him, fully supporting his next plan.

The three had a feast before they took another comfortable hot bath.

The mood and physical condition have been adjusted to the most optimal.

The two women looked at each other and smiled behind Yue Yang, one by one, catching up to his big hand.

It might be a difficult project to guide the energy of this Ice World into the Black Hole Seal Space. However, they were determined to help him complete it. No matter how the sixth sense felt like, they would go all out and cooperate with him to accomplish this unprecedented feat! As for ancient runes, that was no longer the first goal.

“It must be successful!” Yue Yang sensed the feelings of the two women as he raised his hands high. He cheered for the both of them, also cheering for himself at the same time.

“Definitely!” The two women were both emotional, nodding firmly as they echoed affirmatives in unison.

This was the first time Yue Yang had challenged the Black Hole Space Seal…what will happen?

[TL note]:

At this point there’s more new characters that are emerging so I’m kind of making the glossary instead of referring to it. I’ll try my best to provide them as accurately as I can, so let me know if any of the names seem awkward or don’t flow all that well!

At any rate, enjoy the chapter! Hope you guys have a great day/night ahead of you!

-Sterling
