chapters.title: Chapter 907 Black Hole, Broken Ice, Martial Spirit
chapters.body:
Chapter 907 Black Hole, Broken Ice, Martial Spirit

Chapter 907: Black Hole, Broken Ice, Martial Spirit

Yue Yang knew of the horror of the Black Hole Seal Space, but he didn’t expect it to be this much of a hassle.

Xue Wu Xia and Princess Qian Qian were also terrified.

Taking the Creation Domain as a guide and the Grimoire as the basis, Yue Yang originally thought to use World as a support, but he never expected the Black Hole Seal Space would collapse. The iceberg that couldn’t be scratched despite Princess Qian Qian using the Prison Emperor’s Divine Sword against, disappeared in an instant within the range of the Black Hole Space Seal by Yue Yang. Fortunately, the Black Hole Seal Space only appeared within the scope of Yu Yang’s Domain and it did not exceed his reigns of control. Therefore, once Yue Yang’s miniscule Power of the Law disappeared, the Black Hole Seal Space entrance immediately disappeared.

Xue Wu Xia and Princess Qian Qian, who were standing thousands of meters away, turned pale with fright.

Even if Yue Yang stopped the small Power of the Law and the Black Hole Seal Space disappeared, their hands could not stop shaking immediately!

“That was terrifying!” Princess Qian Qian, who was not afraid of anything besides the possibility of Yue Yang ignoring her, was scared to the point where she cried. When Yue Yang walked over, she hugged him tightly, as if he would be swallowed by the black hole if she just let go.

“Was she always staying in such a terrible space all this time?” Xue Wu Xia felt that Empress Fei Wen Li was really an unimaginable superwoman.

To change to someone else, she stayed in the Black Hole Seal Space all the time.

Even if I didn’t die there, I would have gone crazy long ago!

Princess Qian Qian and Xue Wu Xia only felt relieved after they made sure that Yue Yang was safe and sound.

Although frightened, they finally came to a conclusion that Yue Yang’s idea was completely feasible. The only question was— how long could his will and energy be supported? Yue Yang must be in the Supreme Realm and use the small Power of the Law to guide the Black Hole Seal Space. In other words, he must maintain the state of’ challenging’ the Black Hole Seal Space…Although it was completely harmless to him, he must maintain the Supreme Realm for a long time while constantly using the small Power of the Law,. This meant that it would pose a certain degree of difficulty for Yue Yang.

After repeated arguments, Xue Wu Xia and Princess Qian Qian succeeded in persuading Yue Yang for the first time.

They also wanted to stand beside Yue Yang and help him.

Will the Black Hole Seal Space hurt them? Although Yue Yang was unwilling to take the risks, the two women felt that there was no need to think about it. As long as they and Yue Yang maintain the Double Cultivation of their hearts and souls, the Black Hole Seal would definitely feel that the three are one and would not harm them— the same way it didn’t harm Yue Yang.

The Black Hole Seal Space was a manifestation of the Will and Divine Power of the strong in ancient times. Although it was infinitely powerful, it was not an intelligent embodiment after all.

It was incapable of thoughts and corrections.

It was just a strict implementation of the rules established by its master’s will!

“Even if we are imprisoned, we are only locked up with Empress Fei Wen Li, so I am not worried. Her Majesty Empress Fei Wen Li will be able to come out soon, anyways!” Princess Qian Qian said generously, but she got a bit shy afterwards. She looked at Xue Wu Xia and looked at Yue Yang again before her face flushed, making her hide behind him. She was afraid that if she hugged Yue Yang from the front, her frame would encounter ‘something’. Then, she would lose her mindset and withdraw from the resonance of the heart and soul connection of the Double Cultivation.

“Although no one is going to come, we still have to be careful,” Xue Wu Xia summoned the General Blizzard Goddess and tasked her to guard the trio.

Princess Qian Qian was behind as she hugged Yue Yang’s waist.

Xue Wu Xia was in front, the two of their faces facing each other quite closely. With her tender body in his arms, her hands wrapped around his head and neck. Their lips touched and she quickly entered the best state of Double Cultivation for lovers. Slightly slower than her was none other than Princess Qian Qian who was a little shy. Yet, she also blended in with his mind, revolving around the world of Double cultivation.

There were not many people who remained a three-way Double Cultivation, however, it was definitely possible to do so as there were such cases in the past.

And not only with Xue Wu Xia did so, Princess Qian Qian, Luo Hua, Wu Hen and the others have tried it as well. Pairing together was not much of a problem when it came to compatibility.

Of course, because the hearts and souls of the three people were merging together, this meant that the three of them laid bare naked together. It was to ensure that there wouldn’t be any barriers between them as no secret could remain hidden, which was why it was inevitable to have small instances of awkwardness. Xue Wu Xia focused on the cultivation and rarely ever lost track of her concentration. According to Princess Qian Qian’s point of view, Xue Wu Xia was considered the best in that aspect. If it was with Sky Law, Hai Lan or the others, they would have definitely started to fluctuate. The urge to take the next step and deepen their cultivation between lovers as husband and wife— now that was the epitome of awkwardness.

Princess Qian Qian felt that Yue Yang had begun to gather the small Power of the Law and hurriedly stopped her distracting thoughts.

The Black Hole Seal Space reappeared.

Under the slow command of Yue Yang’s Will, the small Power of the Law in the Creation Domain was constantly changing in various shapes and the seal swallowed in various forms, preventing this small Power of the Law from having any possibility of escaping.

The small Power of the Law being swallowed up by the Black Hole Seal Space was not the actual motive of the movement.

In the Creation Domain, various deformations within a hundred meters that would lead the Black Hole to seal various changes were the effects Yue Yang wanted most.

The iceberg that the sword couldn’t penetrate disappeared gradually along with the various changes of the Black Holke Seal Space. The iceberg had experienced thousands of years of ice compression, so even if a piece of ice was broken, there was also a huge amount of energy that had been accumulated. Should it burst out, the power alone was enough to destroy an entire city. However, even a block of ice as large as a hundred meters being swallowed by the seal of the Black Hole was like a clay-sculpted cow entering the sea [1] .

T/L Note: [1] Means if you put a sculpted clay into sea, it wouldn’t return as it would deform and become mud, merging with the water. Implies something that wouldn’t return or a pointless move.

Ten minutes later, when Yue Yang and the two women stopped taking a break, the three people were shocked to discover how terrifying their ‘achievements’ were.

The iceberg over a kilometer was swallowed up.

The Black Hole Seal Space showed no signs of filling up.

Sometimes, it really gave one the illusion that it would never be filled up, and any energy entering it would result in eternal disappearance.

But logic told Yue Yang that it was absolutely possible for the Black Hole Seal Space to be filled with energy. It’s just a matter of how much— maybe it would overflow without filling the ice of the entire iceberg, or perhaps the entire unit world of ice wouldn’t even fill 1/100 of it.

All of this was possible due to how powerful the strong man who sealed Empress Fei Wen Li was.

The stronger the predecessor, the more energy was needed to fill in the space.

“Master, you have worked hard, so drink some water. The two mistresses should also have some water and take a break!” Returning to the Grimoire World, the young slave hurriedly gave some water for Yue Yang, who was both mentally and physically worn out through the copious amounts of sweat.

“It can’t go on like this…” Princess Qian Qian felt that ten minutes was the limit, but an iceberg with the range of a kilometer would not even reach one ten thousandth of the entire iceberg, which meant that the amount of energy required by the Black Hole Seal Space was absolutely hard to imagine. She felt that this way of approach was right, but to find a better way, they must increase the efficiency of the progress.

“We take turns to cooperate. If it’s possible, I think we should first try to collect the cold energy outside,” Xue Wu Xia proposed a concept that could literally go out of control.

“Do you mean to deliberately let the Black Hole Seal Space exceed the control range of the Creation Domain?” Yue Yang felt that it seemed to spark a small glimmer of hope.

“Yes, when we are resting, you can try this. This unit world has no life even if it was to be destroyed, anyways,” Xue Wu Xia’s idea was also made after careful consideration.

“Then let’s hurry up and adjust,” Yue Yang was very tired. He fell asleep as soon as he closed his eyes. The young slave who was massaging his eyes flushed with redness coloured around her orbs as she nearly shed a few tears.

After one hour.

Xue Wu Xia and Princess Qian Qian were almost done recovering.

But Yue Yang hadn’t woken up yet. His physical strength was okay, it was just that he had been over-using the small Power of the Law before, causing his overdraft spirit to be unable to completely adjust to the best state. Although she saw the others walking over, the young slave who was keeping watch by the bed couldn’t bear to wake Yue Yang immediately.

In her heart, it was her duty to let him sleep even for an extra second.

Xue Wu Xia sighed slightly when she saw the young slave’s current dilemma.

How could you not feel sorry for this bad guy?

However, if he doesn’t wake him up on time, he will definitely get angry if he wakes up on his own.

“Or maybe, you can let me do my best to pitch in!” This sentence was said by Pandora, who had awakened from her sleep in the young slave’s body.

“But it seems a bit cold outside…” The latter sentence was said by the shy young slave. Xue Wu Xia and Princess Qian Qian felt the heat flush on their faces as they all understood what Pandora meant. It basically meant that she wanted to help Yue Yang with the Dual Cultivation between husband and wife. With her, the former Goddess of Doom, whether it came down to Yue Yang’s spiritual recovery or the control of the Law’s power, he will get the greatest improvement.

“It seems that I haven’t done it on the ice and snow before. Young slave, let’s try it; it will be very exciting!” Pandora got excited, actively reaching out for his body and wanting to hug him with her hands, whereas the young slave was a tad more reluctant as she resisted, “That’s not good, isn’t it? Let the master and mistress rest again.”

She resisted, keeping her hands as still as possible. With her big watery eyes, she sneaked a glance at Xue Wu Xia and Princess Qian Qian to see if they were going to agree.

Princess Qian Qian coughed, turned her head and pretended that she saw nothing.

Xue Wu Xia knew that the young slave was very good.obedient.

If she didn’t agree, even if she let Pandora control her body, she would feel uneasy, so she just smiled and nodded to her. The young slave bowed to Xue Wu Xia as if she received a pardon and covered her red face with her hands. This was her last natural reaction. From within, she let go of her joy and the control of her body, allowing Pandora to maneuver her hands to hug Yue Yang.

The young slave naturally wanted to help her master as she felt distressed when she saw his exhausted look.

Now that Xue Wu Xia agreed to it, she would naturally feel ashamed and moved at the same time.

Holding Yue Yang, she left the Grimoire World quickly.

“This kid is really gorgeous…” Princess Qian Qian couldn’t help being a little bit jealous.

“Ah, I agree,” Xue Wu Xia seldom agrees with Tigress’ words, but today she feels that she was right.

The two women were preparing to go back to their rooms to continue to rest and adjust their status.

Suddenly, she saw the young slave running back all over as she was entirely naked. The unparalleled huge swaying posture made Princess Qian Qian and the other wife, as women, become unable to refrain themselves from screaming in jealousy.

The young slave didn’t realize this at all as she flushed with excitement, “The two mistresses, Pandora, she said that it seems like there is a God who has lost consciousness sealed inside… You fool, wait until we are done. It’s okay to come back and tell them after we’re done; you don’t have to be so impatient at all!” The latter sentence was naturally Pandora’s helpless sigh.

When the young slave reacted and realized that she was completely bare, she immediately screamed.

She was so scared that she ran away panicking.

She even tripped over herself.

She threw herself at the door with a ‘plop’. Afraid that Xue Wu Xia and Princess Qian Qian would come over to help, she hurriedly got up, “It doesn’t hurt, it doesn’t hurt; the two mistresses, this young slave will leave. The master is still out there sleeping without anyone to watch over him, it’s my fault for being irresponsible…”

Xue Wu Xia and Princess Qian Qian looked at each other as they both shook their heads and laughed.

With such a cute little maid, sometimes, it was hard to be mad!

[TL note]:

At this point there’s more new characters that are emerging so I’m kind of making the glossary instead of referring to it. I’ll try my best to provide them as accurately as I can, so let me know if any of the names seem awkward or don’t flow all that well!

At any rate, enjoy the chapter! Hope you guys have a great day/night ahead of you!

-Sterling

chapters.title: Chapter 908 Explode, Three Swords, The Truth
chapters.body:
Chapter 908 Explode, Three Swords, The Truth

Chapter 908: Explode, Three Swords, The Truth

Three days later.

The towering iceberg had swallowed one-tenth of the Black Hole Seal Space, looking a bit like a ferocious monster that had its mouth open.

The huge ice wall allowed Yue Yang to open up a 10,000-meter-long tunnel of ice crystals, extending the tunnel to the center of the iceberg. The Black Hole Seal Space was still as terrifying as before and it looked impossible to be filled up. Yue Yang entered the space, only to find that earth-shattering changes had taken place inside as there were melted pieces of 10,000 Years of Profound Ice that were floating everywhere. Without the will of Empress Fei Wen Li, these 10,000 Years of Profound Ice would probably have taken a mere minute for it to disappear entirely. However, under the Will of Empress Fei Wen Li, even a small piece of the ice required a few minutes to completely melt and disappear, let alone the pieces that stretched out for a couple hundred meters.

Turning the Black Hole Seal Space into her world of ice and snow was what Empress Fei Wen Li had previously sworn to carry out.

With Yue Yang helping out, she could have plenty of time and energy to receive those 10,000 Years of Profound Ice that had been engulfed which was too late to melt. Then, she could transform them out of the control of ancient runes into the ice energy controlled by her own mind.

The more Empress Fei Wen Li’s energy was consumed by the space, the more her assimilation would be allowed.

Prior to this, the energy of Empress Fei Wen Li had been entirely engulfed by it.

Now with the 10,000 Years of Profound Ice that Yue Yang continuously supplied from the outside, Empress Fei Wen Li gradually became determined to challenge the sealing power of the Black Hole Seal Space.

“Is the martial spirit lost?” After hearing what Yue Yang described, Empress Fei Wen Li also felt that things were a little weird, “Except for the Gods’ Ruins, I haven’t heard of any other places where the Gods have been buried! Also, I am afraid that the Godhead will disappear and Divine Consciousness will not disappear easily. This situation happens to be reversed, so I am also rather confused!”

“Pandora is very sure,” Yue Yang also doubted it slightly, but he still believed in Pandora’s judgment. After all, she was the former Goddess of Doom.

“In that way… you have to be careful and pay attention to the hidden spirits’ counterattacks,” Empress Fei Wen Li still exhorted.

“If that’s the case, it can be used to test the sword,” Yue Yang has been promoted to the Supreme Realm, and the power of the three swords— Hidden Return, Splendid Frost and Perfect Night has greatly increased. Paired with the World Exterminating Wheel, Eternal Wheel, and even the Nirvana Flame, Yue Yang was confident that he was not afraid of the ‘spiritual consciousness’ that had concealed a sneak attack. Once a God’s body was lost, it would not recover its original power no matter how powerful they were.

“You look more confident now than you did before!” Empress Fei Wen Li praised Yue Yang slightly.

Now, Yue Yang has two plans of implementation.

When Xue Wu Xia and Princess Qian Qian cooperated with him through the Double Cultivation methods, he would use the Creation Realm to guide the engulfing of the space. This method would be controlled by Yue Yang’s Will. Though the scope was not large as a range of one kilometer would be absorbed at most, it was tiring enough to sustain that.

The second plan was for the young slave to cooperate with Yue Yang in the Double Cultivation between husband and wife, Pandora, present in her body, was tasked to guide the Divine Consciousness.

Although the Divine Body and Divine Status no longer existed, her purified Divine Power and Divine Consciousness from the Goddess of Doom still retained its infinite power, which could be expanded by thousands of times in Yue Yang’s body.

At this time, Yue Yang adopted the out-of-control method proposed by Xue Wu Xia.

Which was to guide and expand the sealed space of the Black Hole as much as possible—the larger the expansion, the better.

Then, Yue Yang would give up control and let the Black Hole Seal Space disappear into this unit world by itself. The result of this was that the Black Hole would not only tear the surrounding ice and snow energy, but would also directly tear apart and engulf the space. If Yue Yang doesn’t escape fast enough, it would be extremely difficult as it is easy to be affected by the fragmentation of the space at the moment he intends to pull away. Fortunately, the most terrifying power of the seal would not harm Yue Yang; otherwise, this plan was absolutely not up for discussion!

And this scheme had another disadvantage.

Because the Black Hole Seal Space would disappear too quickly, it might not be able to completely engulf the iceberg with thousands of years of cold energy and would not be very effective in destroying the iceberg.

However, this kind of out-of-control method of attracting the ice and snow on the ground was an unimaginable method.

Yue Yang teleported out into an open space and implemented this kind of scheme.

As a result, the energy of ice and snow covering a radius of tens of kilometers was swallowed in an instan. Even the space was torn to shreds, which could not be bridged for a long time.

Ten days later.

The situation was safe and sound.

Yue Yang, who had just completed the work that day, had just teleported back from a distance with the young slave, was shocked that at the foot of the iceberg, the Blizzard Goddess was fighting with someone.

Princess Qian Qian screamed repeatedly, the Prison Emperor’s Divine Sword pointed directly towards the sky.

“What’s the matter?” Yue Yang found that Xue Wu Xia fell to the ground with a heavy injury. There was red blood overflowing all over and her lips were tainted with the same blood. He was so distressed to see her in this state as he made it over to where she laid in a giant step, tightly hugging the trembling Lady Xue in his arms.

Taking her into his arms, Yue Yang felt astonished that her whole body was as cold as a ball of ice for thousands of years.

At the same time, she discovered that this cold energy was not her body’s out-of-control energy, but an inexplicable cold energy invasion.

Who was it that could sneak into Xue Wu Xia, who possessed the Realm of Divine Consciousness? Yue Yang raised his head angrily, looked at the battlefield being fiercely intense and found a golden shadow sealed in the iceberg, thinking of using ice as an attacking soldier. It attacked Princess Qian Qian who was soaring in the air and created an ice chain with firm intentions, securely binding the Blizzard Goddess.

The iceberg at this time was not like how it was before. At some point, a peculiar Power of Law seemed to be evident inside, almost as if it was guarding its inner existence.

Was there an actual human being sealed inside the iceberg?

It’s strange though— how could it hide from my Heaven Eyes Transverse and Xue Wu Xia’s Book of Truth?

Princess Qian Qian’s Six Records— her strongest sixth senses and even Pandora, who had the irrefutable ability to predict death itself, could not so much as sense the guy? Who is this person?

Countless questions flashed through Yue Yang’s mind, but before he could think, Xue Wu Xia’s injury had already roused his soaring anger. No matter who the opponent is, whether it is a god or a human, as long as someone dared to hurt his woman, he wouldn’t let go of them!

“Kill!”

The three swords—Black Hidden Return, White Splendid Frost and Red Perfect Night were instantaneously gathered and summoned.

An angry Yue Yang, under the stimulation of the wounds of his beloved woman, instantly fell into a state of rampage.

He soared into the sky, passing the equally angry Princess Qian Qian and the Blizzard Goddess. He completely ignored the thousands of chains of Profound Ice shot by the opponent, lifting up the sword of Perfect Night and cutting it down with one strike. Forcibly, he cut the chain of the Profound Ice that was shaped like a torrent of thousands of paths and split a hole in them.

Across an unknowingly thick ice wall, the red-eyed Yue Yang yelled out a cry in fury.

With the Supreme Will Sword of Hidden Return, he broke into the wall. Princess Qian Qian, who was behind him, became dumbfounded. Before that, no matter how much she used the Prison Emperor’s Divine Sword to break it, she couldn’t make a holed in the Ten Thousand Years Ice Wall. Now Yue Yang, because of his anger, actually smashed the ice wall with a single slash of his sword, causing at least a collapse of whatever was in a kilometer range and through a burst of the explosion wave that spanned for more than ten meters itself. This was not over yet. Yue Yang, who has run wild, had retained none of his previous rationality at all as he did not consider anything at all. No matter how thick the ice wall was or how deep the opponent was hidden in the ice wall, he couldn’t care less about it. Dominated by the heart of anger, he continued to strike with his third sword!

White Splendid Night!

If White Splendid Night was used to attack the kind and selfless women like Liu Ye, Yue Yu, and Si-niang, then the sword would be powerless and it might even help them instantly recover to their best condition.

However, if it was used to attack evil and filthy monsters, then the White Splendid Night was the most powerful existence in the world.

Nothing can be compared to its lethality!

Yue Yang’s right hand stabbed the blade on the cracked ice wall.

The White Splendid Night does not only attack the ice on the surface like the Black Hidden Return nor was it refracted by ice crystals. It even ignored the influence of the looming power of the Law and entered directly through the wall itself. Like a lightsaber, it hit the golden shadow in the ice stealthily. The golden shadow stagnated for a while before it suddenly disappeared, as if it had never appeared before as it no longer existed.

Xue Wu Xia was impacted with a brute attack and she fainted, whereas Yue Yang couldn’t find the enemy for a while. With the help of the Black Hidden Return and the Red Perfect Night, he smashed and obliterated a lot of the ice.

Finally, he returned with a sour bitterness.

“Strange, she is fine, but there is some kind of power fusing…” Princess Qian Qian hugged Xue Wu Xia early on and checked on her body only to find that her injuries were not caused by a sneak attack. Yue Yang got out of his state of rage and was exhausted, and almost didn’t manage to sit down on the snow. He held back his fatigue and took over the care of Xue Wu Xia. When he forced the pure Innate Sword Qi into her body, he found that her injury had already improved. If it weren’t for the blood stains on her lips, it seemed as if she had never been injured. The most important thing was that Yue Yang also discovered the same situation. Xue Wu Xia’s body had a certain energy fusing going on, and this energy turned out to be exactly the same as her original extreme cold ice power.

“Pandora, what can you see?” Yue Yang found that his Heaven Eyes Transverse had no role to play for the first time, so he had to look to Pandora for answers.

“Maybe I made a mistake before; there was not only one Divine Seal in the iceberg…maybe there are two Divine Seals in it, but one has already beaten the other to dissipate the Divine Consciousness. However, the Gods’ remaining last wishes are still suppressing each other,” Pandora, who was in the slave’s body, couldn’t figure out the truth so she had to guess.

“What should I do now to get rid of the remaining ‘God’?” Yue Yang just wanted to find the answer.

Man or God, as long as one dared to hurt his own woman, they would die!

Pandora hesitated a little and shook her head, “I can’t see through it, but maybe this is a good thing. Although I can only bring misfortune,there is also a strong retrograde feeling for good luck.”

Yue Yang was about to faint— was it a good thing that Xue Wu Xia injured the enemy?

Had it not been for Pandora, the former Goddess of Doom, who was speaking, Yue Yang would have thought she was a lunatic!

The enemy was reclusive.

I want to kill it, but I can’t find it.

Yue Yang had no choice but to bring Xue Wu Xia back to the Grimoire World, but in this way, the energy that obviously had a beneficial effect on her would be cut off. He was discussing with Princess Qian Qian and had to come out with her, trying to stay as far away from the iceberg to prevent the ‘golden shadow’ trapped in it from sneaking another preemptive attack.

After waiting day and night, Xue Wu Xia’s long eyelashes trembled slightly.

She finally woke up.

Before she opened her eyes completely, she screamed, “Don’t hit me, don’t hit me, don’t make a move…”

Yue Yang felt very distressed and hugged her tightly, “Don’t be afraid! With me here, no one will hurt you; Wu Xia, don’t be afraid!”

When she was fully awake and saw that the person in front of her was Yue Yang, she suddenly smiled and laughed, causing both Yue Yang and Princess Qian Qian to feel a rather complex flurry of emotions. Did Xue Wu Xia go insane? Why is she still laughing after being sneaked upon? This is insanely confusing!

“Don’t worry, I didn’t go crazy and my head is definitely not dysfunctional!” Xue Wu Xia’s porcelain arms wrapped around Yue Yang’s neck, suppressing her excitement as much as possible as she smiled at the surprised Yue Yang and Princess Qian Qian, “Actually, no one attacked at all. I… yes, I found the enemy, but it wasn’t that guy who injured me… Wait a minute, let me say, it’s actually very simple— I sensed the seal and the enemy wanted to tempt me to attack the seal, but I already sensed that it was revealed by the Law of another Divine Power, so I took the energy back. In other words, I was injured by the force of the thoughts that I attacked with. Don’t attack the enemy— otherwise, that guy will take the opportunity to escape!”

“You should have said it earlier…” Yue Yang sweated profusely as the iceberg had been largely ruined.

[TL note]:

At this point there’s more new characters that are emerging so I’m kind of making the glossary instead of referring to it. I’ll try my best to provide them as accurately as I can, so let me know if any of the names seem awkward or don’t flow all that well!

At any rate, enjoy the chapter! Hope you guys have a great day/night ahead of you!

-Sterling

chapters.title: Chapter 909 This, Was The Real Him!
chapters.body:
Chapter 909 This, Was The Real Him!

Chapter 909: This, Was The Real Him!

“But what was up with you continuing to absorb the energy fusion?” Princess Qian Qian still pondered.

“In the iceberg, there was indeed an ancient rune inside and it had the same attributes as mine. It was calling me!” Xue Wu Xia raised his hand slightly, whereas both Yue Yang and Princess Qian Qian could see the ice and snow energy gradually condensing within her.

Although it was very faint, it could be said with certainty that Xue Wu Xia had the qualifications to control the cold energy of this world.

As long as she fully integrated the ancient rune in the depths of the iceberg, there was a high probability of success.

By then, she will master the entire Unit World!

Yue Yang was first happy, but then another worry arose— according to the current situation, he was 80% sure that that ancient rune was the basic existence that sealed the enemy. Without it, the strong enemy would have broken out of the ice. Princess Qian Qian looked at Xue Wu Xia to see what she could do.

Xue Wu Xia, who knew what the two of them were thinking about, smiled and shook her head, “Although the ancient runes are good, I didn’t merge with them unless they were 100% capable of contributing to our victory. I have merged ancient runes and it takes at least a period of time to undergo the process of sublimation. Hence, I won’t be able to aid you in this entire battle. I will not ask you to risk your lives because of my own needs. Even the release of such a terrifying enemy in the iceberg was not a good thing for the entire Tong Tian Tower! “

Yue Yang objected, “To obtain the ancient rune is a must, but we have to think of a way to do that!”

From a distance, something seemed to appear out of the dark.

A voice full of Divine Coercion resounded in the minds of Yue Yang, Xue Wu Xia, and Princess Qian Qian silently, but it felt like a thunderbolt was ringing in their ears, deafening their hearing.

If it hadn’t been for Yue Yang who had the Supreme Will and it was someone ordinary, one would kneel down in fright and worship the gods even if the coercion didn’t.

A clear and unquestionable voice sounded, “Even if you want to refuse, how can you refuse my gift from the ‘Red Sky River’? Poor ants like you will never understand the difference between a human and a God! Don’t think that by raising the sword in your hand and breaking one or two pieces of broken ice that you can jump out of the pitiful realm of mortals! Humble lowlives, you will always be frogs at the bottom of the well!”

Yue Yang was on fire.

He had seen his fair share of guys with egos that were too high like Shun Tian, Scarlet Emperor, Dark Prison King, Thousand Goblin King, Ancient Demon King, Tian Hou, Jiu Xiao, and Void…Although these strong guys were also very arrogant— insanely egotistic even, but no one among them were comparable with the blatant arrogance of this one!

This guy is even more of a drag than Ji Wu Ri’s goods— so to speak, he is absolutely insane!

God— that was someone who was only seen in the eyes of ordinary people.

No matter how awesome the gods are, they are nothing more than powerhouses who have reached that realm. The Divine Supreme could possess the Godhead, which was an existence that transcended the realm and was infinitely powerful. However, no matter how awesome the Gods were, no matter how awesome the Godheads were, there was still a limit to them. Did he really think that he was the almighty Lord of the world? If compared with the Ancient Gods who created or destroyed the world at every turn they had in the ancient times, the Gods who have just stepped into the Divine Supreme level were merely ants. The Ancient Gods were capable of destroying the whole world with one hand while creating the whole world with the other— that was the existence that could truly be considered great power!

So for a guy who had been sealed in an iceberg for God knows how long to claim himself as a God himself was just plain ironic. If word spreads out, he’d be the laughingstock of the people— what a drag!

Yue Yang felt even more angry when he thought about it this way!

“Don’t get angry, this is a kind of mental interference that was made just to irritate you! Promise me, no matter what happens, don’t lose your sense of reason and keep a clear head so that you won’t make mistakes,” Xue Wu Xia was the most sensitive to mental attacks. Some mental attacks pierce people like needles while others don’t as they drown victims like a flood. However, some were silent, making people lose their minds and become prisoners.

“Don’t worry, I won’t be angry. I’ll just pretend that all of that rubbish and gibberish were simply the gas of a stupid dog,” Yue Yang nodded, agreeing with Xue Wu Xia.

In fact, he felt that if he was really angry and went violent, that guy would meet an even more unlucky fate.

Because of the violent state of himself, the terrifying power that erupted was simply impossible to exert in his usual state of sanity! Of course, if Xue Wu Xia told Yue Yang that, it might be because of a certain premonition or a revelation of some kind of divine power.

The current iceberg was filled with divine powers of several different attributes.

There were the divine fire powers that were accumulated to erupt and the extremely cold divine powers that froze everything; there were also the strong sealing divine powers, and there was even a kind of divine power that even Yue Yang, Xue Wu Xia and Princess Qian Qian couldn’t figure out. Several kinds of divine powers were suppressing each other, but they were also restraining each other, forming a strangely weird balance at the same time.

At first, it was obvious that no divine power was present, so how could so many divine powers suddenly appear out of nowhere?

Could it be that he broke the iceberg using the Black Hole Seal Space?

Yue Yang thought secretly.

While secretly guarding along with Princess Qian Qian, Xue Wu Xia and the Blizzards Goddess also remained guarded against unexpected situations.

Rumble… At the ice wall of the broken portion, a huge explosion suddenly occurred. Thousands of pieces of broken ice scattered into the sky and a Divine Light hit Yue Yang directly like a flash of lightning.

Yue Yang had already condensed the two swords of Hidden Return and Splendid Frost. When he saw the enemy making a sneak attack, he immediately confronted him with the Wihite Splendid Frost as Black Hidden Return was prepared for a second attack. However, what surprised Yue Yang was that the White Splendid Frost posed no harm to that Divine Light. Besides, that Divine Light also seemed to be completely harmless, even stronger and more beautiful under the blessing of the sword itself. Because of White Frost’s attack, the Divine Light was slightly stagnant as it stroked Yue Yang’s left side in a curved arc and shot towards Princess Qian Qian.

Princess Qian Qian blocked her face with the Prison Emperor’s Divine Sword.

That Divine Light was refracted to Xue Wu Xia under the barrier of the Divine Sword and finally hit the Book of Truth before reflecting against Xue Wu Xia’s eyebrows.

“Ah!” Yue Yang’s eyes widened. Had he known that this would be the outcome, he would have embraced and taken on the light long ago. Who would have thought that his act of deflection caused Xue Wu Xia to become injured as well.

“Don’t be afraid, I’m okay!” Xue Wu Xia said for the first time, signaling for Yue Yang not to be afraid.

“You’re really all right? You frightened me to death!” Princess Qian Qian was also very guilty. If she knew that the Divine Light would hit Xue Wu Xia’s eyebrows, she would have never blocked it with a sword.

“Hahaha, ants, everything turned out to be as I expected,” The arrogant voice laughed loudly, “You mortals! With your wisdom, you could have never imagined that the Divine Light never intended to hurt or attack at all. Instead, it was a kind of Divine Guidance…Hahaha, that bitch You Lan! In order to prevent me from escaping, she dispersed her divine senses, but how could she imagine that after several millennia, there would turn out to be three fools who broke the ice wall and awakened me from my deep sleep. The fact that remains like destiny’s arrangement was the fact that there is someone here who was suited to inherit her strength? You ants— what else can you do besides cry at the hands of fate? It doesn’t matter if You Lan’s dispersing Divine Consciousness lost its Divine Guidance, I will help her guide her Divine Consciousness. When that ant of a girl inherits You Lan’s Divine Rank, the seal would be lifted and you all will collectively die too! Destiny, destiny, how wonderful you are; I like you so much, hahaha, hahahahahaha…”

“Leave!” Once Yue Yang heard that something was amiss, out of all the tactics that he knew, he demanded escape as the best option.

But now it was too late to leave.

The entire iceberg was trembling as an astonished Xue Wu Xia looked at Yue Yang without blinking.

In her body, large amounts of ice and snow energy quickly gathered. On the other side of the iceberg, countless little flickers of Divine Light floated slowly, shining bright like a galaxy.

Inheriting the Divine Powers of the predecessors and obtaining the Divine Rank effortlessly was a great thing, but these Divine Powers were meant to seal a strong enemy. Once they are integrated into Xue Wu Xia’s body, it would mean that the seal is lifted, in turn unleashing a very powerful enemy that was feared ten thousand years ago. Yue Yang gritted his teeth and turned to Princess Qian Qian. Looking into her eyes, he gave her a deep hug and kissed her cherry lips forcefully.

Then,he let go of his hands.

Tending to the scattered strands of hair in front of her forehead, he said, “Tigress, leave first and immediately tell Night Empress and Zhi Zun that we need help.”

Princess Qian Qian was usually very strong and never cried, but now, her tears suddenly fell, “Don’t drive me away. I know that once I leave, I will never see you again. Although I usually like to argue a ton with you, those moments were just me being coquettish…Let me stay and be able to be together with you. It doesn’t matter if I die; if you let me go, there’s no purpose for me to live…”

Yue Yang’s voice was extremely gentle. He always yelled at her at ordinary times, but now he was extremely patient as he softly persuaded, “Don’t cry, both me and Wu Xia will be fine. Even if the other party is a tattered god, I can also defeat him. I am a person who is against the Heavens, so nothing can stop me!”

When Princess Qian Qian heard this, she cried even harder, “If you can guard yourself against the Heavens, why do you want to drive me away? Let me accompany you, if you can guard against the Heavens, I will accompany you to do so; if you fail, I will be with you too…”

Yue Yang held her small face and wiped away the tears for her over and over again.

Xue Wu Xia by her side was already speechless.

Holding the Book of Truth, half of her body had been covered with ice and snow. More and more expansive light points of Divine Power floated like a river as part of it was integrated into the Book of Truth, but the largest part was integrated into her body.

The iceberg in the distance shook violently.

The tip of the ice pointing straight to the sky gradually began to break apart, as if it was about to break off.

Inside the ice layer, a thousand-meter-high image formed by countless Divine Light spots slowly floated out. Without any sort of Divine Consciousness, a female Godhead without any consciousness control appeared and its form was somewhat similar to that of Xue Wu Xia. However, the Divine Light was shining brighter and brighter. When this female Godhead left and drifted towards Xue Wu Xia, the whole iceberg trembled even more, as if there was something eager to struggle out.

“This time I gambled a bit largely, but this young master is not afraid at all. Come on, should I tell you that it is my nature to challenge fate and go against the Heavens?” Yue Yang was unable to persuade Princess Qian Qian to leave. He, who was supposed to be very anxious, suddenly smiled as his face flashed with unparalleled boldness and confidence.

There seemed to be Divine Light that was shooting out in his eyes again.

The sight of that made him look like a legendary God!

In other words, this was the real him!

When Princess Qian Qian and Xue Wu Xia looked at Yue Yang from behind. They were under the illusion that the thousand-meter-high female Godhead, and even the ten-thousand-meter iceberg, were both pliantly under his feet…

[TL note]:

At this point there’s more new characters that are emerging so I’m kind of making the glossary instead of referring to it. I’ll try my best to provide them as accurately as I can, so let me know if any of the names seem awkward or don’t flow all that well!

At any rate, enjoy the chapter! Hope you guys have a great day/night ahead of you!

-Sterling

chapters.title: Chapter 910 Red Sky Divine Flame
chapters.body:
Chapter 910 Red Sky Divine Flame

Chapter 910: Red Sky Divine Flame

Countless sparks of Divine Light enveloped the levitating Xue Wu Xia.

She was already in a semi-fainted state and her thoughts contained various streaks of Divine information from the Divine Light.

Princess Qian Qian was directly casted a thousand meters away by the tremor of the Divine Coercion, completely unable to get close to Xue Wu Xia. Moreover, what she worried about most was not this Xue Wu Xia, who was fusing with an unknown Godhead, but Yue Yang.

The ground shook violently like an earthquake.

The iceberg had also completely collapsed.

The sharp tip of the originally broken iceberg snapped off between rumbles and it seemed that an invisible magic hand was manipulating it. Ten thousand meters high and fallen, coupled with the weirdly maneuvering power, even a congenital warrior would be smashed to bits and pieces under the direct impact of the tip.

Yue Yang was not an ordinary Innate martial artist— he was the Supreme. He was the one who overcame all of the hurdles to stand at the most perfect realm of the Innate Supreme!

He lifted the Crescent Moon Blade and soared into the sky, blasting a wave of ‘Slash of the Mountain River’.

The sword Qi that bore the capabilities of slashing the world itself managed to slice the huge iceberg in half.

The two halves were exactly the same as the power was unleashed a hundred times more accurately than being measured by a craftsman with a ruler. The tip of the iceberg broke into two halves and its momentum was unabated. It would have fallen past the top of the meteorite, but a huge gap gradually separated the two in the middle. It was a hundred meters long and could easily accommodate Yue Yang, Xue Wu Xia and Princess Qian Qian inside.

The tip of the ice plunged deep into the ground and the erupting shockwave swept across the land. The entire snowfield was like the ocean that allowed a hurricane to pass through. Under the tremor of the shockwave, the waves expanded outwards, stretching for tens of kilometers before gradually calming down. Princess Qian Qian, who held a sword between the two cracked ice peaks, was safe and sound because of the protection of Yue Yang’s Creation Domain. Even the deafening impact and sonic boom did not affect her at all. It was as if she was listening from a hundred miles away— clear, but not ringing in her ears and causing her harm.

Looking at the gigantic situation, Princess Qian Qian was astonished by the enemy’s powerful maneuvering power. At the same time, she felt thankful for Yue Yang’s protection.

Only he could take it so easily.

If it was her, she would have retreated long ago, but it would have been an embarrassing sight to watch, no?

From the sky, a piece of sharp broken ice fell flawlessly towards the suspended snow.

With the protection of the Divine Power, it was impossible to hurt her with any sort of attack, but this was a kind of provocation.

The corner of Yue Yang’s lips curled upwards with a sense of sarcasm; he didn’t need the Crescent Moon at all. He directly stretched his fingers to smash the sharp piece of ice in the sky as it exploded into powders of snow and scattered in the strong wind.

This kind of pediatric provocation was certainly not perceived as an enemy’s attack to him.

It wasn’t even good enough to consider it a temptation.

At best, it was only a kind of small harassment made to buy time. Yue Yang knew what this meant and also knew that the enemy was still struggling, trying to break free from the seal, but he did not attack. Not only him, even Princess Qian Qian didn’t launch her own attacks either. She, who held the Prison Emperor’s Divine Sword, steadily trailed behind Yue Yang, silently guarding the rear for him so that he could fight with peace of mind.

“Do you think that if you delay a bit of your time, you can let that ant of a girl absorb the Divine Power? Hahahahaha, how naive! Without a few months, she shouldn’t dream of integrating Divine Power with an independent Godhead based off of her abilities!” A voice that rang out as majestically as a God resounded.

“I want to say, whether your name is Red Sky River or River Sky Redi, the amount of nonsense you spew is astonishing!” Yue Yang replied.

“Yes, no matter what you say, we will not attack you. We have no intention in using our powers to get rid of the seal,” Princess Qian Qian sneered and counterattacked.

“Hahahahaha..this is truly such a laughable scene! Hahaha! Yes, it is true that I am still in the seal, but this is because my Divine Power is too strong to be able to be pulled away at once and not because I am unable to break out of the seal immediately. For ants like you, I can easily kill you in seconds with just one finger of mine. That kind of difficulty is not much harder than crushing an ant!” The arrogant Red Sky River laughed loudly.

“Really? Then try it!” Yue Yang shrugged his shoulders.

Not only did he ignore the Red Sky River, he even put the broken ice peak into the Grimoire World without anyone noticing.

If it was still on the iceberg and protected by the law of the sealing power, then Yue Yang wouldn’t be able to take the tip of the iceberg into the Grimoire World, resorting to swallowing it whole with the Black Hole Seal Space.

But now, things are different. The broken ice snow peak has fallen to the ground and there were no more rules that could restrain it. Although Yue Yang must save his energy to deal with the enemy who could break the seal at any time, he could not use the small Power of the Law to draw the Black Hole Seal Space and swallow it. But he would be able to take the broken part of the iceberg into the Grimoire World and it wouldn’t cost him a single strand of effort at all.

Yue Yang’s actions of ignoring the man seemed to have completely offended the opponent.

First, there was a moment of silence.

When enough power was accumulated, the golden shadow in the iceberg appeared again. With a bang, the side of the iceberg that collapsed due to Yue Yang’s previous attack had exploded. Tens of thousands of fragmented ice storms and ice specks blasted into the air. A dense rain of ice cubes formed, falling down like cannonballs!

“Azure Dragon!”

Princess Qian Qian didn’t need Yue Yang to take action as she was the one who leaped forward.

The image of the Azure Dragon flashed above her head.

Her Sword Qi looked like the dragon itself.

Rotating mysteriously in the air, unlike the previous attack Azure Dragon Lightning Knot to bind the enemy, this was a more clever and ingenious whirling blow. The lightning produced by the Sword Qi was like an azure dragon gliding among the thousands of ice cubes in the sky, driving them one by one to spin like a top before falling to the ground as light as a feather. When falling on the ice, it only rotated on the smooth surface without damaging the ground.

To have this kind of control over her power, warriors below the Heaven Rank would be scared to death upon seeing this sight.

Even a warrior above the Heaven Rank would be dumbfounded should they see it.

At least, in the Heaven Realm, it was believed that many of the 5th Heaven Ranked King-level martial artists were not necessarily able to have this much control over their power.

It was easy to burst these ice cubes and it would be no problem to double it.

But to have none of them shattered and spin around to the ground like feathers, just as how Princess Qian Qian performed would be too difficult!

What’s more, Princess Qian Qian did this with Sword Qi and lightning, which made it even more difficult and became an incredible miracle!

“Hmph, I can’t believe that you dared to show me such an inferior skill!” Red Sky River, who was still sealed in the iceberg, was extremely disdainful. Although he had to admit that he wasn’t able to have that amount of control as Princess Qian Qian when he was still in her level many years back, he has now surpassed it by a thousand times. Looking back on her skills, he felt that his omnipotent self need not care about the tricks these mere ants intend to perform. No matter how strong they were, they were merely mortal!

Sealed by the iceberg, he was still unable to get away for the time being, so he resorted to splitting into a golden shadow as a clone.

The giant golden shadow of a hundred meters ‘drilled’ out of the iceberg with a bit of difficulty out of fear of disturbing the sealing power. When it drilled, his movements turned out to be cautious, trying to follow the cracks of the ice wall that Yue Yang had hit before.

Yue Yang didn’t stop him and just curled his lips, “What a big golden mouse!”

Princess Qian Qian, who was holding the Divine Sword with a serious face and nervousness, couldn’t help but break out into a laugh as well.

Ignoring the physical forms and just looking at the cautious look of the hole that was being drilled out of the ice wall, it really looked like a mouse was trying to make a hole, far away from the claims of great power of God! Of course, when the golden shadow completely drilled out of the iceberg and escaped from the sealed area, it immediately regained its arrogance and pride. It unleashed its full power and gleaming light was dazzling all over the body. The top of his head especially, shone like the sun, which was an unbearable sight to look at.

Perhaps he heard Yue Yang’s previous mockery, because the golden shadow’s clone glared with anger and was enveloped in rage.

The palm of his hand peered forward.

The golden palms were shining.

The huge and golden five fingers slowly gathered around Yue Yang and Princess Qian Qian. Within a hundred meters, there were five terrifying powers immediately gathered quickly whereas the ice on the ground was like being plowed up by an excavator. In the same way, he piled up the powers directly while quickly accumulating and compressing the space centered on Yue Yang’s body. The ice cubes on the ground were even drawn with an even stronger force as they smashed towards Yue Yang like a meteor. In the volley, a giant hand made up of ice cubes even the bodies of Yue Yang and Princess Qian Qian viciously.

“Breakn!” Princess Qian Qian brandished the Prison Emperor’s Divine Sword with both hands, cutting out a sharp wave of Sword Qi and directly slicing off the five fingers made of ice.

“Boom!”

The ice hands with severed fingers were still intact together but the five fingers were most definitely damaged despite failing to be stifled as expected.

Princess Qian Qian’s Sword Qi attack was not over yet. She turned over in mid-air and half-kneeled on the ice. She turned the Divine Sword with both hands and plunged straight into the ground. The power of the sword quickly expanded in the ice layer under her feet, forming a silent shock wave.

It turned out that the strangling force gathered on the ground was like a soap bubble meeting a sharp needle.

Instantly shattered.

It then started to dissipate into invisibility. Even with the golden shadow of the five fingers tightly closed, Red Sky River’s energy clone frowned and looked at his fingers. Although it was not broken, Princess Qian Qian’s sword counterattack power had already cut its five fingers apart! This was the power of Princess Qian Qian’s White Tiger Saint Force— the ability t be able to kil stealthily without anyone noticing.

“If you think that you can jump in joy just because you destroyed a small part of my hand, that’s a big mistake!” The golden shadow shone with extremely dazzling Divine Light as the sun was shining all over the body.

A DIvine Fire that was as powerful as the Di Gui Yin Fire erupted from the soles of the golden shadows.

It was different from the Di Gui Yin Fire.

This kind of unknown DIvine Fire burnt endlessly and crazily without any possibility of being considered tranquil. It was born with an extremely powerful golden thunderbolt that crackled and exploded. Seeing this kind of Divine Fire, Yue Yang secretly contrasted it with the Gui Yin Fire. He wasn’t surprised— elated even, as he seemed to appear like he had something that he had unconsciously thought about as his facial expressions portrayed the expressions of relief.

Not only him, but even Princess Qian Qian nodded secretly, seeming to realize something.

The golden shadow quickly turned into a flame giant with Divine flames. It was blazing wildly and the ice on the ground was dissipated and incinerated by the fire energy. It retreated like a low tide and formed within one kilometer around the body of the golden shadow, forming an empty round circle around him.

The five fingers on the golden palm that Princess Qian Qian attacked had already been healed by the DIvine Fire. In the palm of the hand, a burst of Divine Fire was gushing out.

Like a volcano!

“Actually, the true Divine Power of mine is not ‘Frost’ at all; on the contrary, my Divine Power is flame! Under my ‘Red Sky Divine Flame’, nothing in the world is indestructible. My will can make the world and everything else engulf into flames! Poor ants, bear the punishment of my Red Sky Divine Flame, hahahaha! In front of the gods, your struggle is meaningless. Except for the cries of sorrow, you don’t need to make any other sounds!” As soon as the golden shadow raised its hand, the Divine Fire spurted out with a terrifying blaze towards the sky.

“…” Student Yue Yang was speechless. Although he was also a master of fire and possessed the Nirvana Flame that truly had the ability to burn everything and anything in the world, he didn’t mind letting the enemy be arrogant for a while. Boss Masters that would die from explosions and flames were normally very arrogant all the time, weren’t they?

[TL note]:

At this point there’s more new characters that are emerging so I’m kind of making the glossary instead of referring to it. I’ll try my best to provide them as accurately as I can, so let me know if any of the names seem awkward or don’t flow all that well!

At any rate, enjoy the chapter! Hope you guys have a great day/night ahead of you!

-Sterling

chapters.title: Chapter 911 - Something Like Intelligence Doesn’T Suit You
chapters.body:
Chapter 911 - Something Like Intelligence Doesn’T Suit You

Chapter 911: Something Like Intelligence Doesn’t Suit You

“Cry and tremble, you pathetic ants!”

The golden shadow raised his hands arrogantly to the sky, before pressing them down with a great force, causing an impact with the ground.

Nearly a thousand gusts of flames burst out from the bottom of the rocky ice and the two largest flames appeared beneath Yue Yang and Princess Qian Qian.

Yue Yang reacted extremely quickly. At the moment when the flame erupted on the soles of his feet, he turned over and made a certain tumble, easily avoiding the impact of the eruption. Princess Qian Qian was different, however, as she was evidently faster than Yue Yang. At some point, a pair of Vermillion Bird Flame Wings appeared behind her. At the same time that the afterimage made the flame impact disappear, her real body appeared behind the golden shadow himself.

The Prison Emperor’s Divine Sword slashed down.

Its potential could tear the world apart!

However, despite the fact that this sword could easily annihilate a horde of Heaven Rankers, the golden shadow merely blocked the attack with one finger.

There, it could only be seen that his finger bore a bit of the menacing aura that seemed capable of total annihilation. He faintly mimicked and wrote a phrase in the air with his finger as he pushed Princess Qian Qian back to where she came from.

“Those who despise the Gods will be punished by the Gods!”

Red Sky River raised his golden eyes and glared angrily at Princess Qian Qian who fought back.

Princess Qian Qian’s facial expression changed drastically and her body seemed to be hit by some invisible force, causing her to fall onto the broken iceberg. With a bang, she smashed into the hard ice wallas her whole body trembled in pain. Fortunately, the Prison Emperor’s Divine Sword resisted most of the power. Otherwise, she would have suffered severe injuries and fainted on the spot!

Even staring at the scene was proven to be terrifying. However, Red Sky River’s face was naturally arrogant and he even snorted with a little disdain. “Tiny bug!”

“Slap!”

Just as he finished saying this sentence, Red Sky River received a slap in the face.

Although this slap was not at all heavy, the impact of shame was strong, especially for a proud ‘God’ like Red Sky River. It was most definitely an unimaginable act of shame for him. Even though it was just his energy clone, to be slapped by a human was an undeniable action that made him embarrassed. As Red Sky River gradually turned his head around, he could see student Yue Yang wearing an amused expression as he stood in front of him.

What triggered Red Sky River the most however, was the fact that student Yue Yang even nonchalantly said a few more things that were insults to his entire being, “With a face as large as yours, hitting it was quite the satisfactory act too!”

“Die!”

Red Sky River’s anger reached his limit.

A fire broke out.

Flames soared into the sky and within a thousandth of a second, the palms of the golden energy clone were joined together. Mimicking the act of slapping a mosquito, the shadow wanted to slap Yue Yang alive with his giant hands. The afterimage of Yue Yang disappeared and fell to the ground like a meteor. Although the golden energy clone with a height of 100 meters was powerful, it seemed a bit dull compared to him. He couldn’t get Yue Yang with his hands, so Red Sky River immediately raised his huge feet and stepped on him fiercely. The huge shockwave caused all the ice within 10,000 meters to splash and melt. Yue Yang, who was hiding in midair, seemed to have fainted because of the impact.

The huge hand that was burning with flames slapped down towards him heavily.

“Boom!”

Yue Yang let the giant hand that burned with Divine Flames hit him till he was at least buried a few hundred meters deep underground.

The frozen ground that melted away the ice also formed a huge burning handprint, deep and full of rage as the several thousand year-old frozen ground was imprinted with a black mark.

Red Sky River controlled the energy clone, stomping heavily on the edge of the handprint with his giant foot. The Divine Flame on it fluctuated before it followed the momentum of the trample of the ground.

When his leg was lifted, the Divine Fire energy suppressed to its limit immediately detonated the unbearable energy underground, erupting in an all-round way and turned into a volcanic crater that shot off to the sky. Carrying copious amounts of lava and bearing a human-shaped shadow covered in a scorching shade of black, he immediately flew out from the ground and shot straight into the sky.

“A mortal who offends the Gods will die under the punishment of the Gods,” Red Sky River controlled the golden energy clone, making a fist forcefully.

In the sky, those magma and Divine Fire energy immediately condensed to their limits.

Forming into a ball of energy.

It reached an unbearable peak and exploded again, turning into tens of thousands of igniting rain that showered the entire sky.

Red Sky River sensed that the creature that was gushed out of the inferno had already become a pile of smithereens, which was the main contributor to his slightly calmer moor. Originally, he wanted to torture Yue Yang for a little longer. However, seeing that he was already too weak, he decided not to— he was a human with the strength of a bug, after all!

When the control golden energy clone turned and wanted to kill Princess Qian Qian, he was surprised to find that the ant who was supposed to be killed just now was still alive.

Not only was he still alive, he was even roasting chicken wings?

Student Yue Yang held a fork in his hand while grilling chicken wings on the edge of the fire. Shaking his head, he sang, “Little chicken wings, my favourite food!” The appearance of his was unbelievably infuriating. Upon seeing his cheeky expressions, Red Sky River wanted to spew a mouthful of blood all over the brat!

“Give me a bite,” Princess Qian Qian leaned forward. She now knew when and how to cooperate with his acts.

“Why are you anxious? There is still a big monster that hasn’t exploded!” Before student Yue Yang finished speaking, a giant golden hand struck them.

Red Sky River chased after Yue Yang and Princess Qian Qian violently and furiously, destroying the surrounding ground in a disastrous manner. Try as he might, there was nothing he could do to them. It seemed that they had found out the strength of their opponents because Princess Qian Qian and Yue Yang didn’t fight hard and switched their fighting strategy with the results being good. Red Sky River was very angry, but the two of them were entirely fine—even sharing a honey chicken wing between them.

However, it didn’t take long for the golden energy clone to suddenly stop moving.

Yue Yang and Princess Qian Qian looked at each other and quietly stepped forward.

First, Yue Yang used the Crescent Moon to stab the backside of the golden energy clone, but he found that this product really couldn’t move any longer. He was overjoyed, which led to him gesturing to Princess Qian Qian to take her Divine Sword and deliver a hard slash to finish the job.

“Chop, chop, chop…” Princess Qian Qian slashed his head and face. However, even though she had a Divine Sword in her hand, Red Sky River’s golden energy clone was too capable to cause much damage as her power was barely only able to cut through the Divine Flame on the outer layer of the body. Yue Yang looked at her and got furious, “You fool, why did you cut this strange face when he’s completely shameless? Cut his fingers or toes!”

After hearing Yue Yang’s criticism, Princess Qian Qian pleaded with a bit of an aggrieved tone, “I didn’t know that it would have been as thick-skinned as this!”

Carrying out the blessing of the power of the Four Directions, the Prison Emperor’s Divine Sword and Yue Yang’s Crescent Moon— first form double swords combined, they could finally cut off a finger of the golden energy clone.

Yue Yang happily put away the fire above him.

And one second after he put away his severed finger, the entire golden energy clone dissipated, formed into countless spots of golden light which flowed into the ice wall channel like a torrent and returned to Red SkyRiver’s body. The cracked iceberg collapsed even more severely at this time and the entire iceberg shook. The huge ice peaks like small hills continued to roll down as the momentum sounded like the end of the world.

Princess Qian Qian used the Divine Sword to split the falling ice peak.

Yue Yang, on the ground, quietly filled the Grimoire World with ice and snow, as if he was planning to place the entire iceberg in it…If Red Sky River had been paying attention, then he would find that Yue Yang would not forget to place the ice pieces into is bag no matter if he was running of carrying out a plan.

“Yo-you two hateful ants; it’s time to die!”

A deafening roar erupted from inside the iceberg like a thunder explosion as thousands of ice ridges shook into the air, forming a shower of ice bullets as they were thrown around Yue Yang and Princess Qan Qian The iceberg burst into a huge gap at this time and there was a man who shone as dazzling as the sun. He was struggling—as if he was about to break free from the innermost seal of the iceberg.

The seal was made by some rune and it was still buried deeply at the bottom of the ice layer. There were only countless rays of light that bound themselves onto the Red Sky River like a cocoon.

After Red Sky River obtained the energy confluence of the golden energy clone, his strength instantly increased.

The light and fire on his body was ten times stronger.

In the light cocoon, he still struggled to break free, starting the act from his arm. Naturally, he was only trying to!

“Haha, hahahahaha, you are really born as fools! If you are more courageous and come forward to sacrifice for the sake of the seal. Then, within ten thousand years, I will not be able to break free. But not only would you destroy the iceberg and lead it away from the blue Godhead, and certainly not only the habit of tucking your head back as if you don’t dare to look me in the eyes all, even when I was buying time with my attack. Haha, it is your stupidity that contributes to my victory! Okay, In order to repay your stupidity and cowardice, I decided to give you a quick death!” Red Sky River, who had already freed his arm, grinned coldly. If the previous was the clamour of seeing the world without anything, then now it was the pride of the conspiracy to succeed!

“Don’t speak of nonsense— you think you’re the only one who was buying time? How are you so sure that we aren’t? Don’t think that you’re the only intelligent person, there are others out there who are smart. To be honest, the chimpanzees that bring along boxes to wait by the banana stall out of reach kind of made me feel like you two looked alike when you smiled. My dear red chimpanzee, learn to walk straight before you play with this kind of stuff; for someone who has yet to evolve with modern times such as yourself, the next step might be a bit hard!” Yue Yang insulted him in a smooth manner.

“Puff!” Princess Qian Qian tried to stop smiling but she failed.

While Yue Yang was giving the guy a piece of his mind, his hands and limbs were busy at work as well.

He hugged Xue Wu Xia, whose body was almost fused with Divine Light but was already awake, and then handed her to Princess Qian Qian. He signalled for them to step back so he could formally show off his skills.

Princess Qian Qian only had time to yell ‘be careful’ before he set off flying a thousand meters into the air.

While she was flying away with Xue Wuxia in her arms, Yue Yang rushed towards Red Sky River, which had already freed his own arm and slashed an attack of his own with the momentum of ruining the sky and the earth.

At the same second, Red Sky River’s arms stretched infinitely.

It looked like it was a magic weapon that made Yue Yang’s heart constrict!

Five blood stains appeared on Yue Yang’s chest and the blood splattered, brushing over him who was on his journey to kill the ‘God’ and rushing over frantically. Red Sky River first wrapped his arms in the shape of a snake shield, blocking his front and extended his five fingers to chase after Yue Yang’s vest. He even used his arms and wrists to circle the sky to form an inescapable battle net. A moment before Red Sky River’s fingertips plunged into Yue Yang’s waist, the upward and downward force of the sword suddenly disappeared without a trace.

As if there was never a person named Yue Yang before, the man himself plunged headfirst into the seal.

He didn’t intend to fight Red Sky River; he looked like he was sending himself off to a road of death… What is the kid trying to do?

Red Sky River was stunned. To be honest, he was not afraid to hit him at all—because even if he had only one arm out of the reins, this kid couldn’t defeat him. That was because if he attacked harder, the seal would break quicker, so he wanted him to attack as harshly as he could to his heart’s content.

But this kid didn’t fight at all. Instead, he plunged into the seal. Wh-what is he trying to do?

chapters.title: Chapter 912 - A Human’S Plans?
chapters.body:
Chapter 912 - A Human’S Plans?

Chapter 912: A Human’s Plans?

Yue Yang mentioned that out of all the Seal Spaces, there isn’t one that could rival the level of terror emitted from Empress Fei Wen Li’s Black Hole Seal Space.

In addition to the Black Hole Seal Space, Yue Yang had also studied the evil dragon cave where the Scarlet Emperor was located, the Blood Pond Torture Chamber where Wu Su was, the Water World of the black tower where the Peerless Emperor stayed on the first level of the Heaven Stairway and the ancient seal of the Buried Sword Valley. The hourglass, water, and fire world where Fairy He Qiluo was located, combined with the knowledge inheritance of Si-niang and the insights of many powerful people in the world, he came to a conclusion: any seal was a legal restriction with specific conditions and attributes.

Supposedly, if there was a possibility that someone could run into the seal like an idiot, but did not violate the law.

Then, the person would be absolutely safe even if they stayed in the seal.

From ancient times to the present.

No one has ever done this before. Not to mention knowing of the secret, even if one knew about it, no one would jump into a seal at random because that was just risky and a ridiculous behaviour!

“The environment here is good!” Student Yue Yang had done such a stupid thing now and ran into the seal where Red Sky River was contained.

“What are you doing here?” Red Sky River was a little confused. Is this kid an idiot?

“For this, I can actually explain it,” Student Yue Yang didn’t struggle, allowing countless white lights to restrain himself. The power of the Sealing Law here symbolically tied his body to prevent him from leaving because he made no move to resist. The strands stopped after being able to restrict his movements, which was why there was a stark difference between his bondage and Red Sky River’s, who had struggled in fruitless attempts to break free.

The most terrible thing was the fact that this kid took out the honey chicken wings that he hadn’t finished eating just now and gnawed slowly.

He ate them happily, licking his fingers when he was about done.

When Red Sky River was about to explode out of anger, he slowly raised a finger, “Don’t be angry. At any rate, I’m already here anyway whether you like it or not, so I guess we’ll be spending a certain amount of time together. Don’t be a complaining fool, I know being born as a big primate is not your fault; we just can’t help our hereditary genes…Okay, let’s not say, lest you are too inferior! As for my reason for coming in here, it was most definitely not because I admire your backside. Relax, my attraction functions normally towards females. Besides, I have a paradise of beauties by my side, so I wouldn’t bother to entertain your backside out of all things. Look, only those with low standards would sputter nonsense like you do, but all it does is show your incompetence!”

Student Yue Yang threw away the chicken bones.

The light flashed and the chicken bones were quickly tied up. Before the law, any objects were treated equally.

Taking out a paper towel and wiping his mouth, Yue Yang said slowly, “Seeing that you are not as angry, I will let you in on my reason. Actually, I’m here to help you!”

Even if Red Sky River was angry again, he couldn’t help being shocked for three seconds after hearing these words.

Am I mistaken?

This kid said he was here to help me?

Yue Yang casually kneaded the tissue into a ball before materialising a toothpick and murmured with the chic demeanour of a Lord, “You aren’t wrong and I didn’t misspoke— I really came to help you out of danger. Just now, when you were bragging about it as if you were worried that we wouldn’t know that your personality was undesirable, I never said anything and I’ve given you a chance to show it… You’re angry again, aren’t you? You have to have patience and you have to learn to listen; this would be an important step for you as a gorilla to evolve towards humanity…Where was I? Ah, yes, when it comes to your defensive provocation just now, I didn’t make a move, did I not cooperate with you? You want to go out and I would be glad to see that come true. It fulfills my mindset a lot, like the last time I threw a banana into the pen of a gorilla. The gorilla bowed to me in an act of gratitude— what a sign of evolution! By the way, do you want some bananas?”

Red Sky River was so angry that his face cramped up as he was furious, “You are asking for death!”

Against the fuming Red Sky River, Yue Yang took his leisurely time to peel a banana and took a bite happily, “It’s really good, but it’s true that the bananas shouldn’t all be given to the gorillas. Good things can’t be wasted casually, after all!”

Ho, ho… Red Sky River actually got rather intimidating as his face started to grow strands of red.

It looked similar to the beard of a human man and it could be regarded as a racial symbol to show off. Moreover, being able to reach his realm’s level, his appearance could become illusory and majestic even if the original look didn’t look like this. Needless to say, he was infuriated with how Yue Yang was undermining him. If it weren’t for his inability to fight in the sealed space that tightened his confinements the more he fought, Red Sky River would really tear this kid desperately.

No one had ever dared to call him a gorilla and no one had dared to ask him if he wanted a banana. So what is this?

Was he truly a mere gorilla stuck in a cage for the observation of other people?

Student Yue Yang didn’t have the consciousness of being worried for himself. He yawned, closed his eyes and seemed to fall asleep. He waited until Red Sky River finished roaring angrily and became weak. Then, he opened his eyes and continued to finish his previous words, “Just now you tempted us to make a move but we did not.That was a bit inappropriate, so I came in to express my deep sympathy and condolences to you! However, we were also kind, because we are afraid that us being unfamiliar will ruin your good deeds of escaping. You weren’t too friendly either— pretending to be strong and resisting our enthusiasm to help, it hurt our young souls a lot…But we, as noble people, are very chivalrous too so we won’t argue with a mere gorilla like you. Don’t worry, we truly won’t!”

Red Sky River was already powerless to get angry.

Now, he just wanted to know why this kid broke into this seal.

What’s more, he didn’t go in earlier or later, but deliberately waited until he was about to break the seal before entering. Why on earth did he do that?

Perhaps it was because Yue Yang could see through the Red Sky River’s thoughts, he gave the answer very readily, “You want to ask the reason for entering this space? As I said just now, I am a kind, very great and generous person, so I decided to do a good thing. You don’t know how much courage it took for me to do this. I literally overcame the worries that were higher than mountains; do you know how difficult it is to do a good thing? When I was little, I was determined to help the old lady cross the road. But even to this day, I never had the courage to do it. The act of helping the old lady was not something that anyone could do at any given time! Alright, let’s not talk about all that, you wouldn’t understand it anyway with your level of intelligence. I came in to replace you and let you break free from the seal!”

“What?” Red Sky River was stunned— it was impossible for this kid to have such kindness.

“See? Yeah, what did I just say? With your intelligence, it’s sad that you can’t figure out such a simple solution! But forget it, it’s not easy for the gorilla to evolve to my level…” Student Yue Yang gave him a tolerant look that implied the words, ‘rest assured, I will forgive you’.

“You are waiting for me to break free of one arm and then come in again, You- you want me to be caught in the middle so I can’t take care of both ends!” Red Sky River finally figured out what was going on when he realised what Yue Yang was up to.

He had never seen such a shameless human in his entire life although many human warriors were already unscrupulous.

However, Red Sky River could say that even if the entire human beings of the Tong Tian Tower were added up, their shamelessness would probably be less than one percent of the kid in front of him!

This kid couldn’t deal with him at all, but he kept pretending to not hold any ulterior motive, taunting him to make one of his arms break free before being caught in the middle. When he couldn’t move forward, he ran in. At this moment, someone should be attacking outside, right? When Red Sky River thought of this, he immediately revealed the seal with his Divine Consciousness and looked at it. Sure enough, the human female swordsman holding the Divine Sword had returned and was slashing at his exposed arm!

Thinking of this, Red Sky River suddenly understood a lot of things.

The kid in front of me has been playing conspiracy all the time.

I even wanted to take the opportunity to use him, but who would have thought that he would reverse the tides? However, a human is merely a human, and a God will remain a God— no matter what sort of plan one had, a human would never win a God!

“Hahahahahahahaha!”

Red Sky River burst into a crazy fit of laughter, almost bursting into tears.

Yue Yang watched quietly. His eyes seemed to see a madman, but besides the silent mockery, there seemed to be a kind of faint ‘sympathy’?

Red Sky River laughed for quite some time before he stopped laughing. However, occasionally, he would remember something and continue to laugh. In the end when there was no evidence of a smile at all, he immediately changed into an attitude of coldness and arrogance, “Poor ant, even if your conspiracy succeeds, so what? Can you attack me? Can you kill me? Can you stop me if I want to leave? Before I leave the seal, your companion can’t hurt me and it will only accelerate the weakening of the seal. When I leave the seal, you will perish here forever and I will easily kill your companions before destroying the entire tower! That’s right! You coming in here only caused the slightest bit of trouble. However, you can only do so much here! HUmans will never be able to win Gods”

Yue Yang dug his ears with his fingers, showing a very awkward smile,”Red Sky River, if I am not mistaken, you are actually a quasi-God.
