That is to say, it turns out that you only have the quasi-Divine Supreme existence…I don’t know how you cultivated, but I’m pretty sure that you have reached this level because of a kind of Divine Blood flowing in your body. There is a lot of it, which would explain your current level, but this isn’t your achievements at all. If you don’t have that Divine Blood flowing in your veins, you are merely nothing!”

“You want to seek my blood? Ridiculous! Do you think you can hurt my Divine body?” Red Sky River raised his head up to the sky and laughed.

“Of course not out there, it would not be easy to defeat you,” Yue Yang also smiled: “But here, in this sealed space, I don’t need to defeat you at all. I can do it just by stretching out my hand.”

“Brag! Continue to brag!” Red Sky River didn’t believe it at all.

“Well, after I merge the ancient runes of the core of the seal, I will prove to you that you can completely break free from the seal in three days. Before that, enjoy this last sliver of life!” Yue Yang finished speaking, the Eternity Wheel appeared beneath his feet. Red Sky River’s Divine Flame attack happened to block the Eternity Wheel. Because of Red Sky River’s energy fluctuations, the sealing force immediately bound dozens of light cables, adding a little more resistance to Red Sky River’s escape process.

Red Sky River didn’t care about this bondage—he just wanted to kill the nasty human bug Yue Yang in seconds!

However, he witnessed it with his own eyes.

Yue Yang’s body slowly passed through the Eternity Wheel, immersed in the seal formation as he gradually disappeared… He could feel that this kid was still there and the wheel had also remained, but because of this, there was no way to attack him. Does this kid really want to integrate the ancient runes at the core of the seal?

If he succeeded, wouldn’t he become a prey in his seal?

Red Sky River suddenly felt a trace of a bad feeling surging in his heart.

Moreover, this strange feeling of bad heart has appeared for the first time since having a Divine body!

chapters.title: Chapter 913 - Ants?
chapters.body:
Chapter 913 - Ants?

Chapter 913: Ants?

Three days passed quickly.

For the Red Sky River, these three days passed contrastingly long yet quickly. After being sealed for tens of thousands of years, he finally broke out, which was undoubtedly a great boost of encouragement to his desire for freedom. But because of his eagerness to break free of the seal, as well as the strange words and deeds of the kid, he felt that the days passed like years. Moreover, what made him most suspicious was the fact that the female swordsman who used to attack him with swords outside, had also left after the kid disappeared. Such an abnormal behaviour made Red Sky River feel that something was wrong. Was everything going to be over soon? Was he going to fall into depravity right after he broke out of the seal?

His process of breaking free was getting smoother— with an arm already free from the reins, the next came his head.

On the second day, his body was loosened.

On the third day, only one right leg remained as it was still tied in the light grasps of the seal.

His freedom was about to be restored soon. How many times did the Red Sky River want to face towards the sky and howl? After all, who else could understand the pain of being confined and pushed to slumber for thousands of years?

“When my power is fully restored, the Tong Tian Tower and the Ruins of the Gods must be in my grasp,” Although Red Sky River possessed a Divine body fused with Divine blood, the ten thousand years of torture sealed by the law still managed to weaken his abilities. However, he was able to exert at least one-tenth of his power, which was a much better state than other human warriors, who could only retain about a hundredth of their original power. Hence, his position was much better.

“Crack…”

When the bonds made out of light were only coiled to his right calf, Red Sky River realised an abnormality.

On the edge of the Eternal Wheel, there was a peculiar strike of lightning. It crackled slightly initially but soon got louder and louder.

It seemed like there was something that wanted to rush out from the inside. Although he could not see it, Red Sky River sensed that under the Eternal Wheel, in the core area of the ancient seal, there was a strong change that was altering silently.

The original Eternal Wheel with a radius of ten metres was gradually expanding.

Not good, could it be that kid?

That kid really is trying to blend the ancient runes in the core area of the seal Law? If he were to incorporate ancient runes, wouldn’t it mean that he would become the master of the ancient seal itself? Then I will officially fall into his hands… No wonder he mentioned that he didn’t need to beat me; he just needed to stretch his hand to keep me in check!

The Eternal Wheel expanded continuously, gradually spreading to the area where the Red Sky River was located.

The thunder and lightning on the edge of the rune were like thousands of golden snakes, ready to be unleashed.

“Damn it! Damn it!”

Red Sky River cursed in disgust.

Just a little bit more— there was only the calf below the right knee that remained trapped, so he could not break free from the shackles of the seal. If the kid successfully integrated the ancient runes at the core of the seal and resealed himself, then all of his efforts would have been in vain!

What made Red Sky River most troubled was the fact that the Eternal Wheel kept getting bigger.

If he falls in the Eternal Wheel, everything will stop and become an eternal existence… that means that he would never be able to escape from the next seal!

Absolutely not!

I’m never going to let that kid succeed!

My freedom is almost restored, so no one can stop me!

“Deceitful ant, when I come out, you will be dead. However, if you think that with a little trickery, you can keep me, Red Sky River, behind, then you are wrong! You have made a big mistake!” Red Sky River gritted his teeth and raised his shining golden right hand, which condensed into a shining ‘sword’ with supernatural power. He gathered the Divine blood into the heart and pulled as much energy that he could obtain from the right knee of his. With a sword, he then cut off the part under the right knee abruptly.

Below his right knee, golden blood was overflowing.

There was no splash.

The moment it overflowed, it became completely condensed and the wound was as smooth as a mirror, as if it had never had the portion of the calf below the right knee.

The sealing light belt firmly sealed the right foot and more light belts extended to attempt sealing Red Sky River spiritually.

If Red Sky River didn’t take the opportunity to leave now, he would be a fool!

It was too late to be sad for his broken leg and it was too late to be mad about it too. The moment the light belt tried to rewrap up his frame, he rushed to the top of the high skies like a golden thunderbolt. After he completely got rid of the light bonds of the seal, the light shined and fell onto him as if he was a God. From his point of view, there were mixed emotions of joy and anger, perhaps even inexplicable resentment and shame that was emitted from the weird shade of light.

Red Sky River landed 10,000 metres away from the iceberg, far away from the seal.

Although he was very angry, he still had his sense of reason and would not arrogantly land on the top of the collapsed iceberg. He would not give the Sealing Law a chance to seal himself into the seal!

“Disgusting ants! Now, it’s time for me to settle the debts we have between us. I won’t deny the fact that you, as ants, were the ones who pushed me into a desolate form of losing part of my divinity, but I will definitely settle this matter between us. However, it’s about time you stop messing with me as well— because I’m the one who is going to bring judgement upon you all!”

On his body, the light was a hundred times more intense than the sun.

His raised right hand resembled the hand of Thor.

With just a wave forward, the cracked and gigantic iceberg trembled as if it was hit by a God, and from the mountainside to the foot of the mountain, a thousand-metre-long attacking crevice appeared deeply.

The smashed ice and snow, which covered the sky and shielded the sun, were even more terrifying than a snowstorm.

It took a few seconds before he heard the deafening explosion.

Boom… With the sound of the explosion, a circle of shockwaves quickly spreaded out at a visibly fast speed that swept the frost on the ground, pushing the unstoppable earthquake dozens of kilometres away.

Red Sky River didn’t care about this attack at all. In his eyes, all of this was taken for granted.

The only thing he cared about was whether he would be shocked by the sealing power of the iceberg’s core.

The answer was clear.

Although the seal power was somewhat powerful, it was unable to spread beyond the iceberg, and the light bonds could not capture the Red Sky River that had landed 10,000 metres away.

“Since the seal can no longer retain me, Red Sky River, then as ants, you will die under my full attack! Annihilation is the only destination for ants like you! Hahaha!” Red Sky River was just conducting a test just now. After getting a clear result, he immediately gained momentum, condensed his whole body’s Divine power and formed dozens of nearly a hundred Divine fireballs in the palms of his hands before throwing them out like raindrops.

These attacks all blasted towards the seal area at the core of the iceberg. The purpose was to use the interference to cause tremors that would lead Yue Yang to his death in the ancient seal. At the very least, it would strengthen the seal’s power and replace himself with that kid, sealing him within forever.

Ancient runes were not easy to integrate at all!

In the process of fusion, one should not receive the slightest interference from the outside world. If you were subjected to violent interference, your spirit would be injured at least, where in worse cases, your soul would be wiped out.

Red Sky River hated Yue Yang very much in his heart. After he got out of the seal, he originally wanted to leave as quickly as possible and wait to return to his peak state. But because Yue Yang was forced to have his leg cut off and even insulted him as a brainless gorilla before, Red Sky River couldn’t bear the humiliation that he had suffered. Anyway, he was the one who possessed a Divine body that would never die and was invincible. If he just went ahead to find a place to recover without killing that despicable ant in seconds, he wasn’t going to be satisfied!

Even if he wanted to leave, he had to kill that brat in seconds before leaving!

Boom! At this moment, the iceberg that was immovable despite Princess Qian Qian’s Prison Emperor’s Divine Sword was shattered by Red Sky River’s attack.

The ice pieces of the small mountain were thrown into the sky by the force of the attack.

The sky’s dome had long been covered by a vast expanse of snow freckles as the sky was nowhere to be seen.

The iceberg that was 10,000 metres high had completely collapsed, and now the highest point was less than two kilometres, completely burying the ice wall channel opened up by Yue Yang using the Black Hole Seal Space. “Ant, this is the end of your contempt for the Gods !” Red Sky River snorted coldly with little disdain. At this moment, the kid hadn’t merged the ancient runes yet, but even if he had successfully merged them, he would not survive this attack. Moreover, if the seal power was attacked by the Divine power, it would inevitably be greatly shaken and the power of the seal would be doubled. Even if the kid had great luck that got himself out of death’s grasps, he would never be able to exit.

“Boom!”

Just as Red Sky River turned around and was preparing to leave, a blade slashed down immediately— and it was Princess Qian Qian.

The timing of her sneak attack was excellent, but the current Red Sky River was no longer the golden shadow separated by the Divine power. Moreover, that golden shadow couldn’t be cut by Princess Qian Qian’s strength at all, let alone Red Sky River who has emerged from the trap?

Red Sky River’s eyes were full of contempt.

It was as if he saw a little bug flailing its teeth and claws at himself overwhelmingly.

He held up a finger and lightly caught the Prison Emperor’s Divine Sword that Princess Qian Qian had struck down with all her strength. With just a twist of his fingers, Princess Qian Qian fell onto a huge block of ice with the stature of a small mountain.

Before PrincessQian Qian struggled out of her situation, Red Sky River directly stretched out his right hand towards the huge ice peak, motioning the act of strangulation with his five fingers.

The entire ice peak was immediately compressed and dented like a dough.

It was distorted.

In the middle section, there was a huge imprint of his five fingers. Red Sky River’s eyes flashed with Divine light and his body was situated slightly sideways, avoiding the fatal blow from the Blizzard Goddess behind him. It was a little different from the ease of fighting Princess Qian Qian as he finally took it a little more seriously. He didn’t block with his fingers, but shook his body gently, avoiding the meteor-like attack of the Blizzard Goddess. However, Red Sky River’s attitude was still arrogant as he just dodged and did not retaliate with a backhand. He did not even turn around when he dodged the attacks, but kept facing the enemy with his back.

Dozens of punches, and soon, hundreds of punches passed.

The Blizzard Goddess couldn’t even hit Red Sky River, who could only exert one-tenth of his strength after he escaped from danger.

Regarding the battle power of the Blizzard Goddess, among the many war beasts, she ranked at least within the top three candidates. However, when she attacked Red Sky River with her fists, she couldn’t even hurt the opponent’s hair. This kind of power gap was truly too different as the levels between them were too big!

At the moment when the Blizzard Goddess was unable to keep up with her attacks, Red Sky River, who was calm and collected, suddenly waved his elbow.

A strike of his elbow hit the Blizzard Goddess General’s lower abdomen.

Whoo…boom!

The Blizzard Goddess smashed against the entire iceberg like a meteor as she barrelled through several hundred-metre-thick ice blocks. Unable to stop the momentum, she fell heavily on the huge wall of the iceberg in the distance that showed off large fonts deeply embedded into the ice wall.

“This is the struggle of ants! When self-righteous humans step on ants, I bet they have never thought that Gods could step on humans the same way!” Red Sky River seemed a little unable to lift his energy. His melancholic eyes were directed towards the sky as he gazed above at a 45 degree angle. Letting out a deep sigh, he shook his head, “Forget it, as the benevolent person I am, sentencing you ants with a Divine punishment would be too cruel!”

chapters.title: Chapter 914 - Fight Of Red Skies Against Nirvana
chapters.body:
Chapter 914 - Fight Of Red Skies Against Nirvana

Chapter 914: Fight Of Red Skies Against Nirvana

“Pui, pui!”

Princess Qian Qian crawled out of the heap of ice and snow a little embarrassingly.

Supported by her Divine Sword with one hand, she patted away the remnants of the snow from her body with the other hand. After spitting out the remaining blood that stained the insides of her mouth, she dizzyly asked the young slave who had appeared next to her at some point, “Pandora, do the Gods of the Heaven Realm have an appearance like this?”

“I can’t remember too much of what happened in the past, but it would be impossible for an idiot like him to obtain a Godhead,” Pandora denied in the young slave’s body.

“Hmm? I didn’t think that there was such an ant— her Divine powers were not bad. Hehehe, this is fate’s arrangement!” Red Sky River’s round eyes gleamed. At this moment, he realised that there was an impossibly pure amount of Divine power surging inside the young slave’s body. Although he couldn’t figure out the dangers and the risk that this power possessed for the time being, this was the best tonic for him especially after regaining his freedom! As long as he kills this woman and absorbs the Divine power in her, not only would he gain the best remedy to achieve his peak state, he might very well be able to break through to a true realm of Divine Supremacy and obtain a real Godhead!

The more Red Sky River thought about it, the happier he became.

If he could obtain such pure and untainted Divine powers, the value of his Godhead wouldn’t be of a low level either.

If he could become a true God, then it would not be difficult to open the ruins of the Gods. Once he possessed all of the spirits, blood, consciousness and Godhead of the ruins of the Gods, he could have the chance of being promoted to the highest divinity.

After becoming the Lord of the Gods, regardless of the Tong Tian Tower, the Heaven Realm or even the Upper Heaven Realm— wouldn’t everything become his?

Hahaha!

Lord of the Gods; how bright my future seems!

Thinking about it in his heart, Red Sky River started to laugh wildly.

“How creepy!” The young slave trembled with fright when she saw Red Sky River’s appearance.

Pandora comforted her, “Don’t be afraid, this guy is actually just a very mentally handicapped gorilla! Although I’m not that sure about everything else, one thing I’m positive of is the fact that he will die very soon— and a miserable death, at that! “

Red Sky River heard that comment, but even if he wanted to pretend to be sacred, he couldn’t. His anger was growing immensely, whenever did I become a gorilla?

For me to absorb your Divine powers, that should have been your pleasure and you should be grateful!

But an ant like you dared to spew such nonsense, blaspheming the name of this God?

It was ironic to hear about the proclaimed ‘death’ of me. Unless the opponent was a God themselves, no one would be able to lay a finger on me! I possess the Divine body and I have survived just fine despite being sealed inside an iceberg for tens of thousands of years. Under the current circumstances where no one is able to threaten me, to have a mere ant speak such foolish words, these ant-like humans are indeed true idiots after all!

Forget it, why should I be angry with the ants!

Red Sky River thought about these insults for a second before he sneered as his disdainful expression resurfaced.

He didn’t know that Pandora was once the most terrifying Goddess of Doom in the Heaven Realm, whose ability to predict death was unmatched. After predicting Yue Yang’s death, the man himself who seemed to never yield to death like a stubborn cockroach, had nearly encountered death himself.

The fearless Red Sky River already regarded the Divine power in the young slave as a timely tonic and was only concerned on how to obtain it.

“…” Princess Qian Qian was speechless. When Red Sky River was deep in his thoughts and angry, he looked a bit like a gorilla!

“This gorilla is so scary!” The young slave was about to cry in fright.

“I’ll say, Third Young Master, your precious girl here is going to be abducted. Are you going to continue playing dead, you boring brat?” Princess Qian Qian couldn’t stand it anymore and shouted.

“I feel wronged, Lord— it’s not that I was pretending to be dead, but that ancient rune was too difficult to merge. Everyone thought it was an ancient rune, but no one knew it was a Primordial Ancient Rune! You know, just a normal ancient rune’s text was choppy, but a Primordial one is a lot worse… I was wrong about every single calculation I made. If the gorilla hadn’t bombed the iceberg just now and helped me, I might not have been able to fully integrate now! You see— even he had to help us out! God, what sort of excuse do I have to make up to cover up this story?!” Student Yue Yang got out of the iceberg. He was completely naked, but there were countless mysterious runes flashing on his skin.

However, this kid just came out like this, without hindering his own consciousness at all as he was completely unbashful.

He ran over in a hurry and hugged the trembling little slave, softly comforting her, “Don’t be afraid, okay? Actually, a gorilla is easy to deal with; you just gotta throw some bananas at him…Look!”

“Y-you are asking for death!”

Red Sky River saw that this kid was really throwing bananas at him and he couldn’t help but tremble with anger. Who are you calling a gorilla? Has there ever been a gorilla that looked like me? Roar!

Princess Qian Qian smiled and bent over.

After experiencing life and death, she didn’t care about the appearance of Yue Yang being entirely naked either.

Mistaking the Primordial Ancient Rune as a normal ancient rune was a very serious matter, so it was nice that he could at least come back alive.

Ignoring the fact that Red Sky River was gathering the Red Sky Divine Flames to attack, she opened her arms and hugged Yue Yang tightly, “You’re such a bad guy, you scared me to death! I said it was dangerous to run into the seal, but you went ahead to take a risk… Fortunately, you turned out okay!” While she was dressing Yue Yang, she checked his body as well and found that the energy of the Primordial Ancient Rune had merged into his body like a brand’s marking. Even though his skin hadn’t been fully integrated, she couldn’t help but appreciate this outcome.

Fortunately, Yue Yang was able to successfully integrate the Primordial Ancient Rune. Otherwise, the overall plan would really be ruined because of this accident!

Princess Qian Qian stretched out her hand and stroked the rune pattern on Yue Yang’s skin.

Yue Yang frowned, “Don’t touch it, it hurts a lot!”

Princess Qian Qian knew that, in fact, Yue Yang hadn’t finished the fusion at all. Because he was worried about her safety, he ran out in a hurry. This bad guy… “I’ll tell you a good way to relieve the pain— if you die, it won’t hurt anymore!” Of course, this was not what Princess Qian Qian said. Instead, the words spewed from Red Sky River, whose eyes were burning. He had already condensed the Red Sky Divine Flames that scorched like the sun, carefully avoiding the weak body of the young slave as he grabbed Yue Yang’s neck with his fire claws.

“Yes, that’s an impressive idea, indeed. But do tell me— how were you able to come up with that?” Yue Yang was very surprised, as if he was wondering since when did gorillas possess this much intelligence.

“Die!”

Red Sky River couldn’t bear it any longer.

The fire claw was tightened on Yue Yang’s neck in an instant and he exerted his force fiercely, deciding that it was like strangling a chicken to death. No, like pinching this kid to death as if he was an ant! In his entire life, he had never hated a person to this extent. As long as matters concerned this brat, he was going to remain spiteful and angered! If he didn’t kill Yue Yang now, he wouldn’t truly be happy even if he managed to become the Lord of the Gods!

There was no fear in Yue Yang’s eyes, but there was a wave of calmness that surfaced during a decisive battle against a powerful enemy.

He shaked his hands and gently pushed both Princess Qian Qian and the young slave a few thousand kilometers away.

Behind him, Xiao Wen Li emerged.

Her pupils opened in anger and in them burned her restraining skills that were no less than the light bonds of the sealing power. She halted Red Sky River’s movement that was holding Yue Yang’s throat and forced him into stagnance.

At the same moment, the Blizzard Goddess, who was originally buried in the snow of the iceberg, appeared behind Red Sky River. WIth two fists that focused with the intentions to attack, she blasted them onto Red Sky River’s left and right ears heavily.

After half a second, Red Sky River had broken free from Xiao Wen Li’s restraints and shook his head angrily.

The Blizzard Goddess jumped away with the supernatural power of her body protection.

He held Yue Yang’s throat with one hand and his eyes were full of mockery, “I’ll say, little bugs and tiny ants, what other tricks can you pull?”

A smile appeared on Yue Yang’s face, “Don’t go around claiming that you’re a legendary ‘God’, but even if you are, I will blow you up! It is good to have power, but while having power, you must also have a strategy. The most important thing is to have a heart that clearly understands your own power…I know the extent of my abilities, but you are just a gorilla with empty power!”

After Red Sky River heard this, his face twisted in displeasure.

I have never seen such a person whose throat is locked in a chokehold and yet, has the confidence to be this arrogant.

Go to hell!

Red Sky River couldn’t talk to Yue Yang anymore. He was afraid that he would go crazy as soon as he talked because the man in front of him was a lunatic, after all!

When he was about to burn Yue Yang’s body with the Red Sky Divine Flames, which would cause him to be wiped out in ashes so that even a little dross of his remnants could not remain, Red Sky River suddenly felt the heat wave of a fire…his hand was burned?

How is this possible? He was Red Sky River, someone who owned the Red Sky Divine Flame!

However, in the next second, he no longer doubted it, because he had already seen the body of this kid in front of him igniting a flame that was incomparable in the world.

Nirvana Flame!

The First Flame of the world.

Even the Red Sky Divine Flame, compared with this kind of flame that could burn all things and purify everything, was merely a low-level existence. Red Sky River’s heart brimmed with jealousy to the extreme— he had the Eternal Wheel, the integration of the Primordial Ancient Runes, but were those not enough? Apparently, he even possessed the Nirvana Flame! This pathetic ant had obtained so much more than the actual God himself, which made Red Sky River express that it wasn’t fair.

Why is he, a mere human, a mere speck of the universe, able to possess the First Flame of the world?

Ahhhhh!

Even if he possessed the Nirvana Flame, I’m going to kill you. If I, Red SKy River, am unable to burn you alive, then I will use my Divine powers to break your neck! After that, I will make sure to pound your brain into a messy pulp!

“What a joke!” Yue Yang shook his head and the small power of the Law exploded. Red Sky River’s fire hand felt like there were a hundred thousand powerful men pulling his fingers bit by bit and bending them backwards, gradually loosening his grip around Yue Yang’s neck. Yue Yang stretched out his right hand that ignited the Nirvana Flame and strangled Red Sky River’s throat, “Don’t think that you’re the only one who can have Divine power; I have a stronger Chaotic Power and Source Power of the World. In my Creation Realm, it is impossible for anyone, including the Gods, to break my neck before I lose consciousness. You don’t understand what the Supreme Will is— because you are just a mere nouveau riche who obtained the divinity of your body and flames!”

Red Sky River grabbed Yue Yang’s arm with his left hand and tugged hard.

His right arm slammed into a fist, hitting Yue Yang’s lower abdomen. Within a second, a hundred heavy punches had already been hit.

Yue Yang’s body didn’t move as his right hand reversed his grasps. The moment Red Sky River landed a punch in his lower abdomen, his left hand did not make any defence as he also made a fist and slammed his opponent quickly. Despite Red Sky River’s stunned eyes, he threw out a hundred punches, hitting his face accurately and repetitively.

Boom!

The two stood upright like a mountain.

However, the two forces of the undefensive punches sent shockwaves that drove the ice and snow within a range of 10,000 metres towards the outer diameter and they were even more terrifying than the passings of a hurricane.

Princess Qian Qian took the young slave, retreating further again and again as they were unable to stop.

Red Sky River’s eyes turned vermillion red as if he was bullfighting as he couldn’t bear the humiliation brought to him by the enemy. While he was hitting the enemy, he never expected that the enemy would hit him all the way back. He certainly didn’t expect the attacks to be able to come in contact with his face. This… this was such an immeasurable shame!

“Vacuum Explosive Bomb!” Red Sky River made a mysterious gesture, infinitely compressing a certain incomparable power in his body and finally pushed it on Yue Yang’s chest. This was a magical skill that could destroy the entire range of a mountain. If Red Sky River wasn’t angry and full of shame, he would not have used it at all in battles with normal people— because this was one of his three secret cards!

chapters.title: Chapter 915 - I Want To Thank You!
chapters.body:
Chapter 915 - I Want To Thank You!

Chapter 915: I Want To Thank You!

The Divine Vacuum Explosive Bomb atack burst.

The space became silent for an instant, as if time had stopped flowing in the world.

Immediately afterwards, the space shook violently on an even more terrifying level than a broken void. The distance of the space between Red Sky River and Yue Yang shattered in a flash and expanded crazily outwards as everything turned into nothing through the annihilation. Even the caster, Red Sky River, couldn’t easily bear this kind of power.

He put his hands in front of his face as his body was pushed backwards.

Red Sky River was not worried about his body being destroyed because he had a Divine body that would never be destroyed. Unless the opponent was a God, it would be impossible for anyone to destroy his body!

The frantically expanding shockwave swept a range of over 30 kilometres, yet it still had no momentum to calm down. The solid ice on the ground was destroyed into a heap of ice foam, trapped in the hurricane of the shockwave as it covered the sky. Princess Qian Qian, who had withdrawn by a long distance away from the blast, was holding the Prison Emperor’s Divine Sword to block the shockwave, but even she couldn’t stand firm. She tightly protected the young slave behind her and the two of them slid back for a full kilometer before they were able to support themselves on foot.

The Blizzard Goddess, who was about to step forward to assist, flew out and slammed onto an ice peak. Then together with the collapsed ice peak, she was thrown hundreds of metres away, buried by the sky of ice and snow and was nowhere to be seen.

Three minutes passed.

But the broken void still could not be bridged nor restored.

The broken ice and snow foam in the distance looked like an ice storm, obscuring the sky and making it dark for a hundred miles.

“What an annoying ant!” Red Sky River snorted a little smugly and annoyed. Although he had already killed the enemy in seconds, he was still very upset— this kind of victory could not bring him much pleasure. On the contrary, using this kind of Forbidden Technique to deal with a low-powered human ant was truly an embarrassment.

Fortunately, he finally won.

Otherwise he would have been even more unhappy.

Red Sky River thought to himself. Should he catch up with the two women first, kill them in the cruellest possible way, absorb the Divine power in their bodies and snatch away the artifact? As for the Blizzard Goddess General who was already buried under the mountain of ice and snow, he felt that it was unnecessary to kill her.

That was because she was a Life Guardian War Beast, and it would be very, very difficult to kill a Goddess General. Defeating her was not a problem, but it was almost impossible to kill a Goddess General who had gradually become a unique Goddess herself. Besides, in the lump of ice and snow, the Blizzard Goddess was almost as good as dead as well!

Just when Red Sky River was about to fly, eager to chase after Princess Qian Qian and the young slave in the distance, he suddenly discovered the man who was supposed to have died appeared in the place where the shattered space was bridged. Upon seeing him alive, he cried out in surprise and astonishment, “This is impossible!”

The power of the Divine Vacuum Explosive Bomb was not something that one could handle even as a God. Without the Divine body, it was impossible to resist that destructive power. So how did this ant-like human man endure it? Even the space was burst apart as everything was annihilated into smithereens, so how did this kid survive? The most important point was that Red Sky River found that the boy didn’t even have a strand of hair out of place, let alone being injured or dead. It was incredible enough that his hands and limbs were intact instead of having his innards fly out from the force of the shockwave, but how did that not happen?

Yue Yang was not injured, but his face was full of pain.

But within the pain, there seemed to be an unbearable expression of comfort.

Like the feeling of ordinary people walking barefoot on a stone path paved with small sharp stones, letting the rocks massage their feet!

He couldn’t die from the explosion, and he’s even feeling comfortable from that? Red Sky River was flabbergasted— besides being in denial, he couldn’t do anything else.

“No matter what the reason is, you will die, you will be absolutely dead!” Red Sky River was angry and furious as his body looked like it had exploded, carrying a surge of power that could shake mountains and rivers and flew over to Yue Yang.

His fist attacks landed like raindrops.

He maintained a sturdy bombardment of attacks on Yue Yang’s body. Whether it was on the vital points of the head, face, or the limbs, each vital point was swarmed by a flurry of attacks.

In addition to curling his body to protect himself, Yue Yang seemed unable to escape for a while, let alone fight back!

Boom boom boom boom boom boom!

Bursts of fist attacks rained down, carrying Red Sky River’s Divine power as he continued slamming them onto Yue Yang’s body like cannonballs.

Red Sky River felt ruthless— you didn’t die even if I tried to explode you, didn’t you? I’ll beat you to death’s door and smash you into pieces. You’ll become meat sauce before being pounded into a heap of flying ash; I’ll see if you can live then!

No one knew how long he continued his attacks for, but it shouldn’t be less than 10,000 punches that were a direct hit on Yue Yang’s body.

Even Red Sky River, who has a Divine body, had started to feel a little tired. After all, he first cast the Divine Vacuum Explosive Bomb with all his strength before proceeding his current attacks with his remaining power. If he hadn’t possessed a Divine body, an ordinary martial artist would have collapsed long ago. At last, Red Sky River condensed a hugely incomparable Divine Red Sky Fireball and smashed Yue Yang into it before the ball itself exploded, causing a heavy blow to its surroundings.

With both hands, he cleverly hit the Divine Red Sky Fireball. At the same time, guided by his mind, he let it directly break through the void to take the enemy’s body along with it and disappear into the void forever.

It didn’t matter if there was going to be a big explosion inside or if it kept burning like this; the enemy was bound to die anyway!

Anyone who was confined by the Divine Red Sky Fireball in the void would not be able to return to the original world…This was one of the three secret trump cards.

At the same time, it was also one of the three Forbidden Techniques, “Burial of Divine Fire!”

The Divine Red Sky Fireball took Yue Yang and smashed him into the void. It looked like the sun was becoming ruined as it sank into an eternal void and disappeared in a flash. Red Sky River didn’t have 100% confidence unlike how he usually felt when using the Divine Vacuum Explosion Bomb as he kept staring at the void fissure, for fear that Yue Yang would escape. If that’s the case, he didn’t mind using the last, but also the strongest, Forbidden Technique against him. If he really were to use the final Forbidden Technique, Red Sky River himself would be injured to a certain extent. Of course, that kind of lethal power would definitely be more than ten times more powerful than the combined power of the first two Forbidden Techniques!

His eyes kept their gaze intently as the broken space slowly closed.

Yue Yang did not escape in the end.

Red Sky River was secretly relieved in his heart.

Sometimes, he was really worried and afraid that he would not be able to kill this ant-like human man who seemed weak but extremely tenacious. No one would believe it either if he tried to tell the world what he felt. After all, how could a dignified God be incomparable to a mortal?

Boom!

The Blizzard Goddess attacked the left and right ears of Red Sky River with both of her fists.

Red Sky River felt a little dizzy as he wondered, how did her combat effectiveness suddenly increase by dozens of times? Just now, it was possible to use the supernatural power of protection to protect myself, so how could this happen? Fortunately, the powerful Divine body eliminated the damage from the attack and the dizziness had subsided in less than half a second. The strength of Red Sky River’s body skyrocketed as he caused the General Blizzard Goddess to tremble backwards. First, he shook his head to eliminate the remaining dizziness before he snorted arrogantly, “Go away! I don’t want to do meaningless things. With your strength, it’s never possible for you to hurt me! Tell your master— even if you get the Azure Blue Godhead, he will definitely not be my opponent in the end… Get off me!”

He pushed hard with both hands, causing the Blizzard Goddess to directly be forced back a hundred metres away.

Just when Red Sky River turned around for the second time and was about to leave happily to chase Princess Qian Qian and the slave, suddenly, out of the corner of his eye, he discovered something incredible.

In the bridging space, a hand suddenly stretched out.

It fumbled for a while, as if it was looking for the door handle or handrail. Then, a hexagram pattern appeared in the virtual space as it was shining slightly. The hand grabbed something, and suddenly, a door opened from the space. From the incredulous gaze of Red Sky River, student Yue Yang came out from the door embarrassedly. His hair was frizzed up like a chicken coop and his face was coloured into a shade of black, but his body was strangely unharmed.

Red Sky River’s chin dropped to the ground.

Student Yue Yang’s face of soot smiled and he nodded towards Red Sky River, saying hello as if he was talking to an old acquaintance before he carefully closed the door of the space. “You’re not dead?” Red Sky River asked a rhetorically stupid question in astonishment.

“I don’t think so,” Yue Yang nodded and confirmed. “Although the Chaotic Energy in the endless void was very terrifying, fortunately, my teacher was a master of space teleportation, so I stayed in it for a while and fumbled around before coming out. Ah, I understand your feelings— it was a shock, wasn’t it? Allow me to express my deep sympathy and condolences to you, and of course, my gratitude!”

“Gratitude?” Red Sky River was even more surprised.

“Yes, without your Divine Vacuum Explosion Bomb and the Burial of Divine Fire, I wouldn’t have been able to merge this Primordial Ancient Rune immedately. This was a very difficult task, but presumably, I think you were aware of that as well! With your selfless help, I was timely sent into the endless void, where my body and the Primordial Ancient Rune absorbed the source of the universe and resonated with it in a comprehensive way. That was the only reason why I obtained success! Now that I mention it, I really want to thank you—if it weren’t for you, I guess it would have taken at least half a year, or even longer, to become fully integrated. Besides, even if it was integrated, there was no way it could turn out to be as perfect as it is now!” Student Yue Yang said that he was very moved in his heart and he wanted to give him a picture that wrote, ‘Becoming Selfless For The Sake Of The Country—Its Peace, Sovereignty and Prosperity’. With that, he would present it as a gift for Red Sky River.

Red Sky River was so angry that his nose flared.

A mere mortal was unable to be graced with death’s door no matter what I do; I threw him into the endless void but instead, it allowed him to successfully merge with the Primordial Ancient Rune…This is simply unreasonable! Is it really necessary to use the last forbidden move to kill this kid?

While there was still a hint of hesitation from Red Sky River, it was student Yue Yang’s turn to fight back.

Although the Primordial Ancient Rune was even more integrated with each punch, the 10,000 blows were still painful after all. Student Yue Yang, who had never suffered a loss, decided to return this kind of ‘help’ to Red Sky River. He even did so tenfold, and perhaps a hundredfold! Didn’t you punch me 10,000 times? Okay, it’s my turn to reward you with 100,000 punches. If you are not satisfied, how about a million punches?

Yue Yang rushed towards Red Sky River, ready to make a move.

Between the two, the Eternal Wheel flashed.

Yue Yang, who had integrated the Primordial Ancient Rune, felt that the mysterious power of that Ancient Rune and the power of the Eternal Wheel were both rising at the same time. Red Sky River found that even if he possessed a Divine body, he became instantly stagnant and was completely unable to move.

With the addition of the Primordial Ancient Rune, the Eternal Wheel had almost reached the rank of ‘Empyrean’.

And this was obtained when Yue Yang had yet to combine the Primordial Ancient Rune and the Eternal Wheel into one.

Otherwise, Red Sky River would remain stagnant for an infinite eternity in this Eternal Wheel. Unless Yue Yang’s Will was lifted, there would not come a day where he could break free.

chapters.title: Chapter 916 - Eternal Start, Exterminated End
chapters.body:
Chapter 916 - Eternal Start, Exterminated End

Chapter 916: Eternal Start, Exterminated End

Yue Yang responded and returned a hit on Red Sky River’s body.

The initial power was not all that fast.

Gradually, the faster he fought, his fists became even more densely packed like the downpour of a rain. As the momentum continued, Red Sky River couldn’t remember how many punches he had received.

If it weren’t for his indestructible Divine body, Red Sky River felt that he would have never been able to hold himself even if he was twice as strong. The Eternal Wheel, unknowingly, flickered with the passage of time. At the moment where it disappeared completely, Red Sky River did not run away. Instead, he forcibly caught Yue Yang’s fist with his palm, “You- are you done playing?”

He grabbed Yue Yang’s fists with both hands and raised the majestic power in his body.

Pulling Yue Yang away from the ground and shaking him like a ragdoll, he then smashed his body down heavily.

In the smashing frenzy of the shattered space, Red Sky River’s head was pressured fiercely by the force, whereas the same irresistible degree of power shook half of Yue Yang’s body into the endless void. While stretching out his hand that was holding on to Yue Yang, Red Sky River sneered with an arrogant gesture of standing above, “No matter how many punches you give me, I won’t be hurt in the slightest! That is because I have a Divine body—an immortal body that will never die! If you want to defeat me with several weird skills and the same degree of power that resembles an ant, then I can tell you that you can never achieve your goal; never! What am I? I am a God and you are just poor mortals— this is the biggest difference between the two of us and this also the gap that you can never cross!”

“Even if you are a God, I can kill you!” Yue Yang’s eyes were full of murderous intent.

“Dream on!” Red Sky River saw his soaring murderous aura. Even if he had enough self-confidence, he couldn’t help feeling a little uneasy. This kid’s killing intent is really too heavy!

The Blizzard Goddess took advantage of the stalemate and suddenly struck again.

Her fists hit the left and right ears of Red Sky River for the third time.

This time, her power was ten times stronger than the combined power of the previous two attempts. Red Sky River was beaten and shaken as the first thought in his heart was that this LIfe Guardian beast knew how to hide her strength. Based on her current power, it would have been impossible for her to be flying into a pile of rocks after being hit by his punch before. This Life Guardian Beast’s strength was not far off his own radar.

Red Sky River, who was suffering from a splitting headache, was very angry, but there was also a wave of shame at being deceived.

The opponent had the power to reach the level of a Divine General, so assuming that it was easy enough to win someone of that rank with just a slap to the face was too naive of him.

The Red Sky Divine Flames ignited violently with Red Sky River’s anger. Like a volcanic eruption, a golden energy clone was successfully formed above his head. Waving golden meteor-like fists and fighting back, he forced the Blizzard Goddess General to backtrack a few tens of metres away.

The danger appeared again.

Red Sky River found that both himself and the energy clone had stagnated. The feeling was similar to the power of the Eternal Wheel, but this time, it came with a certain irresistible pressure of succumbing to a Will. The light like an unknown Divine Light shone incomparably, causing Red Sky River and the energy clone to feel a strong burn at the same time. No, this was not merely causing damage on the surface, but it was a judgement towards the soul.

A small hand that was as fair as a white orchid slowly stretched forward from its original posture that was holding onto a shining ball of light.

It closed its hand into a fist before lightly flicking Red Sky River’s forehead.

That kind of power was so gentle that it couldn’t even kill a mosquito.

However, Red Sky River felt that the soul in his mind was impacted by a kind of terrifying energy—a power no less than that of the Blizzard Goddess General. Along with the traces of the wounds that she had inflicted and not recovered, the injuries of his deepened, broadened and there was a trace of heaviness that now lingered.

The soul instinctively allowed his Divine power to protect him and instantly cut off the contact with the outside world.

The little soft hand that couldn’t further hurt Red Sky River turned in small spirals before officially releasing its power.

Red Sky River’s frontal bone was blasted into a crack with this concealed blow of hers.

Moreover, the energy clone originally associated with the Red Sky River spirit allowed the Blizzard Goddess to take it captive and forcefully drag it out of his body. In coordination with Yue Yang’s movements, the energy clone was placed on the Nirvana Pillar of Fire in the palm of Yue Yang’s palm, purifying over the Pillar of Fire. This action was very similar to a human barbecue, except for the fact that she was the spirit that remained after the Nirvana Flame purified Red Sky River’s energy clone.

“Oh no!”

When Red Sky River forcibly repelled the enemy’s unidentified power with his Divine power, he discovered that his energy clone had become a lump of pure energy without a master and he screamed in shock.

At this time, he discovered that the Blizzard Goddess was not the only one who was hiding her strength, but also that ‘weak’ little snake demon Loli.

This little snake demon Loli was not inferior to the Blizzard Goddess in terms of strength; in fact, her talents and the timing of her attacks were even better! It seemed that this little snake demon Lolita was a veteran who had experienced millions of wars as she carried herself in the way that she had fought countless blood-fueled battles, seemingly not as young and weak as her appearance.

Red Sky River was shocked—not only about the concealment of the opponent’s strength, but also the might of the opponent’s Will.

Faintly, he felt that this little snake demon Loli had a stronger Will than his own Divine power. Even if she was a Divine Beast and possessed the Will of a Divine Beast, she can’t surpass me, right? I am a God, after all. But why is this happening?

Without the energy clone, it was impossible to reverse the tides.

Without mental manipulation, the energy clone that caused the opponent’s mental shock and collapse, had undoubtedly merged with the ground of ice and water, making it impossible to take over again.

The only way to get out of this mess was to completely destroy the hateful human man in front of him. As long as he was killed, then the snake demon little Loli who guarded the life of this brat would also die. As for the Blizzard Goddess behind him, he would also kill her master. Enemies that wielded this kind of strength must not be allowed to survive!

The Forbidden Technique had to be used; otherwise, he had no chance of winning this battle.

Red Sky River found that he really couldn’t kill the opponent unless he used the kind of Forbidden Technique that would cause great damage to his body. “You’re a God? You’re a God-level idiot, that’s what you are!” Yue Yang’s murderous intentions now overflowed as he called upon the Grimoire. The energy cluster obtained was completely given to World for absorption. Under normal circumstances, he wouldn’t have done this, but now Yue Yang didn’t have time to deal with it. As weakening his enemy was his primary goal, Yue Yang generously rewarded the lump of energy to World. Then, he blessed five giant shadows on both bodies of Xiao Wen Li and the Blizzard Goddess so that their strengths were raised to the limit.

“Tsk!” Xiao Wen Li held a double-edged sword in her hand. Staring at Red Sky River for the second time, the restraints she wielded exploded.

“Ah!” The Blizzard Goddess took advantage of Xiao Wen Li’s hold of Red Sky River as she took two full seconds to gather her strength. At the moment Red Sky River was about to break free in the third second, the giant shadows that acted as their support directed an attack towards both sides of the God’s ears for the 4th time in total.

Boom! This time, the force was as strong as Red Sky River’s powers and he couldn’t hold it anymore.

His left and right ears burst as the eardrums shattered, whereas the power that went through the brain shook his insides into a mess. Red Sky River’s auditory fluids and blood splashed out as he howled in pain.

Red Sky River wailed for the first time, his voice as deafening as the screams of a thousand troops.

His body lost its balance due to the heavy injury. At the moment when he fell to the ground, Yue Yang held the Prison Emperor Divine Seal with both hands and slammed the wound on Red Sky River’s forehead that Xiao Wen Li had hit again, exacerbating the injury that was made! The Prison Emperor Divine Seal exploded with the mighty power that was capable of overwhelming heaven and earth. WIth just one hit, it surpassed the power of the four attacks of the Blizzard Goddess, directly smashing Red Sky River’s forehead and injuring him without mercy.This didn’t obtain Yue Yang’s approval in terms of power, however. If Yue Yang was fully integrated with it, Red Sky River’s head may be smashed to pieces by now!

Those who were hit hard like Red Sky River were especially apt in countering the shock of the attack.

He supported himself on the ground with both hands. With only one foot left, he aimed and kicked Yue Yang’s chest back in a desperate manner.

However, Yue Yang was ten times crazier than him. Desperately aiming a snatch towards Red Sky River’s chest, the power of the Law and the Divine Power of Calamity that he could master were both raised to the limit. The small metal beast jumped out as it turned into an imaginary Tong Tian War Blade. Sliding into his hands, he pierced the blade into Red Sky River’s chest fiercely with Yue Yang’s cry.

Despite the fact that Red Sky River was being impaled with the sword blade, he still wanted to resist with his Divine power.

Yue Yang went wild as his face showed a hideous look due to the use of his excessive force.

Forcing the Tong Tian War Blade with both hands as Yue Yang stepped on the chest of Red Sky River, the Chaotic Energy obtained after purifying the Divine Power of Calamity in the Desire Valley also completely exploded. Holding it under the sword of Hidden Return, it was advancing desperately.

With a puff, the Tong Tian War Blade directly penetrated through Red Sky River’s chest and his back.

With this irresistible lethality, even Red Sky River himself was stunned. A weapon that could harm a Divine body? Earth soldiers? No, Heaven Realm soldiers? Red Sky River, who could not find the answer, felt that he was already in a dangerous situation. If he could not reverse the situation, it would be dangerous. The next step for the enemy might be to use this magic weapon to chop off his head. “Divine blood, Sacrifice! “

A flash of terror flashed in Red Sky River’s eyes, pushing away Yue Yang like a lunatic.

He jumped into the air and impaled the bloody hole in his chest with his right hand before he extracted a ball of golden blood. He then muttered to himself, as if he wanted to sacrifice this ball of blood.

Numerous sparks of brilliance suddenly appeared from his body. It seemed that every inch of skin, even every pore, had thousands of Divine Light gushing out of it. Bathed in the colourful flashes of Divine Light, the body of Red Sky River quickly became huge. At a speed visible to the naked eye, it rose to a red giant of 10, 20 and gradually, 30 metres.

At the same time, a crimson river of blood appeared around his body, which enveloped him spiritually.

This was Red Sky River’s biggest Forbidden Technique in his life, the ‘Crimson Blood Sky River’ that was capable of killing large numbers of enemies through the sacrifice of his blood.

If it were not for the present time being the most critical moment between his life and death, Red Sky River would never use this Forbidden Technique. Because once it was used, then he would not be able to return to his peak state for 1000 years and would even be in a state of weakness for a long time.

“Die, we’ll see who’s tricks are better!” Yue Yang also became desperate as the Eternal Wheel was formed. At the same moment, it transformed into the Exterminating Wheel.

The Exterminating Wheel was driven by his Supreme Will and the power of the Primordial Ancient Rune.

From below, it started to rotate upward, making its way towards Red Sky River. In the sky, at the same moment that he stagnated and recovered, it launched an attack using all of its Divine Powers, causing the Crimson Blood Sky River to explode like a dam. The aftereffect made an impact on Yue Yang’s head!

The tricks of the two that naturally countered the other, broke out into action at the same time!

chapters.title: Chapter 917
chapters.body:
Chapter 917

Chapter 917: The War Of The Blood Pool Sky River

The Crimson Blood Sky River hit the top of Yue Yang’s head with the power of nine waterfalls.

In an instant, he plummeted hundreds of metres under the frozen ground, forming a huge impact and smashing a large hole amidst the ground itself.

The Crimson Blood, like fire, boiled in the hole that it created. Sizzling, the hard and once frozen soil continuously melted into magma under its burning heat, melting into a terrifying hot pool of blood. The Blizzard Goddess looked at her arm, where only a drop of Crimson Blood was splashed onto it. However, even an arm as cold as hers started to burst into flames as a hole was singed through the small spot stained with the Crimson Blood.

This was the power of the Crimson Blood, and yet, Yue Yang was bearing the brute force of the power in the pool of blood.

Xiao Wen Li, who had never left Yue Yang’s side, stared at the blood pool solemnly at this time.

Normally, she would have already jumped in to rescue Yue Yang.

Now, she wasn’t moving at all!

Even when the Blizzard Goddess approached and wanted to check on Yue Yang in the blood pond, she gently shook her head and waved her hand, indicating that the Blizzard Goddess should not come forward. She kept levitating above the blood pond despite the surface area of the pond expanding with every second and ignoring the fact that the magnitude of the boiling magma was increasing quickly as well.

“?” The Blizzard Goddess could not understand, but she knew one thing— when Yue Yang was not with her, she had better listen to this little snake demon Lolita!

On the other side, there was also a rather unusual behaviour that came from Red Sky River who was counterattacked by Yue Yang moments before.

Red Sky River’s hands suddenly fell from midair.

There was an unbelievable look of astonishment plastered on his face, as if he couldn’t believe that he, who possessed a Divine body, would actually accept damage from the enemy’s attack. Red Sky River made an instinctive movement— leaning forward and stretching out his bloody arms. He was trying to grasp the pair of severed hands as he completely forgot about the fact that his hands were already slashed off by the Exterminating Wheel. And it was this action that exacerbated some of his hidden injuries.

The only leg that remained on his body cracked silently.

It was a hundred times sharper than cutting something with the sharpest sword in the world, his sole leg was broken between the knees as it was even too late for the wound to bleed.

The once half-leaning Red Sky River flopped to the ground with an even more surprised look. It was not until this time that he realised that his only remaining leg had also been cut off by the Exterminating Wheel.

Those severed hands and the lump of ‘Divine Blood’ that clumped together in the middle, fell into the boiling pool of Crimson Blood.

White smoke came billowing out.

At the moment when the Divine blood merged into the Crimson Blood pool, Yue Yang, who was stark naked but covered in dense runes, emerged as he grabbed the two severed hands with one hand and the ball of Divine blood with the other. His body was steaming hot, and the Crimson Blood erratically eroded his skin that were not covered with the marks of the runes, but even they were constantly being swallowed by World and the other unknown forces in his body.

“Impossible! You can’t hurt my Divine body!” Red Sky River rolled on the ground after breaking his leg. Like Mjölnir that descended from the skies, he charged towards Yue Yang.

“Aish!” Yue Yang put away Red Sky River’s severed hands, and with a shake of his left hand, there was an extra speed artifact ring that formed on it.

At the moment he avoided the attack, Yue Yang smeared the Divine Blood onto the Divine Seal of the Prison Emperor.

The small metal beast that turned into a Tong Tian War Blade immediately changed back to the original body regardless of the ongoing fight. Before the Prison Emperor’s Divine Seal absorbed the blood, the little tongue of the metal beast desperately licked the blood on it. At least a small part of the blood was swallowed into the beast’s stomach. Yue Yang was so angry that he threw this little greedy critter directly into the Crimson Blood pond before he took Red Sky River’s leg to attack with all his mind and will. Following the power of the Divine Blood, the broken leg hit the Prison Emperor’s Divine Seal. If he couldn’t subdue the Prison Emperor’s Divine Seal and obtain its approval at this time, then the treasure would be ruined no matter how great it was. That was because next time, whether it was killing Red Sky River or being able to kill a snake-haired demon boy, or passing the trials in the Beast Valley— that was the time when the treasures were most needed to show off while having to wait till Yue Yang achieved the level of the Divine Supreme. The Divine tool at that time would just be icing on the cake as it was entirely optional because there would be no such urgency.

Its brilliance was like an arrow.

Hundreds of millions of brilliant light rays shot out from the Prison Emperor’s Divine Seal as Yue Yang’s body was nearly transparent from the luminance.

Except for those rune patterns, Yue Yang’s skin seemed to be penetrated by the light.

The battle with the Prison Emperor’s Divine Seal had reached the final juncture.

Although a powerful enemy was right in front of him, in order to succeed, Yue Yang had to take a risk.

Red Sky River’s face was distorted at this time. His body bounced back into the air and the Blizzard Goddess General and Xiao Wen Li, who were furiously flying around to stop him. Regardless, he whirled around in the sky and pounded on Yue Yang’s head heavily.

Normally, Yue Yang would definitely not suffer from this kind of loss.

But his mind was completely integrated into the Prison Emperor’s Divine Seal, so he couldn’t get out at the critical moment of the battle between God and man.

Yue Yang’s body was forcibly hammered into the depths of the ground by Red Sky River.. However, Red Sky River had no intention to forgive at this time as another attack shook Yue Yang from the ground. Although his combat power was reduced with both hands and limbs severed, and despite the fact that he was even greatly damaged because of the Forbidden Technique Divine Blood Sacrifice, all of his injuries were ignored. He knew that if this kid didn’t die today, then tomorrow would be his own time of death. After he succeeded in contracting the Divine Seal and possessing the ability to fully exert the power of the Divine tool, Red Sky River couldn’t be Yue Yang’s opponent after suffering such heavy injuries!

“You want to have a contract with the artifact? Keep on dreaming!” Red Sky River twisted his elbows [1] in the air and heavily landed them on the back of Yue Yang’s neck, who was still holding the Prison Emperor’s Divine Seal. Unable to resist or block the blow, Yue Yang was hit directly, spurting a mouthful of blood onto the seal after taking the impact.

[T/L Note: I initially thought that his entire arm was taken, but I guess his elbows and above remained intact]

“Die!” A Divine sword pierced through the space as if it was surpassing time, slamming on Red Sky River’s head in an instant.

It was Princess Qian Qian who hurried back.

Red Sky River was furious. Although he was wounded by the Divine sword, the blow was not heavy enough to stop his actions.

At the same moment Princess Qian Qian flew forward and held the Prison Emperor’s Divine Sword, he landed a harsh attack with the severed arm of his right hand, smashing it heavily on her. Princess Qian Qian’s sword was hit instead as she raised it in an act of parry. Red Sky River’s hands were shaking as blood flowed from both ends— even in a state of anger and desperately attacking, he was unstoppable even if his strength was repeatedly weakened!

He swiftly turned, swiping his elbow on Princess Qian Qian’s arm.

There was a muffled sound of a crack in her arm as it nearly broke.

If it were not for the guardian of the Divine Sword, Princess Qian Qian would not have been able to resist Red Sky River’s full blow.

A bloody light flashed behind Red Sky River, indicating that Xiao Wen Li’s attack was successful. Red Sky River had no time to turn around to fight back or evade as Xiao Wen Li swept him away with her tail and blasted him a hundred meters away. He was thrown far from where Yue Yang and Princess Qian Qian were.

The Blizzard Goddess jumped up high, and at the moment the Red Sky River fell to the ground, her fingers curled into fists as she hammered him.

Red Sky River was smashed deeply into the frozen ground.

Half of his body was plunged into the mud, leaving only a pair of stumped legs exposed.

The Blizzard Goddess would soon become a Cyclone Goddess. Grabbing those broken legs, she pulled Red Sky River out and smashed him onto the ground repetitively. After dozens of smashes, the whole earth was full of pits and mottled cracks.

Blood was spilled on the ground.

However, Red Sky River did not die.

At the moment when the Blizzard Goddess jumped high and threw him, he headbutted her hard. As the Blizzard Goddess stagnated, Red Sky River escaped in an instant. Under Xiao Wen Li’s slash, he penetrated himself into the ground, emerged far ahead and slammed into Yue Yang, who was still using his spirit to fight with the Prison Emperor’s Divine Seal.

Princess Qian Qian guarded Yue Yang as she stayed by his side and slashed Red Sky River down with a single sword, but this couldn’t stop his advancement.

In the burst of blood, Red Sky River crashed into Yue Yang.

He was even able to swipe at the Prison Emperor’s Divine Seal with both of his stumped arms as he prepared to cause a disruption, making Yue Yang, who was so disturbed, vomit blood and fall to the ground. “Don’t think about it!” Princess Qian Qian didn’t even have time to retract the sword as she hugged Yue Yang directly, wanting to push him aside. She embraced Yue Yang and that caused Red Sky River to hit her shoulder, crushing her internal organs. Her entire being flew back like a broken kite and a mouthful of red blood spurted out of her mouth, half of it sprinkled on the Prison Emperor’s Divine Seal. With her splash of blood, the Prison Emperor’s Divine Seal that had the upper hand suddenly dimmed. Then, insane bursts of golden light shone from it. Not only Yue Yang and Princess Qian Qian, but even Xiao Wen Li, the Blizzard Goddess, and even the entire sky and the earth were dyed into a shimmering shade of gold by the light!

“I’m going to fight you to the death!” Red Sky River despairingly sensed the enemy’s changes. Instead of hitting the enemy hard, he didn’t know why he actually helped them successfully contract the Divine Seal.

There was no other way except to desperately fight.

Red Sky River gritted his teeth and rammed into Yue Yang again.

This collision completely exhausted her strength and the Blizzard Goddess was unable to catch them. Xiao Wen Li directly let the air current carry them as Princess Qian Qian held onto Yue Yang. She couldn’t escape the attack, so she had to grit her teeth, turn Yue Yang in her arms, and forcibly resist the enemy’s blow with her back, hoping that this would be useful. Princess Qian Qian has no time to think too much. She only hoped that she could use herself to save the life of her lover as nothing else mattered.

Boom!

The earth-shaking sound reverberated across the whole world.

The iceberg in the distance collapsed as if the heavens and the earth seemed to hang upside down, resembling a scene of the end of the world.

The shockwave tore through the space, sweeping all kinds of Chaotic Energy. The red blood in the blood pool and all kinds of wandering energy blasted into an extremely strange, blood-red energy vortex!

The only thing that could stand on the frozen ground is Princess Qian Qian’s Prison Emperor’s Divine Sword.

Only the artifact could help maintain her stride.

She didn’t know how long had passed before Princess Qian Qian opened her eyes slowly in panic. Then, she was surprised to find that she was not dead and not even harmed. Except for her arms and shoulders, there was no feeling of bruising on her back at all. I’m fine, what’s going on? Her consciousness was certain and from there, she realised that Yue Yang, who was in her arms, had probed in the void as he held her shoulders with one hand and grasped the Prison Emperor’s Divine Seal with the other. Under the Divine Seal of the Prison Emperor, it was Red Sky River whose skull was completely sunken.

It turned out that Red Sky River’s full-scale attack finally went through to Yue Yang, who in turn, willed the Divine Seal to stop the attack.

As soon as she understood, Princess Qian Qian collapsed to the ground.

She couldn’t stand any longer.

The facial features of Red Sky River overflowed with blood. His face was in a very horrible shape while drops of blood converged into a stream of red, dripping on the ground.

“Ah!”

Suddenly, the broken arm swung frantically, sending Yue Yang flying backward. At this time, Red Sky River no longer had the desire to fight on as his one and only intention was to escape. He had already understood that with the extent of Yue Yang’s attack, even if he didn’t have the Divine Seal, the Blizzard Goddess and the little snake demon Lolita, he wouldn’t be able to go up against Yue Yang either.

Now I must risk everything to escape— if I can’t run from here, I will die!

When Red Sky River turned to escape, a flash of light illuminated from the top of the sky.

The Exterminating Wheel that was shot out by Yue Yang came back. The rotation was unchanged from its original form as it spun in a whirl to destroy everything. Red Sky River escaped a hundred meters away before his body was cracked in half, making him fall onto the frozen ground.

Even so, the two halves of Red Sky River still wanted to struggle and crawl.

He still wanted to recombine the two halves to escape.

However, it was impossible to restore the situation.

Holding the Prison Emperor’s Divine Seal with one hand and forming the White Splendid Frost in his other hand, Yue Yang had already flown down with the demeanour of a king who ruled over the world.

This battle had been a hard struggle.

Red Sky River— die!

chapters.title: Chapter 918
chapters.body:
Chapter 918

Chapter 918: I Can’t Bear To Do So

Seeing Red Sky River face his end, Yue Yang’s spirit relaxed as he fainted and fell to the ground.

Xiao Wen Li quickly took over his last task, which was to temporarily put Red Sky River’s body into the storage ring, whereas the slave picked up Yue Yang and hurriedly brought him back to the Grimoire World to heal his injuries. Princess Qian Qian cried and laughed at the same time as there were still lingering fears in her heart. She was afraid that Red Sky River wouldn’t give in to death and was just waiting for the prime time to strike again. She carefully observed the surrounding environment and after truly sensing that the battle was over, she relaxed her nerves as her body gradually fell to the ground as well.

The Blizzard Goddess quickly stepped forward and held the arm of Princess Qian Qian.

She then quietly waited for Xiao Wen Li.

After purifying the brilliance and the extreme cold ice to seal the Crimson Blood pool, Xiao Wen Li summoned her Grimoire and called upon the Stone Element Medusa, Storm Mermaid, Thunderbolt Naga and the Ice Serpent Demon to take over their work.

Drifting over, she led Princess Qian Qian and the Blizzard Goddess to return to Yue Yang’s Grimoire World.

In the Grimoire World, there was already a mess.

Many places were piled up by huge icebergs like small hills, and in some places there were traces of the Red Sky Divine Flame that did not have the time to be purified. There were also countless unknown divine powers that contradicted Yue Yang’s Will in the Grimoire World, causing large and small energy vortexes. Outside the living room, Xue Wu Xia’s body was levitating in the sky, constantly blending in with the unknown Godhead. The Book of Truth was also blooming with thousands of brilliant rays, gradually evolving from the original sub-Divine artifact into an almost invisible artifact evolution.

Yue Yang was lying on the bed. Although his Will no longer contended with the Prison Emperor’s Divine Seal, but because of the previous contract, he had almost exhausted all of his energy.

Therefore, at this time, he had already fallen asleep out of fatigue.

“What a reckless guy!”

“Always insisting to shoulder everything alone!”

“Aside from being a little tamer in your sleep, you’re usually such an aggravating guy!”

“Besides, you’re always like that— making others worry all the time. When will you let my heart be at ease, huh?”

Princess Qian Qian draped herself over Yue Yang. With a gentleness that Yue Yang would never see when he was awake, her bloodied fingers stroked his face as she lowered his head again to kiss him softly.

Xiao Wen Li and the Blizzard Goddess smiled at each other.

They all know what kind of character this ‘Tigress’ was.

She was strong and victorious, so it was common for her to fight with Yue Yang. She was always waving her small fists at him, which made it really rare to see the gentle side of her! In fact, maybe this was her real side! They’d have to wait until Yue Yang fell asleep because there would be no one who was able to spark an argument with her. With that, she, who was usually aggressive and powerful, would eventually regain her true personality. Although it was not all the same, the real Princess Qian Qian was somewhat similar to the gentle Yue Yu. This was the little secret of the Princess— one that Yue Yang wouldn’t have imagined could be true!

“What did Si-niang say? She asked you to take good care of me, right? And the result? Now, Xue Wu Xia and I will have to take care of you, you big villain…”

Princess Qian Qian hugged Yue Yang tightly.

Muttering to herself for a while, a shallow smile formed on her face. From time to time, a tear of deep love dropped from her eyes, warm and hot, as it dripped onto Yue Yang’s sleeping face.

This boasting man had at some point broken savagely into her heart, refusing to come out! Yes, he was such a savage little hooligan, what a damn brat!

Princess Qian Qian relaxed her mind, and before she knew it, she fell asleep and slept in his arms.

Even though she fell asleep, there was still a hint of dampness on her eyelashes.

The corners of her lips even showed a sweet smile.

Her hand was placed in his big hand, but she clenched her into a small fist, as if she was about to hit someone. Maybe, in a dream, she could meet the big bad guy in her mind who made her angry, laugh and cry all the time!

After Xiao Wen Li and Blizzard Goddess looked at them, they laughed at each other again.

The two of them also felt exhausted.

Sitting next to Yue Yang, they snuggled against each other and recalled all the previous battles, but they couldn’t help but smile knowingly.

After today’s battle, they could speak of attacks, techniques, killing intent, etc.

Red Sky River was far from being compared with the elites who have been in their battlefields in the past. When he killed the Navagraha Empress Mother, Zhi Zun and Yue Yang were completely exhausted, where even The Qilin Girl, Bing Yin, was summoned to help. Yue Yang also used the uncontrollable Golden Giant’s Law Power to carry out a super heavy blow at the time in order to defeat the Empress. If it weren’t for Phoenix SIsters and the Heavenly Sword Goddess that pledged their absolute protection on them, Yue Yang and Zhi Zun, who won, would probably die under the Comet Sky Descent along with the Empress herself!

Now, with Yue Yang’s power alone, he managed to defeat Red Sky River.

This did not rule out the fact that Red Sky River had just escaped from the seal and even self-destructed.

But it also did not rule out the fact that Yue Yang had repeatedly made breakthroughs after the Empress’s fight where he was now making rapid progress and even entering the Land of Trials. Getting through the Rain, Wind, Sand, Desire and Beast Valleys and cultivating together with all the women in the World Tree. From there, he resonated with the consciousness of many predecessors of the World Tree, where he explored the ‘Divine Realm’ that was impossible to see before.

Finally, the reason for Yue Yang’s victory was not ruled out. There was a reason for the integration of the Primordial Ancient Rune and the contract with the PrisonEmperor’s Divine Seal.

But even if you add up all the factors and make a comparison, the Empress who invaded the Tong Tian Tower was far better than the Red Sky River of today.

Red Sky River possessed the Divine Flames, a Divine body and the Divine Blood that even the Empress dreamt of. Just these advantages were enough to make a warrior stand in an invincible position!

If the Empress had obtained the same type of Divine Flames and the Divine Blood of Red Sky River to achieve the level of an immortal body, then she would definitely not lose to Yue Yang’s hands as she did.

The Empress could beat Yue Yang senselessly merely by the only skill that she had cultivated.

If it weren’t for Zhi Zun, Yue Yang would not be her opponent anyway.

In terms of overall strength, Red Sky River would undoubtedly beat the Empress by many levels; but in terms of combat effectiveness and battlefield performance, he was not near the level of the Empress at all. According to Yue Yang’s words, Red Sky River was just a nouveau riche who had obtained a lot of blood!

After one day.

When Yue Yang opened his eyes, he found Princess Qian Qian sleeping next to him, but she was sleeping in a less-than-elegant-manner with her arms around his neck. She pouted her pink lips, as if she was about to call out the words of conquest— ‘Little thief, surrender to the Princess’. His slender member was laid on the shoulders of the sleeping slave who laid on the bed. One of her legs was placed directly on Yue Yang’s lower abdomen and his entire body was squished between her legs, forcing her knees to bend as if she was afraid of him falling under the bed while he was sleeping.

No wonder. In a dream, there was a beauty who used her feet to tease me down there from time to time. It turns out that it was this rouge tiger girl with a terrible sleeping form!

“Don’t go…” He didn’t know what Princess Qian Qian dreamed of as she hugged Yue Yang tightly.

“It’s really heavy, lift your leg,” Yue Yang felt that it didn’t matter if he let her leg press him down. The little slave even bore the weight of her leg for when she fell asleep. Looking too unbearable, he quickly reached out and moved her under the arms of Princess Qian Qian. He moved the Princess’s legs away from the little slave’s shoulders.

“Oh? Oh! Why did this young slave fall asleep? Master, you can get up later; wait for this young slave make a good meal in the kitchen! Okay, let the Princess take a rest for a while. The little slave will be very fast, I promise!” The young slave opened her eyes and found that Yue Yang was waking up. Cheering for joy, she immediately covered her small mouth for fear of awakening Princess Qian Qian. She pushed Yue Yang back to the bed, carefully covering him with a quilt before she happily ran all the way to the kitchen to make some food for her owner and prepared some hot water for him to wash up with.

Xiao Wen Li and Blizzard Goddess General, who were alarmed as they heard the rustles outside the door, peeked in and took a look.

Xiao Wen Li came in and hugged Yue Yang. She gave him a prompt kiss before she went out again.

The Blizzard Goddess did not.

She just nodded as she was not as close to Yue Yang as Xiao Wen Li, or maybe she didn’t dare to get too close. After all, she didn’t spend too much time with Yue Yang after enlightening her wisdom.

While everyone was away, student Yue Yang naturally started the cunning and lingering touches of a sly wolf, but Princess Qian Qian did not wake up. Apart from getting a perfect touch, he didn’t feel too much desire to conquer her. Yue Yang untied her armour, kissed the blooming red plum on the beautiful jade pile of snow [1] and gently covered her with a quilt.

[T/L Note: Red plums is another way of saying ‘nipples’ in a less explicit way, whereas the pile of snow refers to the fairness of her skin resembling a layer of white snow]

This tigress belonged to him forever.

There was no rush to eat ‘it’ for a while—he must conquer her mind and body together, and it should be at the highest achievement of conquest!
