Now he would rather let her sleep well as she was really exhausted after running and being frightened for so many times!

Outside the door, the young slave ran back like a happy bird as everything was already prepared. First, she waited for Yue Yang to have a big meal before she prepared hot water for him slightly bashfully, “Master, let the little slave serve you as you take a bath. Last time at Sister Sky Law’s place, this slave studied very seriously… Huh? These symbols… Can’t the patterns disappear?”

Yue Yang also looked at the Primordial Ancient Rune patterns on his body and shook his head, “Maybe it will take a while, at least one month!”

The young slave sar behind Yue Yang. Using a technique once performed by the Phoenix Fairy Beauty, the world’s unparalleled creamy porcelain ‘bubbles’ started to gently rub his back. She leaned into his ear emotionally and asked, “Is the young slave doing this right? Sister Sky Law or Sister Hai Lan—which one among them is considered more of the standard?”

“This… the standard doesn’t matter. As long as you have this intention, it is already worthy of praise,” Yue Yang moved his hand and massaged the young slave gently.

Once his sly hand made a move, he couldn’t take it back.

Easily, the little slave who had worked hard to learn how to please her master had soon become a crumpled pile of soft dough.

After a while, a certain transmigrated man couldn’t help but start a war. He put his arms around the weakened little female slave and prepared to find a venue for a fierce battle of ammunition. A certain cute young slave climbed into the pool of warm water as she broke free from his embrace. Then, she leaned on it and lifted her hips in a respectful gesture, sighing to her master with a little tinge of regret, “The young slave has not done a complete one yet. Next time, this young slave will not be so useless, for the master must have the greatest happiness! Ah, master shouldn’t kiss me there! Oh, the slave can’t hold it in any longer…”

The fierce battle was like an endless pour of rain.

After an unspecified amount of time, the two people came to a truce contentedly.

Yue Yang waited for the little slave fell asleep, feeling energetic and refreshed. He simply sealed Red Sky River’s body in the Magic Tower and ran out again to collect a large amount of ice into the Grimoire World, preparing to transmit it into the Black Hole Seal Space next time.

After finishing everything, he slipped back to sleep with Princess Qian Qian. He didn’t seem to appear like a wolf who had stolen quick touches before. Instead, he looked like a good boy.

After Qian Qian woke up, she threw a fist at him, where he was left dumbfounded.

“No way? Tigress, I was such a good boy; will I be beaten if I accompany you to rest from now on?” Student Yue Yang desperately shouted in injustice.

“Are you embarrassed? You untied all my clothes while I was asleep. What bad things have you ever done? What are you doing? Do you still want to deny it?” Princess Qian Qian found her bodice torn. The peaks of her curves were half exposed and the red plums of hers have remained tensed and pursed mischievously. It would be strange if this kid had not stolen the kiss! He still wanted to speak about injustice? He’s asking for death to be granted!

“…” Classmate Yue Yang forgot that he had made this mistake. He only wiped out some traces of the fierce battle with the young slave, which made him forget about the fact that he had untied Tigress’s bra and even slipped his mind to clasp it back on. He couldn’t do anything about letting her catch on like that as there was no denying the truth.

“Prisoner, what are your last wishes before you die?” Princess Qian Qian stared at the dejected pervert.

“I do have one,” Yue Yang suddenly rushed to Princess Qian Qian and used his sly hands to initiate physical contact, “I just kissed them a few times, but I haven’t touched them enough. I will be tortured after I have touched it enough… Ahhh, you’re biting me. Okay, I’ll bite you too…Hey, it’s not fair; you’re biting me so hard, but I’m biting you gently…”

“You can also use force. If you have the ability, you can bite off this piece of meat! Anyway, it can’t be as big as Sister Xue’s, so you might as well just bite it off!”

“I can’t bear to do so…”

chapters.title: Chapter 919
chapters.body:
Chapter 919

Chapter 919: Rebirth, Crescent Moon

Besides spending a few hours returning to the sixth floor of the Thunder Fortress, letting Fat Toad Jia De bring to Jun Wu You the news that he and Princess Qian Qian were practising on the tenth floor, Yue Yang never left the already devastated unit world.

During the day, Yue Yang used the small Power of the Laws to guide the Black Hole Seal Space.

He absorbed a lot of ice ridges to help Empress Fei Wen Li to speed up the rate of completion for her ice world. In the evening, Yue Yang returned tiredly to the Grimoire World and enjoyed the gentle massage of the slave. If Princess Qian Qian was in a good mood, she would come and take a bath with him, but he was not allowed to touch her— otherwise, she would bite him. The beautiful days passed by, but even as another ten days passed, Xue Wu Xia never regained consciousness. Yue Yang guessed that it would take at least half a year for Wu Xia to fully integrate with that unknown Godhead.

And the estimation was even done based on the fact that Yue Yang would be transferring some of his True Qi to her daily.

That unknown Godhead was too powerful.

Until now, Yue Yang still couldn’t figure out why a warrior with such a powerful Godhead would sacrifice his life to seal Red Sky River.

“Xue Wu Xia is already considered to be in a pretty good shape. In addition to getting a Godhead, the Book of Truth was also promoted to an artifact. And I’m the only one stuck without any additional improvements!” Princess Qian Qian couldn’t help but become slightly jealous. In this battle, Empress Fei Wen Li gained ice energy, Xue Wu Xia obtained the Godhead, and even Yue Yang got the Primordial Ancient Rune— she was the only one who didn’t manage to gain anything.

“Tigress, there will be something that suits you next time!” Yue Yang hurriedly comforted her.

“Let me bite you,” Princess Qian Qian demanded.

“Huh?” Yue Yang felt odd—What kind of request was that?

“I’m angry…” Naturally, Princess Qian Qian’s request could not be met and that was because student Yue Yang temporarily conquered her rage with a more brutal action—that is, to seal her mouth with a suffocating kiss. That way, there was no chance for her to bite anyone around her!

Princess Qian Qian failed to obtain any sort of treasure, which was why Yue Yang felt a little guilty in his heart. Tigress’s effort was still quite large, so she can’t be at loss too much.

Therefore, he decided to take time to help her refine the Prison Emperor’s Divine Sword. The collapsed iceberg was almost entirely collecte and filled anyways.

If Yue Yang’s decision had been made before he kissed her, Princess Qian Qian would definitely not agree to it.

But after receiving such a suffocating kiss, she remained weak and was unable to form the usual “tigress Coercion’.

She had to abstain and let Yue Yang win this time.

Before helping Princess Qian Qian in refining the Prison Emperor’s Divine Sword, there was a problem. He needed to find a way to rescind the ownership and make the sword Tigress’s sword. Yue Yang was the master that the Divine Sword had recognised, but because of the interference of the Prison Emperor’s Legacy, the person who used it ended up becoming Princess Qian Qian. If Yue Yang cleared all the remaining legacies of the Prison Emperor, then the new Prison Emperor’s Divine Sword would definitely recognize Yue Yang as the master. With that, not only would Princess Qian Qian become unable to integrate it, she would not even be able to use it now. Now that Yue Yang had a more powerful Prison Emperor Divine Seal, the day he completely eliminated the lingering signs of the Prison Emperor over the Divine Seal and made it his own, the power of the Divine Sword would also increase as well!

Therefore, Yue Yang still hoped from the bottom of his heart that Princess Qian Qian could continue to use the Divine Sword.

The heroic figure of her wearing armour and sword was actually very cute.

It’s just the fact that Yue Yang, a lunatic, always imagined a day would come when he could ‘push down’ Tigress without undressing the armour. He never said it out aloud, but that sort of conquering skill was what life truly was about!

“What are you thinking about? Your saliva is about to flow out!” Princess Qian Qian slammed Yue Yang who was in a daze with her fist. This was because she hated his lustful appearance most.

This attack failed to knock some gentlemanly sense into Yue Yang, but it did help in forming some ideas in his mind.

Actually, those ideas weren’t something that just formed out of the physical attack.

He had thought of similar ideas a long time ago.

But at that time, his strength was insufficient as the abilities he mastered were at a level that was very different from what it was now.

The most important thing was that without enough materials, even if it was intentional, it couldn’t be completed, so Yue Yang had left that idea behind for a long time. Today, after getting a good hit from Princess Qian Qian, Yue Yang remembered the idea and further formed a brand-new concept on that idea. “Ah, ah! I thought about it, but before I help you purify the Prison Emperor Divine Sword, I have to do an experiment first to make sure of something and accumulate some experience at the same time. Wait for me!” He immediately grabbed her hands with joy as soon as he confirmed his next actions. She held her little hand and forced a kiss on it, making Princess Qian Qian’s fingers tremble.

He didn’t care about getting dressed, so he appeared naked out of the water.

Then, he dashed all the way to his laboratory.

Princess Qian Qian saw it and reacted. Her blushing face was feverish and she was very angry on the surface, scolding him, “Idiot! Look at yourself! Look at what you look like, oh dear!”

But she felt oddly gleeful on the inside.

This guy really looked like a big kid sometimes.

Whenever he thinks of something, he’ll do it straight away and abandon everything else, geez… I don’t even know if I should praise his devotion and dedication, or to criticise that he’s such an impulsive person. But, if I were to clarify things, he could be serious when the situation calls for it!

She was actually very happy to see Yue Yang busy as she felt that he was the most attractive at this time!

Others thought that Yue Yang’s smile was the most attractive part of him, but she doesn’t think of it that way.

She just thought that the pervert himself would like to initiate something naughty.

“Crescent Moon, you finally have a reincarnation day; who would have guessed! I thought you were going into the warehouse as a souvenir!” Yue Yang sighed incomparably when he summoned his Crescent Moon blade. Because of his lack of strength at the beginning, Yue Yang could only achieve Platinum Rank when casting the Crescent Moon— even trying to get to the Holy Rank was hopeless. As a result, this sharp blade, which was originally very useful in the early stages, had almost no chance to appear in the later stages. Especially the evolution of the Tao Tie Blade and the presence of the two terrestrial items, the Star Gathering Heavenly Scorpio, completely took the place of the Crescent Moon. Forget the metal beasts,Tao Tie Blade and the Star Gathering Heavenly Scorpio, just the Black Light Holy Dagger and the Five Colours of Divine Light could result in the Crescent Moon Blade rusting inside the storage area.If it wasn’t for the fact that he needed to confuse and weaken Red Sky River, Yue Yang would not have thought about using Crescent Moon.

In this battle, Yue Yang obtained a lot of Divine Blood.

Most of it was absorbed by the PrisonEmperor’s Divine Seal, but he still managed to get ten drops for himself.

Yue Yang decided to upgrade his own Crescent Moon. Although it wouldn’t reach the level of a Holy Rank Earth Divine Weapon like the Tao Tie Blade, he could also make it a killing weapon that at least bore the rank of a Holy Weapon, right?

The most important tool was no longer a problem.

While using the Black Hole Seal Space to swallow the iceberg, Yue Yang discovered that there was a core area of the iceberg. In the extremely cold ice core, there were still a few traces of that unknown holy and supreme spiritual sense. It was heavily broken and it was impossible to recover, but maybe it was the Divine Supremacy that had inadvertently drifted to the ice core before dispersing its consciousness.

Yue Yang couldn’t read the memory of that predecessor nor did he know any information about her during her lifetime. He only learned from the Godhead she left behind that she was a female.

Perhaps using such a powerful female senior to become own spirit was a bit disrespectful.

But this might be the only way to continue to commemorate her.

Otherwise, while waiting for the ice core to dissipate, the last few remaining pieces of Divine Consciousness would disappear in smoke and become annihilated.

“I don’t know how to call you, senior. Since there’s no turning back now, please possess my Crescent Moon and fight with me from now on! The Crescent Moon is of the frost attribute, which is why I don’t think you would dislike it. Hence, please merge with it and help me eliminate my enemies in the future!” In order to protect the few strands of spiritual consciousness left by that unknown predecessor, Yue Yang personally made a cut on his finger and used his own blood to draw a picture of the enlightenment of the new Primordial Ancient Rune onto the Crescent Moon Blade. With an ice core that was the size of a small mountain, the Divine Blood of the Goddess wrapped around the soul of the unknown predecessor and slowly poured into the Crescent Moon, followed by the refining through the Nirvana Flame.

After being refined, the Crescent Moon will usher in a brand new change.

What will it become?

Yue Yang himself couldn’t imagine it.

Because he gave the selection rights of the final form to the unnamed predecessor’s remaining spiritual consciousness to show his respect for the Goddess.

One day passed.

As the refining reached its peak state, Yue Yang bit his tongue, spraying his own blood and the Chaotic Origin Energy in his body into the blade.

Princess Qian Qian and the little slave were too nervous to even breathe. Princess Qian Qian tightly held the hilt of her sword as the little slave covered her mouth adorably—for fear that her teeth would tremble with tension and for fear that the sound the jittering of her teeth would affect Yue Yang’s final refining process.

Thousands of brilliance bloomed like flowers.

The colourful light resembled a rainbow as they were spreading in bursts. At the same time, an invisible, ice-cold Will permeated the entire Grimoire World.

Ding!

With a sound that resembled a sound of the Heaven’s beckons, the most precious ‘Dream Ice Crystal Gold’, ice core, Divine Blood, the unknown goddess’s spiritual sense, Chaos Origin Energy, and Yue Yang’s blood that he obtained from the Demon Sovereign Area were all added. Finally, under the refinement of the Innate Sword Qi and the Nirvana Flame did the reincarnation of the blade become successful. It broke past the level of advancements that it couldn’t achieve previously and advanced immensely compared to what it was before!

It was suspended in the air through the power of Yue Yang’s mind.

Compared with the original half-moon-shaped blade, this time, it extended both of its sides. The curved blade was more slender and thinner, making it look like a work of art.

The Dream Ice Crystal Gold and the ice core seamlessly merged together, turning the blade into a blade befitting of a weapon in war.

At the core, there was a spherical Chaotic Origin Energy.

The Chaos Origin Energy was the fusion of the Divine Blood and Yue Yang’s blood. After the blood of Yue Yang had swallowed the Divine Blood, a new kind of blood was formed as it was now tasked to store the spiritual consciousness of the unknown Goddess. Of course, the three of them were also perfectly fused together. It turned out that the Primordial Ancient Rune pattern ‘Everlasting’ and the Heavenly rune pattern, ‘Frost’ and ‘Sharp’, have also formed a specially wonderful mutation and evolution under the new life of the ancient rune pattern which Yue Yang merged with his blood.

The new Primordial Ancient Rune blood map went through its own ‘rebirth’ whereas the increase mutated its entire ‘immortality’, turning it into an ‘Eternal Existence’ that was beyond the general Primordial Ancient Rune pattern.

Even the original ‘Frost’ and ‘Sharp’.

The advanced metamorphosis had also led the two blades to become Glacier and the Split Heaven that were close to the power of ancient runes as their power had been raised to a completely different level.

The Crescent Moon that had just been reborn slowly fell back on Yue Yang’s hands. Its shape was not very abnormal as the original shape became perfect after Yue Yang’s design. The spiritual sense of that unknown goddess just extended it a bit to make it look more slender and elegant. On the outside of Yue Yang’s blood rune, there was an extra layer of fine patterns, which may be the signs of her life. However, Yue Yang didn’t know what sort of inflorescences belonged to these delicate patterns or what they meant.

Like a work of art instead of a murder weapon, it has already made a leap in quality that surpassed Yue Yang’s original expectations.

Now, it has become the existence of one of the sub-Divine artifacts.

From the original Platinum Rank, directly crossing the Holy Rank and leaping straightforwardly to the sub-Divine Rank. If the unknown Goddess had more spiritual knowledge, or if she could carry the Godhead, the Crescent Moon might be able to become a Divine Ranked weapon even if there were only the remaining pieces of the Godhead!

It was a pity that the unknown goddess left behind an amount of spiritual knowledge that was too little and the actual Godhead itself was merging with Xue Wu Xia, so the Crescent Moon could only obtain a sub-Divine rank.

“From now on, I will still call you Crescent Moon. From now on, please accompany me to slay the devil and slaughter the Gods!” Being able to reach the sub-Divine Weapon had already exceeded Yue Yang’s expectations by a far margin. He originally only thought that it would be promoted to the Holy Rank at most, not even the Superior Holy Rank. But who would have thought that the blade was able to achieve the level of a sub-Divine Rank! Yue Yang, who was extremely satisfied and extremely excited, raised the Crescent Moon and couldn’t help but make a bold statement.

“Ding……”

It seemed to ring in response to its Master’s statement as the Crescent Moon glowed with utter brilliance, resembling a spring day in a field of flowers.

It let out a cry that sounded like Heaven’s call, which reverberated immensely into the depths of the people’s hearts. For a long time, it did not calm down, making Princess Qian Qian and the little slave who were onlookers, tremble due to the overwhelming force.

Princess Qian Qian rushed in at this time and directly punched Yue Yang, “Bad guy, I can’t believe you really succeeded!”

Yue Yang took the opportunity to initiate physical contact and hugged Tigress for a bit.

Not waiting for her to raise a fist, he turned around and hugged the slave, pretending that this was an over-excited reaction instead of a premeditated surprise attack with the intentions of a sly wolf. Princess Qian Qian rolled her eyes, please, do you think I have the talent for six senses for nothing? But she didn’t expose him and allowed him to be sassy with her.

With this best experience, Yue Yang was now confident that he could help Princess Qian Qian with her sword, but Princess Qian Qian waved her hand and said, “I’m not in a hurry. While you are in good condition, it’s better to use that strength on the Eye-Destroying Dagger and the Pisces Ribbon. The quality should also be refined—especially the Pisces Ribbon. If they could play their roles, then in some cases, we would be able to control the entire battle!”

“The Pisces Ribbon?” Yue Yang felt that there was some truth to her words. If the Pisces Ribbon could be even better, this thing would be as terrifying as the Chains of War in the ‘Heroes of Might and Magic’ [1] !

[T/L Note: It’s a computer game started in 1995 that was a strategy-based game series. I believe some people might have played it before.]

chapters.title: Chapter 920
chapters.body:
Chapter 920

Chapter 920: Your Family Tutoring Is Really Strict

It was not difficult to refine the Pisces Ribbon, but it lacked the most critical materials. The Golden Fleece that was once obtained in the Zodiac Temple before had already been integrated into the Star Gathering Heavenly Scorpion gloves.

Yue Yang hoped to find a treasure that resembled the Golden Fleece or something that was even beyond that level to refine the Pisces Ribbon.

If he was going to do it anyway, he was going to do his best.

The Eye-Destroying Dagger was only at a silver rank originally, so refining it now was the best opportunity.

Yue Yang first imprinted the Ancient Rune ‘Reality’ on it. Then, he supplemented it with the Heaven Realm Rune ‘Illusion Breaking’ and ‘Multiply Emptiness’ to blackmail with the Thunder Crystal and the Flaring Red Crystal. He also coupled it with the items he got from the Double-Headed Black Dragon in the Beast Valley— the Ancient Dragon Blood and dragon fangs were fused together to refine the Eye-Destroying Dagger to a Super Platinum Rank! Suddenly it’s improvements surpassed the Crescent Moon, but unfortunately, because the weapon itself was not blessed with an opportunity of reincarnation, even if its rank far surpassed the Super Platinum Rank, it would not be able to evolve to the Holy Rank. THis scenario was similar to how so many martial artists of the Heaven Realm were unable to step into the state of Divine Supremacy no matter how much they trained.

The Eye-Destroying Dagger that formed an extremely gorgeous appearance was now strapped to Yue Yang’s waist.

Walking outside, using it would be enough to deal with smaller matters if he wasn’t involved in large battles. If the Eye-Destroying Dagger and the Tao Tie Blade were taken out as soon as they were attacked, he guessed that they would either frighten the enemy and make them run away, or it might indirectly provoke the enemy to greedily pry and seek a chance to steal it for themselves.

Even the Super Platinum Rank was considered a rather impressive work of treasure, so using it to deal with small crowds would be more than sufficient!

“How does the capacity of the Black Hole Seal Space react to this? The iceberg is almost entirely depleted!” Princess Qian Qian assisted Yue Yang to absorb the iceberg that day, but there, she found that the huge iceberg was almost completely swallowed by the Black Hole Seal Space. If Empress Fei Wen Li was still unable to leave, then they must find another place to absorb pure ice from.

“I think that it would not be filled even if we find a few more icebergs!” Yue Yang shook his head and smiled bitterly. What kind of existence was the senior powerhouse who sealed Empress Fei Wen Li?

“Don’t be discouraged. Even the Tong Tian Tower has hundreds and thousands of ice and snow worlds like this, let alone the Heaven Realm. We have mastered this method, so we don’t have to worry about a lack of energy,” Princess Qian Qian comforted him very on this rare occasion.

In fact, if no one else was there and there were only the two of them in one space, Tigress would be pretty gentle and loving.

Usually Xue Wu Xia wouldn’t give her a chance as she kept showing up next to Yue Yang, which was why Tigress would opt to always take on a coquettish and annoyed personality.

Now that Xue Wu Xia was asleep, she naturally reverted back to her true self.

After an additional half day, the iceberg was completely swallowed. Even the ice that was a thousand miles away was absorbed and engulfed by the Black Hole Seal Space after Yue Yang deliberately used his techniques to pull them closer.

Continuing to absorb the remaining ice would not work for them any longer. First, the efficiency of the absorption would become extremely low; second, this unit world had made the act of engulfing become unstable and there was room for collapse at any given time; third, Yue Yang could not stay for a long time as he had many more matters that he had to busy himself with. For example, one thing that needed to be done soon was to attend an appointment in the Heaven Realm’s White River City of the Heavenly Splendour Territory. There, Yue Yang was to meet up with the Snake-Haired Demon Man. He had already pushed back the meeting for far too long to the point where mushrooms might have already started growing by now! Even Princess Qian Qian thought that the amount of alone time between the two of them were most certainly enough.

Sure enough, at night.

Princess Qian Qian began to pack up. No longer practising the sword as she was very rarely preparing a nice and gentle bath for Yue Yang. She even made the bed early, just like a cute little wife who just passed the doors of marriage.

After a night’s rest, Princess Qian Qian broke free from his arms and put back her White Tiger Silver Armour, restoring her signature face of a violent female swordsman.

Yue Yang still wanted to lie in bed, but it made Princess Qian Qian hold his ear with one hand as she pinched it slightly, “Don’t pretend to be dead. You touched and kissed me yesterday; what are you dissatisfied with? Get up right away. We have a lot of things waiting for us to settle- you’re still trying to touch me all over? Asking for death…”

When he came out of the unit world, he left the Tenth Floor of the Tong Tian Tower and went to the Sixth Floor Thunder Fortress to take a look and explain some things. Then, he returned to the First Floor of the Soaring Dragon Continent. Jun Wu You, the old fox and the old man, Yue Hai, have gone off to somewhere unknown; but Feng Kuang, the eagle-eyed man and the others were training the new recruits of the Dragon Knights and Dragon Blood Legion Guard. As the number one founding figure, Yue Yang naturally stood up and provided the new recruits a few words of encouragement before quickly slipping away amidst the frenetic cheers— it was too much pressure for him to watch! To get rid of those fanatical fans, Yue Yang dragged Fatty Hai and Ye Kong out.

“Your cultivation is not bad, but your potential is locked in place and remains the same as I last saw you. However, you guys are in luck. Not only did I get the Ancient Dragon Blood, but I also obtained the Crimson Blood Pool, which is close to the level of the Divine Blood. This was a move of a certain yet-to-be-God, who sacrificed his Divine Blood for an attack like that.”

Yue Yang decided to replace the blood potential for Fatty Hai and the others before going to the Heaven Realm.

It used to be the blood of the Ancient Demon King. Fatty Hai and Ye Kong had their potentials set to a certain level already, so the highest they could go was probably a Heaven Rank. Frollivking around the Tong Tian Tower with that kind of power would still be fine, but they probably couldn’t even win against a certain, awesome City Lord.

However, Yue Yang felt that they were making progress.

With the improvement of understanding and the improvement of the realms, their ability would naturally increase. It was impossible to do so before, but now it is not impossible to achieve it now with the help of intelligence— it all depended on whether one would be brave enough to fight! Providing Divine Blood would be impossible because Fatty Hai and the others could not withstand the power of Divine Blood for the time being. Therefore, Yue Yang decided to destroy Fatty Hai and the other’s original foundations before replacing them with the blood of the Ancient Dragon.

If it were only the Ancient Dragon Blood obtained from the Beast Valley, the potential would not level up by too high of a margin, but after Yue Yang killed Red Sky River, he had also obtained the ‘Crimson Blood River’ sacrificed with Divine Blood, where he sealed them into one blood pool.

Ye Kong tamped down his excitement without saying a word.

Fatty Hai rubbed his hands, showing off a greedy look in his eyes that were paired with fear as well as his body fats started trembling, “This must be dangerous, right?”

Yue Yang denied, “No, it’s not dangerous at all, I can guarantee that it won’t explode!”

As soon as Fatty Hai heard this, he immediately praised him with words of sycophancy, “As expected, you are indeed the Third Young Master of the Yue Clan. Well, since you are kind and willing to help me with my cultivation, as a leader myself, who am I to reject your intentions? I will reluctantly accept it! Wait, who just hit me? Damn, monkey, are you itching somewhere? This Young Master will take you on myself!”

When Yue Yang condensed a blood pool in midair and kicked Fatty Hai in again, he screamed like a pig.

He was horrified to find that his skin was melting, “Didn’t you say that it will not explode?”

Yue Yang nodded affirmatively, “Of course! I can guarantee that you would melt into a puddle of blood before it even has the chance to explode!”

“Ah, I don’t want to die! I’m still a poor virgin who hasn’t made any breakthroughs in my relationships, I would die with injustice!” Fatty Hai cried completely when he heard this.

“Drink this,” Yue Yang handed him a bottle of Dragon Blood.

“Gulp, gulp…what’s this?” Fatty Hai poured the liquid into his belly anxiously and asked questioningly, “Well, there seems to be a fire burning in my stomach. Oh, oh no, I feel like a volcano that’s going to erupt right away! THird Young Master, are you sure you gave me the correct thing to drink?”

“Drink this again. If you don’t die, it means that it is successful,” Yue Yang handed Fatty Hai a bottle of purple-blue liquid.

“What if I drink it and die?” Fatty Hai’s fat hands were shaking as if he had a convulsion.

“Ah, that means it’s a failure!” Yue Yang replied solemnly.

“I won’t drink it!” Fatty Hai decided not to be Yue Yang’s guinea pig. It was too dangerous! It turned out that this kid was not sure at all!

“What a shame, it seems like my tutoring hasn’t really set in for you!” The Wind Breath Seabird, who had mostly evolved into a human body, was furious. He grabbed Fatty Hai’s chubby cheeks and poured the liquid medicine directly into him. Fatty Hai coughed. When the drink was in his lungs, she beat him again and again. Princess Qian Qian, who was on the sidelines studying the skills of her family tutoring, turned pale. Princess Qian Qian only dared to ask after a long while, “Are you sure he won’t be crippled by hitting like this? I seem to have heard many bones broken just now…”

“This fat guy is very resistant to physical hits, so it’s okay. If the tutor is not strict enough, how will we face the faces of the people in the future? They would definitely criticise the Hai family for not having proper etiquette,” Wind Breath Seabird threw down the indistinguishable fat in his hand before she clapped her hands casually.

“Your tutor is really strict!” Princess Qian Qian was so scared that she was nearly spitting out her words.

When she was angry on certain occasions and wanted to punch Yue Yang into a pulp like this, she couldn’t bear to do so!

Princess Qian Qian strongly suspected that Fatty Hai’s vitality was so strong because the Wind Breath Seabird ‘trained’ him through storms and hurricanes of beatings.

Ye Kong and the Li brothers took the Ancient Dragon Blood and the mysterious purple-blue liquid, before jumping into the blood pool at the same time.

They may not believe that they will succeed, but they will never doubt that Yue Yang’s method was ineffective!

In fact, if they knew that the purple-blue liquid they drank contained the juice of the Vulcan Soul Refining Herb, which resembled the existence of the Divine blood, they would be scared to cancel this ‘blood exchange plan’ on their initiative as the materials for the drink were too precious and too expensive. Even Yue Yang himself was reluctant to use the Vulcan Soul Refining Herb for the time being, but for them, he took off a leaf and refined the juices to enhance their potential.

It would be strange if the old fox and the others knew about it and didn’t chase him with a cane.

In the eyes of the old fox, besides Yue Yang, the most worthy investment was Yue Bing, who is still growing rapidly and was about to contract the ancient rune, ‘Ancient Forest’. This little girl was the real hope of the old man; as for Fatty Hai, Ye Kong and the others, the old fox thought it would be good to put them to use by giving them scraps.

Fatty Hai and Ye Kong couldn’t see it, but the WInd Breath Seabird, who was about to be promoted to a Divine Beast, could see the value of that bottle of purple-blue Soul Refining liquid.

Therefore, she was angry and beat Fatty Hai violently, feeling that his actions had upsetted Yue Yang’s secret magnanimity and kindness.

A few hours later.

Fatty Hai, Ye Kong, and the Li Brothers, who had fainted several times, were reborn again.

However, because of the destruction of the previous foundation, their strengths have declined to a certain extent, so they would have to cultivate again. Yue Yang will not take them to the Conqueror City for the time being and opted to let them stay in the Tong Tian Tower. In terms of basics, they could consult their seniors, especially the sage-level elites such as the Old Man Nan Gong and Granny Wu Teng. The better the foundation, the better their future growth would be.

Yue Yang and Princess Qian Qian teleported from the Da Xia Palace to the Tian Luo Palace and met Si-niang.

He then reported to her about all the battles against Red Sky River.

Si-niang was a little bit irritated about Yue Yang’s risk of fusing with the Primordial Ancient Rune, but because of her secrets, she didn’t elaborate on how bad his decision was. She just told Yue Yang that he must not do such things casually in the future. She hinted that regardless of the artifacts or runes, it was still a divine scripture and he shouldn’t come in contact with it nonchalantly.

Yue Yang wanted to ask for the reason but Si-niang didn’t answer, so he went back to his room to rest with Little Shuang Er in his arms.

Princess Qian Qian kicked him secretly and told him not to push Si-niang.

There must be a reason if she wasn’t going to reveal the truth.

It’s been a long time since he took his sister to practice together. He originally wanted to take Yue Bing to the Heaven Realm, but unfortunately, this diligent little girl and Yi Nan went to the Heaven Stairway to practice again. Hence, Yue Yang only found Yue Yu in the laboratory.

“No, I won’t go, you can go with Qian Qian!” Yue Yu refused, giving the opportunity to Princess Qian Qian.

“Let’s go together, I’ll call Sister Ye again!” Princess Qian Qian’s six senses have a peculiar premonition of not knowing whether it was a right or wrong decision. She felt that this trip to the Heaven Realm required two people, that is— Drunken Cat Yu Jie. Yue Yu, moreover, was still the most critical person to have around. Without her, she didn’t know what the end result would be. Therefore, Princess Qian Qian gave up the opportunity of a world that consisted only of the two of them as she practically forced Yue Yu into the Grimoire World.

“Why don’t you help Qian Qian fuse the Prison Emperor’s Divine Sword?” After the Drunken Cat Yu Jie and Yue Yang broke through the last level, they became generous and came here without hesitation. Taking advantage of the time where Princess Qian Qian was trying to persuade Yue Yu, Drunken Cat Yu Jie dragged Yue Yang aside, “You haven’t pushed down Tigress? It’s not like you!”

“Ah, you know, I’m actually a good boy!” Yue Yang dared to say this and Drunken Cat Yu Jie blushed for his sake.

chapters.title: Chapter 921
chapters.body:
Chapter 921

Chapter 921: Secrets Of The White River City?

Heavenly Splendour Territory.

It took half a day to travel from the Eight Desolate Territories to the Heavenly Splendour Territory despite using the teleportation array.

However, the corresponding portal from the Heavenly Splendour Territory to the White River City was not opened. It was said that because of the state of war, more than a dozen ‘districts’, nearly a thousand ‘land’ and tens of thousands of ‘countries’ large and small were all in melee. What shocked Yue Yang the most was the fact that the battles hadn’t ceased despite going on for almost 3000 years.

Countless warriors have already died in battle, but the war never stopped. In fact, it was impossible for the fight to stop unless most of the forces of Heavenly Splendour Territory were wiped out.

The more people die, the more the hatred grows.

The more races and forces join the melee, the more intense conflict of interests would arise.

In the Heavenly Splendour Territory, without a patriotic army and gallant warriors, everyone played the role of helpless victims stuck in a never-ending battle. At the same time, there were also executioners who participated in the manipulation of the war, one in which consisted of countless mercenaries.

The celestial warriors who were invited by various forces to come to help in the battle also perished here.

If their bones were piled up, a mountain that ranged a few thousand metres in height and a few hundred kilometres in width could probably be formed.

But in order to obtain the immediate benefits or to hone their martial skills on the battlefield, there were still countless warriors pouring into this war of the Heavenly Splendour Territory every single day. The state of constant battle operated like a meat grinder— unrelenting and bloody.

“Welcome, rich and brave businessmen,” In the entire Heaven Realm, the Heavenly Splendour Territory was the place that enjoyed the visits of businessmen and entrepreneurs the most. That was because the merchants who dared to come to the Heavenly Splendour Territory were known as the bravest adventurers in the world. Although the three Emperors of the Heavenly Splendour Territory fought to the death, in order to continue the war, they all announced a decree: no one was allowed to rob and kill businessmen without any reason. The freedom to contract and cultivate businesses were protected by the greatest order in the Heavenly Splendour Territory and no one was allowed to confiscate or seize the goods and the freedom of merchants without any logical reason. With the merchants, businessmen and the various materials they bring, the civilians in the Heavenly Splendour Territory who were caught in the war could continue to live.

The army needed even more supplies as well.

And so, the three Emperors who were also competing for the throne of the Domain Emperor could also continue to fight for the position of becoming the first ultimate leader of the Heavenly Splendour Territory. In the Heaven Realm, if a powerful Domain Emperor was born in one area, it was a great thing to happen; if two equally powerful Domain Emperors were born, it was a bad thing. As three powerful Domain Emperors were born at the same time, the current situation was nothing less than a nightmare!

Before coming to the Heavenly Splendour Territory, Yue Yang had learned about some of the situations in the said area. Like many people, he disguised himself as a wealthy businessman and officially stepped into this chaotic place. With his identity as a businessman, he could go almost anywhere, let alone the White River City.

Of course, since he was a businessman, owning goods was essential.

Especially for someone like Yue Yang, who came to the Heavenly Splendour Territory for the first time, the border guards would never let such a ‘suspicious person’ enter without a trail of goods behind him. It’s not impossible to enter secretly, but Yue Yang didn’t need to hide and cower around like a mouse; wouldn’t it be better for him to breach the area openly and use the goods to earn some extra money on the way to achieve his true goal? The Heavenly Splendour Territory had very high-quality Electro-optic Ores, which was one of the items that Yue Yang needed to make the Beast Bracelets.

Yue Yang, Princess Qian Qian, Yue Yu and the Drunken Cat Yu Jie took the luxury airship in front.

In addition to this luxurious airship that did not carry cargo, there was a fleet behind it, which was full of food that was sufficient for fifty broad cargo ships and fine wine for ten narrowly long clippers. Bao Gu was their main ‘face’ as he presented himself as the head of the regiment of the Southern Heaven Realm’s Wu Ye City. As for their escorts, it was the Flying Locust and Hua Ban that the Wild Bull Thief Guild took initiative to send over from the Wu Ye City.

Also, the surrendered trio Zhong Guan, Bai Ma and Hei Tu who have won Yue Yang’s trust, were here as well.

As for Yong Hui and Yue Su, whose strengths were greatly depleted, Yue Yang did not trust them completely, so he decided to let them be for now.

Although the Captain of the Guard, Zhong Guan’s strength was only at the 3rd Level of the Heaven Rank, his strength was very good in the long-term battlefield of the Heavenly Splendour Territory. With such a large group of Heaven Rankers as his guards and with a luxurious airship that he owned, no one would dare to cross him even if he wasn’t trying to appeal as a businessman.

There were five Heaven Ranked powerhouses as guards?

Among the many businessmen and merchants in the entire Heavenly Splendour Territory, even if he was not ranked in the top ten, he would be placed within the top twenty— it would be foolish for anyone to doubt him.

“Fifty boats of food? And ten boats of wine? It’s too much—no, we can’t take it. Not just the Council of Commerce— even with every merchant of the Golden Sun City combined, we can’t take it. You may not know, but do you have at least an idea of the price of the food here? Dare I say that the number of people who died of starvation in the Heavenly Splendour Territory was ten times more than the number of people killed by the war! Dear Lord Bao Gu, please sit down quickly. No, of course we do not dare to keep things secret as we always have great respect for huge and successful business groups like yours. It’s just that we need to convene some manpower, so please give us a little time. I dare say that not only our businessmen in the Golden Sun City, but starving soldiers and civilians would sing praises of your generosity as you have come in time and your help would be too great. If you did not come, in another month, at least one-fifth of the people here would probably starve to death and the rate would keep increasing as well… Lord Bao Gu, please sit down and I will inform the City Lord immediately. You can rest assured that even without your five Heaven Ranked guards, no one would dare to touch your cargo at this time!” When the fleet came to a place called the Golden Sun City, which was also the largest grain merchant in the area. However, this man seemed to have the keenest sense of smell. He was out here to greet them in no time and once he heard that there were fifty boats worth of food, his excitement was hardly contained as he fought the urge to hug the Lord that suddenly arrived like a saviour.

“We have food; these fifty boats are just a small tryout. We are considering the business prospects of Heavenly Splendour Territory and we’re trying to see whether such an investment will pay off,” Bao Gu exuded an aura of a Master as he spoke solemnly.

Now, he was no longer a small, travelling businessman who was bullied so badly that he didn’t even dare to embark on any adventures.

After getting to know Yue Yang, his fate took a 180-degree turn.

Of course, he was not the only one who had a change of fate.

There was also the Fat Toad Jia De!

Although Bao Gu was the head of the caravan that led the team this time, because of his qualifications, Bao Gu had to call Fat Toad the ‘Chairman’ to show his respect. Yue Yang had already handed over the entire Titan Council of Commerce in Jia De’s hands before entering the Heaven Realm. With that, Fat Toad did not disappoint and managed the Titan Council of Commerce in an impressive manner, making Yue Yang very satisfied. This outstanding performance also made Fat Fog Jia De the first Toad man in the Entire tower to be lucky enough to integrate the Dragon Blood; perhaps he was even the only Toad within the entire Heaven Realm who was blessed with that honour. If it weren’t for the Fat Toad Jia De’s physique that might not be able to withstand too strong of a bloodline transformation, Yue Yang even wanted to give him the supreme honour of the Ancient Dragon Blood.

Since he was not very familiar with things in the Heaven Realm, Fat Toad was also willing to share his power and handed over the opportunity to lead the team to Bao Gu.

He was responsible for cooperating and integrating the business group together.

This way, Fat Toad gained more recognition from Yue Yang and respect from Bao Gu!

“Master Bao Gu, I dare say that this place is definitely worth investing in. With food, you can have everything here, including the lives of others! Here, there is nothing that cannot be exchanged for food!” The grain merchant patted his chest and gave Bao Gu a guarantee.

“Since that’s the case, then I won’t beat around the bush,” Bao Gu directly stated his own conditions, “We need the Electric Flower Ores.”

“Electric Flower Ores are military-controlled products…” When the merchant heard this, his facial expressions fell

“If there is none, then I will leave!” Bao Gu didn’t bother wasting his time.

“Wait, Master Bao Gu, please don’t be angry, please listen to our explanation. It’s not that there aren’t any Electric Flower Ores, but they are generally purchased by the country’s Lord before they are melted and refined into weapons. It was one of the orders of the Domain Emperors— those who illegally obtained them, including global exports, will be decapitated,” The grain merchant was full of worry.

“We don’t need public transactions, wise merchant. Have you ever thought about this? As long as you capture weapons on the battlefield and hand over those scraps to us, then we can donate food and wine to you— think about it. Sometimes, it’s easy to obtain someone’s friendship, especially one that’s delivered to your door. However, when that opportunity to establish a friendship goes away, you can’t get it back even if you regret it later,” Bao Gu’s skill with words was immensely trained in the Wu Ye City. The most important thing was that he had food in hand; so no matter what he demanded or how he behaved, the merchant couldn’t say anything about it!

“It’s so irritating, is this also the way to entertain guests?” Jia De, the Fat Toad, added oil to the burning flames of annoyance.

“Wait, wait! Two gentlemen, don’t be angry— your proposal is very good, but we need a decision maker. I think the City Lord will agree to this good proposal. I will go to him immediately, but please be sure to give us this chance,” The grain merchant had to succumb. His granary could practically feed the air, but he just encountered a fleet that was still full of grains. Even if he was to die because of this decision, he must not let it slip away from his grasp.

With that being said, how can something like the Electric Flower Ores be a problem?

That’s right!

They won’t trade; they’ll just give it as a gift!

Moreover, being such an awesome business group, he believed that even if the higher-ups knew about it, they would close one eye and pretend not to hear about it.

When Bao Gu and Jia De teamed up to intimidate the grain merchant, Yue Yang was studying the routes.

The problem was that this White River City was almost situated in the centre of the Heavenly Splendour Territory.

Why did the snake-haired demon man, the eldest Young Master of the Four Major Families, ask Yue Yang to meet him there? Could it be that there were other secrets in the White River City? Are there artifacts out there? Or some kind of treasure being formed? Or was there any ruins there that made the snake-haired demon man so anxious to the point where he’d set off to find a treasure the moment he escaped the Earth Demon Palace?

“Have you noticed that in White River City-no, the entire area here is full of rivers, lakes, or swamps!” Princess Qian Qian said abruptly.

“If drawn like this, the city here seems to form a strange pattern,” Yue Yu also shared her discoveries in the past few days.

“Ah, I’m very ashamed, I didn’t find anything…” Drunken Cat Yu Jie quickly waved her hand when she saw Yue Yang looking at her.

“Let me think about something!” Yue Yang felt that Princess Qian Qian and Yue Yu both saw some really important points, but they were not complete. In the end, what kind of secrets did the White River City hide? Was it really as simple as an ordinary celestial city?

Bao Gu and Jia De, who had just boarded the luxury airship to report back to him, saw that Yue Yang was thinking long and hard with a map in hand. Hence, they turned around quickly and left quietly.

Compared to what he was going to do, the Council of Commerce’s affairs were not worth mentioning.

It was better to not disturb him— they would handle the matters with the City Lord and the grain merchant themselves!

chapters.title: Chapter 922
chapters.body:
Chapter 922

Chapter 922: Not One Of Us Shall Be Unaccounted For

The City Lord of the Golden Sun City, named Feng Ji, was a powerhouse of the Cat Clan that was merely a Quasi-Heaven Ranker.

With this strength of his, if he were to be stationed anywhere else but the Heavenly Splendour Territory, he would have been killed instantaneously by the Bandit Group’s Leader. However, among the nearby cities, his strength was considered to be one of the strongest— ranking in one of the positions of the top five. In the Heavenly Splendour Territory, the closer the City Lords were to the area of war, the stronger their respective Country Lords were. The City Lords in the outer second and third rows who did not directly participate in the war were mostly below the Heaven Rank. There were even leaders that were merely at the 6th Level of the Earth Rank.

Initially, Feng Ji wasn’t the City Lord of the Golden Sun City.

He was an adventurer who came to Heavenly Splendour Territory to cultivate. However, because the former City Lord of the Golden Sun City died in battle, the Captain of the guard and the butler who took over passed away in battle one after another. There was no one who could take on the responsibility of the City Lord, so he took the initiative to take over the Golden Sun City.

Adventurers like him who succeeded the City Lord’s position were not uncommon in the Heavenly Splendour Territory.

Although the strength and qualifications of the City Lords in the periphery of the Heavenly Splendour Territory are not high, there were still a few vacant City Lord positions and no one was willing to take over those messes. For example, there was the Yang Ti City that was located not far from Golden Sun City. Due to the lack of minerals, poor land and the natural disasters, the civilians who have been taxed heavily were all starving. Hence, no one wanted to take over the position in that area. The Country Lord sent a small garrison of troops to manage the city, but they were barely maintaining law and order. It was even more welcomed for the larger business groups out of the area to send a representative and take over the position of the City Lord. Strength was not that important, but the new leader must have the readiness and the ability to take on the matters of war. Other than that, the higher-ups did not interfere with any actions of the lower ranked City Lords.

It could be said that places like Golden Sun City and the Yang Ti City, which were on the periphery and lacked special items to boost their poor economical rate, have long been forgotten by the higher-ups.

“How am I going to make so much food appear out of nowhere? I have no way to do so!” Feng Ji was roaring angrily at his butler, Sha Tong, “It’s not that I don’t want to help those civilians, there is just no way to help! The last seeds have been handed over to them, but how was I supposed to know that they were already fried by the profiteers? I don’t know! I don’t know a thing about agriculture and I don’t know how to nurture plants; I used to be just a mercenary who had three meals a day and never let my family go hungry… I never wanted to be some sort of City Lord— I just wanted to help out Ai Cao’s hometown a little! But if you’re going to ask me to magically form seeds for the public, I can’t. Do you think I’m a God or something? You of all people should know what sort of state my treasury is in— the final influx of funds have been given to those profiteers in order to buy those damned seeds. Now that the seeds were already fried and are currently unable to sprout, am I the one to blame for this? Well, do whatever you like from now on, I have had enough!”

T/L Note: Just wanted to say that I felt his frustration and I’m sure some of you do too; This has got to be one of the most impactful things that I have translated in over 100 chapters. This guy is my fav character now

“My Lord, if there is no food, I dare say that within a month at the latest, half of the people in the Golden Sun City will starve to death!” The butler Sha Tong grimaced. He knew of the troubles of the City Lord well, but who else was he to ask for help? And what can he do besides asking for help? After all, Feng Ji was the City Lord— the strongest person in the City.

“I don’t know what to do!” Feng Ji shouted, “I myself have been frugal. I have been hungry for three months and I haven’t had a full meal in that same timeframe. There is no way for such a useless City Lord to go on ruling, so just choose a new City Lord. Whoever wants to take over can do so, because I have no ability to ensure that a hundred thousand people’s hunger can be sated!”

“This…” Butler Sha Tong sighed.

The butler knew about his conflict because even he didn’t have the ability to ensure that the hundreds of thousands of civilians could be fed.

The shortage of food was not a sole problem that the Golden Sun City was facing alone as it was a crisis faced by the entire Heavenly Splendour Territory. Except for some of the wealthier places in the Heavenly Splendour Territory, most of the other areas were left to fend for themselves in poverty.

The war caused too many of the strong and hard-working men to die on the battlefield. Now, most of the people left in the peripheral areas were the old, the weak, women and children. In addition to the necessary garrison personnel and the seriously wounded or disabled, any adult, regardless of gender and race, would be transferred to the military camp in the combat areas for intensive training as long as they had some sort of combat power. Then, they would be sent to the battlefield to fight in the battle between the Domain Emperors.

As the remaining grains were running out, without seeds and crops, the next harvest would accumulate to zero.

And about a month later, all the grass, roots, bark and livestock would be eaten up as well. Finally, hundreds of thousands of starving people would face the same tragedy as the most intensively famine areas in the Yang Ti City.

Yi Zi Er Shi [1] … Sha Tong saw these tragic scenarios happen more than once.

T/L Note[1]: In the Song Dynasty, not sure if it really happened but I wouldn’t doubt it. The war caused poor families to watch their kids starve to death. Unable to eat their own kid, they’d exchange the bodies with another family’s as they ate each other’s children

Could it be that the Golden Sun City would also become a dead place full of bones and corpses that lasted for thousands of miles?

“My Lord, there is good news; there is good news!” Ou Ba, the poorest grain merchant in the world, rushed in with a flushed face and directly bumped Sha Tong, the starving butler, to the ground.

“A businessman? It’s a miracle that there are still businessmen who are willing to come to a poor area like ours,” Sha Tong didn’t have time to get up as he directly grabbed Ou Ba’s leg and asked.

“Where is the businessman?” Feng Ji was also very welcome, but after asking this sentence, he put on a bitter face, “We have run out of money.”

“Not money; they don’t want money!” Ou Ba shook his head and waved his hands excitedly.

“There are businessmen who don’t want money?” Feng Ji couldn’t believe it. If businessmen didn’t love money, then all the sows in the world would start to climb trees!

“Yes, that’s right! They don’t want a single gold coin from us, and no, they don’t want magic crystals either. To be honest, no one would want our low-quality magic crystals even if they were presented for free… You can’t imagine what the scene was like just now. The merchant group came to us with fifty boats of grain and ten boats full of wine. My God, if those goods can enter the war zone, I think it’s possible that the Emperors would start to fight for it till their heads break and bleed… I’m done blabbering. Yes, let’s get back to the deal— they don’t need our money because they only need all kinds of weapons that were recovered from the battlefield!” Ou Ba was a little confused when he spoke with joy.

“Are you stupid? We are at the periphery, not the war zone, how could there be any weapons here? Besides, those are contrabands and traders will all be killed!” Sha Tong denied the possibility of such a transaction.

“Yes, you are right, but what I want to explain is, what do they want the weapons for? The Electric Flower Ores. They don’t want the normal weapons as they are all just a bunch of scraps. But using the Electric Flower Ores, we can obtain large amounts of food! City Lord and Butler Sha, think about it— fifty boats. Every boat is about a few hundred metres wide! As long as we are able to get them, preventing the deaths of the entire City is completely possible!” Ou Ba hurriedly explained clearly.

“I’ll say Ouba, keep your voice down. The Electric Flower Ores are things that the Domain Emperors themselves personally forbid us to obtain….” Sha Tong felt that his heartbeat at this time was beating like a drum, but he did not deny the fact that he was moved.

Was there anything scarier than starving to death?

No!

Instead of grasping onto the final slivers of life as he starved to death, it was better to fill the stomach first and be a full-fledged ghost!

Ou Ba felt a little relieved when he saw Sha Tong, a die-hard loyalist, start to waver and quickly struck while the iron was hot, “We are not striking a deal, City Lord; we are expressing our hearts to the distinguished guests. As a testimony of friendship, we give them a small gift and the other party generously returns the food we urgently need. Even if the higher-ups know of the news, I believe we will not be severely questioned. After all, there is a shortage of food everywhere, so even the Country Lord will be facing his fair share of troubles.”

Feng Ji thought that this idea was not a bad idea.

He was just worried about the limited amount of Electric Flower Ores’ sufficiency to exchange mountain piles of food.

In any case, it was better to stabilise the other party first; if they leave and take the boats with them, then everything will be over.

The three decided to take the risk, so they dragged several other extremely poor merchants in the city and went to visit the head of the business group together. Anyway, this transaction was a cursed transaction. They would live together and die together— no one should be left out from that rule!

When he saw the fifty grain boats, even Feng Ji, the City Lord of the Golden Sun City, couldn’t help swallowing a mouthful of saliva.

Holy smokes, if only I weren’t a City Lord. If I was just a mercenary like before, I’d be able to snatch a good serving for myself without the process of business exchanges.

At the very least, the risks would be lesser than agreeing to this cursed transaction.

When he saw that the guards on the other side had five Heavenly Rankers guarding the cargo, he was so frightened that his body went weak. Good God, even if he actually tried to rob them, he wouldn’t be able to keep his Cat skin! But it was logical— without a few Heaven Rankers to guard the fifty boats of grain, it would be hard to get through the central battle zone as well. However, where did this Titan Commerce Group come from? To have five Heaven Ranked powerhouses to act as bodyguards, this commerce group was not inferior to the top ten positions among all the commencing groups and councils.

“Are you the City Lord? Then, I won’t waste our time. Our request is very simple— as long as you guys can hand us the Electric Flower Ores, we can provide you with seeds in addition to the food supplies!” Bao Gu stated his position in this transaction. That is, as long as they were able to provide the Electric Flower Ore, they couldn’t care less about everything else.

“Seeds?” Feng Ji’s heartbeat accelerated when he heard this. In the Heavenly Splendour Territory, seeds were definitely their lifeblood. Everything could be scarce, but seeds should never decline in quantity!

“The purity of our Electric Flower Mine is not high and the Country Lord would come to collect it once every three months, so the inventory is insufficient.” The butler Sha Tong lowered his head.

He had to.

Because he could see it now with much clarity. The other party was a super luxurious business group and he was afraid that they would not care about the small inventory of the Golden Sun City.

As long as the grain ships were driven into the war zone, the Domain Emperors would compete for the trade of the Electric Flower Ores.

Although it was forbidden by the Domain Emperors, there were exceptions to everything, right?

Such a luxurious and rich super business group could usually get the terms of the special approval of the Domain Emperors… “Well, it’s true that we really don’t like the fact that the inventory is only filled with small amounts. We want an abundance of the Electric Flower Ores— an insane amount!” When Fat Toad Jia De said this, Feng Ji, Ou Ba and Sha Tong were almost desperate. They were thinking about pleading, but the fat Toad Jia De waved his hand and proposed a plan, “Otherwise, we will invest in mining here. You are responsible for providing labour and we will provide food. We’ll allow you to exchange wages for food and at the same time, we can also assist you plant some seeds. In return, you have to send as many people as you can to mine the Electric Flower Ores. As for the purity, you don’t need to worry about those.”

“No problem, the thing we have in abundance here is manpower!” Ou Ba, afraid of Feng Ji and Sha Tong’s hesitation, agreed first of his own accord.

“Golden Sun City might as well be given to you because I am an incompetent City Lord. Besides, any one of you is stronger than me. You can send someone to be the Golden Sun City’s Lord and do whatever you want…” Feng Ji felt that he was useless. As a dignified City Lord, he was even starving, let alone owning one of the full-plated gold body armour that the opposing group’s bodyguard had on.

He took off the Ring of the City Lord, the only token of identity for a City Lord and forced it into Jia De’s hands.

Then, he held Bao Gu’s hand, “Captain, can I be an escort here with you?”

This guy’s shocking behaviour made Bao Gu and Jia De stunned.

I didn’t know that such a thing was possible.

Sha Tong and Ou Ba also screamed like resentful women, “City Lord, you can’t abandon us. If you leave, what will we do in the future?”

Feng Ji waved his hand, “Stop, stop, I’m no longer your City Lord. To be honest, I’m fed up with this damn City Lord position! I don’t have that ability and I don’t like to worry about the food and drink of hundreds of thousands of people. When I became this City Lord, I never had a day of happiness! Even when I was at my most dejected state before, I was never as poor as I am now and I have never been as starved as I was now. If I would starve to death because of my City Lord position, why the heck am I still here then? Why don’t I try to become an escort or someone’s guard? At the very least, I won’t be starving to death!”

“Boy, you are not qualified to be a bodyguard!” Zhong Guan and the others’ stomachs hurt from their excessive laughing. There were so many who dreamed of being a City Lord, but now, it was such a joke to see that there was a starving City Lord in front of their eyes.

“My strength is not really considered better than the average warrior, but I have good specialties and talents. Although I can’t grow food, I am good at reconnaissance and tracking!” Feng Ji quickly fought for it.

“The problem is, although I am the Head of the Commerce, there is still a master above me,” Bao Gu smiled, “It will be futile unless you can get the master’s permission. So many powerhouses wanted to try out the position to be a guard. There were even Heaven Rankers of the 4th Level, but they weren’t qualified. Besides, besides your ability, your loyalty also mattered. To be honest, I doubt your loyalty because you are able to just give up the position of the City Lord like that once you encounter hunger!”

“You have a master?” Feng Ji was going to be stupid. What was the origin of this commerce group? Was the master of the Heaven Rankers a Country Lord or something? Or was the master of an even higher existence?

“The master said that if you can find a way to cross the Wind-Stopping Swamp, then you can temporarily be employed as a guard for a three-month trial period.”

Yue Yang was on the luxury yacht as he sent a Heaven Realm Female Draconian from the to pass on the message.

Although Feng Jii was reluctant to be a starving City Lord, it seemed that there was a problem with the devotion of his loyalty. But if they looked at the situation from both sides, this Cat Clan guy wasn’t half bad. If it were up to any other City Lord, would they also go along with the public’s starvation amidst famine? At the very least, it can be proved that Feng Ji did not exploit the civilians for wealth. He might not be qualified to bear the position of a City Lord, but there should be no problem in exerting his specialties as a guard for the expedition team.

Moreover, it was indeed better to let people like Bao Gu and Jia De take over the Golden Sun City compared to his own competence.

In the mountains near Golden Sun City, the reserves of the Electric Flower were pretty good, but it was difficult to mine.

The problem here was that there was not enough manpower and technology to initiate mining, which resulted in its low production capacity. If the Thunder Fortress had the technology to mine the Call of Thunder Ores, coupled with a large amount of manpower, the Electric Flower Ores might not be sufficient to become a weapon for the elite soldiers on the battlefield, but it was enough for Yue Yang to refine the Beast Bracelet.

“Wind-Stopping Swamp is a dead place!” Feng Ji’s facial expressions changed greatly when he heard this.

“We don’t want cowards!” Fat Toad Jia De gave a sharp retort.

“Who are you calling a coward! You still found the right person. If you had asked another, I’m afraid that they wouldn’t have agreed to do so. Even if I once escaped the Wind-Stopping Swamp, I’m only 30% positive that I will pass… You don’t know, but It’s too terrifying. It’s a dead place that cannot be crossed. In addition to strength and experience, the most important thing you have to have while crossing the Wind-Stopping Swamp is none other than luck!” Feng Ji bowed to the Female Draconian in the sky who was still waiting for an accurate reply. His eyesight was not bad, so he knew that the status of this Heaven Realm Female Draconian was stronger. At the very least, her rank was higher than several genuine guards of the Heaven Rank. Feng Ji’s attitude was very respectful and his words were also very sincere, “If you want me to pass the Wind-Stopping Swamp, I will need to find someone in another place— not one of us shall be unaccounted for.”

========================================================================

This translation is presented by Nocturne Translations.

========================================================================

[TL note]:

At this point there’s more new characters that are emerging so I’m kind of making the glossary instead of referring to it. I’ll try my best to provide them as accurately as I can, so let me know if any of the names seem awkward or don’t flow all that well!

At any rate, enjoy the chapter! Hope you guys have a great day/night ahead of you!

-Sterling

chapters.title: Chapter 923
chapters.body:
Chapter 923

Chapter 923: Welcome Ceremony And Apt Traditions

After getting rid of the painful position of the Golden Sun City Lord and becoming a temporary guard, Feng Ji quickly played the role.

He first made a sailing route and handed it to Bao Gu, who presented it to Yue Yang.

He quickly returned to the City Lord’s mansion and brought out his long-legged Dromaeosaur beast that was also starving. Fortunately, the loyalty of this long-legged beast was not bad. In addition, there were many occurrences where Feng Ji would rather give the beast a portion of his meal and choose not to be full. Otherwise, after being hungry for a few months, no matter how good-tempered a beast was, it would most definitely run away.

“You’re not going to use this war beast to lead the way, are you?” Jia De, the Fat Toad, looked at it. He sweated profusely, thinking, can you get any poorer than this, City Lord?

“Where’s the flying beast?” Bao Gu also felt that Fengji, the City Lord, had accepted the position as a leader in vain!

“Ah, there is no flying beast, but, dare I say, as long as it is fed with a full stomach, it can run as fast as flying!” Feng Ji’s words made Zhong Guan and the others burst into tears with laughter. They thought that it was too much of a stroke of misfortune for a City Lord to end up in such a pitiful state. Finally, the speechless Fat Toad Jia De waved his hand and instructed his subordinates to prepare some food for Feng Ji and the long-legged Dromaeosaur.

Because Feng Ji’s food was served slightly slower, he didn’t care about many people watching from the side and devoured the raw meat along with the long-legged Dromaeosaur.

Jia De and Bao Gu turned around and didn’t want to look.

Even the reincarnation of a starving ghost would not behave like this… Seeing the bloody raw meat in front of their eyes, the Golden Sun City merchants such as Sha Tong and Ouba were also secretly swallowing their saliva.

Fortunately, they were more self-contained and had better control. In addition, they did not dare to be presumptuous in front of the honourable superiors, so they have to endure their hunger with all their might.

In the end, they finally waited until the barbecue was placed on the table. Then, they waited for Bao Gu to invite them to eat and immediately, they surrounded him impatiently. Everyone was tearing the meat with their hands, desperately trying to stuff them into their mouths.

Although Sha Tong, Ouba and the others devoured the meat readily, they had a better appearance and eating etiquette compared to Feng Ji. who had rolled his eyes after swallowing the food too quickly.

If it weren’t for his Quasi-Heaven Ranked strength, Feng Ji would have probably choked to death on the spot!

It’s not like Fat Toad Jia De had never seen starving, poor people before. In the former Thunder Fortress, before the Third Young Master took over the mine, there were dozens of slaves starved to death every day. It would have been odd if there weren’t at least a hundred people dying each day. However, in the legendary Heaven Realm where the strong would stroll around in pride; in a place like the Tong Tian Tower that was as hopeful as a world could get, it was truly a speechless fact to see people starving to this extent. Fat Toad Jia De dared to say that if those in the upper ranks of the Tong Tian Tower knew about this harsh truth, they would probably refuse to come to this part of the Heaven Realm even if they were invited with large sedan chairs.

After feasting on the big meal, the bellies of Feng Ji and the long-legged Dromaeosaur bulged as if they were pregnant.

It would be a miracle for them to be able to remain alive, let alone rush for time!

“Let’s match you with a flying beast!” Bao Gu didn’t want to wait for this guy to take a breather before starting his journey— he knew just how precious Yue Yang’s time was.

“No, no!” Feng Ji held his toothpick and burped his stomach. At the same time, he waved his hands to refuse, “There is no problem in rushing now. As long as my beast is full, it can run faster than most flying war beasts!”

“Bullshit, just do as I say. Zhong Guan, give him a flying dragon and have him set off immediately,” Jia De, the Fat Toad, commanded without the chance to refuse.

Although Yue Yang didn’t ask for it, Fat Toad Jia De would never allow anyone to waste his master’s precious time.

No matter how fast this war beast was when it ran, it was only running on the ground.

The ground was a bumpy road, so how could it compare to flights in the sky? If he were to encounter mountains and hills, it would take a much longer time to run on the ground to reach their destination. There are flying beasts here but he chose to use a four-legged beast? No, this beast travelled on its hind legs, which was equivalent to two legs… Could two legs fly faster than the sky?

When Feng Ji heard this, an embarrassed look suddenly appeared on his face.

Butler Sha Tong, who knew him well, stepped up and explained, “City Lord Feng Ji, ahem, I mean Guard Feng Ji, is afraid of heights. Unless there is a danger to his life and he is unable to avoid flying, he will not dare to fly at high altitudes.”

Bao Gu and Jia De listened to him before falling to the ground.

Good fellow, a Quasi-Heaven Ranked warrior who was unable to fly?! Forget about flying, he was even afraid of heights? Could this guy get any more unreasonable?

“If you weren’t specially hired by the master, I’d have already dragged you out to be buried alive,” Zhong Guan had never seen such a person in his life.

If it was due to the natural physical characteristics, such as a man of fire being afraid to enter water, or a water warrior being unable to enter areas of high temperatures, that much was understandable.

But a normal Cat Clan member being unable to fly seemed ridiculous.

Fortunately, he did not hail from a flying clan like the Eagle Clan or the Sparrow Clan. Otherwise, this brat would have been the janitor for the household by now!

After Yue Yang heard about it, he couldn’t help but laugh. The Heaven Realm was truly amazing— if a Quasi-Heaven Ranker couldn’t fly, it would be similar to an Innate powerhouse of the Tong Tian Tower being unable to fly. Not to mention, he has a fear of heights! Of course, because a warrior’s strength in the Tong Tian Tower was not granted upon birth but was cultivated, any Innate Ranker would definitely be able to fly… The Innate powerhouses of the Tong Tian Tower having subpar flight skills and speed would already be looked down upon, let alone having a fear of heights! Moreover, after reaching the 6th Innate Rank, life in the air shouldn’t feel different from that of the ground.

“Zhong Guan and the others will stay behind to cooperate with Bao Gu and Jia De in handling the Golden Sun City. The Electric Flower Ores are the key point, after all,” Yue Yang made a temporary decision. Instead of flying in a luxury airship, he would follow Feng Ji and take a walk around the Heavenly Splendour Territory. Maybe this way, he would be able to obtain more information and figure out the real reason behind the snake-haired demon man’s request of meeting him here.

Drunken Cat Yu Jie and Yue Yu entered Yue Yang’s Grimoire World.

The Heaven Realm Female Draconians and the luxurious airship temporarily stayed in the Golden Sun City and waited, whereas the Fat Toad Jia De and the others were separately busy with their own matters.

For the first time, Yue Yang and Princess Qian Qian, who were wearing the same style of platinum armour, appeared in front of Feng Ji for the first time. Seeing how the two were almost identical, Sha Tong and Ouba were stunned. Even Feng Ji, who had good eyesight, was a little unsure, “Please forgive my rudeness, but which one of you is Master Titan?”

Jia De, the Fat Toad, got angry on the spot, “I really think that you are a blind man— Master Titan is beside Madam, Princess Qian Qian. You don’t even know the most gallant Princess in the world, how am I expected to trust you as a road scouter? Even the blind are stronger than you are!”

In fact, it’s no wonder that Feng Ji couldn’t distinguish the difference between the two.

In Yue Yang’s Domain, no one could see through the truth. Plus, Princess Qian Qian and Yue Yang’s armours were the same as they had the vague image of deception of reality and falsehood. Unless one solved the mystery in the Gates of Life and Death or had the strength of an Innate Supreme, it was not possible to see through the deceptive appearance. What Fat Toad Jia De and the others saw, under Yue Yang’s control, was different from what Feng Ji could see. To be exact, there were even distinctions between what Feng Ji and Sha Tong and the others could perceive as well.

Feng Ji made Jia De come to a dismay, so he suddenly felt a little ashamed. But at the same time, he felt like Master Titan and Princess Qian Qian didn’t have very high levels when it came to their skills. It was odd because he initially thought that they would have been much stronger.

As the guards were even Level 3 Heaven Rankers, it would only make sense if they were at the very least 4th Level Heaven Rankers, right? Unexpectedly, at first glance, it seemed that they were inferior to him— using their current abilities to pass through the Wind-Stopping Swamp was going to be an impossible task.

Of course, Master Titan and Princess Qian Qian might have secretly hidden powers.

The two of them stood together, giving off a very strange vibe. They seemed to be very strong, yet very weak at the same time, so it was hard to guess.

Feng Ji decided to find out for himself.

Otherwise, it would be too late for him to regret it if they went to the Wind-Stopping Swamp without making sure.

It would be better to die now than to die in Wind-Stopping Swamp in vain. Moreover, if nobles like Master Titan and Princess Qian Qian were unfortunate enough to die because they led the way, not only would this party be executed, but the commoners of the Golden Sun City would probably be exterminated and buried with them… Feng Ji thought for a while to gather his courage before he bowed to Yue Yang and Princess Qian Qian, “Since the Master and Her Highness have entrusted me with the task of leading the way, then I am responsible to care for your safety.
