The reason why he was able to get here in three days was because he discovered an unknown space rift. Passing through the space rift, he shortened at least 70% of his journey to get here.

This slave-hunting team could catch up with him from Heiling City to the Green Wilow City with a leisurely pace… The former Captain of the guard dared not think about it nor did he dare to look at it as he found a bloody shadow in one of the prison carts rather familiar. The sharp-eyed pathfinder thief rolled over and jumped down before he stuffed a purse to one of the guards with a smile on his face. Then, he said with a smile to the former Captain of the Hei Ling City guards, “Your speed is good, ain’t it? I didn’t expect you to be ahead of us!”

chapters.title: Chapter 928
chapters.body:
Chapter 928

Chapter 928: Knowledge And Trust

“You two know each other?” The guards of Green Willow City looked at the Captain who escaped from the Hei Ling City.

“…” The former Captain of Hei Ling City frowned.

He couldn’t say no because this damned pathfinder thief had already greeted him. Looking at his familiar appearance, anyone would think that they were childhood friends, so who was going to believe him if he said that he didn’t know who he was! However, if he said that he did, wouldn’t that mean he would be in the same faction? That was something that the former Captain would never admit to as the consequences of admitting so would be dire!

There was no other way to answer his question, so the former Captain merely pretended that he didn’t hear his question.

However, the pathfinder thief who offered a large bag of tax money nodded his head unconsciously and admitted, “Yes, we are together!”

As soon as these words were said, the former Captain of the Hei Ling City Gate wanted to kill him.

It was a pity that his strength wasn’t enough to win against his opponent, so he only stayed silent and once again, pretended to not hear anything.

Anyway, it was very unwise to turn against the other party here. He chose to just wait till they got into the Green Willow City before figuring a way out of his predicament!

The former Captain of the Hei Ling City gates forced his way through the crowd of people that were entering the city. He advanced forward through the busy street quickly, intending to get rid of the terrifying slave-hunting team behind him. If it was possible, he wanted to rush to another city gate as soon as possible; from there he would go further and escape. He did not want to partake in any activity with them no matter what would become of the Green Willow City! Although the Country Lord of Zhi Feng was at the 5th Level of the Heaven Rank and there were many warriors of the Heaven Rank under his command, in a few days, nearly ten Cities were completely taken over and subdued. The terrifying slave-hunting team’s arrival that dared to drag the respective City Lord captives in prison carts across territories did not sit well with the former Captain of the Hei Ling City. With such a massive strength in tow, he was not enthusiastic about siding with the Country Lord of Zhi Feng.

Unless there was an absolute assurance that they would win, who would just barge in to die trying?

This slave-catching team dared to come— which meant that they knew they were going to succeed.

If he took another look at the City Lords and the Garrison Generals of the respective captive countries in their carts, tortured and marred from head to toe, his heart was going to jump out of his body.

Unless it was done by one of the Domain Emperors, how was it possible for them to win against that many City Lords in one go? Yang Ti City, Sha Yan City, Ge Bi City, City of Thorns, Hu Tao City, Buffalo City and the Hei Ling City— every single one of the City Lords and Garrison Generals were all suppressed in the prison carts. This- what sort of power was this to be able to do something like that?

Moreover, if it wasn’t a powerhouse that wielded the same level of abilities as that of a Domain Emperor, how could anyone use a big-footed earth dragon to catch up with him who flew a Griffin at its highest speed and even used a space rift to escape?

Although his strength was not very strong, the Captain of the Hei Ling City gates had worked as a Captain for a long time. There, he had seen countless people, but never once did he ever see a pair of silver-armoured warriors as strong as the couple sitting on the golden throne. He couldn’t judge the magnitude of their strength solely by sight alone, but in his heart, he could feel the undeniable presence of a strong coercion. Could it be that this couple was the ‘Vengeance Domain Emperor’ among the Three Great Domain Emperors? Only Lord Vengeance Domain Emperor would have such mercy on pariahs and female slaves! But how could the Vengeance Domain Emperor appear here in the Zhi Feng Country? The Wind-Stopping Swamp was too far away from the area of control of the Vengeance Domain Emperor and this wasn’t an actual war-zone either!

The captain of Hei Ling City gates did not understand where this slave-catching team originated from.

He didn’t know their purpose of coming here either.

However, he had no time to think about these questions.

The only thing he wanted to do was to quickly escape to a place as far away from the Green Willow City as he could, never encountering the slave-catching team ever agiain!

“Wait,” The pathfinder thief riding on the Dromaeosaur chased after him again and said with a smile on his face, “Although your strength is pretty useless as it’s a lot worse than mine, your eyesight is good and your speed is not too bad. If you want to, shall I introduce you to join our escort team as a member? You seem very promising, so as a veteran member, I will warmly welcome you to join! Ah, my name is Feng Ji, what is your name?”

“Feng Ji? Are you not the City Lord of the Golden Sun City?” The city gate Captain of the Hei Ling City felt that it was no wonder he seemed a little familiar. It turned out that this guy was the legendary Golden Sun City Lord who almost starved to death!

“That was more than ten days ago; now I am a qualified, loyal bodyguard,” Feng Ji admitted generously.

“You gave up the City Lord position to be a guard?” The Captain of the Hei Ling City gate thought that this kid was mentally disabled. However, after thinking about it in his mind, being able to serve as a guard for the Domain Emperor was indeed more promising than being a City Lord. Besides, the Golden Sun City was nothing but a rotten place with no food, water or any form of scraps to live by, so becoming a guard was not exactly humiliating. The most important point was the fact that he guessed the people who did not agree to be their guards were all placed in the prison carts behind them. So thinking about it, the guard Feng Ji was actually treating him with the maximum politeness! The Captain of the Hei Ling City gates thought so as he shuddered, pleading in a low voice, “Sir, please raise your noble hand and let this lowly one go! This humble one only desires to live, so I definitely won’t speak about your team to anyone! Brawls between the upper ranks have nothing to do with an ant like me, so please spare me!”

“How boring, I thought you had good eyesight and you were a talented person, but I didn’t expect you to be a coward!” Feng Ji waved his hand boredly, “Then get out of my sight!”

“Thank you my lord, this ant will leave immediately and will never come back again!” The Captain of the Hei Ling City gates bowed lowly before turning around. That was close, thankfully his abilities were too weak and his rank was too low, which was why the opposing team didn’t continue insisting.

Just when the Captain of the Hei Ling City gates was about to leave at the fastest speed of his life, a voice echoed from behind.

It was one of the two silver-armoured warriors on the big-footed earth dragon, “Why have we stopped?”

Feng Ji sauntered forward and reported, “Master, you see, I found someone that I want to introduce to join the guard team. He has good eyesight, but he is very timid, so I didn’t know how to handle things for the time being,” After he finished speaking, he also turned around and pointed at the Captain of the Hei Ling City gates. With his words, the Captain of the Hei Ling City gates wanted to cry there and then— it’s over, he’s done for!

On the golden seat, the female warrior of the silver-armoured warrior couple refused, “No matter how smart you are, we don’t want cowards!”

Hearing what she said, the Captain of the Hei Ling City gates was granted amnesty and wanted to kneel and kowtow to her.

However, he did not dare to move.

In front of such a strong person, saying any wrong word or making any mistake might lead to his death.

He was waiting for the final decision of the mysterious man, who he suspected to be the Vengeance Domain Emperor. He hoped that he would also share the same opinions with the mysterious female warrior and be someone who hates cowards so he could escape.

“Naturally, we don’t want cowards,” The mysterious man nodded and said, “However, not all of a person’s courage can be seen on the surface; some are related to growth and need to be stimulated. Courage was usually proportional to strength, so the greater the ability, the more courage one would have. It would be impossible for everyone to be born as a daring guy. Especially for an intelligent mind, you’d have to give them some time to be courageous as they have always relied on their heads to overcome a situation. How about this? Give him a chance and let him handle a task— if he succeeds, we can take him as a temporary guard and nurture his abilities.”

“If the task cannot be accomplished, just kill him right away; I hate timid and incompetent guys!” The female warrior added.

The Captain of the Hei Ling City gates felt that it was getting dark.

He was screwed.

Completely screwed!

What sort of crappy chance is this? They’re obviously forcing me to do it!

It wasn’t a matter of wanting to commit as a guard-in-training; it was a matter of whether he could retain his life. If he couldn’t succeed, he was going to be bested into the claws of death. What kind of misfortune was this? Could it be that he collected too much from the taxes all these years, causing him to face this sick form of retribution?

The mysterious man threw a magic crystal at him and the Captain of the Hei Ling City gates caught it subconsciously. When he saw it, he shivered with fright.

My goodness, this is a Dragon-Devouring Beast Magic Crystal unique to the area around the Wind-stopping Swamp. It has the strength of a 3rd Level Heaven Rank; a precious treasure that has been purified by an unknown energy and in a flawless state. If I were to own one, I might even be able to become the City Lord of the Zhi Feng Country.

But what did he mean by throwing it into my arms?

“Your task is to hand it over to any of the Three Chief Executives under the command of the Country Lord of Zhi Feng and tell the other party that our Titan Commerce Group wants to participate in the birthday celebration of the 88th Concubine of the Lord,” The mysterious man dispatched a task to the Captain of the Hei Ling City gates.

“…” The Captain of the Hei Ling City gates did not dare to refuse, so he forced himself to accept it.

When the slave-catching team had passed by, Feng Ji, the pathfinder thief, patted the Captain of the Hei Ling City gates affectionately on the shoulder like a boss covering for his younger brother, “This is very simple; I did this in the Hei Ling City, the Buffalo City, the City of Thorns and so on. I believe that with your abilities, this would not be a problem. Do it well and maybe you’d still have a chance to join our escort group.”

The Captain of the Hei Ling City gates actually wanted to strangle him to death. If this kid hadn’t stopped him, he would have fled long ago.

Of course, he could only think about it.

If he were to really strangle him, the former City Lord of the Golden Sun City was still a Quasi-Heaven Ranker. With his mere strength of the 7th Level in the Earth Ranks, going against him would basically guarantee a gruesome death.

Under the situation that he was not stronger than the enemy, the Captain of the Hei Ling City gates could only force a smile that looked less like a smile and more like a crying expression, “I’ll give it a go!”

Feng Ji was very happy when he saw this expression, but he shook his head, “It’s not ‘giving it a go’. You have to be 100 % committed to this, otherwise, I can guarantee that your end would be distasteful. Actually, I think you’re being treated quite nicely. Out of so many people that tried running away from us, you’re the only one who’s survived for now. If it weren’t for the fact that our Master thinks you’re a capable person, do you think you’d be able to escape the Green Willow City? With your level of abilities, let’s not mention the others, even I can kill you with a swoop of my hand! Just do it properly, aright? Maybe you might be able to join us and be a real guard. Then, Master would grant you a Heaven Ranked beast and you’ll be able to turn the tides… Naturally, this position is not something that anyone can just take when they feel like it; even I’m a temporary escort, so you’re going to definitie;y be further from bearing a permanent position! Ahahaha!”

The boy went ahead and the Captain of the Hei Ling City gates found himself sweating profusely, his legs shaking like a convulsion.

He was going to have to fight for it as the outcome would determine his life or death!

Should I tell the secret?

If the Zhi Feng Country knew about this, they would definitely take the necessary actions. Should they win, his contribution towards ensuring the safety of the country would be immense!

But if that mysterious young man was truly the Vengeance Domain Emperor, then he would be getting into deep trouble. Even if the other two Domain Emperors were to come and save him, he wouldn’t be able to survive, let alone relying solely on the power of the Country Lord!

I should probably just do it obediently; if I think about this any longer, my life is going to be at stake.

God knows if anyone was spying on him in the shadows.. The Captain of the Hei Ling City gates glanced around and shuddered secretly before he hurriedly stepped forward, heading straight for the Country Lord’s Palace of the Green Willow City.

***

Ten minutes later.

He was simply thrown out of the Palace.

The Dragon-Devouring Beast Magic Crystal that was at a 3rd Level of Heaven Rank was indeed accepted and the promise to participate in the birthday banquet was also received, but he knew that everything was over by then. Because the Three Chief Executives didn’t show up and the ones who tended to him were just ordinary stewards. There was no invitation card either and the guy’s promise was completely invalid, which meant that the Magic Crystal that he presented must have been tucked into the bastard’s pockets.

Things like this didn’t only occur frequently in the Green Willow City, but in the Hei Ling city as well.

If it wasn’t sent by someone merely at the 7th Level of the Earth rank and was given by a Quasi-Heaven Ranker, perhaps these imbeciles wouldn’t have been as daring.

As the strength of the messenger was too weak and the quality of the item was too high, the opposing party must have taken the opportunity to sate his greed.

That Dragon-Devouring Beast Magic Crystal probably wouldn’t ever be received in the hands of any of the Three Chief Executives.

Which also meant that his mission had failed!

The Captain of the Hei Ling City gates, who had been punched more than a dozen times on his face, got up from the ground in despair. He had exhausted all means— he begged hard and even revealed his true identity as the Captain of the Hei Ling City gates. He repeatedly stated that he was entrusted by the powerful Titan Commerce Group to present gifts, hoping to actually get the invitation to the birthday party. However, the guy who received the offering still ignored him and said, “When the time comes, the Lord will make the arrangements; if you are to cause any more trouble, I will kill you” and then sent some guards to throw him out.

This was because his strength was too weak— weak to the point where even the opponents didn’t see a point in bullying him.

Even if they stole the treasure, there would be no adverse consequences.

If it weren’t for the entrustment of the Council of Commerce, he would have probably been killed and destroyed there and then!

“…” The Captain of the Hei Ling City gates suppressed his anger and shook his head. This damned Country Lord’s Palace was truly robbing others in broad daylight, but it’s useless to complain as he didn’t have a high enough strength! If he had enough power, he would definitely kill all those incompetent fools and set fire to this damned ‘Palace of Hell’ that was almost made up of the bones of the pagonised civillians!

“Things don’t seem to be going well?” At some point, Feng Ji was right behind the Captain of the Hei Ling City gates.

“I failed,” The Captain of the Hei Ling City gates closed his eyes and waited for death.

“Now do you understand the helplessness of not having strength? A person must not only have sight, but also strength and finally— courage. If you have all these, then you are qualified to be the guard for the Master!” Feng Ji patted the other party’s shoulder, “Master Titan knew that you would fail, but he saw your hard work and thought you were actually kind of talented, so he gave you a second task.”

“A second task?” In the heart of the Captain of the Hei Ling City gates, suddenly, he felt a like he was going to be reborn as he started to cry.

In despair, he saw the dawn of hope again.

He was not going to fail a second time!

He vowed to put in all of his effort; even if he was going to die, he wasn’t going to fail his second task!

If for nothing else, the appreciation and trust of the superior being was what he was going to work for; even when he failed, the man still trusted him so much and entrusted him with a second mission. In his entire life, when has anyone ever placed that much trust on him? When had anyone offered him a second chance?

Only that mysterious and powerful young man— only he felt that the Captain was a man of talent!

The Captain of the Hei Ling City gates clenched his fists. For the first time, he felt that he had an unprecedented power of faith bursting in his body!

chapters.title: Chapter 929
chapters.body:
Chapter 929

Chapter 929: An Arrogant Man Who Changed His Attitude

Leader Jin was not originally named Jin.

However, because when he was a mercenary in his early years, his face was disfigured and his teeth were entirely shattered, which he later replaced with an entire row of golden teeth. He also accidentally won the appreciation of the Chief Executive under Country Lord of Zhi Feng’s command and became the leader of the guards in duty. Hence, the name ‘Leader Jin’ was made.

T/N: ‘Jin’ means gold in Chinese.

The day after tomorrow would be the Country Lord of Zhi Fen’s 88th concubine’s birthday celebration.

Leader Jin was very busy at the moment.

He commanded the servants arrogantly on the street, making those struggling citizens move faster in loading all the meat and alcohol they needed into the car.

Although Leader Jin was in charge of the preparations this time, he was only a second-class guest outside the palace. Despite not being a VIP in the palace, this was still an important position. In order to achieve that standing however, Leader Jin paid 10,000 gold to the Chief Executive and his son, two Gold-level treasures and four beautiful slave girls who were still virgins.

With great effort, of course there would be great rewards.

When Leader Jin successfully won this important role, countless businessmen complied with him and the guards who used to have no deep friendship also secretly kept paying homage to him, hoping to get a share of this rank.

Although Country Lord Zhi Feng was known to be a dear who favoured all of his concubines, he especially loved the concubine in the 88th room the most.

It turned out that this favoured concubine of his was always in the top 5 ranks in terms of favour. Besides the main wife and another two equal wives that ranked a little higher than her, she was actually the next-in-line when it came to ranking. However, it was kind of strange— his beloved concubine who was named ‘Zhu Guang’ didn’t seem to like the number 5; instead, she really enjoyed the number 88. To make her happy, the Country Lord Zhi Feng killed off every single concubine after the 87th one so she could have a taste of the 88th seat that she so enjoyed. One could definitely see from that sact how much the Country Lord Zhi Feng adored and loved her to no end.

In the Green Willow City, besides the birthday celebrations of the country Lord himself and his 1st wife, Lady Zhu Guang’s birthday celebration was the next grand event. It was three years ago when he encountered the beautiful Lady Zhu Guang and he had always treated her well like she was his treasure. He wanted nothing more than to envelop her in his loving arms each and every day.

The beautiful lady’s smiles and frowns would determine the mood and emotions of the Country Lord himself.

If it weren’t for the fact that his first wife was bestowed by the Domain Emperor himself, paired with the fact that she came from a rather major family in the Heavenly Splendour Territory that made him unable to break off the marriage, the Country Lord of Zhi Feng would have divorced her long ago and move up his beloved concubine’s ranking.

“Lead Jin, Leader Jin, Leader Jin…”

When Leader Jin heard someone call him, he turned around and found the man that had taken risks in his early years but unfortunately didn’t get along that well with— it was the Flame-Eyed Man, Jin Yun. Although he hadn’t seen him for nearly ten years, of course he still recognized this former companion. However, he saw his former companion dressed like a hunter with animal skin draped over his back. His face also seemed like he had been pounded into a pulp. There was no need for explanation— he knew that the Captain of the Hei Ling City guards probably ran into some sort of trouble and had no one else to rely on, hence, offering himself up to him for service. If it was someone else, Leader Jin wouldn’t even bother to reply to him, but the Flame-Eyed man was still quite strong. Not only was he a formidable guard, he was good at racking his mind and played the role of the intelligent strategist previously when they were still teammates. Besides, when his life was in danger in his previous team, Jin Yun did help him out before. The most important part was, as a dignified person, Leader Jin thought that he had to accept some pleas from his former friends or teammates every once in a while to further emphasise his success over them.

He thought to himself and a smile appeared on his face. Pretending not to recognize this Flame-Eyed Man Jin Yun, he faked puzzlement and asked, “You… You are..?”

The former Captain of the Hei Ling City gates, Flame-Eyed Man Jin Yun, naturally knew that this guy was pretending to be confused in order to humiliate him.

But in order to complete his task, he had to hold back his anger.

He hurried forward and saluted respectfully, “Leader Jin has risen to the high ranks. With such an important position, perhaps you forgot about this old friend of yours. I’m Jin Yun, the one who went on the collecting task in the periphery of the Wind-Stopping Swamp.”

Leader Jin heard it and patted his forehead. As if he remembered something, he shouted, “Hey, hey! Truly, how can I forget about my old friend! It’s all this stupid brain’s fault; it becomes useless when we get old. I couldn’t even react for a while! Tsk tsk tsk, Flame-Eyed Man Jin Yun, you were the deputy leader at that time— handling logistics, inquiring about the intelligence arrangement plan, being multi-talented and equipped with unparalleled wisdom and sight; how could I forget you! It’s just your outfit that made me momentarily confused. Deputy Leader Jin Yun, weren’t you assigned to a good role in the Hei Ling City? How did you end up in such a sorry state?”

“I-cough, I resigned,” Flame-Eyed Man Jin Yun indeed escaped the roles of a guard as he spoke with sweat dripping off his head.

“So it turned out to be a resignation…” Leader Jin laughed coldly in his heart. Leader Jin thought that he was clearly fired from his job, so what was he trying to hide? He’s still insistent to keep some of his dignity despite resulting in such a horrifying state! Naturally, with Leader Jin’s personality, although his heart was snickering and condescending, his facial expressions revealed none of that. He reached out his hand to touch the former Captain of the Hei Ling City guard’s animal skin as he let out a sigh, “Still, living in freedom remains the best. Busying yourself from the break of dawn to the brink of night and being unable to make time for anything else is way too agonising. You are the one who can walk freely to enjoy pots of good wine and have good meat, whereas I can no longer rid myself of this role. If I keep at it for a few more years, I will be able to retire like you guys and enjoy the life of freedom!”

“Leader Jin, you have been promoted to a high rank and you bear an important position for the Country Lord, so it’s normal for you to be busy,” Jin Yun, the Flame-Eyed Man spoke with a smile, wishing to slap this guy to death.

“The Country Lord’s matters were all major events. Brother, I am also fighting for my life. If I neglect a task, my head may fall off one day,” Leader Jin was very elated, hoping that he would continue praising and never stop for three days and three nights straight.

“Yes, of course, the Country Lord’s matter would definitely be important…” Jin Yun, the Flame-Eyed Man, had no choice but to agree.

“Deputy, what is the purpose of your visit today? You just entered the City I assume, so I don’t think you had your meal yet, have you? With big brother here, how could I ever let you suffer the pain of dealing with hunger? Since you’re in Green Willow City, let’s head to this old man’s place! You don’t have to be afraid anymore, I’ll be the judge for you no matter what sort of scenario you got yourself into. I can’t say much of anything, but as long as I, Leader Jin, have a bowl of rice to eat, you will never feel hungry! Let’s go, we’re going to go to the best restaurant in the Green Willow City to indulge in some fine wine. Not mentioning anything else, I think I can still bear the cost of getting a good, virgin girl for you too,” Leader Jin became more arrogant by the second as the entire street could hear his words with much clarity. Under the countless gazes of awe and envy, his face gleamed as his body trembled, exuding an aura of proudness.

“Actually, I am here today to plead for Leader Jin’s help in one aspect,” Jin Yun, the Flame-Eyed Man, endured the embarrassment. In order to complete the task, what’s wrong with being humiliated by this guy?

“If it’s not important, let’s eat first. No matter what happens, I can’t let my brother go hungry, right? Let’s go, we’ll talk about it at the celebration. Deputy Jin Yun, let me tell you— now that you’re with your brother, you don’t have to worry about anything else,” Leader Jin felt exhaled and raised his eyebrows, feeling as if the bad luck that he encountered at the start of the year drifted away along with that puff of breath.

His heart bore slight pity; if only Jin Yun had offended him back then, he would have taken the opportunity to step on him a couple of times in an act of public revenge through humiliation. However, back then, the Flame-Eyed Man Jin Yun didn’t treat him badly at all and even saved his life in a small way.

Forget it, he was happy enough to be able to flaunt his success in front of the person that was flashier than him back then. The Flame-Eyed Man Jin Yun probably never thought that the almost useless mercenary back then would one day rise to this position— to the point where Leader Jin would offer a helping hand when he was at his worst. Haha, he must be feeling the shame and gratitude at the same time!

The Flame-Eyed Man Jin Yun whispered to him the purpose of this trip, “The thing is, Leader Jin, I’m leading a small Council of Commerce and that group wants to take advantage of Madam Zhu Guang’s birthday celebration to enter the Country Lord’s mansion to convey their respect and intentions. I hope Leader Jin can help me out; there will not be a shortage of obedience and rewards.”

This kind of thing was not very difficult for Leader Jin.

That was because the Country Lord of Zhi Feng wouldn’t ever reject the entry for Commerce Councils.

At most, it would be a matter of where the guests were to be seated. If the Council of Commerce came from a high-standing, it was not impossible to be classified as a VIP.

But the person who came to beg was his old friend Flame-Eyed Man Jin Yun. Leader Jin’s face portrayed his distress when he heard it, so he waved his hand in embarrassment, “Deputy, I’m not trying to make things difficult for you, but it will be hard to solve this matter. You are my brother, so I naturally want things to go well for you, but just listen to your brother on this one because there is a certain difficulty to this. Although your brother is the one arranging the celebration, the main source of responsibility lies in the Palace. Getting a spot in the Palace is hard because there’s Commerce Councils from both in and out of the Zhi Feng Country that are vying to get a spot. That would practically be me going up against death! It’s not that I don’t want you to help you; it’s just too difficult.”

Even if it was not difficult in the slightest.

In order to humiliate Jin Yun, the Flame-Eyed Man, Leader Jin also had to pretend that what was being asked of him was intensely difficult to handle.

He wanted this failure of a friend to plead and beg him endlessly. It would be best if he would kneel for him and sob while doing so as well.

Leader Jin could see that this Flame-Eyed Man Jin Yun had fallen to such a pitiful state where anyone could start to gang up against him. If he didn’t use the chance to give him a good kick in the face, he would have felt like this was a wasted opportunity.

“We will definitely not make things hard for you, Leader Jin!”

A clear voice resounded not far from the two of them.

Leader Jin turned his head and saw that there was a quasi-Heaven Level guard with sharp eyes, who accompanied a handsome Young Master dressed in silver armour as the two of them walked over. From the perspective of Leader Jin in the Country Lord’s Palace, it was obvious at a glance that this Young Master was simply a dragon among men. If nothing else, just by looking at his outfit, he could tell that he was an extraordinary being.

On the surface, the young man seemed like an ordinary warrior.

In fact, just by looking at a certain ring on his hand, it could be seen that he was deliberately making himself low-key as he hid his true power and dressed as an ordinary warrior.

It was a Holy-level ring, but Leader Jin didn’t know what sort of special skill was used to cover up the brilliance and the aura. This ring was called ‘Rain Flower’, which was a very rare find. It was said that the ring was part of a set of five in the Heavenly Splendour Territory— namely Cyclonus, Wind-Stopping, Wandering, Cloud-Crossing and Rain Flower. The first two were owned by the Hurricane Country Lord and the Zhi Feng Country Lord as they were bestowed by the Domain Emperor. The latter three precepts were slightly inferior, but they were all Holy Level treasures. It was said that collecting the five rings would provide mysterious functions.

Back then, in order to reward his younger brother, Feudal Lord of Hei Ling City, for his great deeds in capturing millions of slaves and assembling an army of 300,000 people, he awarded the ring to him in public.

There was also a saying that it was the Feudal Lord of Hei Ling City who begged so hard to be granted that reward under the pretence of ‘strengthening their brotherly bond’.

The Country Lord of Zhi Feng had no choice but to give in to him.

Precisely because of that, it became one of the three things that the Country Lord of Zhi Feng regretted the most. Ever since he gave the ring to his brother, he knew that he would never be able to gather the five rings and uncover what sort of mysterious power they held.

Therefore, Leader Jin would deeply remember the appearance of the Five Holy Rings.

Unexpectedly, today, he saw this Rain Flower ring in the hands of a strange man. Of course, a treasure like this was definitely not something that ordinary warriors could possess. If it was owned by an ordinary warrior, that man would have been killed and the treasure would be taken away in less than a day. This noble young man dared to wear it generously, proving that he was indeed an indescribable figure.

“Who is this Young Master?” Leader Jin naturally did not dare to treat this noble man with the same attitude he treated Jin Yun.

“The president of our Titan Commerce Group,” The pathfinder thief Feng Ji beside him quickly introduced the Third Young Master of the Yue Clan who was dispatched.

“Leader Jin, the Deacon of the outer affairs of the Country Lord, and the Head of preparations for Mrs. Zhu Guang’s birthday celebration,” Jin Yun, the Flame-Eyed Man, who stood there pretended to introduce his former friend to student Yue Yang.

“So it turns out to be Leader Jin…” Yue Yang imitated the tone of Leader Jin just now, who was about to sneer and humiliate the arrogant guy. Who would have thought that this guy was all talk and no bones because Yue Yang watched Leader Jin bow deeply towards him. His butt was now higher than his head as he bowed even deeper and spoke, “This humble one deserves to die, I was unaware of Young Master Titan’s glorious arrival and visit! Please forgive this humble one!”

“Then, the matter of attending the birthday celebration?” Jin Yun, the Flame-Eyed Man, was convinced by the authority Yue Yang had over this once arrogant man.

Although this guy’s character was not good, his smoothness and insane reaction speed to all sorts of situations in life were really not comparable to ordinary people.

Of course, it’s not bad to keep an eye on the strong to observe their words and expressions. At least he could see that Master Titan had specially put on the tentative Rain Flower ring, so at the very least, he wasn’t born with a useless pair of eyes as they proved to be functional.

Leader Jin patted his chest and gave words of guarantees, “This matter is covered by me. If Master Titan cannot sit on the VIP seat, my head will be chopped off for the Young Master to sit on as a stool!” He took a closer look. Around them, there were several mercenaries with good strength forming a protective circle on the street. It seemed that there were more than a dozen high-ranking powerhouses secretly guarding them, making him even more convinced that this Young Master Titan was a famous disciple.

After Feng Ji got Yue Yang’s signal, he quickly stuffed a Heaven Ranked Level 1 Red Wolf King Magic Crystal in the arms of Leader Jin, who became even more delighted to the point where he almost didn’t kneel down and kowtow to Yue Yang.

Leader Jin then left to make the necessary arrangements for the birthday celebration.

Flame-Eyed Jin Yun asked suspiciously, “Why did we have to get an invitation from him?”

Yue Yang smiled, “When you’re playing chess, sometimes you need patience and sometimes you need to be stupid. But when the stupid becomes a master, you can reap the rewards.”

After he finished speaking, he left, completely ignoring the Flame-Eyed Man Jin Yun who seemed to deliberate between understanding his words and not comprehending anything. Feng Ji waited for Yue Yang to turn around and leave before he punched Jin Yun’s head, “You bastard, what did I tell you before? Any questioning is forbidden because the only thing you have to do is to execute, execute and execute! By the way, just now, as the welcome was not warm enough, in order to show my concern and love for you, a newcomer, I decided to warmly welcome you again!”

The Flame-Eyed Man Jin Yun rolled his eyes, “Damn, who decided this kind of welcome ceremony? You’re going to hit more? If you continue, I’m going to fight back, okay?”

Feng Ji knocked Jin Yun to the ground with a punch before he stretched out his legs and kicked him, smiling happily, “You don’t need to know who set rules for the welcome ceremony, just understand one thing— as long as newbies join, you can welcome them ruthlessly. Do it just like the way I’m welcoming you; you don’t know how long I’ve waited for this day- Shit! You’re really fighting back.Fine then, I won’t be polite anymore either!”

After a violent beating, the Flame-Eyed Man Jin Yun stretched his legs as he almost died.

Feng Ji, the man who kept laying punches and kicks on him, was so tired that he stuck out his tongue and panted.

Beating people was hard work as well, wasn’t it?

“Crap, if there is another newcomer joining, I will beat him to death!” Jin Yun, the Flame-Eyed Man, gritted his teeth with hatred. He felt that if this tradition and this welcoming ceremony ended here, it would be the saddest thing in his life. Therefore, no matter what and no matter how, this tradition must be inherited and carried forward!

“That’s right, the fine traditions must be inherited!” Feng Ji gasped for breath and kicked the Flame-Eyed Man Jin Yun again, who fell to the ground.

“You’re still hitting me?”

“You must have been daydreaming; of course I’m going to! That day I was surrounded by a circle of Heaven Rankers who beat me up for approximately 20 minutes; they might continue once we get back, to be honest. If I don’t get my revenge, wouldn’t that be a loss for me? Accept fate, kid, I’m going to beat you up for sure! But because you’re rather frail and weak, I’ll be separating the times I best you and do it on more occasions!”

“Damn, you introduced me to this group because of your desire for revenge…”

chapters.title: Chapter 930
chapters.body:
Chapter 930

Chapter 930: My Sister? I’ll Get Yours!

Yue Yang took advantage of Feng Ji’s old acquaintance to get through to Leader Jin and they finally got an invitation to the birthday party.

In addition to being in awe of his identity, Leader Jin who received over-the-top bribes such as the Heaven Rank War Beast Magic Crystal, was naturally very concerned about Yue Yang’s affairs. He tried his best, intending to pull this noble person Yue Yang into the social circle of the Country Lord Zhi Feng as soon as possible. Of course, he was just a low-ranked Leader, aso he wasn’t qualified enough to make an appointment for Yue Yang to meet the Country Lord Zhi Feng.

“Tomorrow morning, the Chief Executive will return to Green Willow City. It is estimated that in the afternoon, we will be able to arrange an appointment at a suitable time. Please wait for one more night, Master Titan,” Leader Jin not only respected Yue Yang, but also the Flame-Eyed Man, Jin Yun. He also regained his true enthusiasm as a friend, desperately trying to drag him to drink some wine and establish a good relationship.

“It’s okay, the Titan Commerce Group has the intention of joining the birthday celebration, so there’s no need to hurry,” Yue Yang smiled.

“In the past two days, many noble people have gone to the Country Lord Zhi Feng’s Palace to walk around. I wonder if Master Titan is willing to attend? Perhaps you might be able to meet some of your friends in the Palace!” Leader Jin wanted to make up for his lack of ability and wanted to talk about Yue Yang going to the Country Lord’s Palace for a walk. But let alone Yue Yang, Feng Ji and the Flame-Eyed Man Jin Yun who joined later, both knew that this was impossible. Before coming to the Green Willow City, this Young Master Titan had never been to the Heavenly Splendour Territory. It was simply done on a whim to seize the capital and the Green Willow City, so it was impossible for him to see any old friends.

“After the lunch break, if I don’t have any matters to tend to, I may go to the Country Lord’s Palace for a stroll,” Yue Yang didn’t mind going to have a look at the terrain and spy for some information.

He still didn’t really get why the war was still ongoing to this stage in the Heavenly Splendour Territory, after all.

Was it really as simple as it was said on the surface— that it was done by the first Domain Emperor?

Besides, even if there was a war between the three Domain Emperors, what did it have to do with ordinary people? Why should tens of millions of troops strangle each other in the war zones?

This kind of strangulation seemed to be a war, but after careful analysis by Yue Yang, Yue Yu, Princess Qian Qian and Drunken Cat Yu Jie, it appeared to resemble more of a blood sacrifice that would cost countless lives.What is the reason for the three Domain Emperors to invest sacrificing tens of millions of troops in the melee zone with their flesh, blood and lives? Although he didn’t know the truth, Yue Yang had reason to believe that existences above the level of the Country Lords should know something. Even if they didn’t know why countless blood sacrifices were made in the battles between the Domain Emperors, they should know something about the strange situations in the Heavenly Splendour Territory such as the Wind-Stopping Swamp, which was a forbidden place restricted by laws.

This time, when he came to Green Willow City, Yue Yang was not going to keep things as simple as torturing the wicked in order to kill and seize treasures. He also wanted to obtain the information of the Heavenly Splendour Territory from the strong such as the Country Lord Zhi Feng. At least, he had to squeeze out the truth about the Wind-Stopping Swamp and White River City.

Leader Jin looked at Yue Yang and agreed before he happily went back and prepared.

Although on the surface, this Young Master Titan did not seem to be a strong Heaven Ranker, he was secretly protected by Heaven Ranked guards, so he should be of a very noble existence. Getting to know such a noble person would definitely become a great benefit to him. Besides, this Young Master Titan was young— he was still so young and yet so powerful, who could guarantee that he wouldn’t reach the Heaven Ranks once he grew older?

“Those captured prisoners really don’t need to be brought back to the Tong Tian Tower for imprisonment first?” Yue Yu always felt that the prison car was too loose of a captivity for those who were Heaven Rankers. Although these villains had already been beaten up by Yue Yang, they might have their hidden skills. Once Yue Yang left, perhaps they would get away and escape.

“Don’t worry, they can’t run away,” Yue Yang was very calm.

“Those guys are already crippled and there are Zhong Guan, Hei Tu and Bai Ma who are guarding them day and night. If they can run like this, then Zhong Guan and the others should just kill themselves instead of being guards. I think the biggest problem is not about the prisoners, but it’s whether or not the people of the Tong Tian Tower are able to arrive in time. If something was overlooked or if there was even a slight delay, it would be possible for the Country Lord of Zhi Feng and the others to escape. This is their land after all— we’re not familiar with it and this was done on a spur of the moment; obviously, there would be a chance where things don’t always go to plan,” Princess Qian Qian felt that it would be better to bring Sky Execution and the other powerhouses Tong Tian Tower. Although there was a danger of revealing their strength and attracting attention, it was better than asking for troops to be dispatched when they were caught in a tight pinch.

“Those guys in the Sky Demon Palace are all belligerents. Can’t they just stay in their lodges nicely? There’s also that stupid Great Demon King Baruth and the others. Even if others were blind, they would be able to tell their identities if they were to really come!” Drunken Cat Yu Jie felt that there was going to be something wrong no matter what they did.

“If only Wu Xia was here,” Yue Yu sighed slightly.

In the past, most of their plans were conceived by Xue Wu Xia. Everyone discussed how to improve it, so it was not too difficult back then. Now that she was asleep and the burden fell on his shoulders, he realised that her role was really not easy.

It was impossible to count how many battles they have fought in the past. The ones that were so thrilling and dangerous that they almost failed included the unsealing of the Prison Emperor Palace, the Dark Prison King’s poisoning, the Death Arena, the duel with the Ancient Demon King, and the battle from the invasion of the Demon King. There were also various other battles, big and small, all of which were won by Xue Wu Xia and Yue Yang after negotiating with each other and making decisions.

Although everyone had something to add, the supplementations and improvements were completely different things from layout planning.

Yue Yang waved his hand, indicating that the three women should not pay too much attention to these things, “The so-called perfect and foolproof plan cannot exist. The plan can’t always keep up with the changes in things. We only need to have a basic route to move forward and we don’t need to pursue perfection too much. I know Wu Xia is not here and all of you want to help me, but you don’t need to make a unique plan to go up against the Country Lord Zhi Feng. Even if he escapes, we will chase him. We’re not in that dire of a situation where the plan needs to be 100% perfect, and it’s not like we’re going to die once the plan fails..”

Hearing what he said, the three girls secretly laughed.

Come to think of it, reality was like that.

With Yue Yang’s strength, it wouldn’t be too difficult to beat the Country Lord Zhi Feng.

The only thing that was slightly difficult was to determine how to catch all the warriors of the entire birthday celebration in one go to prevent them from escaping and alarming the three Domain Emperors.

Even if they took a step back and alerted the Domain Emperors to let them know of Yue Yang’s existence, they would at most be alert to the rise of a newcomer. No matter how suspicious they were, they would never suspect that the powerhouses of the Tong Tian Tower were coming. Not being alerted was the perfect execution of the plan, but it wouldn’t be a big deal to disturb the Domain Emperor either. Even if there was such an accident, it would not be fatal to the overall situation.

The reason why Princess Qian Qian and the others were so nervous was because they had unconsciously regarded themselves as Xue Wu Xia and pressured themselves to plan a perfect plan for him.

“Little San (Yue Yang), you can just stroll around and see if you can find out some information before you come back. If it’s really not going to work, then I’ll see if there’s anything I can do to help,” Yue Yu was peaceful by nature and didn’t like fighting very much, so expressing her will and initiative to fight was a rather rare occasion.

“Great!”

Yue Yang knew that she didn’t want the plan to fail as soon as Xue Wu Xia fell asleep, which explained her enthusiasm.

Of course, this was also related to the fact that Yue Yu’s strength has skyrocketed.

Now, she was no longer the weak Yue Yu who needed Yue Yang’s protection. When Yue Yang needed her, she could really stand up and become a powerful aid for him!

***

On the streets of Green Willow City, the residents here were very strange and behaved unlike anything Yue Yang had seen before. The rich and the poor were polarised— with the rich getting loaded while the poor have nothing. The rich were dressed in fresh clothes, sated, satisfied and full of lavishness. The poor were naked and many children wandered on the streets, looking for every opportunity to make money, such as cleaning shoes for the rich, sweeping horse dung for the rich, running errands for the rich. They used their dried up, darkened and thin bodies to do unimaginably hard work in exchange for a little black bread to fill the belly.

It would be alright if they were given the money that they were promised. The worst part would be meeting the arrogant higher-class status citizens that not only didn’t reward them for their hard work, but also gave them a few kicks on their ribs and bones.

The same goes for mercenaries.

The mercenaries with strength and backing were prosperous and proud of the spring breeze.

Some mercenaries were downcasted like the walking dead, following others behind their backs, betting with their lives, mixing with the hungry that lost all hope. Many mercenaries were homeless as they laid down on the streets with signs that stated they’d hunt demons below the 5th Level for one gold. Besides that, they have nothing and some mercenaries were desolate to the point where they didn’t possess their weapons.

In comparison, on both sides of the street, there were tall, majestic and magnificent buildings of all kinds; all of which show the prosperity and wealth of Green Willow City.

Here, it was a paradise for the rich.

But it was also a hell for the poor.

Yue Yang sighed slightly. Although the Tong Tian Tower was also supreme in strength and preyed on the weak, no matter how bad it was, it was not like the Green Willow City. Emperors like Jun Wu You and the others would occasionally take care of the people’s livelihood even if some leader was considered to be a fool at governing.

In the Soaring Dragon Continent, no matter how bad it was, if you were cheeky and took refuge in certain families as servants, you could still have a meal.

There were thousands of hungry people that laid on the streets of the Green Willow City.

He had never seen anything like this.

The entire Zhi Feng Country— no, perhaps the entire Heavenly Splendour Territory was like this.

“Get out of the way, you pariahs! Gentlemen of the Heaven Rank, you are about to enter the city, so maybe hurry up and keep your eyes squinted so as not to contaminate your noble sight!” A guard came back from the city gates and hurriedly drove the hungry people who were lying down on the street. He had them hurry to hide in some dark alleys, so that the outside world would not see their ugly states. Some citizens with slower movements were punched and kicked by the guards and it would not be surprising if they were directly hacked to death if they hadn’t escaped quickly.

“Welcome, welcome! We warmly welcome the distinguished guests to visit Green Willow City!”

A group of people flew out from the Country Lord’s Palace. Most of them were beautiful women with exposed fronts and the other half were guards with bright armour.

They lined up together and happily greeted these kinds of foreign envoys. Most of these envoys were friends of the same level as the Country Lord of Zhi Feng and a few were VIP guests invited by him.

The Head of the Three Chief Executives personally welcomed him as one of the Country Lord’s Four Marshals, Bai Sui, accompanied the Yue Yang throughout the entire journey.

Leader Jin introduced to Yue Yang that he was supposed to arrive late at night, but because the journey was relatively smooth and there were no accidents when he passed the edge of the Wind-Stopping Swamp, he arrived half a day earlier.

Not far away, more than a dozen Heaven Rankers up to the 3rd Level formed a rather conspicuous team.

Accompanied by the Head of the Chief Executives and the Marshal Bai Sui, Yue Yang flew into the Green Willow City with a smile on his face.

Originally, Yue Yang was not very interested in these people; it’s not like he hadn’t seen a bunch of Heaven Rankers together before. However, there was a ten-metre-high giant among the team, which really made Yue Yang dumbfounded. The size of this giant was neither the tallest nor the shortest, there was nothing special about his appearance and the armour on his body is relatively ordinary, which seemed to be unremarkable.

His strength was not bad as it was equal to the strength of the two most prideful faces in the team— all at the strength of a Level 3 Heaven Ranker.

“Crap, this damned fellow!” Yue Yang cursed.

“What?” Leader Jin was scared to death. It wouldn’t matter if this Young Master wanted to let out his anger, he could do it any day at any time; but he absolutely must not go against that Heaven Ranker team. Even if this Young Master Titan turned out alright in the end,Leader Jin’s life wouldn’t be spared if such an incident happened. He was going to try to persuade Yue Yang to go back and convince him that it would be fine if he wanted to beat him or scold him when he went back as long as he didn’t do anything rash here. That’s more than a dozen Heavenly Rank powerhouses!

Yue Yang kicked him away, pointed at the ten-metre-tall giant and shouted, “When you see an old friend, why don’t you say hello? That’s too outrageous!”

When the giant saw Yue Yang, he was even more stunned.

His expression is unbelievable.

Standing beside him, there was a powerhouse who was also at the3rd Level Heaven Rank and asked with a light snort, “Tian Ri, is that your friend?”

The seemingly unremarkable giant nodded before he suddenly laughed and strode towards Yue Yang, “What fate we have to meet each other across thousands of miles, so I couldn’t recognise you from afar. Damn kid, I haven’t seen you for so long and you have already grown up so much. You really gave this old man a shock! Though I did hear that you were up here, I didn’t expect you to mix in with… hey hey, what sort of flashy clothes are these? And the Holy Level Ring, Rain Flower? Where’d you steal this from?”

Those Heaven Ranked powerhouses saw that they were old acquaintances and didn’t care much. They just glanced at Yue Yang curiously and moved on.

On the other hand, the Head of the Chief Executive’s eyes flashed like lightning.

Immediately, he summoned Leader Jin to ask about Yue Yang’s identity. Of course, except for the name of Master Titan, he knew about nothing else. Leader Jin had also just gotten in his line of work, so he didn’t know anything about him either.

“Serve him with all your strength and find out. He’s the friend of Lord Tian Ri? This young man is really not easy!” The Head of the Chief Executive gave Leader Jin an order.

“Yes,” Leader Jin was overjoyed to be used so much and his bones were lighter by a few pounds.

Over there, Yue Yang and the ten-metre-tall giant were scolding each other in a low voice.

Yue Yang was unceremonious and directly spoke, “I have seen a lot of people pretending to be a pervert, but I have never seen someone who pretended to be as coercive as you! You’re obviously at the Level 8th Innate Supreme Rank but here you are, pretending to be a 3rd Level Heaven Ranker. What the hell do you want to do? Ming Ri Hao, you lied to this Young Master so miserably! I was really blind at the beginning to trust that you were merely a 3rd Level!”

The ten-metre-tall giant was the golden giant Ming Ri Hao that he had seen in the Prison Emperor’s Palace, but now he had hidden his golden light in a low-key manner and even his appearance had been made ordinary.

It was not a bad thing to disguise, but with the strength of the 8th level of the Innate Supreme pretending to be the 3rd Level Heaven Rank?

Yue Yang felt that it was impossible not to lecture him to death!

Ming Ri Hao made a quiet move, “Don’t yell out, it’s not good for everyone. You pretend to be your rich Young Master, I’ll pretend to be my Heaven Rank mercenary— everyone can get what they need!”

“I’ll give you ten seconds to explain, otherwise, don’t blame me for turning my back on a friend!” Yue Yang gave him the look that indicated he was going to tell if he didn’t let him know what was going on.

“If I had known, I wouldn’t have come to this damned Green Willow City. Forget it, I’m just unlucky to meet you… Before I say it, tell me about you first. You opened the God’s Ruins to absorb the Divine Power? How did you progress to this state? I can’t see your strength clearly. Could it be that your strength has surpassed mine? How is this possible? If this is the case, what is the Prison Emperor’s title as the best progresser back then?” Ming Ri Hao was even more curious about Yue Yang.

“This Young Master has made rapid progress because he is a genius and it has nothing to do with the God’s Ruins,” Yue Yang summed it up in one sentence and then asked Ming Ri Hao,: “I’m done talking, and when it comes to you, what are you doing here? By the way, I wrote so many love letters but why did your sister reply to none of them?”

“Don’t ask me about your businesses!” Ming Ri Hao seemed to be extremely afraid of his younger sister Ming Yue Guang and he refused to talk more.

“Then why are you here? Don’t tell me, you are so bored that you have come here for a walk,” Yue Yang snorted very unhappily.

“We’re in the streets discussing some important national affairs and that’s unsightly. Let’s go find a restaurant and sit down and have a drink. If I were to talk about this in detail, I won’t be able to finish it in three days and three nights,” Ming Ri Hao felt a little conflicted. If Yue Yang was like before, he would have been able to kill him that moment. But he was now grown up and different as he couldn’t tell his level at all, so he couldn’t finish him off now. INstead of becoming enemies, he had to become friends with him too.

Anyway, it didn’t seem that bad to have a cunning and shameless guy like him as a companion.

Student Yue Yang also has other thoughts. If this Ming Ri Hao wasn’t the eldest brother of his little girl Ming Yue Guang, he would have started to think of ways to eliminate him as well.

But Ming Yue Guang was to be pushed down by his own reservation; this guy was strictly nothing but her big brother. He had good strength, good brains and hiring him would be very cheap. Overall, becoming alliances with him wouldn’t be a loss.

Finally, after thinking about it, he decided to cooperate.

Anyway, if I can’t get a big advantage this time, I’ll get it back from his sister in the future!

Fortunately, Ming Ri Hao couldn’t read minds. Otherwise, he would have yelled at him. “My sister? I’ll get it from your sister!”

chapters.title: Chapter 931
chapters.body:
Chapter 931

Chapter 931: Being Shameless Is Also An Ultimate Skill?

Ming Ri Hao drank wine for a long time and finally, he asked, “You really don’t know?”

It seems that Yue Yang was extremely abnormal if he didn’t know about the truth. Seeing his suspicious look, Yue Yang is full of anger, “If I knew, do you think I’d be that free to be sitting here and listening to your nonsense?”

After listening to Yue Yang’s words, Ming Ri Hao was more than half convinced that this kid really didn’t know the truth.

It’s just that he didn’t know his purpose in coming to Green Willow City.

“Then why did you come to Green Willow City? The Western Heaven Realm is so big, why did you just come to Heavenly Splendour Territory to mingle?” Ming Ri Hao asked tentatively again with three points of doubt. He believed that Yue Yang didn’t know the truth, but since he came here, there must be someone who instructed him to or some sort of clue he was going to follow. It couldn’t have been a coincidence, after all.

“I used to be in the Conqueror City of the Eight Desolate Territories and I was going to enter the Land of Trials. I accidentally rescued a snake-haired demon man who was said to be the son of the Dugu family of the Four Major Families. He invited me to the White River City to meet up and here I am,” Yue Yang reminded himself half-heartedly through this explanation as well.

“White River City? Then you should go straight through the Wind-Stopping Swamp but you came to Green Willow City?” Ming Ri Hao finally figured it out.

“The power of various elements in the Heavenly Splendour Territory is disordered and the laws are broken and twisted. If I don’t know a little about the situation and go to the White River City stupidly, I might be at a loss! That snake-haired demon man was from one of the Four Major Families, but I am not! I will not mention my business. Of course, I came to Green Willow City to collect some information and there is nothing to say about that. What about you, what are you doing here?” Yue Yang stopped his story and continued Ming Ri Hao’s interrogation.

“This matter… It’s quite complicated,” Ming Ri Hao picked up a huge wine glass and drank at least a barrel of wine in one gulp.

“Speak,” Yue Yang wasn’t going to waste his time speaking nonsense.

“Let’s talk about why I’m pretending to be a weak mercenary and why I’m here,” Ming Ri Hao suddenly laughed, “When it comes to hiding power, I still learned these skills from you. All the strengths that are displayed would be perceived as majestic, but after suffering a loss, I realised that it was stupid—you don’t have to look at me like that. I didn’t fight with the Prison Emperor for a day or two; I fought with him for two years. We fought for more than ten times over large and small matters alike. If I can’t even pick up the skill to hide my ability after all that, would it make sense for me to blend in with the crowd? Besides, suppressing my power’s greatest benefits was that it was easier to cultivate. At my level, even improving is not a walk in the park… Forget it, you have a brighter life than me so I won’t say anything more.”

“Since I escaped from the seal of the Prison Emperor’s Palace and returned to the Western Heaven Realm, I found that things are different because after being sealed for thousands of years, many things are no longer the same as what they were before. In addition, my strength has not been restored, so naturally, I dare not show up as Ming Ri Hao. Instead, I resort to hiding and wait until regaining a certain amount of strength before daring to reveal myself.”

“My little sister is better than me, but when Jiu Xiao and Void came back, they immediately reported to the Palace. There were several attempts made by the Central Palace in taking the opportunity to challenge the status of the Three Leaders of the Heaven Realm.”

“It’s not easy to be a high-ranking person in the Heaven Realm where the weak are the strong!”

Ming Ri Hao sighed. Even if he was one of the Three Leaders in the Heaven Realm, he had to be careful.

There was a brutal struggle at any level after all.

A battle between the Three Leaders was far more terrifying and dangerous than the battle between the lower-level warriors. Often, if they made a mistake, they would fall into unfavourable situations and never recover.

The two bullies, Jiu Xiao and Void, he could ignore; it was something that Ming Yue Guang had seen coming. The master of the Central Palace was also eyeing and wanting to take advantage of them and a few people joined forces to kill her, who just escaped from the seal, to seize the dominion of the Western Heaven Realm. Moreover, there was a very beautiful chess piece in the Central Palace. They have cultivated and supported several ‘Quasi-Leaders’ in the six thousand years since the Three Leaders were sealed in the Prison Emperor’s Divine Palace..

In a broad way, they let these Quasi-Leaders take action, constantly testing and provoking them in order to challenge the status of the Three Leaders.

Among them, the Nine Headed Ocean Demon King was one of them.

Unfortunately, no matter what, the Central Palace would never have imagined that the Nine Headed Ocean Demon King was too impatient. When he went to the Tong Tian Tower to capture the God’s Ruins, Yue Yang, a rapidly rising young man, not only ruined their six-thousand-year plan of support,it also brought a life-and-death crisis to the tower, which inspired the forward momentum of the warriors of the tower. Moreover, the Central Palace could never have imagined that the Tong Tian Tower had two ever-changing variables— Zhi Zun and Yue Yang. The two of them broke the silent fate of the Tower’s warriors and pushed them to grow into a new generation of guardians. Under the influence of Zhi Zun and Yue Yang especially, countless young warriors have grown wildly, far exceeding the previous Laws of growth.

Now, the Tong Tian Tower has undergone earth-shaking changes.

Its rise was unstoppable!

“Is she okay now?” Yue Yang could imagine how many powerful enemies Ming Yue Guang, who returned to the Western Heaven Realm, had to face.

“She’s still recovering and is safe and sound, but I don’t know where she is cultivating. I’ve never dared to ask her about her,” Ming Ri Hao nodded, “It’s the descendants of our clan who were almost entirely slaughtered by the Central Palace and the Quasi-Leaders to the point where there was almost nothing left. All the Generals in the past have defected and all the die-hards have been wiped out, leaving a mess that is difficult to clean up, which gives me a splitting headache as I don’t know when we can ever return to the glory of the past.”

“Recovery my ass, I’ll say that you have nothing to do after eating. Just take care of yourself, why bother with taking care of so many!” Yue Yang had different opinions.

“Didn’t the Three Leaders not have a single underling?” Ming Ri Hao looked at Yue Yang in surprise as if he was asking, ‘is that possible?’

“Isn’t it just a matter of one sentence if you have strength and want some subordinates?” Yue Yang gave him a disdainful look.

“But they can’t be loyal…” Ming Ri Hao shook his head and waved his hand.

“No matter how loyal one gets, wouldn’t they betray you with one sealing? Therefore, the important thing is not loyalty, but strength! Strength that is unafraid of betrayal or challenge; a strength strong enough to not spark any form of rebellion even if they had the guts to do so!” Yue Yang thought it’s boring to talk about loyalty with his subordinates. As long as he was strong enough, his subordinates would feel like they would have a potentially great future ahead by following behind, they would naturally be loyal. Otherwise, there was no way to ensure loyalty.

This was the Heaven Realm where the weak would eat the strong. Why should their subordinates be so loyal?

It’s best to use some cannon fodders; a batch of dead ones would be replaced.

Wasn’t that what the Central Palace did when they were in need of people?

Yue Yang gave Ming Ri Hao a lecture and smiled again, “There are really loyal people and you don’t need to say more for them to remain that way. As long as you can see people with discernment, worrying about these is just a fool’s errand. By the way, I know why you came to Green Willow City!”

Yue Yang’s words made Ming Ri Hao’s heart beat slightly faster. Damn, it’s really not too good for his opponents. Thinking about it, he had only been sealed for 6,000 years, but everything seemed to be reversed.

If he knew those guys were like this ,he would have sent them all to the battlefield to be cannon fodder to avoid getting this worked up now!

He put aside this burden and smiled again on his face, “You little ghost! Okay, then tell me, what am I doing here?”

Yue Yang couldn’t guess it at first, but after listening to his complaints just now, he managed to react as he laughed loudly, “I don’t know the specifics, but I guess you are here to seek retribution. Maybe someone stole some treasures of yours or killed an important relative and hid in the vicinity of the Heavenly Splendour Territory’s Wind-Stopping Swamp, so you pretended to be a mercenary of the Heaven Rank and came to Green Willow City to clean up the traitors.”

When Ming Ri Hao heard what he said, he was stunned, “Good man, your brain is smart. I don’t admire anything else but your intelligent brain and thick skin!”

“Are you praising me or insulting me?” Yue Yang snorted angrily.

“Being shameless is also a skill! In the entire four cardinal directions of the Haven Realm,you are the only one who dares to write those disgusting love letters to my sister. Ahem, I’m seriously in awe!” Ming Ri Hao laughed wildly and nearly couldn’t keep his laughter in check.

“You peeked at my letter?” Yue Yang’s face turned dark.

“No, but my sister’s best friend peeked at it, and she said that no one in the entire Heaven Realm can write a love letter of your level!” Ming Ri Hao burst into tears with laughter.

“…” Yue Yang was speechless,and he was secretly ruthless in his heart. If he knew which best friend of hers was peeking at his letter, even she would be pushed down. Was the little girl not afraid of peeking at others’ love letters? He secretly rejoiced, but fortunately, he didn’t write anything too explicit. If he was like that prince that wrote a letter to his lover, saying that he would live in his lover’s trousers for the rest of his life, that would have been embarrassing.

Fortunately, I just wrote letters to flirt with that chick Ming Yue Guang and didn’t really make a fool of myself!

Ming Ri Hao smiled for a while before his face turned very serious, “Betraying me wouldn’t result in much when I think about the past favours; at most, I’ll let it slip with an eye closed. However, I absolutely do not allow anyone to betray my sister, because not only is she one of the Three Leaders in the Heaven Realm, but she is also the greatest pride in my heart. Any behaviour that challenges and betrays her, I will destroy completely to protect her Supreme Majesty as a Leader in the Heaven Realm. This time, I came here to find a traitorous slave. She was originally a female official of the Moonlight Glazed Palace and she even stole treasure and fled during the period when we were sealed.”

Yue Yang understood and said with a smile, “She’s hiding in Green Willow City? No wonder you came here incognito and pretended to be a mercenary of the Heaven Rank!”

Ming Ri Hao shook his head, “I’m not sure, but there is a secret info that this fugitive slave appeared nearby, so I’ll try my luck. Who would have thought that I found no fugitive slave and met you instead!”

After thinking for a while, Yue Yang offered a condition, “I don’t care if you chase the fugitive slave, that’s your family business. But why did the Heavenly Splendour Territory become like this? What secrets are there in it? I want to know the truth. Don’t try to hide things from me. If it were only for a fugitive slave, I don’t buy that you would show up in a crappy place like this. Speak. If this Young Master is entertained, perhaps I might divide 30% of the rewards of the Green Willow City with you.”

“Who cares about rewards in a shabby place like Green Willow City? Do you think I’m a beggar? I’m not a starving person on the street outside. It’s a shame that you think a little bit of this can touch my heart!” Ming Ri Hao was jumping with anger. It wasn’t impossible for him to tell the truth, but the kid’s attitude was very infuriating.

“I’m willing to give you a share, that’s a blessing that you won’t meet in ten thousand years,” Yue Yang spread his hands. It’s better if he didn’t want it anyway, it’s not like he was going to beg him to have it!

“…Ah, I forgot that you’re a selfish miser!” After hearing that, Ming Ri Hao was suddenly in a good mood.

According to Yue Yang’s miserliness, for him to be willing to share something out, it was indeed extremely rare.

For ordinary people, 30% would indeed be an insult, but for this kid, if he missed the opportunity now, he wouldn’t even think about presenting again.

Thinking of this, Ming Ri Hao patted his thigh, “Okay, 30% is fine.”

Student Yue Yang despised this guy very much and raised his middle finger, “Can your morals drop any lower?”

Ming Ri Hao laughed smugly, “If I can take advantage of you, I wouldn’t worry about my integrity! Besides, my secret is big enough— if you don’t give me a share and you take it all, I really can’t handle knowing that… Have you heard of the Divine Grimoire?”

“Divine Grimoire?” Yue Yang almost wanted to say that he had one in his hand, but he held back, “I haven’t heard of it before. Could it be that the Heavenly Splendour Territory has one?”

“No, there should be no Divine Grimoires in the Heavenly Splendour Territory, but here, there are all the secrets of where the Divine Grimoire is located. Ten thousand years ago, there was a warrior from Heavenly Splendour Territory who was not strong and could even be said to be very weak. But because of chance, he entered a certain Divine Grimoire and obtained a broken Godhead. From then on, he showed great abilities and returned to the Heavenly Splendour Territory in the form of a demigod, ready to lead the tribe and rise to the Western Heaven Heaven Realm,” Ming Ri Hao explained the past briefly.

“What about the demigod now?” Yue Yang had never heard of any demigods in Heavenly Splendour Territory.

“He has fallen,” Ming Ri Hao’s words made Yue Yang stunned— the demigod died? Ming Ri Hao gave a positive answer, “It was precisely because of the death of this demigod that a series of competitions arose.”

Yue Yang has some confidence in this point.

After the demigod died, in addition to competing for the incomplete Godhead, the most important thing was to follow the vine and search for the location of the Divine Grimoire.

If there is a Divine Grimoire acting as the driving force and the Central Palace was desperately igniting the fire behind it, it would be strange if the Heavenly Splendour Territory wasn’t reduced to a pulp!

Ming Ri Hao looked at Yue Yang and suddenly smiled again, “Actually, there is another more detailed version of this matter, do you want to listen to it? The truth is often unexpected, but if you promise to join hands with me to fight against the Central Palace, then I will tell the real truth. Otherwise, you will still be your Master Titan and I will chase my fugitive slave!”

Yue Yang was very angry.

He hated it the most when others threatened him with something.

However, it was not too much to join forces to fight against the Central Palace. This guy just wanted a firm commitment and there was really no way. Yue Yang secretly cursed this guy Ming Ri Hao and he planned to take this account. He was going to write it down and look for the little girl Ming Yue Guang to settle this matter in the future, but on the surface, he nodded to Ming Ri Hao and promised, “Okay, let alone the group of rice bugs in the Central Palace, even the Void and Jiu Xiao, this Young Master will fight to the end. However, if you dare to quit halfway through the battle, don’t blame me for turning against you. Your sister is a different matter, but for a Level 8 Innate Supreme like you, I have my ways of ensuring your death!”

These words were threatening and that counterattack frightened Ming Ri Hao inwardly.

Seeing that Yue Yang’s expression did not seem to be fake he believed it a little bit.

It was impossible for others, but this kid was indeed very evil, so it is very possible for him to lose to him at the 8th Level of the Innate Supreme. Forget it, this kid shouldn’t be an enemy, it’s better to make him an ally and let his enemies have a headache for his cunning and shamelessness!

“Okay, actually, the truth is…” Ming Ri Hao decided to be honest with Yue Yang and tell him the real truth.

chapters.title: Chapter 932
chapters.body:
Chapter 932

Chapter 932: Unforgivable Vengeance

“The truth of the endless wars in Heavenly Splendour Territory is a story of madness and revenge.”

Ming Ri Hao cleared his throat and told Yue Yang in detail, “Ten thousand years ago, the Heavenly Splendour Territory was just an ordinary area in the Western Heaven Realm and was nothing special. Although the people could not say that they live and work in peace and contentment, it was passable. The rulers inside, except for the Water Palace in the Central Palace being the most powerful, there were the Three Families and the Five Sects. The forces of all parties restrict each other and compete with each other. There have been occasional small frictions over the years, but most of them live in peace. It was not until the appearance of the Conqueror Queen Fei Wen Li that broke the balance. In the next battle in the Conqueror City, the old Domain Emperor of the Heavenly Splendour Territory died on the spot. The Three Families and Five Sects also lost a lot of Generals. Most importantly, the people obtained a piece of news from an unknown source: The Master of the Water Palace, who had always existed as the fair host of all forces, was already fallen for some unknown amount of time, leaving behind only an empty shell of the Water Palace that became a puppet of submission to someone else’s power.”

Yue Yang frowned and tried his best to find any clues, “It’s no accident that the Domain Emperor of the Territory died in battle, but the Master of the Water Palace died early?”

Ming Ri Hao nodded affirmatively, “In order to cover up the news that the Master of the Water Palace has fallen, the Central Palace not only sent a new Master of the Water Palace to sit in, but also sunk the original Water Palace that soared the skies into the ‘White River’ where the sorrowful geese mourn the swallows.”

When Yue Yang heard the name White River, his eyes flashed with questions: Could it be White River City?

He even conjured a map of Heavenly Splendour Territory from the storage ring, turning the pages and checking it out.

Ming Ri Hao waved his hand and laughed, “This map is simply wrong, don’t read it; the real terrain is completely different from the map. White River is far bigger than the one on the map and it is full of twisted Law Power. Above, you guessed right, there is a White River City that you are going to, but White River City is not the Water Palace. The real Water God Palace was sunken into the White River. In order to prevent anyone from detecting it, a dangling continent was buried on it— White River City was built on the dangling continent.”

“The Water God Palace and the death of the Water Palace’s Master— are they related to the Divine Grimoire?” Yue Yang quickly grasped the point.

“I don’t know who came out with the news that the Master of the Water Palace had been secretly executed by the Central Palace because he concealed the Grimoire. And the Master of the Water Temple, who was known for her impartiality in the Heavenly Splendour Territory, before his death, recorded the secrets she knew about in the Water God Palace. In addition, the key to unlock the Water God Palace was sealed in the minds of her two daughters in the form of energy seals. Maybe the Water Palace Master knew that she was going to die very soon and made the necessary preparations.”

“Where are her two daughters?” Yue Yang asked.

“In the battle against the Conqueror Queen 10,000 years ago, the old Domain Emperor was killed and all the secrets could not be covered as they broke out. Even if the new Water Palace Master arrived or sunk the Water God Palace, it would not help. In the Heavenly Splendour Territory, about 9,000 years ago, a pair of twin sisters suddenly appeared. They were beautiful in appearance and looked exactly the same, but their personalities were completely the opposite. The elder sister was very quiet, kind, helpful, and polite to the opposite sex, but she was very wary and vaguely refused the men that attempted to pursue her.
