Her younger sister had no scheming properties, was mischievous, loved to laugh, full of energy and liked to tease people, but she had no malice as she was just like a happy and carefree elf. If her older sister wasn’t there to protect her, this little sister would have no way to survive in the cruel world of the jungle.”

“At this time, the three best young men in the Three Families and the Five Sects all fell in love with them… To be precise, they all fell in love with the beautiful and kind elder sister. At first, people did not realise that this pair of twin sisters were the two daughters of the former Water Palace Master, but with the persecution of the new Water Palace Master, the heads of the Three Families and the Five Sects all knew the secret but left them to fend for themselves without helping. The three were enraged, so they left their families and brought their supporters to fight it out with the new Water Palace Master together.”

“This battle was estimated to have lasted for three years. In the end, the strongest young man that the elder sister liked died on the spot. The remaining two were also seriously injured and were on the verge of death.”

“Maybe they were worried about having regrets after death. The two of them confided their love to the elder sister one after another. When the younger sister found out, she was very sad. The three elder brothers all loved her sister, but none of them liked her, and that made her feel extremely sad. Especially her favourite second brother’s rejection, who had always regarded her as a younger sister, became a fact that she could not accept.”

“In order to make her sister happy, the elder sister made the first sacrifice. She decided to pretend to be her sister and leave with the corpse of the first man who had died in battle, whereas she would pretend to be her and marry the second brother whom she liked. When the little sister heard about this method, she cried a lot but in the end, for the love she wanted to pursue in her heart, she still obeyed her sister’s words. In order to pursue happiness, she decided to change her original sunny and lively character into someone who pretended to be gentle and calm, imitating her sister with all her might. When she wanted to marry the second brother, he naturally became ecstatic while the third brother was extremely desolate as he left without waiting for his injury to heal.”

Yue Yang listened to it for a long time and felt that if Aunt Qiong Yao wrote this play, how many tears would be shed?

He guessed that the paper towel manufacturer would die of laughter.

Of course, this was not the end of the story.

On the contrary, this was just the beginning of the real tragedy!

“The second brother and younger sister got married and lived happily together, soon having a baby. But the sweet life after marriage made the sister a little ecstatic and her original personality emerged. She was revealing some of her flaws and the second brother noticed the abnormality. If the second brother acquiesced and continued, then the happiness would continue, but the second brother found himself deceived and became furious. Despite the pleas and sobs of the younger sister, he left the house in search of the real sister,” Ming Ri Hao’s voice gradually fell as if he couldn’t bear to tell the tragedy that had happened aloud.

“He found her?” Yue Yang asked again.

“Yes, he found her. The older sister was training the eldest brother’s younger brother, hoping that this young man would be as brave as his elder brother and revive the glory of their family. After searching hard,the second brother finally found the elder sister with someone who looked like the elder brother. The second brother, who thought that the eldest brother was not dead and was living with the elder sister, assumed that they deceived him. So he became furious, lost control of his emotions, refused to accept any explanation and insisted on attacking. The men swung their swords towards each other… In the end, he killed the man who was striving hard to follow the steps of his deceased elder brother. In order to save the last bloodline in the eldest brother’s family, the elder sister used her own life and sacrificed for the second time in exchange for the life of the younger brother.”

“The third brother was heartbroken when he heard the news. The new Water Palace Lord then transformed into the third brother’s appearance and killed the remorseful second brother. Then, he pretended to be the younger brother of the first man and took the baby.”

“In order to save her husband’s life, even if he didn’t love her, the younger sister willingly sacrificed her own life to bring the second brother back to life. The rational second brother who washed the hatred and remorse away, found the third brother who didn’t know the inside story. They drew their swords to face each other again until the two of them were beaten and wounded. When they were about to die together, the new Water Palace Master who pretended to be the eldest brother appeared. He took the two prisoners and tortured them by all means, intending to ask them about the secret of the Divine Grimoire. The real younger brother of the first man who was saved, broke into the new Water Palace and found the ‘enemy’s daughter’ who was still being swaddled. In the end, he did not have the heart to kill the baby and adopted it. He fell in love with this grown daughter, got married with her and she gave birth to a pair of twin sisters.”

“After the second and third brothers escaped from prison, a thousand years have passed. They each prepared plans for revenge. The third kept his name incognito for many years, worked hard and prepared to find the new Water Palace Master for a decisive battle. The second brother, who let hatred and anger cover his mind, didn’t know that he was deceived. He found the eldest brother who ‘killed himself’ and the enemy who ‘snatched’ his daughter. The most tragic thing was that he could not distinguish the difference between his wife and his daughter and thought that his wife had betrayed him. With a full blow, he killed his daughter and the enemy under the sword together.”

“The Master of the Water Palace succeeded in his trick and was very proud. He robbed the twin sisters again, imprisoned them as slaves and focused on finding the secrets of the Divine Grimoire in the two girls. His son, however, did not agree with his father’s actions at all. He released the two daughters privately and finally married the beloved younger sister. The angry New Water Palace Master killed his son as the younger sister took her son to escape. Finally, the grandson of the new Water Palace Master grew up and became the Domain Emperor named Vengeance Domain Emperor. He angrily declared war on his grandfather and also fought against the second brother, ‘Rage Domain Emperor’ who caused the whole tragedy back then.”

“On the other hand, the elder sister who escaped from captivity was rescued by the son of the old Domain Emperor. She found the Divine Grimoire in the imprint of her inheritance and the Divine Grimoire being mentioned in the ancestor records. She obtained the broken Godhead from the Divine Grimoire. After that, she returned to Heavenly Splendour Territory in a demigod form, becoming very powerful and unparalleled. She was kind and gentle like the grandmother who sacrificed silently and she decided to resolve this hatred and let it end.”

“However, when she wanted to completely integrate the incomplete Godhead, her husband who had been calculating this moment for a long time, the son of the old Domain Emperor, attacked her and she fell. Most of her energy was taken away by her husband and he suddenly became the third Domain Emperor of the Heavenly Splendour Territory. The Emperor-level powerhouse, known as the ‘Sacred Light Domain Emperor’.”

“The Vengeance Domain Emperor and the Rage Domain Emperor were desperate to kill the Sacred Light Domain Emperor and the new Palace Master of the Water Palace. They themselves have wounds that could never be healed and hatred that would never be forgiven… In the beginning of the Heavenly Splendour Territory, it was a personal battle between the Vengeance Domain Emperor and the Rage Domain Emperor. Later, because of the birth of the Sacred Light Domain Emperor, the Heavenly Splendour Territory completely became a dead place caught in a melee. For 3000 years, this kind of battle had never been forgiven by either as the hatred never subsided. You may have heard of some of the things that developed later, so I won’t talk about it.”

After Ming Ri Hao finished speaking, he exhaled for a long time, as if he was about to spit out the depression he had accumulated in his heart.

Yue Yang was silent for a long time.

He suddenly said, “No, even if the news of the Divine Grimoire was confirmed, there is still an important person. Why didn’t he show up in the end? That third brother? Wasn’t he working hard? Wasn’t he going to fight with the new Water Palace Master? Why has he remained silent?”

Ming Ri Hao was also silent for a long time before sighing, “Because, he was later sealed in the Prison Emperor’s Palace and was not to be seen for 6000 whole years.”

Yue Yang was stunned.

He opened his mouth so wide that he could fit a fist into it, and after a long while he clapped his leg and laughed, “Damn it, it turns out that the third brother who worked so hard to get nothing from the beginning to the end is you?”

Ming Ri Hao was furious and almost wanted to raise his hand and slap the unsympathetic guy to death.

Did you think I wanted that sad fate?

That’s a trick of fate!

The more Yue Yang thought about it, the more he laughed; the more he laughed, the louder he burst into tears.

It wasn’t until Ming Ri Hao was so angry that he threw a glass of wine on his head that he barely stopped smiling. He tried his best to suppress it and pretended to be sympathetic and comforted him, “Forget it, two-legged toads are hard to find and there are many two-legged women. Yes, if you don’t have it, just look for it. In the first love of the young, it’s normal to sort of make love a little bit as long as you don’t have to do it for the rest of your life. Anyways, just find another girl!”

Ming Ri Hao’s anger value reaches at least one million— was that meant to be comforting?

At the end, Yue Yang tried his best to hold back his smile and said, “Old Hao, I understand why no one saw you in the first place. Just look at you, you have grown into such a stupid and dense appearance. It’s strange if a woman likes you…”

Ming Ri Hao could’t hold back his anger anymore as he was so done with the kid’s bullshit. Grabbing Yue Yang’s collar, he hoisted the boy up to ten metres in the air and stared at him with bull’s eyes, “Do you want to die?”

Yue Yang hurriedly shook his head. People who were brokenhearted were not easy to mess with, let alone a hard-pressed uncle who had been broken-hearted for thousands of years. Who knew if this hard-to-please uncle would overstimulate himself and cry on the spot. If that was the case, it would be terrible… When Yue Yang thought of this, he broke out in cold sweat and quickly smiled, “Old Hao, it doesn’t matter if you broke up? What does a broken love look like? You sing songs! ‘Break up is a cold, just eat some Xin Fu Cold Medicine and everything will be…’ [1] cough, cough, I forgot, there is no Xin Fu Cold Medicine here… Well, let’s do this. I have a few pig friends that I can introduce you to. It is said that they have a princess who is fat and strong with a heroic and unparalleled personality. Although she eats a lot, she has a good temper. She is never a picky eater and is a first-class girlfriend! The most important thing is that the figure of Her Royal Highness matches you very well, so it’s like a match made in heaven!”

T/: Note:[1] It’s the lyrics to a promotional ad for a song about cold medicine in China.

The veins on Ming Ri Hao’s forehead jumped violently, making a crackling sound.

He had a darkened face.

Angrily, his voice was squeezed between his teeth, “Have you said enough, kid?”

Just when Ming Rihao, the hard-pressed uncle, was about to tear down the ribs of this nasty boy, there was a sudden commotion outside and the sound spread through the city like a hurricane.

“The Liberty Queen has been caught? Really? There’s no way!”

“Really, it is said that Six Feudal Lords and 12 Heaven Rankers were dispatched before they successfully rounded her up.”

“Impossible, there must be a traitor who betrayed her. Otherwise, no amount of people will be able to catch the Liberty Queen. Damned traitor, I want to kill him!”

Hear the name of the Liberty Queen.

The anger on Ming Ri Hao’s face suddenly subsided.

Yue Yang took the opportunity to break free and looked at the expression of the hard-pressed uncle before he flew closer to the window to take a look. He found that the hungry people and the poor mercenaries were all panic-stricken and desperate while the rich and the guards were full of joy and enthusiasm. It was crazy as it managed to form two diametrically opposed expressions. However, the opposition was still not right— one was still Heaven and one was still hell.

He asked tentatively, “Hard-pressed uncle, this Liberty Queen, is that, ahem, the descendant of your first love?”

Ming Ri Hao punched him fiercely and beat Yue Yang directly to the ground, “Don’t call me hard-pressed uncle again! Damn it, I shouldn’t have told you the truth. You’re a kid that never keeps secrets!”

chapters.title: Chapter 933
chapters.body:
Chapter 933

Chapter 933: You Bastard, I Hate You The Most!

Although Yue Yang was not good at keeping secrets. However, out of his appreciation for Ming Ri Hao’s hard life, he felt like he should at least convey this story properly as it wasn’t easy for him to live like that. Hence, he rushed back and told the story to Yue Yu, Princess Qian Qian and Drunken Cat Yu Jie.

When he explained the entire story in his own words and added a few details here and there, the three women were stunned.

For a long time, they didn’t know what to say.

In fact, even student Yue Yang’s conscience was triggered. He slightly felt like he couldn’t hold it together despite the fact that he had watched countless bloody movies, TV shows, comics, novels, and was an otaku whose heart was already incredibly durable and trained to deal with sinister plots. Hence, not much could be said about the three women Yue Yu, Princess Qian Qian and Drunken Cat Yu Jie. Seeing the three girls stunned, Yue Yang quickly comforted them, “Actually, it’s nothing— isn’t it just that the relationship is a little messy and the story is a little bloody? There are more tragic things than this. For example, there is a child named Conan and no matter where he appears, a person will die immediately and inexplicably. Sometimes, more stuff happens, but that doesn’t stop everyone from loving him! Another example is a group of heroes called Ultraman. Whenever they appear, monsters would appear along with them. They would at least destroy a city’s worth of people, but many children still worship and idolise them!”

“What nonsense are you talking about?” Princess Qian Qian couldn’t understand what he was talking about at all. What the heck was going on and who is this Conan or Ultraman?

“To be honest, what I’m trying to say is that you guys have seen too little gore. If you have watched Aunt Qiongyao’s films K-dramas, or seen a terminally ill and mentally disabled female lead character wandering among several men, enjoying all kinds of competition and jealousy, and finally killing a few people before pretending to vomit blood in happiness and dying in the arms of the male lead’s arms—that is the real horror! No, the most horrible one is, yes! It’s a Goddess Divine Scripture that was said to have spread in Jin Jiang, the forbidden area of the Gods. Ah no, that’s a taboo, I shouldn’t have said it…” At the end, Yue Yang shuddered and covered his mouth, no longer daring to speak.

T/L Note: I’ll be honest, I have no idea what movies these are about. If anyone can tell what they are, I’m pretty interested to know, thanks.

“What a mess,” Princess Qian Qian was at a loss.

“Jin Jiang is over there in the White River City?” Yue Yu wanted to open the map to find it, but after thinking about it, since it was the forbidden area of the Gods, it would naturally be impossible to find it on the map.

“Then, what should we do now? I don’t want to get involved in this kind of tangled relationship and unresolved hatred when we can just leave them to kill each other. Who cares about the broken matters that were left over for nearly 10,000 years? I don’t care!” Sister Drunken Cat Yu Jie felt that she would have enough headaches just thinking about it.

“Naturally, we wouldn’t be interfering. What I meant is that MIng Ri Hao has encountered an unfortunate fate, so we should celebrate,” Yue Yang was beaten up by Princess Qian Qian before he could even finish speaking.

Ming Ri Hao used to be an enemy, but the two parties would be able to cooperate anyway.

His life was already hard enough, so to add a sort of ‘celebration’ seemed inhumane to her!

Of course, Princess Qian Qian felt that the hard life of the old guys like Ming Ri Hao and the other old men were self-inflicted— especially the Rage Domain Emperor, the second child who was in the midst of blessings. If it weren’t for his brain’s stupidity that caused this entire tragedy, the situation wouldn’t have turned out as bad as it was now.

As for the new Palace Master of the Water Palace and the idiotic Sacred Light Domain Emperor who killed his wife, both of their stupid actions definitely contributed to worsening the tragedy as well.

This kind of hatred could never be resolved!

And even if it could be resolved, according to Princess Qian Qian’s character and temper, she would not resolve it and let these three brain-dead guys fight it out. The only one who was still considered normal would be the Vengeance Domain Emperor.

Because of the appearance of the hard-pressed uncle Ming Ri Hao, there were also bizarre stories of grievances.

Yue Yang felt a sense of dread.

The Heavenly Splendour Territory was really not as simple as he had imagined.

If the Divine Grimoire was involved, then the Central Palace would definitely keep their eyes on it like a mouse that loved rice. Although the guy Ji Wu Ri had entered the Land of Trials, was intending to snatch the Divine Grimoire there and would not be distracted, there were at least three imbeciles that were similar to him in the Central Palace. Just because Ji Wu Ri didn’t show up, that didn’t mean that the other two wouldn’t appear.

Most likely, the entire tragedy was secretly manipulated by the Central Palace.

Otherwise, how could Ming Ri Hao, someone who knew the truth and could play a positive role, be imprisoned? Later, he was even tricked into going to the Tong Tian Tower and fought against the Prison Emperor together with Ming Yue Guang as the Three Leaders of the Western Heaven Realm.

There must be hands moving about in the dark!

Without a tactic of secret manipulation, the whole thing would never have turned out like this!

Yue Yang voiced the doubts in his heart and immediately won the agreement of Princess Qian Qian and the other two women.

The temptation of the Divine Grimoire was said to be infinite. The melee in the Heavenly Splendour Territory was most likely a blood sacrifice, used to break a certain seal of the Divine Grimoire in order to gain its approval. That is to say, the people in the Central Palace perhaps already found the Divine Grimoire 3000 years ago. And all along, these 3000 years were spent fighting with thousands of troops, using the blood and souls of countless people to complete the process of contracting the Divine Grimoire.

“What? Do you mean to say that there is an existence as powerful as Ji Wu Ri here in the Heavenly Splendour Territory?” Yue Yu was startled by Yue Yang’s speculation.

“Well, it’s possible!” Princess Qian Qian’s body trembled slightly when she heard the words.

Originally, she also felt that something was wrong, but her guesses were not as bold as Yue Yang’s, who instantly deduced that the enemy had already figured out the location of the Divine Grimoire itself.

Yue Yang not only guessed that there was a powerful powerhouse from the Central Palace who bore a power similar to that of Ji Wu Ri who knew the location of the Divine Grimoire, but he also unfolded the map and pointed at one particular area to the three women, “Look at this White River City. It turned out that this area was below the Water God Palace, except it is buried by the dangling continent. I suspect that the Divine Grimoire is near the White River City, but no one has been able to contract with it. The Divine Grimoire always had to recognise its master as no amount of brute force would allow you to contract with it… For 3000 years, the Heavenly Splendour Territory has been beaten to their limits and is still fighting because of that guy. There is probably some secret method of a blood soul sacrifice that could enable him to get closer to the Divine Book step by step. Otherwise, the war here should have stopped a long time ago.”

T/L Note: I’m calling the powerhouse a guy for now and sticking to the ‘he’ gender because the Chinese pronouns used a gender-unspecific term.

Drunken Cat Yu Jie pondered for a long time before she nodded.

She suddenly opened her mouth and said, “If that’s the case, then we have to get ready. It’s not like the Land of Trials where there was only Ji Wu Ri. Even if he had a few aids with him, the amount of people that were able to enter the Land of Trials certainly wouldn’t exceed a large number. However, the Heavenly Splendour Territory is different. Here, the Central Palace can send their men at any time and we will face more enemies— and I don’t think it will stop very soon. This will be an unprecedented and vicious battle for us. “

The words of Sister Drunken Cat Yu Jie also represented the voices of Princess Qian Qian and Yue Yu.

When Yue Yang frowned and thought deeply, Princess Qian Qian suddenly stood up and looked at Yue Yu with her big bright eyes.

Yue Yu seemed to understand what Tigress wanted to say and her little face showed a look of pleading. She waved her hands again and again, signalling her not to say it. Princess Qian Qian took off the Dou Luo Pearl Necklace from her neck and forcibly put it on Yue Yu, “Apart from Si-niang, the one who can best utilise the energy of this treasure is you, Sister Yu. Now that the strong enemy is creeping around us, we can’t afford to ponder any longer. We have to put improving our abilities as the main priority— I will lead the martial arts training, but Sister Yu, you shouldn’t hold back either,” After speaking, she took off the Rain Flower Ring that Yue Yang was wearing and handed it to Yue Yu.

After taking the Rain Flower Ring, which still retained some of Yue Yang’s body temperature, Yue Yu’s head lowered.

She could only come to a default decision after being faced with Princess Qian Qian’s words.

Princess Qian Qian was actually quite nervous as she feared Yue Yu’s rejection, but when she saw her acquiesce with a comfortable smile on her face, she gave Yue Yu a hug. Then, she turned around to pull Yue Yang, who was still deep in thought, “Don’t think about it anymore, the complexity of the matter is far beyond our imaginations. What we need to do now is to improve our skills; once we have the strength, we will be more confident in dealing with whatever comes in our way!”

Yue Yang felt a little odd as Tigress was usually a very shy girl. With Sister Yu and Kitty by his side, she would never bring up the topic of Double Cultivation.

Unless her keen senses had already felt a sense of crisis?

Not only was Yue Yang surprised, but even Yue Yu and Drunken Cat Yu Jie felt that the Qian Qian today was behaving a bit differently. Of course, if she could let go of everything and no longer compete with Xue Wu Xia as she cultivated with Yue Yang every day, that would have been naturally better.

“Bastard, the Prison Emperor’s Divine Sword can’t be integrated for the time being, so is there any way for you to raise me to a new level? I have a sort of unsure feeling tugging at the strings of my heart, but I know that I will explode if I’m not involved in the next battle. Seriously, I don’t want to watch you fight alone like the last time you fought against Red Sky River; I want to stand by your side and face them with you no matter what happens!” Princess Qian Qian used to be very strong, and more often than not, she would choose to cultivate alone as she didn’t need to take up Yue Yang’s precious time. However, the current Princess showed an eagerness to become stronger in order to fight side by side with him.

Yue Yang understood her mood.

Last time, or in other words, in many of the previous battles, Princess Qian Qian felt that she could not play a role and could not effectively provide assistance.

Now that the number of enemies were getting larger and stronger, she was still hovering below the Innate Supreme rank and she had not been able to fully integrate the Prison Emperor’s Divine Sword.

It would be a lie to say that she wasn’t in a hurry.

The most important thing was that Xue Wu Xia had acquired an unknown Godhead and was merging with it at the moment. Once she wakes up, her strength would definitely improve and the Book of Truth in her hands would also evolve into a Divine Weapon that would be impeccably far from what it was now. This was Princess Qian Qian’s largest crisis and also her largest motivation to work her way up the ranks.

Seeing the incomparably stubborn Tigress giving in to him as his eyes stared at the hope deep within her eyes, Yue Yang naturally felt distressed for a while. No matter how strong she was, Tigress was still a woman, so he felt the need to protect her.

He looked at Princess Qian Qian and stared at her for a long time.

It wasn’t until Princess Qian Qian’s heart thumped loudly in fear of him saying the word ‘no’ that Yue Yang conjured a beautiful pearl, “First of all, please forgive me, Tigress. In fact, last time I was collecting the Vulcan Soul Refining Herb from the hands of Lord Black Flame, I even got my hands on a pearl from him. Look, it’s a White Tiger Sacred Pearl! Don’t hit me first, listen to me— Tigress, I didn’t mean to tease you, I just wanted to give you a surprise… I was happy to get the Vulcan Soul Refining Herb, but when I later found out that this White Tiger Pearl was an Ultra Holy White Tiger Sacred Pearl did I realise what real happiness was!”

Princess Qian Qian stared blankly at Yue Yang’s face as if she was overly pleasantly surprised. After a long time, she was unable to speak.

Suddenly, two drops of tears fell.

It slid down extremely quickly and splattered on Yue Yang’s large hand. The remaining tears splashed and dripped on the White Tiger Sacred Pearl, causing a burst of energy fluctuations.

She first wanted to show him a smile, but her mouth didn’t have the strength to raise itself. She was already on the brink of tears and she was holding it in, but after he explained, she couldn’t hold back anymore. Princess Qian Qian bowed her head and opened her mouth to bite Yue Yang’s hand fiercely with her little white teeth. At that time, when he groaned in slight pain, she released it again and hugged Yue Yang tightly/ Kissing his lips with force, the fragrant tongue of hers slid over like a small red carp, bringing him infinite sweetness and tenderness.

Even during the passionate kiss, her small fists pounded on his back relentlessly.

It’s just that with that strength, it could barely kill a mosquito.

“You bastard, I hate you the most!”

========================================================================

chapters.title: Chapter 934
chapters.body:
Chapter 934

Chapter 934: Evolve, Divine Beast, White Tiger

It has always been Yue Yang’s goal to elevate Princess Qian Qian to the realm of Innate Supremacy.

It wasn’t an impossible feat for her to do it alone, but it would require a lot of time.

Previously, Yue Yang could still wait for her to progress slowly.

But now, as there were more enemies and even more risks of dangers, it was imperative that she was to be promoted to the Innate Supreme ranks as soon as possible and become a powerful aid.

Moreover, Yue Yang himself had the most perfect comprehension of the Innate Supreme realm— even Empress Fei Wen Li had to turn to him for help and discussions. She would constantly use the link between them to comprehend the Innate Supreme’s shortcomings and realise her own weaknesses, let alone Princess Qian Qian! So, with the guidance of Yue Yang, it would be better than to have Princess Qian Qian comprehend the realm on her own.

Long before he got the White Tiger Sacred Pearl, Yue Yang already had a plan.

Now, with the unexpected surprise of the White Tiger Sacred Pearl, Yue Yang felt that the time was right and revised the original plan into a three-step implementation.

The first was to use the energy of the pearl to elevate her Platinum-rank Western White Tiger to a Superior Holy Beast, though it was best if it could evolve into a Quasi-Divine Beast.

The second is to use the pure energy of the Vulcan Soul Refining Herb and the Divine Blood to enhance it again so that it could truly reach the level of a Divine Beast.

The third step was also the last step and it remained very crucial. Yue Yang planned to lead Princess Qian Qian to realise the breakthrough to the realm of Innate Supremacy but at the same time, fuse and refine the Prison Emperor’s Divine Sword, completely turning it into Princess Qian Qian’s artifacts. This way, even if Princess Qian Qian can’t reach the perfect Innate Supreme like Yue Yang, it would at least be a near-perfect breakthrough. With the Divine Beasts and artifacts in the hands of the Guardian Beast, Princess Qian Qian, who would have broken through the Innate Supreme Realm by that time, would greatly improve her strength and truly become an invincible female swordsman on the battlefield.

“Don’t rush things, that’ll be it for today. Let me rest, I need a little time.”

Princess Qian Qian’s mind was separated from the state of Double Cultivation.

She who had not reached the Innate Supreme Realm, couldn’t sense the world of his mind for a long time. It was the same feeling that Yue Yang experienced when he tried to sense Zhi Zun, the Night Empress and Empress Fei Wen Li’s mind for long periods of time.

He was better at sensing the Night Empress’s strengths as Yue Yang’s current strength was closer to hers.

Yue Yang also needed to observe and look up to Zhi Zun.

But these senses of his were at its strongest with Empress Fei Wen Li. In the initial stage, Yue Yang couldn’t bear being in her mind for even a second. Later, after comprehending it under the World Tree, he could successfully confluence her mind. That stage was required for the smooth interactions and the presence of a common understanding between their spirits to make up for the deficiency in power. Princess Qian Qian was also in this current stage now. She felt that she had to look up at Yue Yang with great difficulty, especially when she was trying to find Yue Yang’s ultra high realm that peeked into the Realm of the Innate Supreme, and that made her unable to maintain it for a long time.

Yue Yang’s realm was not something that the current ‘her’ could explore and feel now.

Of course, this kind of complete merge between the mind and heart, although painful, was extremely beneficial.

She continued and after more than a dozen attempts and persistence, finally, the minds of the two merged together for a long time.

For the first time, the GuardianBeast Western White Tiger, who was one with Princess Qian Qian, completely accepted Yue Yang’s spiritual realm. It accepted the transmission of the source of Chaotic Energy in his body and obtained the Innate Sword Qi and the Nirvana Flame to purify his soul.

“Aaahhhhh…”

Princess Qian Qian felt torrents of incomparable pain.

It was as if her entire being was completely burned by the Nirvana flame from the inside out— except this burning continued endlessly. Whenever the energy in the body was slightly insufficient, the source of Chaotic Energy and the Innate Sword Qi would replenish it to make sure that the purification of the Nirvana flame would continue. Even when she was about to let go, Yue Yang would activate the Eternal Wheel to force her to stay in a state of purification and prevented her from giving up halfway.

This kind of pain was absolutely unbearable for ordinary people.

Princess Qian Qian, who has the talent of the Six Records, could feel the pain on a different level due to the heightened senses. To a certain extent, she probably had to suffer a hundred times more pain than others. However, what Yue Yang wanted was this kind of result— the ones that were preserved and born under the greatest purification were the most precious and the most powerful.

The talent of the purified Six Records from this greatest suffering would turn out to be the most powerful six senses.

And the raised Life Guardian Beast ‘White Tiger’ would also achieve the best growth.

Yue Yu and Drunk Cat Yu were watching from outside. They were frantically pacing, but even so, they weren’t able to do anything.

Princess Qian Qian must break through this difficulty by herself. Only by truly passing the test of fire would there be the best, real gold!

The practice state continued.

One minute, three minutes, five minutes, and ten minutes stretched into an hour, three hours, five hours. In between that period of time, Yue Yu and Drunken Cat Yu Jie didn’t care about the embarrassment and took turns to enter and transfer their energy over to their beloved and naked Yue Yang, who had to be rid of his clothes while cultivating the Double Cultivation techniques. They supported the troubled and laborious man as he maintained this state of cultivation, but they did not dare to stay too long or encourage him for fear of interfering with Princess Qian Qian’s concentration that might distract her and cause her to eventually fail.

At the same time, the two women were also shocked by Princess Qian Qian’s perseverance.

Although Yue Yang was fully assisting her and forcibly used the Eternal Wheel to assist her, no matter what, it was an extremely unbelievable existence that one could last five hours of cultivation.

Yue Yu was amazed at Princess Qian Qian’s persistence, whereas Drunken Cat Yu Jie was also secretly ashamed that her own will was far inferior to hers.

As expected, she was the rouge tiger girl he admired the most!

The cultivation continued.

They didn’t know how long it took, but suddenly, a silent but substantial tiger roar erupted from Princess Qian Qian’s body, forming a silent shockwave that spreaded throughout the entire space of Yue Yang’s Grimoire World. It seemed that Princess Qian Qian’s Life Guardian Beast, the White Tiger, had surpassed the Holy Beast rank and entered the Superior Holy or Quasi-Divine rank. The most important moment had come— would a breakthrough occur or would the realm remain at this level for a long time?

“Let’s go!”

Yue Yu and Drunken Cat Yu Jie looked at each other and nodded firmly.

One person held the Vulcan Soul Refining Treasured Liquid that was extracted from the leaves of the Vulcan Soul Refining Herb while the other held the Divine Blood. Both items were things that Yue Yang had prepared earlier beforehand.

At the moment when the White Tiger was ascending its realm, the first and second steps of Yue Yang’s plan should be completed at the same time. Because after the first step was completed, it would take some time for Princess Qian Qian’s body to adapt and stabilise the White Tiger after its ascension, so the time to breakthrough again would have to be separated by a long distance. In order to grab hold of the time they had, it must be completed in an instant. In the shortest time, he would use the energy of the White Tiger Pearl, the energy of the Vulcan Soul Refining Treasured Liquid and the Divine Blood to break through again and enter the realm of the Divine Beast in one fell swoop.

Thousands of brilliant rays bloomed on Princess Qian Qian.

As sharp as a blade, the ensuing shockwave tore off the clothes of Yue Yu and Drunken Cat Yu Jie to ashes as they forcibly plummeted their way through the force.

With all their strength, they rushed towards Princess Qian Qian and dripped Vulcan SOul Refining Treasured Liquid and the Divine Blood onto the White Tiger Pearl on her forehead.

Princess Qian Qian almost fell into a dizzy state and Yue Yang let go of the White Tiger Pearl to protect the back of her head with his hands.

Xiao Wen Li stretched out her little hand from behind Yue Yang.

She held the White Tiger Pearl lightly and pressed it in between Princess Qian Qian’s eyebrows.

Both liquids that have dripped onto the pearl instantly submerged into the White Tiger Pearl as the energy of the White Tiger Pearl directly penetrated into the depths of Princess Qian Qian’s mind. Her potential, at this moment, completely exploded and it was unleashed to its limit.

Princess Qian Qian’s Grimoire naturally emerged.

Three rays of golden lights respectively lit up from the Grimoire, the top of Princess Qian Qian’s head and the top of Yue Yang’s head at the same time. When it rose to a certain height, it twisted and combined mysteriously and infinitely, forming an unprecedented spiral beam of light that shot straight into the sky.

There seemed to be an infinite White Tiger that jumped out of Princess Qian Qian’s body. Then, an image of te White Tiger was formed as it covered the entire sky of the Grimoire World.

When it opened its mouth and roared, it was silent.

But the whole world seemed to be shattered—there was only a tiger roaring and nothing else in the world.

Princess Qian Qian, who had nearly fainted, suddenly opened her eyes. Thousands of rays of brilliance poured out of her beautiful eyes and her power was comparable to that of a powerful god. Her summoning Grimoire radiated with the illuminance of brilliances, making it difficult to see its glorious form. In the fierce glow, it gradually surpassed its original realm and broke through the Diamond-level limit, evolving into a Quasi-Holy-level Grimoire. It automatically turned and a new page presented a scene. It was a White Tiger that had grown up with its owner since childhood: as a Divine Beast!

Next, Princess Qian Qian, who couldn’t bear the change of continuous breakthroughs, reached her limit and fainted in Yue Yang’s arms.

In the chaotic field of Holy power, the powers of four holy Beasts were displayed at the same time.

Electric Blast, Freezing Earth, Blazed Flaming Sky were shot out. But the most terrifying White Tiger Holy force, under the blessing of the Divine Beasts, split the world of Yue Yang’s Grimoire World into thousands of cracks, almost causing the entire world to collapse.

Fortunately, the world of the Grimoire responded very quickly as Yue Yang took over Princess Qian Qian’s mind and will after she fainted.

In an instant, everything dissipated.

“This tiger girl is so scary with just a breakthrough!” Drunken Cat Yu was taken aback and was almost killed by Princess Qian Qian’s unintentional release of Sword Qi. Fortunately, Yue Yang and Xiao Wen Li protected them. Otherwise, the consequences would be unimaginable.

“After passing this hurdle, Princess Qian Qian’s hardships have technically already been overcome. If she can break through the Innate Supreme and merge with the Divine Sword, then no one can stop her from galloping on the cultivation road. She and Wu Xia were destined to be peerless geniuses who are going to obtain Divine Supremacy!” Yue Yu was both happy for Princess Qian Qian and sad for her lack of skills. Although she knew it was impossible, she still hoped in her heart that her realm with Xiao San (Yue Yang) could be brought closer. It now became increasingly difficult to look up to him; perhaps one day, he might leave her forever…”You can do it too; it’s just that you didn’t really invest and work for it,” Drunken Cat Yu Jie felt that if Yue Yu really worked hard, her future achievements would be unimaginable.

But based on the embarrassment of her new identity, it was inconvenient for her to persuade her even more.

After all, Yue Yu was her second sister now. So, some things were really not suitable to be said.

Yue Yang sent a burst of energy to the fainted Princess Qian Qian to restore her body, but he couldn’t bear the exhaustion in the end and fell to the ground before he could take a sip of the water handed by Drunken Cat Yu Jie. Both women then quickly held onto him and Princess Qian Qian.

Princess Qian Qian was fine— she was just temporarily unaccustomed to the successive breakthroughs in her body, where she needed time to adjust and fell asleep.

Yue Yang was extremely tired.

The two women looked at each other. Drunken Cat Yu Jie avoided Yue Yu’s sight as she carried Princess Qian Qian and quickly went out, leaving Yue Yu alone.

She knew that to recover from Yue Yang’s fatigue, Yue Yu had to do what she does best and only the pure energy of her water attribute would recover him to his best state. This was one of the points where even the pure ice energy of Xue Wu Xia’s, would still be far from hers.

Drunken Cat Yu Jie took Princess Qian Qian away to avoid her, so the embarrassment in Yue Yu’s heart disappeared.

She had seen her younger brother become so tired that he slept everywhere and had helped him recover countless times. In experiments, after battles, or when fusing runes, medicine, refining— anytime when he was tired, she would use her energy to help him get rid of the exhaustion She was already used to this kind of situation, so she didn’t care about anything else, she quickly lowered her head and embraced the irritating and delightful Xiao San. While transmitting her energy to him, she complained to him, “Always working so damn hard, you’re already an adult but you behave like a kid; when are you going to make sure that this elder sister of yours can ever achieve peace of mind when you’re like this? Maybe I owed you too much in my previous life. I don’t know what I owed you though, for me to have to repay you this much in this life of mine…”

Yue Yang, who was already exhausted and asleep, couldn’t hear what Yue Yu said.

Of course, when he was awake, she didn’t and wouldn’t speak to him that way.

On the first day, Yue Yang, who was recovered, returned to his fierce state. He jumped up and ran out to find Princess Qian Qian, “Tigress, let me see you! I haven’t seen a Divine Beast and a master in a body together before!”

Princess Qian Qian saw that Drunken Cat Yu Jie and Yue Yu were resting and didn’t get up. Suddenly, she punched Yue Yang in the chest and that staggered him.

“What’s the matter?” Yue Yang was surprised, Tigress didn’t seem to be happy?

“You’re still saying that? That- You made it disappear; I seriously became a white tiger!” Princess Qian Qian’s face suddenly turned red and it was as hot as a burning flame.

“What?” Yue Yang didn’t understand at first. He was stunned for a long time before he reacted, “You became one with the Divine Beast and became a White Tiger? The grass below is gone? I didn’t know about this, would it really? Impossible, did it really become that? Hey, let me see, let me see!”

[T/N: As odd as it sounds, White Tiger comes from a Chinese saying that has more background to it, but it’s complicated. In short, the term ‘white tiger’ is used to address a woman with no pubic hair]

“In your dreams!” Princess Qian Qian saw the appearance of a curious baby reflected in his expression. She was embarrassed and angry, hence, she raised her pink fist and knocked him to the sky.

chapters.title: Chapter 935
chapters.body:
Chapter 935

Chapter 935: Don’t Add Your Share Of Chaos, You Brat!

Heavenly Splendour Territory, Zhi Feng Country, Green Willow City.

Ming Ri Hao saw Yue Yang again after two days. Somehow, this kid was smiling cheekily as if he was a sly fox who managed to steal some little chicks. He asked, “What happened to you? You didn’t go to some odd place to pull some tricks on some girl, did you, you brat?”

Yue Yang naturally denied it.

Things like elevating Princess Qian Qian’s Guardian Beast, the White Tiger, to a Divine Beast, and even turning her into a real ‘white tiger’— the double satisfaction of this sense of accomplishment and unexpected surprises truly made him very proud, but this could only be beautiful only to him. Only he was allowed to reminisce about it slowly, and it would never be something to share. He waved to Ming Ri Hao, saying that it was his business, telling the hard-pressed uncle to keep his hands to himself.

Ming Ri Hao wasn’t the kind of person who liked gossip and he didn’t like to inquire about other people’s matters either. In fact, he was just curious about Yue Yang;s change in expression, which led him to ask the question.

So he didn’t really care even if Yue Yang wasn’t going to tell him.

It’s just this kid’s proud and happy spring-like mood which contrasted with his own damp bleakness made Ming Ri Hao unhappy for a brief moment.

He had never been as depressed in meeting anyone else, but with this kid, he just felt desolate. He guessed that it was probably a cruel joke that the Gods of Fate played on him, “Tomorrow is the birthday banquet, are you sure you want to attack?” Ming Ri Hao was angry, but he still valued Yue Yang. Although he kind of hated this cunning boy, he was still a first-rate ruthless man with an accredited strategy and success rate. There was absolutely no loss in cooperating with him.

“Actually, I just wanted to squeeze out the secrets of the Wind-Stopping Swamp and understand the Heavenly Splendour Territory. Now that I have you, I don’t have to make cliché conversations with the Lord of Zhi Feng. I think the original plan can be revised— if the fugitive slave in your family is not there, then we don’t have to startle the snakes. In this way, you can first describe the current and hidden power of the Heavenly Splendour Territory in detail. After that, I will see how to arrange my plans around them,” Yue Yang had already talked to Yue Yu before his cultivation yesterday. Princess Qian Qian and the others discussed it and felt that the plan did not have to be carried out as originally intended, especially when an unknown and powerful enemy was lurking behind. Exposing the full strength of their own side at once was a very passive behaviour.

“What if the fugitive slave is there?” Ming Ri Hao naturally put his obsession in the first place.

“Then there’s nothing to say about that; catch what should be caught, kill what should be killed,” Yue Yang laughed. He was not someone who hesitated, nor was he someone who feared the consequences of his actions.

“Okay,” Ming Ri Hao first applauded before he nodded to Yue Yang. He stated, “If the fugitive slave is really there, I;m ceratin that I can arrest her, but I cannot promise the accuraccy of time. As an ally, I can understand and take your concerns and best interests into account. As long as it doesn’t affect your plans, I will try my best to cooperate.”

“Let’s talk about the general situation first, everything else can be discussed slowly,” Yue Yang wanted to know if there was a person as powerful as Ji Wu Ri in the Heavenly Splendour Territory.

No matter what, there was news of a Divine Grimoire here.

There was no reason as to why the people in the Central Palace wouldn’t know about the news. If they knew about it, they wouldn’t remain stagnant either.

Especially through Ji Wu Ri’s diligent pursuit of the Divine Grimoire of the Land of Trials, Yue Yang could guess of a possible situation that was occurring in the Central Palace— there was also a fierce struggle between the powerhouses of Ji Wu Ri’s level. In his dreams, Ji Wu Ri wanted to contract the Divine Grimoire and climb the Divine ranks and become a true God. Hence, there was no reason that the two people who possessed the same strength wouldn’t act the same way.

What’s more was that even if there weren’t Central Palace powerhouses like Ji Wu Ri keeping an eye on the Divine Grimoire, there were countless Rankers who were merely one level lower than Ji Wu Ri. Did none of them know about the Divine Grimoire in the Heavenly Splendour Territory?

This is a Divine Grimoire we’re talking about!

Yue Yang wouldn’t believe that not one person expressed their interest in it even if someone were to beat him up with that fake truth.

Ming Ri Hao was a little hesitant at first, thinking that speaking out directly would arouse this kid’s fighting spirit and cause him to charge forward without hesitation. In the Prison Emperor Divine Palace, this kid was still a scum as he dared to challenge Void and Jiuxiao who were part of the Three Leaders of the Western Heaven Realm.

Now that this kid had grown up, what else was there for him to be afraid of with his guts?

However, Yue Yang was staring at him with his eyes that looked like they were about to emit lightrays like Ultraman.

As a result, Ming Ri Hao reported several names to Yue Yang with the secret technique of sound transmission. Then, he briefly explained the strength and power behind these names.

When Yue Yang heard this, he stood up, turned around and left.

“Where are you going?” Ming Ri Hao hurriedly stopped this kid. He thought to himself that if this kid really tried to go now and wouldn’t call it quits, there was going to be pandemonium. If he had known earlier, he wouldn’t have told him for the time being and just deceived him for a while before talking about it later on. Just as Ming Ri Hao secretly regretted his decision, Yue Yang’s answer made him almost fall to the ground.

Because what Yue Yang said was, “‘m going home!”

Ming Ri Hao broke out in sweat, “Why are you going home? Are you going home to move the troops? This- the current Tong Tian Tower might be slightly formidable, but compared to the Central Palace, it’s not something to be taken lightly!”

Yue Yang shook his head, “What nonsense, I’ll be an idiot if I were to compete with the Central Palace; I’m going back to avoid the limelight!”

Ming Ri Hao sweated as if he was a waterfall, “I thought you were going to rush to challenge them!”

Yue Yang looked at Ming Ri Hao with a look of disappointed helplessness, “Hard-pressed uncle, don’t think that everyone’s intelligence is as low as yours, okay? Do you think I can touch those guys with the level I am now? I’m going back; just pretend that you never met me in the Heavenly Splendour Territory!”

Seeing that this kid was about to let go, Ming Ri Hao quickly stopped him, “Don’t be like this! You can’t be too unethical; we have already formed an alliance.”

Yue Yang snorted coldly, “Wasn’t the alliance a verbal one? Well, now I regret it!”

Come on, can you be any more shameless, kid?

Seeing Yue Yang’s appearance, Ming Ri Hao felt a pain in his liver. However, he had no choice but to give in, “Boy, if you are willing to stay, we will join forces to fight the enemy. After defeating the enemy, we will obtain the treasure and I can let you choose your pick first. Wait, don’t go, don’t go, let’s negotiate. I mean, if the Divine Grimoire is there, you will also get the benefits first…” Ming Ri Hao looked at this kid with a look of disdain on his face, “If you stay, after this battle is over, I will tell you where my sister has retreated to cultivate! For this, I will definitely not lie to you, otherwise, it’s alright for you to peel my skin and make your clothes!”

Yue Yang was overjoyed when he saw that his desperate cards were turned out and placed on the betting table.

As soon as he stretched out his hand, he held Ming Ri Hao’s big hand, “Big brother! Don’t say anything else, I’ll stay here to help you! In fact, you misunderstood me. As I am righteous, affectionate, eager to seek justice, peaceful, motherland-loving, the love of the collective, someone who loves to help out my friends in need and is a fair-faced young man, how can I leave big brother to fight alone? Obviously, you misunderstood me! However, I have a lot of magnanimity, so you don’t need to apologise; I have already forgiven you in my heart!”

Ming Ri Hao’s face turned black with anger.

He almost slapped this kid to death.

Of course, he knew in his heart who this kid was— he wouldn’t lift a finger to help so long as he didn’t gain any sort of benefits. So, Ming Ri Hao could only close his eyes and accept the fact that he was the one at a loss.

Yue Yang loved to take advantage of others; this was true, but he was not stingy at work, especially when it came to his family and his loved ones he would never sit back and reserve his strength. They sat down again and talked about formulating a new plan in every single detail.

After two hours of deliberation, the new plan was finally finalised.

After the final decision, Ming Ri Hao secretly breathed a sigh of relief in his heart— fortunately, this kid was his ally and was not an enemy!

Outside the street, another shocking wave of news came from the Mercenary Guild. Different from the usual news, this news once again surprised the people of the Green Willow City like a hurricane of chaos. Yue Yang was slightly surprised when he listened carefully and found that it was still about the Liberty Queen that he heard about yesterday. According to the laments of the hungry and poor mercenaries, as well as the cheers of the rich, it seemed that the Liberty Queen would move to Green Willow City. After the birthday banquet of the Country Lord’s Concubine, the beauty Zhu Guang, she was to be executed in public.

“Hard-pressed uncle, what do you think is going on?” Yue Yang pointed out the window.

“I actually don’t know,” Ming Ri Hao shook his head.

“Is she not the descendant of your first love?” Yue Yang felt that it was a little strange. If she wasn’t a descendent of his first love, what was there to be hard-pressed about?

“Maybe it is the descendant of my fourth sister’s disciple or it may be the fifth sister’s descendant. I have never seen it, but I just heard that in Heavenly Splendour Territory, there would always be a ‘Liberty Queen’ once almost every few hundred years. They regard the fourth and fifth sisters as ‘Double Saints’, and these Queens were always filled with compassion and tolerance in their hearts. No matter where they belong, they would save all the poor, the hungry, and all the soldiers. Under this belief passed down from generation to generation, the Liberty Queen would run around the Heavenly Splendour Territory in an attempt to appeal, hoping that the three parties would lay down their weapons and end the war. Because of such an anti-war philosophy, many poor people and disabled soldiers have become her believers and her suitors,” Ming Ri Hao paused before he said slowly, “Because of this, these Liberty Queens and her faithful believers generally don’t live for long. As long as they are caught, they will be burned alive by those in power.”

“Do you not intend to care?” Yue Yang felt that Ming Ri Hao’s big stature was in vain as he criticised him,”This is the best time for a hero to save beauty!”

“Can’t you think of anything else other than a hero saving beauty?” Ming Ri Hao felt that he was seriously unable to keep up with this kid’s thought process. It was obviously a sad and depressing truth, so why did it only involve a hero saving beauty to him?

Yue Yang smiled and gestured for Ming Ri Hao not to be angry. Anyway, she wouldn’t be burned until the end of the birthday banquet tomorrow, so there was still time to save her.

Ming Ri Hao remained silent, as if he was unwilling to meddle in his others’ business.

Downstairs, in the heart of the streets.

Suddenly, there was a loud bang.

The sound waves made the buildings around the street tremble a little and the window frames nearly fell.

“Bastards in Green Willow City, you damned maggots, leeches that eat human blood, hand over the Liberty Queen immediately,” There was a loud voice that rang out like a bell and Yue Yang looked out and found two men. The axe-wielding warriors with skin as strong as an ox and a head as dark as charcoal stood in the middle of the street outside like two Gods who guarded the gates of Heaven.

“Don’t force me; it’s going to be bad if I become angry!” Unlike the black charcoal-head on the left, the black charcoal-head on the right spoke weakly—even more quietly than a bride who passed the doors of marriage. If it weren’t for the terrifying physique and strong strength, some might think that he was a little girl who only hid at home and embroidered.

“It’s the Bull Brothers, they are here!”

“My God, these two have already arrived…”

“Tsk, two brainless fools are just here to die. No matter how strong they are, can they be stronger than His Majesty? These two savages are simply dying in vain!”

Yue Yang heard the discussions around him. When he looked back at Ming Ri Hao, he found that he still had a rigid expression on his face, looking as if he really didn’t want to intervene.

He couldn’t help but wonder since there was no reason for him to behave like this; this hard-pressed uncle did not seem like such a person.

Of course, there might be a reason behind it. Everyone has their own little secret, after all. Although Yue Yang was curious, he knew that Ming Ri Hao wouldn’t say anything and he didn’t want to ask too much. Instead, he paid attention to the streets and saw the followers of the Liberty Queen and the Lord of Green Willow City—what will happen if the two sides collide!

If possible, he was going to pretend to be a fan of the Liberty Queen and go out to make a scene.

That seemed like a good idea!

Ming Ri Hao looked at him and knew that he was going to get a headache. He wanted to say to Yue Yang: The situation in the Heavenly Splendour Territory is already chaotic enough; don’t add your share of chaos into it, you brat!

chapters.title: Chapter 936
chapters.body:
Chapter 936

Chapter 936: Is It Funny?

The two Bull Brothers belong to the type of species who had strong limbs and simple minds.

Their strength was good, their body was super strong and their courage was full, but unfortunately, their brains were also full of muscles.

The Lord of Zhi Feng did not appear, probably because an invasion of this level was not capable of alarming him. On the other hand,nearly ten Heaven Ranked powerhouses who had heard the commotion gathered around the Bull Brothers and beat them violently. The buildings in the nearby streets were razed to the ground as some mercenaries and the starved people who could not avoid them suffered heavy casualties, caught in the fighting between the two sides. Finally, a white-bearded old man from the Fox Clan came out and proposed to move to fight outside the city in order to avoid harming innocent people. Yue Yang was stunned as the Bull Brothers agreed to this proposal.

“Since you are the followers of the Liberty Queen, following the beautiful and kind-hearted woman who has worked hard for the people for all her life, your actions should have been to save and rescue the citizens of the Heavenly Splendour Territory from suffering. I wonder if you two, who are so great, have noticed the amount of innocent people that have been hurt by the wrong hand of yours? If that continues, more innocent people will be hurt. If the Liberty Queen were to know about how many lives that were hurt just to save her, she would be so upset!” The white-bearded old man of the Fox Clan persuaded them like this initially.

“You have to hand her over, otherwise, we will not leave,” The boss of the Bull Brothers really stopped his movements. Though his intellect was still subpar, thankfully his will and stubbornness to save the Liberty Queen remained as well.

“Don’t force me to make another move. I really don’t want to hit anyone, so you guys better let the Liberty Queen go,” The second brother of the Bull Brothers replied weakly.

In fact, he was the most powerful— and also the most violent.

It seemed like he couldn’t fully control the power in his body.

The white-bearded old man of the Fox Clan took the opportunity to propose a fair duel outside the city, and whoever won would win the Liberty Queen.

The Bull Brothers with muscles for brains happily agreed and Yue Yang almost fell to the ground when he saw this kind of negotiation occur. They were truly fools that even medicine couldn’t cure; only idiots would ever agree to that! It was precisely because the team felt like fighting in the city would be a disadvantage, so they chose to play dirty outside the streets— but who would have thought that the two idiots would agree to this without any second thoughts!

Ming Ri Hao also shook his head in secret.

To be surrounded by such idiots, it was no wonder that the Liberty Queen was caught!

It should be said that the Liberty Queen was rather amazing as she had persisted for so long before she was actually arrested. But then again, if it weren’t for a guy with a chaotic mind like the Bull Brothers, who else would follow the Liberty Queen to do such a ‘magnanimous’ act in saving the entire Heavenly Splendour Territory?

In less than half an hour, the two Bull Brothers were escorted in, covered in blood.

The two of them were heavily bound with Dragon Chains and Ghostly Tears of Blood and Tears, locked up in a prison car.

In addition to being battered and bruised, their skins were coated with some kind of debilitating toxin, effectively stripping away the strength of the Bull Brothers and making them unable to resist.

“You are all liars, the dirtiest maggots in the world! Blood-sucking flies! If you have the ability, let go of us brothers and let’s fight again! Villainous behaviour, shameless dog thieves; you must die painfully! Villains like you would definitely fall from the Heavenly Splendour Territory when God punishes you!” The boss of the Bull Brothers was furious and he cursed them aggressively all the way.

“Boohoo…” Brother Bull’s second brother however, cried aggrievedly. He seemed even sadder than a child who had their lollipop snatched away.

“Swear louder, haha! It’s really nice to hear!” The white-bearded old man of the Fox Clan was triumphant.

“You scum!”

The other Heaven Rankers did not seem to be in such good shape.

Although it was a completely unfair siege and a shameless plot, this pair of indescribably stupid Bull Brothers wielded strength that were far beyond their imaginations. With nine against two, despite the success of the sneak attack and the level of suppression, everyone was somehow injured. Even after finally capturing the boss of the Bull Brothers, the seemingly cowardly second brother became mad and killed one of them in seconds. If it wasn’t for the fact that they used the older brother as a hostage to get the younger to surrender, the second brother might have won the unfair fight.

It was initially just an easy-going battle, but it had evolved into an intensely dismal battle that they nearly lost.

What kind of monster were these Bull Brothers?!

Yue Yang went downstairs and waved to Ming Ri Hao, indicating that he was busy and motioned for them to act separately. Ming Ri Hao was speechless for a while.

My eldest Young Master, even if you want to cause some trouble, you’re not doing it now, right? You didn’t say a word when the two Bull Brothers were still there. Now that everyone has been caught, what’s the use of going out?

Besides, these two were full of muscles for brains; even if they were saved, what use were they going to be?

Although it was rather troubling, he did not stop Yue Yang.

Ming Ri Hao decided to leave it up to Yue Yang and let the kid do as he wanted. He pretended not to notice and slipped in between a crowd of onlookers, not wanting to care about crap like this.

“Hey, isn’t this my family’s Da Leng and Er Leng? How did people get caught? Now what did I say at the start? Da Leng, this Young Master asked you to take care of your younger brother, to not do anything and just watch the door. Look at you now, running around with your younger brother and being caught as runaway slaves. You have seriously derelicted your duty and this Young Master is so angry that I have decided to leave you two alone. Hurry up and apologise; otherwise, I’m going to make you two pay for it as well,” Yue Yang stopped the prisoner’s car and kept criticising the Bull Brothers as if these two guys were the guards of his house.

“What’s going on?” The white-bearded old man of the Fox Clan was confused. The situation looked real enough, but why didn’t he hear that these two brothers were still guards?

“I don’t know!” The eight remaining Heaven Ranked warriors also looked at each other in dismay.

“Brother, do you know him?” The boss of the Bull Brothers responded very slowly, taking a long time to even form a question, “We don’t seem to have been guards, right? Brother, have you been one?”

“No, no I haven’t,” The Bull Brother’s youngest was completely confused at this time.

“This is a misunderstanding…” Leader Jin just intended to come out and escort the ceremony, so when he saw Yue Yang take a stand, he started to panic. A dead fritter like him could see at a glance that this Young Master Titan had an excessive sense of justice as he hastened to rescue these two stupid bulls, but he was frustrated because it wasn’t the right time nor place to do so. Of course, to have an unrelated noble child from a famous family like Master Titan act in his stead as he sat back and watch the entire thing play out was absurd. Leader Jin needed to do something and prevent two sides from brawling; otherwise, it would be an act that was equal to Master Titan opposing the Country Lord of Zhi Feng.

“Misunderstanding?” The white-bearded old man from the Fox Clan understood slightly.

“Bullshit, I think it’s a revolt attempt!” One of the Heaven Rankers was upset because the one who died in battle was his friend. Although he didn’t know the details of the opposing party, when he saw that the guy who stood up to speak for this kid was just a low-level Chief Steward, he immediately sneered.

“Leader Jin, what’s going on?” The Chief Steward who rushed over was an old man as thin as a bamboo pole.

“Actually ,this is the Young Master Titan, the young and promising chairman of the Titan Council of Commerce. This time, with respect and sincerity, he came to congratulate and celebrate Ms Zhu Guang’s birthday… Master Titan has a full sense of justice. Besides, he has a good sense of humour and likes to joke around with everyone,” Leader Jin quickly reported to the Chief Steward as he turned around and pulled Yue Yang away.

“It turned out to be a joke! Haha, come on, Young Master Titan, please enter the Palace of the Lord with all of the famous warriors. The hospitable Lord has set up a banquet and sent his Ministers to greet you. Today, we defeated the enemy, so it is right to join the celebration—no one is to go home sober!” When the Chief Steward heard this, he hurriedly answered as such as he didn’t want the good relationship to tarnish. According to Leader Jin’s words just now, the intelligent Chief Steward was able to understand what was going on. The Young Master Titan could not watch nearly ten Heaven Rankers unfairly picking on the Bull Brothers, so he went ahead to take a stand.

“This joke is not funny at all!” The white-bearded old man of the Fox Clan snorted without a smile.

“To me, I don’t think it’s a joke at all!” The Heaven Ranker who framed him just now was still holding on tightly to his words.

“Hey, let’s just arrest this kid; even if he isn’t trying to revolt, I’m afraid we can’t really leave him running around,” A Heaven Ranker, who was displeased with Ming Ri Hao, recognized Yue Yang as the kid who called out to ‘Tian Ri’ the other day. So, he decided to make a move and at least give the guy a scare!

“Don’t be angry, distinguished guests, this is really a misunderstanding…” Leader Jin quickly bowed and apologised on Yue Yang’s behalf because he couldn’t let the other party take the blame.

“What if I said it wasn’t a misunderstanding?” The Heaven Ranked powerhouse who was hostile to Ming Ri Hao also had the strength of a 3rd Level Heaven Rank. If Yue Yang hadn’t called Ming Ri Hao yesterday, he wouldn’t be so targeted as he is now. He decided to take this kid first, and even if he couldn’t take him down, he would make him disgraced and make Ming Ri Hao, who went by the pseudonym Tian Ri, embarrassed in the team.

“This?” Leader Jin dared not speak.

A Level 3 Heaven Ranker was not someone he could afford to offend.

But he still stood firmly by Yue Yang’s side. After all, the family behind this eldest Young Master was the real deal. He would rather offend that Heaven Ranker than leave at this time!

The Chief Steward just wanted to persuade him, but the aggressive Heaven Ranked powerhouse sneered, “Chief Steward Ye, this is now between me and him!”

Anger flashed deep in the eyes of the big steward.

Although he also had a good amount of strength, he expected the man to behave like a proper guest and think about the image of the host.

But he was used to seeing this sick part of the world, so his joyful and angry expressions were always indistinguishable. In the face of the aggressiveness of the Heaven Ranked martial artist, he just said indifferently, “Okay, this old man will be here to wait. The Country Lord is not only hospitable, but he is also always tolerant. Since the guests have private matters that need to be handled, I should avoid it. Young Master Titan, this old man is trying not to be rude, but it appears that I have overstayed my welcome. I sincerely apologise.”

On the surface, he expressed that he was apologetic to both sides. However, he remained slightly biased towards Yue Yang.

After all, the man ridiculed him there and then whereas Yue Yang, the famous Young Master, was a distinguished guest whom he had painstakingly brought back.

“Chief Steward Ye, don’t worry; if you knock off all the teeth of a mutt, the dog will naturally know how to shut up,” Yue Yang laughed. His arrogant and flamboyant attitude suffocated the tension around them as it also made the curious onlookers feel a chill in their hearts.

It seemed that this kid was not an easy target to mess with.

The provocative Heaven Ranked powerhouse also secretly cursed.

Damn, it seemed like this brat the Tian Ri is an acquaintance of, is actually not an easy prey. If he has a very strong family backing him, I’m the one at a loss.

What caused him the most worry was— now the provocation has been made, everyone around them would be watching the scene play out, so it was impossible to take it back. The only solution for now was to bite the bullet and be tough; then he would wait it out till there was a time to make concessions.

“What bravery, who are you? Who gave you the right to be this arrogant?” The Heaven Ranked powerhouse feigned anger and asked about Yue Yang’s details.

“For someone like you, it’s not enough to know my worth… Someone drag this guy down and after he’s beaten half to death, tell him who this Young Master is!” Yue Yang snapped his fingers, but Feng Ji and Jin Yun were the only ones left. The two jumped out as Feng Ji wiped his sweat profusely and reported, “Young Master, to report, Captain Zhong Guan has not returned from a shopping trip. If you want to hit someone, you’ll have to accept us pathfinder thieves.”

“Ah?” Everyone was dumbfounded; they were joking, right? With their two little pathfinder thieves, they want to beat the Heaven Ranked powerhouses? They would be blown away with a hit!

“Hahahaha! Are you acting in a clown show? Hahahaha!”

The Heaven Ranked powerhouse breathed a sigh of relief in his heart. Fortunately, the person he met was really a con. He only knew how to boast and wasn’t actually capable.

After laughing wildly for a long time, just as he was about to step forward as he thought about slapping the two thieves in the face. Then, he would frighten this dude and tell him not to be arrogant in the future. Unexpectedly, before he could move, he felt that there was someone behind him and there were definitely more than one. At least three people had at some point, snuck behind him and were ready to attack.

Damn, these guards have always been there. They were just deliberately trying to play off as weak to show my carelessness.

He fell for their trick.

“Is it funny? Laugh again, go on, why aren’t you laughing? Keep laughing!” A cold voice sounded, causing the stagnant Heaven Rank powerhouse to sweat profusely.

========================================================================

chapters.title: Chapter 937
chapters.body:
Chapter 937

Chapter 937: My Name Is Sky Execution

“Is it funny? Keep laughing then!” This ruthless mocking voice was as cold as ice, as chilling as frost, as sharp as a needle and as lethal as an arrow.

The remark went straight for the heart.

It stung even more than putting saltwater over a whip that was swung mercilessly over skin!

Immediately, the Heaven Ranked powerhouse who provoked trouble was disgraced.

Not only him, but also the friends around him and the people who laughed along with the intention to flatter the ‘strong’, all collectively felt ashamed.

Tolerate?

They couldn’t tolerate it in the slightest!

This kind of bare slap in the face was unbearable to say the least!

If he was not a Heaven Ranked powerhouse, then he could choose to swallow his temper and become a turtle to crawl back into his shell— that’s fine. Although the others might feel disdained, they wouldn’t dare to say anything. However, as a Heaven Ranked powerhouse of the 3rd Level, if he didn’t even dare to respond to the prompts and insults of the enemy, where could he ever venture to if this incident spread like wildfire? All of his companions would look at him with the eyes of ‘look at that coward’?

He knew that he was going to jump into the trap. He knew that the enemy was provoking him intentionally, just like the way he knew that the enemy was no easy target to provoke.

But he had no chance of compromising.

So, he gritted his teeth.

The Heaven Ranked powerhouse, whose body was originally stagnant, erupted with earth-shattering power. His aura was like a volcanic eruption and the shockwave shook the audience like a hurricane. Between the twists and turns, his fist was like a shooting star. It would be too late to catch it as it had already pierced through the air.

“Hmph, go to hell!” The provocative Heaven Ranker launched an attack and his fists were like shooting stars. Taking advantage of the his anger, he spurred the murderous intention and charge backwards.

“Amazing…”

“It’s Meteor Breaking Fist!”

“This kind of power explodes in an instant and it is not something that an ordinary person can take. It seems that Hu Lei’s strength had reached the peak of the Heaven Rank’s 3rd Level. Even those equipped with the same strength as him would find it difficult to resist him. In the battle just now, Hu Lei did not go all out at all. So, the unfortunate ranker was killed as a last attempt by the Bull Brothers not because he was unable to rescue him, but because Hu Lei and the others deliberately hid their strength? If someone hadn’t intercepted him, Hu Lei might not have shown his true strength!”

A few companions who used to stand not far from the provocative Heaven Ranker, in addition to avoiding the magnitude of the shockwave, also have their own concerns.

Even the Chief Steward, Leader Jin and the others who were watching the battle from a distance had their eyes flickering back and forth.

Their thoughts were quick, but his punch was faster!

At the moment when everyone’s thoughts arose, the fist of the Heaven Ranker Hu Lei suddenly increased its speed again.

Just like a shooting star that was too fast to catch, sped up by leaps and bounds as it slid past the line of sight. It completely disappeared from sight, making it impossible for anyone to track it merely with their eyesights.

“Thwack!”

A dull crash sounded.

The deafening roar that the people imagined never came; there was only an unexpected sound that indicated some sort of contact. It didn’t sound like a fist’s punch, but like a person being slapped in the face. Everyone was stunned at first and when they focused their attention, they took a closer look at the field. There, they saw Hu Lei, a 3rd Level Heaven Ranker paired with the ‘Meteor Breaking Fist’ that he had blasted with the greatest amount of strength he could muster, was caught in the opponent’s sole hand.

The most fearful thing was not the fact that the man was able to catch this incredible punch with one hand.

Instead, the other party still had the time and strength to spare, so he slapped Hu Lei in the face!

The crowd knew how difficult it was to be able to slap this 3rd Level Heaven Ranker, let alone the fact that the man had received and stopped the Meteor Breaking Fist before doing so. Everyone was shocked and Hu Lei, who now sported an angry red mark across his cheek, was no exception!

What kind of pervert was this guy?

The crowd watched intently.

It was discovered that the person who calmly caught Hu Lei’s Meteor Breaking Fist with one hand was a cool-looking, handsome and an unusually young human man. No words could be used to describe this person’s demeanour. Instead, they felt that this guy did not seem like a person at all; rather, he resembled a sword, a piece of ice or a lightning bolt. In front of him, any weak thing seemed pale and powerless and the strong like Hu Lei, a powerhouse of the 3rd Level Heaven Rank, looked as pitiful as a ridiculous clown.

Compared to Hu Lei’s three-metre-tall body, this man’s body was naturally far more inferior.

But the strange thing was that the huge Hu Lei looked like a thin dwarf when the two were compared instead!

“You, you- who are you?”

The provocative Hu Lei trembled as he now began to realise how seriously he messed up. Although he could run rampant in the Heavenly Splendour Territory due to his 3rd Level Heaven Ranked strength, he was nothing compared to this man with silver arcs all over his body.

If he wanted to kill Hu Lei, he could have done so— faster than the time needed to squish a bug!

Under the glaring eyes of the other party, Hu Lei felt his knees go weak as he had the urge to kneel and beg for mercy.

“My name is Sky Execution!”

When the human man who claimed to be Sky Execution raised his hand, Hu Lei was so frightened that he was almost blown away. It’s over, he would be instantly killed by the opponent as he had provoked an existence that was impossible to resist. Today, it seemed like death was inevitable for him! For a time, Hu Lei was in despair and even closed his eyes, waiting for death to come as he no longer struggled. He also knew that even if he struggled as hard as he could, he probably wouldn’t be able to delay his day even for half a second. At the moment when death was about to swallow his life, Hu Lei chose to endure the fear and wait for death instead of fighting in vain like a laughingstock.

Hu Lei’s companions and acquaintances all turned pale at this moment.

They knew that Hu Lei was the strongest man among them.
