In addition to Tian Ri and Wo Shi, who were never present in this scene, Hu Lei was the 3rd most powerful amongst them. If he could be instantly killed by someone, what’s the point of having more people on their side? No matter how many gophers they scouted, how could they fight against lions?

The skinny Chief Steward Ye’s expression faltered and his gaze flickered anxiously.

His thoughts were occupied, but it wasn’t an easy thought like Hu Lei going to be killed; what he was thinking most intensely about was how mysterious this Young Master Titan was! He was the most important focal point, so what exactly is his identity? What was so domineering about him that managed to get the Sky Execution, who could have killed Hu lei instantly, to be on his side? Besides, the two others flanking on the sides of Sky Execution as well— although they were slightly weaker than Sky Execution himself, they were more than skilled to handle Hu Lei should the need ever arise. If these were just Young Master Titan’s guards, then the family clan behind him must be very important. Leader Jin was Yue Yang’s die-hard supporter, and that meant that Yue Yang’s safety and happiness could potentially affect Leader Jin’s future, which was why he demanded that Hu Lei remained silent,

He thought in his heart and didn’t dare to say it out aloud.

Now that Hu Lei was about to be killed by the guard of this Young Master Titan, Leader Jin was so moved that he almost cried. Yue Yang was so powerful and he was excited by the fact that he knew such an awesome person! ThisYoung Master Titan was too epic, the Country Lord himself probably couldn’t compare to him either! Sky Execution, who could kill Hu Lei in a matter of seconds, was his bodyguard; was there anything even more touching than this?

All of a sudden, Leader Jin became Yue Yang’s most ardent fan.

He was going to worship Yue Yang with his entire soul!

“Please stop,” A voice as strong as gold and iron that was full of absolute confidence rang out. Right in front of Sky Execution, who was raising his right hand, a man appeared beside the weakly trembling Hu Lei. He wore casual clothes like ordinary warriors, but as long as he was not blind, Sky Execution could clearly see the nobility laced with his identity. His facial expressions were as resolute as a stone as he had a pair of extremely sharp eagle eyes, which seemed to be able to look directly into people’s hearts and figure them inside out. His nose bridge was extremely high and his silhouette was much rougher than that of ordinary people. His thick eyebrows and eagle eyes were in line, exuding a majestic power that swallowed the world.

Oddly enough, there wasn’t a trace of anger nor fury in his expression; instead, he wore a friendly smile.

He nodded again.

It is completely beyond the etiquette that a superior should have.

Of course, this was just a nod that was limited to a number of people such as Yue Yang and Sky Execution; not everyone was eligible to receive this rare form of respect.

As soon as this man with absolute confidence in his demeanour appeared, Chief Steward Ye, Leader Jin and the others lowered themselves to the ground long ago. That was because he was the King who ruled the entire country of Zhi Feng— the owner of the Green Willow City, the Country Lord of Zhi Feng!

“This King would like to apologise on behalf of Mr. Hu Lei. He and his companions have come from thousands of miles away as my guests. Although I have no intention to interfere with this Young Master, I have to humbly ask Young Master Titan and his brother Sky Execution to raise their benevolence and allow this mistake to pass. This King would like to bestow the Thousand Star Ring and the Swallowing Dragon Pearl as an apology. I hope that this kind of meagre gift, in the eyes of Young Master Titan and Brother Sky Execution, can turn battles into harmonies and wars into jade and silk,” The Country Lord of Zhi Feng clapped his hands. Immediately, a personal guard of his that was at the 4th Level of the Heaven Rank appeared behind him, holding onto both Holy Ranked treasure.

“…” Sky Execution was cold and silent as he waited for Yue Yang to speak. His right hand even remained raised, not wanting to put it down. If Yue Yang refused to reconcile, he would immediately kill Hu Lei in front of the Country Lord of Zhi Feng as an example.

His attitude made even the Country Lord of Zhi Feng feel a chill in his heart.

How terrifying, what exactly was the origin of this Young Master Titan? To subdue someone like Sky Execution and make him feel obliged to serve…Everyone in the audience looked at Yue Yang with sweat and fury as they now understood one thing— the truly most terrifying person was not Sky Execution, but the seemingly Young Master Titan, whose strength did not seem to be at the Heaven Ranks. Fortunately, no one touched him before this, otherwise, the Green Willow City would be in danger of being overturned upside down! Him running out righteously to stop a group of Heaven Rankers and asking for the Bull Brothers was not an act of impulse; it was because he had the ability to do so!

Naturally, student Yue Yang’s skill to act flippantly was naturally something that no one dared to question.

Since Sky Execution cooperated as such, he naturally took the opportunity to bear the position.

First, he took a few steps old-fashionedly and coughed. Then, he acted as if he just saw the Country Lord as he waved, “This uncle, are you the Country Lord of Zhi Feng? Well fine then, to beat the dog, I must see who the owner is after all. Coming from a famous family that boasts of education and connotations, naturally, I can’t afford to behave the same way as a mad dog. Since Uncle Country Lord of Zhi Feng is already begging for his sake, I’ll leave things like that then. Sky Execution, you guys can all go about your business; by following me all day, I can’t bully anyone at all!”

“Your wish is my command,” Sky Execution and the two invisible Dragon Emperor and Underworld Emperor behind him nodded in cooperation and turned to leave.

“Please wait…” Country Lord Zhi Feng still wanted Sky Execution and the other two to stay behind. Their strengths would be on par or even greater than the Country Lord himself, so he definitely couldn’t pass up the opportunity to befriend them.

========================================================================

This translation is presented by Nocturne Translations.

chapters.title: Chapter 938
chapters.body:
Chapter 938

Chapter 938: Beat Them Up Until They Call Me Young Master

Sky Execution stopped when he heard the words.

“Country Lord, I’m sorry, Sky Execution and the other guards are on duty, so it’s inconvenient for us to stay any longer.”

He only gave a small salute to the Country Lord of Zhi Feng without looking at the people around him as if everyone else were transparent. In an instant, Sky Execution, the Dragon Emperor and the Underworld Emperor disappeared in a flash, not giving the Country Lord of Zhi Feng any opportunity to persuade them to stay.

Not only the Country Lord of Zhi Feng, but everyone in the audience who saw this scene understood what just happened. Sky Execution and the other two equally powerful companions were most likely not warriors from the Lower Realm; instead, they were probably warriors of the Upper Realm. With their arrogance and strength, they didn’t want to get acquainted with anyone from the Lower Realm at all. The only exception was when their Young Master Titan was being provoked and looked down upon as a ‘mere playboy’— that was when they showed themselves to take a stand.

To get to know Sky Execution’s existence, it would most likely have been impossible under normal circumstances.

Although he was a guard, perhaps his status was much higher than that of the Country Lord of Zhi Feng!

Of course, the Country Lord of Zhi Feng was not annoyed by the rudeness of the other party, but rather pleasantly surprised. The more arrogant Sky Execution’s attitude was, the greater his background, which meant the more noble the identity of this Young Master Titan would turn out to be.

It was a little difficult to get to know Sky Execution now, but that was not the point; the most important thing was to flatter this Young Master Titan!

Country Lord of Zhi Feng looked at student Yue Yang again and the surprise in his eyes was like seeing a magical mountain of infinite value. Of course, his reaction was already considered calm. In contrast, the usually stoic and professional Chief Steward Ye had been holding his enthusiasm to the point where his heart was practically jerking and beating loudly at this point. As for Leader Jin, he had been crying profusely a while ago as if his tears were endless and would never run out.

The white-bearded old man of the Fox Clan, who had stoked the disagreement before, became pale at this moment.

He was afraid that this Young Master would hold grudges.

He wanted to apologise, but because of his lack of identity, he didn’t dare to come forward.

“Master Titan, please forgive Hu Lei for being blinded by evil just now,” The Hu Lei who escaped from death’s grasps immediately knelt down.

With him taking the lead to kneel, all of his other friends around him, as well as the old man of the Fox Clan, knelt down and pleaded guilty. Regardless of whether there was truly a mistake made by their party, as long as the Young Master was benevolent enough, everything else could still be discussed.

Between image and life, it was a no-brainer to ask which one was more important.

Of course their lives were more important, because at least they were capable of feeling embarrassed when they could have been six feet under.

Everyone didn’t think that it was inappropriate for a group of Heaven Rank powerhouses to kneel. On the contrary, even the Country Lord Zhi Feng praised Hu Lei in his heart. Towards he who took the lead in kneeling and pleading guilty, the Country Lord was glad that Hu Lei was able to adapt quickly to take care of the overall situation. Even the blind could see that this Young Master Titan was not any sort of arrogant playboy; on the contrary, he was just a hard-spoken, soft-hearted and extremely compassionate disciple. Since he forgave Hu Lei just now, they knew that this Young Master probably just entered the world and didn’t know much about the cruelty as he was still new.

If he had travelled for a long time, then the family behind him would not send a strong man like Sky Execution to protect him secretly.

His elders, knowing that he is a troublemaker, probably guessed that he would get into trouble.

Yue Yang waved his hand, generously indicating to forget about it.

From his attitude, the Country Lord of Zhi Feng could keenly see that this Young Master didn’t seem to favour cumbersome etiquette. Perhaps he played the role of a Young Master for a very long time and for a change of style, he preferred a direct and fresh attitude, no longer wanting anyone to treat him the way he lived his entire life.

Hu Lei and his Heaven Rank companions secretly breathed a sigh of relief.

They were so close to greeting Hades!

Fortunately, the matter was not made to be a big deal just now. If someone had attacked the Young Master, things would never be settled so simply. No, if it wasn’t for the arrival of the Country Lord of Zhi Feng who came forward to save Hu Lei, the outcome would probably end up differently as well.

Thinking of this, Hu Lei and others stepped forward to thank the Country Lord of Zhi Feng.

“Haha, the saying ‘you don’t know each other if you don’t fight’ seems to be true. The friendship between men is made with fists, after all!” The Country Lord of Zhi Feng guessed that Yue Yang was still in the hot-blooded period of his youth and pretended to be heroic. He took the opportunity to approach Yue Yang and warmly invited the Young Master, whose status was still indescribable at this point, to come to the mansion for a small gathering, almost wanting to force him in.

“Country Lord Zhi Feng, please wait a moment, I still have things to deal with,” Of course, Yue Yang had to hang up his appetite.

“Whatever Young Master Titan has to do, mobilise them as you wish. The soldiers of Zhi Feng are always at your beck and call,” The Country Lord of Zhi Feng felt that this time he was very lucky that there was a famous Young Master from the Heaven Realm in his own territory. He planned to build a good relationship to ensure profits in the future.

“It’s trivial, there’s no need for the Country Lord to take action,” Yue Yang waved his hand, then turned around and instructed Feng Ji and Jin Yun, “Go find Zhong Guan and the others, how do these guys do their jobs as a guard? Although this Young Master gave them a break, when matters arise, it’s really annoying that I can’t even find them! If they don’t show themselves within ten minutes, tell them that they are fired and they no longer need to return anymore!”

“What?”

“Captain, look, hurry up!”

“Master, we came back late. This is your favourite roasted dragon wings. Here, it’s fresh and hot! Feng Ji, what happened?”

The five shadows flew back holding a flurry of large and small plates of food. When they saw that there were people around Yue Yang, they rushed back quickly and flanked his sides left and right like guards. They first greeted Yue Yang with a smile, and the tall man who looked like the Captain whispered to ask Feng Ji what happened in their absence.

Everyone discovered that these guards were all Heaven Rankers.

The strongest one had the strength of the 3rd Level.

The rest were of a pretty similar level as well.

Two of them were at the 2nd Level and the other two were of the 1st Level before Feng Ji and Jin Yun brought up the rear as Quasi-Heaven Rankers.

But Hu Lei felt that although the Captain of the guards was at the same 3rd Level of the Heaven Rank along with him, the other’s strength seemed to be on the verge of being a Quasi-3rd Level Heaven Ranker. If they fought, the Captain would have the upper hand easily, but it came off as odd to Hu Lei because of the difference in strength.

However, the Country Lord of Zhi Feng knew what was going on. These guards, especially the man known as Zhong Guan, already possessed Ultra-Powerful Wills.

That was the first stage of cultivating the Will of the Gods.

Of course, there was no problem with this bright-faced Captain having an unshakable will to overpower Hu Lei who was at the same level! Moreover, this Captain of the guard who wore a heavy crown on his head had a hidden source of strength. He guessed that his power was similar to his own Captain Ba Le, who was also at the 4th Level of the Heaven Ranks, so how could Hu Lei and the others be on a par with such a level? Simply put, it turned out that there was no need for Sky Execution to take action. The Captain of the guard was more than capable of driving them away, but he opted to get food for the Young Master, which led to the inevitable appearance of Sky Execution.

Thinking about it like this, the Country Lord of Zhi Feng might have secretly underestimated the identity of Yue Yang, the Young Master Titan.

The escort team that combined guards and hidden soldiers was not something that ordinary families could afford to pull off. Even the Four Major Families didn’t seem to have such treatment, so it was estimated that this Young Master was also an extremely noble and famous disciple!

Feng Ji coughed slightly, “You missed a lot of wonderful things!”

The Captain of the guard, Zhong Guan, cooperated tacitly and there was no trace of the unfamiliarity of the situation on his face. He showed his acting skills as a movie star and asked, “What did we miss?”

“Screw you all, take the plates away, this Young Master is pissed…” Yue Yang kicked the guard and Zhong Guan, who was used to Yue Yang’s punches and kicks, deliberately flew back and portrayed acting skills that were capable of winning awards, “Young Master, don’t be angry, don’t be angry, the humble one will handle things right away! Feng Ji, have you gone mute?”

“Ah, the Young Master wants to capture that pair of Bull Brothers as guards!” Feng Ji, who was angered by Zhong Guan pulling onto his collar, pointed to the Bull Brothers who were still in the prison car.

“Hey, this has nothing to do with us!” After watching the show for a long time, the Bull Brothers suddenly realised that things seemed to go back to their issue and the elder brother hurriedly shouted in a loud voice, “I don’t know you Young Masters, so you guys can fight all you want, but you can’t let out your anger on us!”

“We didn’t scold the Young Master just now either…” The second brother almost cried.

Both of them were dense, but they were not complete fools.

The strength of this Young Master was not something that the two of them could afford to provoke.

Besides, they didn’t want to be an enemy of this Young Master as he was the one who stood up to support justice!

Yue Yang clapped his hands and said something that seemed like the truth in front of everyone’s eyes, saying, “Drag Da Leng and Er Leng down and beat them up hard!”

Everyone was dumbfounded.

Jesus!

Was he trying to save them or beat them up?

And with the way he was saying things with such ease, he was probably the type of Young Master that has never been through nor understood the pain of being beaten up!

Under the watchful eyes of everyone, Zhong Guan, the Captain of the guard, stood at attention with a snap and saluted, “As you command!” When Hei Tu and Bai Ma opened the prison car and dragged the Bull Brothers out, he asked again, “Master, how long are we to beat them?”

Yue Yang said without hesitation, “Until they are willing to call me Young Master!”

After saying this, everyone fell to the ground.

Leader Jin especially, couldn’t wait to hug onto Yue Yang’s thighs and beg for him to give him a beating as well.

With just a beating session, they were able to become bodyguards? Isn’t that way too easy? Leader Jin now understood why someone like the Flame-Eyed Man, Jin Yun, managed to become the guard of a hotshot— it was because he had suffered a beating as well prior to joining.

Damn, this Flame-Eyed Man Jin Yun is way too unlucky; he even managed to find a master like this?

“No, we won’t ever call you Young Master; don’t even think about it!” The elder brother of the Bull Brothers roared angrily.

“Let’s discuss things, can you guys not hit me in the face…” The second man begged weakly.

The crowd fell for it.

It was such a confusing scene— one side demanded the other to be his bodyguards, but the other party refused to give in even if they were going to be beaten up. This beating session really shocked Leader Jin and the onlookers to the bone.

What a life-changing beating session; too bad the one getting beaten up wasn’t me!

chapters.title: Chapter 939
chapters.body:
Chapter 939

Chapter 939: A Drop Of Divine Blood!

Zhong Guan and the others crowded the brothers, truly not letting up at all.

They didn’t take it easy and beat them violently.

Even Feng Ji and the newly added Jin Yun started to attack as if their lives depended on it. They got into the space and kicked the Bull Brothers desperately with their feet, for fear that if they beat him for a second less, they would suffer a loss due to the amount of pain they had gone through. The second brother was beaten and he cried, but the boss of the Bull Brothers yelled, especially towards Feng Ji and Jin Yun, who were weaker than them, “Remember this, you two! When I’m free from here, I will skin you till your bones protrude; if I don’t, I’m not part of the Bull Brothers! Good hit, you scumbags, if you have the power to spare, why not hit me harder? Hit harder, have you not had your meal? You useless and weak pathetic excuses of men!”

Feng Ji and Jin Yun became angry and burst out with all their strength.

They attacked him with all their force.

The old man of the Fox Clan, Leader Jin and the others who were watching were really afraid that they would kill the Bull Brothers.

Hu Lei and other Heaven Rankers peeked at student Yue Yang. They were secretly shocked and baffled when they found that the Young Master had a calm face with no trace of mercy. He really deserved the title of the King of the famous family who perceived lives of the Lower Realm as such.

The Captain of the guard behind the Country Lord of Zhi Feng frowned slightly, but he winked instead. If he could befriend this Young Master Titan, what was giving an insignificant pair of brothers to him? On the contrary, if it pleased him, then it would be a real investment. When he just presented two sacred relics, the other party didn’t even bother giving it a glance. With that, he knew just how rare items would have to be to catch the Young Master’s eye… The Country Lord guessed that there were many sights that the Young Master hadn’t seen before, so the image of the Bull Brothers’ reluctance to back down might come across as amusing to him. After all, the Young Master was in no way short of guards himself.

The Captain of the guard nodded, but his expression was still a little inquisitive— could the Young Master Titan’s interference have anything to do with the Liberty Queen?

Chief Steward Ye saw his expression and waved his hand quickly.

He came out early, which was why he understood the process.

This Young Master Titan didn’t know about the Liberty Queen at all as he had a conflict with Hu Lei due to his impromptu intentions. If this Young Master Titan really knew the Liberty Queen, would she have let a bunch of Heaven Rankers catch her? Sky Execution alone was more than enough to kill all the abductors in seconds, let alone the fact that there were still many great men who were secretly protecting this Young Master Titan.

The Country Lord of Zhi Feng didn’t take it seriously either. To hell with the so-called ‘Liberty Queen’— if it wasn’t for the Domain Emperor’s order to arrest her and have her beheaded, he wouldn’t care about her at all!

They were just a bunch of people without actual strength that posed no threat!

It was just a group of pauper-believers as her followers, so what’s the use of it? On the contrary, those poor people were all burdens. If it weren’t for some of them being greedy and selling the information to him for some influx of cash, he wouldn’t have been able to catch the Liberty Queen that easily either.

Even if the Young Master was tired of playing with ordinary women and wanted the Liberty Queen, he would offer her to him with both hands, let alone giving away the Bull Brothers.

It would just be a waste of rice and grains to want a pair of idiots like them!

Zhong Guan and the others dragged the Bull Brothers aside as the sounds of the crackles continued. Probably within an hour or two, this stubborn pair of Bull Brothers wouldn’t succumb to addressing Yue Yang as a Young Master. With brute strength as their forte, it would be troubling for them to be smart about things and lower their pride. Standing out here with them seemed a bit unnecessary, but they were slightly hesitant about requesting the Young Master Titan into the Country Lord’s premises.

The Country Lord of Zhi Feng gave his subordinate, the Chief Steward Ye, a look.

He in turn, signalled for Leader Jin.

The performance of meritorious service depends on you!

Leader Jin got the signal and his whole body trembled with excitement. Under normal circumstances, he would definitely kowtow to the Country Lord of Zhi Feng, but now, he had to get the job done quickly. By doing a good job, he didn’t mind getting skinned a little later!

“Master Titan, ahem, this is the Country Lord of Zhifeng, but you already knew about it just now. Ahem, it’s like this— Master Titan came to our Green Willow City with great enthusiasm from thousands of miles just to participate in the birthday banquet for fun. Besides, you even purposely sought out for this humble one as well…” Leader Jin became nervous and didn’t know where to start, but he was a slick character after all. He found the momentum of his words and eloquently advertised both Yue Yang and the Country Lord, as if the two weren’t standing a couple of metres around him.

“So that’s the way it is. Young Master Titan came from afar to the Green Willow City, but instead, we greeted you rudely,” What the Country Lord of Zhi Feng wanted was an excuse.

As soon as he heard this Young Master wanted to join in on the fun and participate in the birthday banquet, he was immediately overjoyed.

It turned out that this Young Master was this up-to-date; why didn’t he say it earlier!

The Chief Steward Ye also secretly scolded himself for being an idiot. Just now, Leader Jin mentioned this when he was refuting the guards.

Student Yue Yang patted his head, “Oh, although I got an invitation card from Leader Jin, but I forgot to give a gift— this Young Master is the one who is rude!” He flipped through his storage ring and found a bunch of items, but even as he searched, he didn’t seem satisfied by that pile of treasure. But the onlookers were all surprised as they have never seen this many treasures in their lives. Compared with his collection, any treasure that they have seen before was simply trash in front of Yue Yang!

The Country Lord of Zhi Feng, who was so used to seeing treasures like these on a daily basis, was also shocked by the sheer amount.

He knew that it was rude, but he couldn’t help but ask, “Just now, was that the Martial Spirit Pill?”

“It seems a little disrespectful to give you a mere Martial Spirit Pill for a birthday banquet, so I’m taking another look!” As soon as Yue Yang said, the heart of Zhi Feng’s Country Lord twitched. The Martial Spirit Pill was a top grade item, something that couldn’t be bought no matter how much wealth one owned. With it, he could probably ascend to another level in terms of cultivation, so there was nothing else as suitable as that! He wanted to ask for it, but he felt that he wasn’t in a place to do so as his heart beated rapidly!

“Gulp!” Chief Steward Ye, Leader Jin, Hu Lei and the others were not blind; they all swallowed their saliva desperately. If it were someone else, they would have already made their moves to rob them; but this was the Young Master Titan— any move against him would equal their deaths!

“This is not very good… this is too rudimentary… Let me take a look at this? It seems…”

“Any one of them is fine, I like them all!” The Country Lord of Zhi Feng didn’t dare to say these words and only uttered them in his heart; it was so uncomfortable to hold back.

“Where the heck is this Young Master from; there’s too many treasures here, aren’t there? The amount there is here is enough to drown someone,” The Heaven Raker Hu Lei has seen his fair share of Young Masters before, but he has never seen one at such a calibre. Even Domain Emperors would have the urge to rob him if they saw this scene, let alone normal civilians.

But they could only think about it—if they really wanted to do it, even if Yue Yang allowed them and gave them some leeway, they wouldn’t dare to do so either. These treasures were not something they could risk owning at all; just having a chance to glance at them was already a blessing!

Yue Yang turned around for a long time and saw that the corners of the eyes of the Country Lord of Zhi Feng and the others were starting to cramp up.

There are too many babies and they are all top-quality ones; how terrible of me, haha!

Finally, after much difficulty, Yue Yang finally chose something.

The Country Lord of Zhi Feng turned pale when he saw it. With a bit of unbelievable ecstasy and a hint of panic, he shouted, “Divine Blood? No, this- that- too! That’s too precious, really! That- that is- It is unbearable to bear such a generous gift! It is too precious! Ah no, this is too!”

Seeing the small jade bottle with a drop of Divine Blood in Yue Yang’s hand, the Country Lord of Zhi Feng couldn’t wait to swallow the bottle into his stomach.

But on the surface, he had to restrain his eagerness.

My heart is tingling. Damn, the Divine Blood is right in front of me, but I have to keep it professional and reject it to be polite— this is crazy!

Of course, he couldn’t agree to give it back, but he didn’t dare to reach out and immediately take it from Yue Yang’s hands either. In addition to his ecstasy, he was also a little scared. This hot-headed Young Master Titan himself sent him Divine Blood. If someone in his family were to fight for it, even if he got Divine Blood, it would still be a dead end for him. This gift was too precious and he was afraid that he wouldn’t be able to bear the risks of owning it, but this was the Divine Blood. The blood of his dreams was in front of him, but he couldn’t even ask for it… This wasn’t a robbery; this was something granted to him by the other party, so how could he not want it?

The Country Lord of Zhi Feng was about to cry in his heart.

On the surface, he had to pretend to be prudent and pretend that ‘this thing is precious and not what I like’, and repeatedly refuse it, but his eyes were fixed on the jade bottle. He couldn’t wait to stare at it for the rest of his life and never let it go.

Chief Steward Ye, Leader Jin and the others almost fainted and fell to the ground. Was there truly someone who would give the Divine Blood as a birthday gift?

Who were these people?

If they intended to scare the people, this wasn’t supposed to be how they should be doing it!

This almost scared him to death. Couldn’t this Master Titan send some normal gifts? His heart can’t take it anymore!

“Too, it’s too precious, Master Titan; this is really, really unacceptable! Really, Zhi Feng absolutely cannot accept this, but I can accept it in my heart,” Lord Zhifeng wanted to slap himself, but he couldn’t. He still had to say some polite words to make him appear as a nicer person. He just hoped that this Young Master Titan, who was not deeply involved in the world and had a naive face, wouldn’t believe in his polite words.

“It’s nothing; it’s just a drop of Divine Blood, so it’s really nothing, I still have a big bottle!” Yue Yang’s nonchalant attitude made everyone eager to vomit blood and his face was full of indifference. He really didn’t know that there was poverty and suffering in the world.

“Since this is the intention of the Young Master…” The Chief Steward Ye wiped away his tears;to be able to have a glance at the Divine Blood, it was his biggest pride as a Chief Steward.

“Yes, good, good! Since it is Master Titan’s intention, then Zhi Feng will feel ashamed if I don’t accept it. This drop of Divine Blood is the supreme gift of the birthday banquet. The kindness and righteousness of the Young Master is well-received! Come here, with the ceremony of welcoming the Domain Emperor of the Heavenly Splendour Territory, with the highest style, we welcome the Young Master Titan and the Divine Blood into the palace!” If it wasn’t for everyone watching, the Country Lord of Zhi Feng would definitely swallow the Divine Blood in one gulp.

Of course, he knew that this must not be rushed.

The reputation must be given to this Young Master Titan. If he was impatient and gave the other party a bad impression, maybe this Young Master Titan will walk away boringly.

Since the Divine Blood had been obtained, the most important thing now was figuring out how to serve this Young Master with countless treasures.

Otherwise, the gift of the Divine Blood would backfire.

If he couldn’t get it right, he would have a certain Heaven Ranker ambush him at any time… “My gift is the supreme gift? Haha, that’s great, I want to be the first!” Yue Yang seemed to be very proud, looking like some rich second-generation child in the Heaven Realm who was showing off his wealth like nobody’s business. If they hadn’t known that he was acting, Feng Ji and the newly joined Flame-Eyed Jin Yun might have sneaked in a few words to persuade him. After all, it would be too much of a loss to give them Divine Blood as a gift!

However, they had already learned of the plan.

They knew that this drop of Divine Blood was merely the root cause of the disaster that plagued the entire country of Zhi Feng.

The invincible and undefeatable Young Master Titan, who smiled brightly but killed people ruthlessly, used Divine Blood to make a big bait. Who knows how many big fish would be baited by the bait, lured into their deaths by their own accords.

chapters.title: Chapter 940
chapters.body:
Chapter 940

Chapter 940: Roaring Emperor

With a drop of Divine Blood as congratulations, the effect caused by it was definitely a shock to the whole city.

Although the Country Lord of Zhi Feng wanted to keep it slightly confidential, since this was a congratulatory gift, it was hard to prevent the news from spreading like wildfire. Unless life was killed and blood was shed, it would be impossible to stop the news from spreading.

The news of the Young Master Titan congratulating the Country Lord’s concubine’s birthday banquet with the Divine Blood spread throughout the entire Green Willow City like a hurricane. The Mercenary Guild secretly sent ten troops to leave the city one after another to spread the news. As for the spies lurking in the Green Willow City, they remained lurking in the shadows for a very long time. Now that there was such big news that the Divine Blood had appeared in the world, they were naturally eager to report to their masters.

After inviting Yue Yang to enter the palace, the Country Lord Zhi Feng originally wanted to invite his most beloved concubine of the 88th rank, the beauty Zhu Guang, to come out and greet him.

Zhu Guang heard that the other party sent a drop of Divine Blood as congratulations.

She was surprised and was immediately ecstatic.

However, she was reluctant to come out to thank the distinguished guests.

“My beauty, what are your concerns?” Country Lord Zhi Feng thought that her behaviour was a bit strange. Zhu Guang was also a lively person and she was also the protagonist of the birthday party. How could she refuse to attend if the other party went all the way to send Divine Blood to congratulate her?

“Your Majesty, this concubine thinks that this situation might not be easy. We don’t know each other, but the fact that he could just give out a drop of Divine Blood— how many people in the world could do this? If he came here unintentionally, as Your Majesty said, it would naturally be a good thing. But if he came here intentionally and did it on purpose, then I have to heighten my guard against it! This concubine is just a weak woman and it doesn’t matter if I die, I’m just afraid that Your Majesty’s great foundation will suffer,” As soon as the beautiful Zhu Guang said so, the Country Lord Zhi Feng’s excited mind quickly calmed down. Indeed, there were no benefits for no reason in the world. Even if this Young Master Titan came here unintentionally, wouldn’t it be bad if he fell in love with his concubine?

“Well said, beauty, you reminded me that in the Heavenly Splendour Territory, guarding against others is an essential habit and it is always good to be cautious,” Country Lord Zhi Feng thought for a while before he decided to do something to test the generous Young Master Titan.

“Your Majesty, if you don’t mind, why don’t I arrange for a few beauties to test Young Master Titan’s intentions?” The beauty Zhu Guang was indeed very careful.

The Country Lord of Zhi Feng discussed it with her.

When he came out, he immediately apologised to Yue Yang, saying that his concubine, who was about to have her birthday banquet, was too frightened and unwell because she had been assassinated before, so she was temporarily unable to come out to meet the guests. She also said that in order to express her apologies, the concubine decided to present two stunning beauties in her stead to please Young Master Titan. She promised that she would come out to meet him at her birthday banquet tomorrow and personally take a shot as a gesture of apology.

Yue Yang smiled lightly at the apologetic tone of the Country Lord Zhi Feng.

He took on the role of the eldest Young Master, indicating that he was completely fine and even gave a top-grade Concentration Pill to help the frightened Zhu Guang recover quickly.

As for the two beauties that were presented, he refused them straight away, “Your Majesty Country Lord, your kindness has been accepted. Titan has been engaged since I was a child and it’s an appointment of a noble family. My virtuous wife has yet to enter the door, so Titan does not want to take a concubine.”

When the Country Lord Zhi Feng heard it, he believed that it was 80% of the truth.

The marriages of children from famous families were indeed like this. It was absolutely impossible to choose freely and it was mostly destined early.

In a marriage of the right kind, the legal wife had a lot of power. If she was the kind of controlling wife who wouldn’t allow her husband a concubine and yet the husband still went against her wished, the legal wife was allowed to torture the mistress at will. Even if she was beaten to death, it would totally be accepted as normal. If this young master Titan accepted the two beauties, then things would have been even more doubtful. That was because any descendant of the famous clan would face the problem of inheritance. Being the son of a famous family, it wouldn’t be right for him to fool around… With the Young Master’s refusal, it seemed more natural.

Country Lord Zhi Feng secretly tested the waters— Master Titan was very tightly kept at first as he said little about his family and the Heaven Realm.

But little bits of information would occasionally be leaked out, and that proved his familiarity with the Heaven Realm and the Four Major Families. Country Lord Zhi Feng finally found out the truth— it turned out while this Young Master Titan was travelling around the Western Heaven Realm, he was invited by Young Master Chang Feng to tour around the White River City.

His stop in the Green Willow City was completely unintentional as he just passed by.

When the Country Lord Zhi Feng got this news, he was overjoyed.

From his point of view, this Master Titan was by no means an ‘enemy’ who came here intentionally. Instead, he was just a really famous Young Master who came here unintentionally. Otherwise, how could he tell about his appointment with Young Master Chang Feng and his plans to go to the White River City?

“What did Young Master Chang Feng ask Young Master Titan for? When will you two meet?” Country Lord Zhi Feng expressed his concern in a small way.

“He didn’t let me know of the time. In fact, that guy Chang Feng just escaped from the Earth Demon Palace and his whole appearance turned into a snake-haired grimace. I guess he returned to his family with much damage to his face and he probably just wanted to invite me to the White River City to get something to restore his body and appearance! Are there any rare treasures in the White River City that are worth the efforts of Chang Fengl?” Yue Yang asked in a puzzled tone.

“White River City is not the territory of the Sacred Light Domain Emperor, so Zhi Feng is not familiar with it,” Country Lord Zhi Feng pretended to know nothing.

“Forget it—no matter what, it’s definitely not comparable to my Divine Blood,” Yue Yang showed off like a rich second-generation inheritor.

Hearing what he said, the Chief Steward Ye and the Captain of the Country Lord’s personal guard were secretly amused.

The Country Lord of Zhi Feng was at peace in his heart, too.

It seemed that this Young Master Titan really didn’t know anything.

When the sky was getting dark and the surrounding candles were lit, the Country Lord Zhi Feng saw that the captain of the guard, Zhong Guan, floated in and whispered in the ear of Master Titan. He saw the unhappy face of the Young Master Titan, but he put down the glass and asked, “Is there any good news from Captain Zhong Guan? Sit down and have a drink!”

Zhong Guan bowed as a sign of respect, but he waved his hand to refuse the banquet, “Thanks you Country Lord for your thoughtfulness,but the Young Master should not be drinking too much. If he ends up drunk here, there might be a chance that he might do something he would regret once he sobers up.”

Yue Yang feigned anger and threw away the cup, “Fine fine fine, you care so much even if I just take another glass or two— I don’t want to drink anymore!”

He was so angry that he didn’t even say goodbye to the Country Lord Zhi Feng as he left.

Zhong Guan smiled bitterly.

However, the Country Lord Zhi Feng and the others didn’t mind.

On the contrary, they understood it very well. It didn’t matter how many glasses he wanted to drink, especially for the particularly noble Young Master Titan. But if he were to stay overnight, it would probably be unlikely. Whether it was for his safety or for his life, there were certain restrictions. When entering someone else’s palace, his safety would naturally be difficult to guarantee entirely. There was also an important item with him as well. If he were to stay overnight, he would inevitably have beautiful women to accompany to sleep. If he accidentally had any offspring, it would not be tolerated for the legal wife, who had yet to enter the door and hadn’t ensured her son would have the rights for inheritance.

Therefore, for a well-known disciple like Master Titan who was yet to marry, it was a ‘dark period’ for him and it was his most ‘unfree’ time.

Country Lord Zhi Feng understood very well in his heart; he knew why this Young Master Titan was bored and wandered everywhere. The reason was because he had no freedom and was bound everywhere. However, according to the performance of this Young Master Titan, he was probably about to get married soon. This was the last trip before marriage, he assumed; otherwise, there was no reason to refuse the two beauties without even thinking.

“Your Majesty, I’m sorry, Zhong Guan apologises on his behalf. We shall take our leave and congratulate you tomorrow,” Zhong Guan took the blame and apologised profusely before he quickly followed Yue Yang’s retreat.

“This Master Titan is 99% real!” The Country Lord Zhi Feng was very happy.

After returning to his concubine’s bedroom, he affirmed the identity of student Yue Yang to his beloved beauty, saying that after repeated trials, he had determined that this kid was not an enemy who came to find fault with them. However, the beautiful Zhu Guang was still dubious. But the fact made it difficult for her to deny it. Even if he was an enemy, who would use something as precious as a Divine Blood as a gift? No matter how stupid the enemy was, wouldn’t it be more conspicuous to do so?

On the other side, in Ming Ri Hao’s residence.

Ming Ri Hao used the Roaring Emperor’s Roaring Magic and he drooled as if he was taking a shower, “Did you take the wrong medicine? What kind of crazy idea do you have in mind to give the Divine Blood as a gift? There is nothing more stupid than this! There is nothing! I don’t think you are usually a fool, but how could you do such a foolish thing?”

Student Yue Yang wiped the saliva from his face with a towel and said with a smile, “People always have to do a few stupid things occasionally to look like a normal person!”

Ming Ri Hao was almost mad.

No matter how confused he was, he couldn’t just use something like the Divine Blood to give as gifts, right?

Once the Divine Blood was given out, no one in the entire Heaven Realm would be able to reject it— that was Divine Blood!

In broad daylight, he took it out in public and gave it as a gift! Wasn’t it obvious that others will attempt to snatch it?! Even Ming Ri Hao wanted to rob this kid, let alone outsiders.

“If you have Divine Blood that is useless, you can give it to me; why did you give it as a gift? Will that guy Zhi Feng appreciate you? He won’t! He will only laugh at you as a nouveau riche in secret! Besides, I guess It won’t take long for you to make a mess in the entire Green Willow City and it will definitely become a place of war. If Zhi Feng doesn’t have time to devour the Divine Blood and it falls into the hands of the Domain Emperor sooner or later, getting it back will be difficult! As soon as you tell others that you have Divine Blood, what will the guys in the Central Palace think? What will they think? You’re not even trying to carry out plans and spying on your enemy; you’re practically going in blind with the intention to make things collapse— this is messed up!” Ming Ri Hao’s face was contorted with anger.

“It doesn’t matter if it’s messy, they’re the ones fighting in the chaos. Why don’t we just pick things up from the middle?” Yue Yang didn’t worry about the disappearance of the Divine Blood at all— even if the Country Lord Zhi Feng swallowed it, Yue Yang would kill him and dig it out in from his body before refining it well.

Anyway, he had the Nirvana Flame and the Innate Sword Qi. As long as there was the Divine Blood, any state of it was capable of restoration.

In addition, it was impossible for the Country Lord of Zhi Feng to swallow theDivine Blood immediately.

If he really did that, he would be a real fool and he would definitely die. In the abnormal state of absorbing the Divine Blood, even the Captain of his personal guard would definitely take the opportunity to kill him and obtain it, let alone the other guards of the palace. If he wants to absorb the Divine Blood, he would have to find a safe place. It would take a few months to slowly integrate with it and absorb it before he could completely convert the Divine Blood for his own gain.

Not everyone had Yue Yang’s Nirvana Flame and not everyone had Yue Yang’s Innate Sword Qi either!

Ming Ri Hao was tired of scolding him and he finally sighed, “Okay, since things have developed into this. Tell me, what should I do next?”

chapters.title: Chapter 941
chapters.body:
Chapter 941

Chapter 941: Fool Them To Die Without Fighting

Yue Yang scratched the back of his head, “I don’t know what you’re going to do, but I’m going to try some stuff with the Bull Brothers. Their strong bodies are the best for experiments!”

“Using the Divine Blood again?” Ming Ri Hao grabbed Yue Yang’s collar frantically and angrily stared at the boy who made him so mad that he wanted to just kill him for good, “If you really have so much Divine Blood to spare, don’t waste it on some Bullshit Brothers; you can give a little bit of it to me. It took me so long to recover to this state and I haven’t reached my peak level yet. If you want your allies to play the best roles, give me the Divine Blood— that way it would be so much more useful than using it on some Bull!”

“You want the Divine Blood? Why didn’t you tell me earlier?” Yue Yang looked at Ming Ri Hao strangely.

“Who wouldn’t want it? Only fools would pass up on such an opportunity! If I had known that you had it all along, I might have even robbed you!” Ming Ri Hao felt that he was truly an idiot to ask such a question.

“Fine…” Yue Yang nodded generously, which surprised Ming Ri Hao— that easily? This was very suspicious! Then, he heard Yue Yang speak up, “But I can’t give it to you for the time being!” Ming Ri Hao immediately understood that it really wasn’t that easy because this kid still had conditions that needed to be upheld.

“Kid, there better not be a day where you fall into my hands because I’m going to make you suffer,” Ming Ri Hao rolled his eyes in anger.

“I’ll take care to make sure you never have the chance, then,” Yue Yang answered him seriously, making Ming Ri Hao even more angry.

“Are you really going to give the Divine Blood to the Bull Brothers?” Although the Divine Blood was not his own, Ming Ri Hao felt distressed for Yue Yang. It wasn’t like him to waste such good items on such things!

“Who said so? I’m just preparing to extract an unknown bit of ‘Divine Power’ from the Bull Brothers,” Yue Yang laughed. Although he had a large bottle of Divine Blood, this was not something that could be given out that easily. Ming Ri Hao ruffled his own hair as he was worried for nothing— with the stinginess of this kid, it would be strange if he was willing to provide the Bull Brothers the Divine Blood.

On the other hand, the said brothers weren’t convinced.

They have been beaten for several hours. With receding breaths, it appeared as if they were going to die.

Of course, that’s just how things appeared on the surface. If they were to untie the Dragon Chains and the Ghostly Shackles of Blood and Tears, it was guaranteed that they would jump up and fight against Zhong Guan and the others!

Yue Yang had seen it at a glance before that there was some strange kind of Divine Power stored in the bodies of these two tough, bull-like guys. This kind of Divine Power was completely hidden and usually did not play a role, but as long as the Bull Brothers were injured, this Divine Power would quickly activate to restore their bodies.

That’s where the immortal bodies of the Bull Brothers came from!

If the brothers’ heads were not cut off in one slash or killed in one move, then no matter how serious the injury was, the Bull Brothers were incapable of greeting death.

Once in the Five Elements Palace of the Tong Tian Tower, Yue Yang deceived the ‘Five Element Pillar’s Divine Power’ from the Golden Earth Bear King. Later, the Divine Power was merged with Ah Man, making her a never-weary Goddess of War. As long as her feet stepped on the earth, her energy would never wither. The Divine Power of this pair of Bull Brothers was somewhat similar to the Five Element Pillar’s Divine Power, but it was not the same.

The similarity was that both Divine Powers restored the master’s energy and wounds.

The Five Element Pillar’s Divine Power had its limits to the terrain, but it could be done anytime, anywhere and would always work, whereas this Divine Power had no geographical limitations, but it would not always be effective like the Five Element Pillar’s Divine Power. This kind of unknown Divine Power usually lurked around and it would not respond even during battle— it would only work if the Bull Brothers were injured.

The most important thing was that this kind of Divine Power, in Yue Yang’s view, was one that was very inappropriate for the physique of the Bull Brothers.

It was precisely because they were not suitable to use this kind of Divine Power that they could not play a real role in the martial world.

Of course, that’s why Yue Yang’s plans were to make them his guards.

However, extracting the Divine Power in their bodies for study was Yue Yang’s biggest goal.

“You two, are you alright?” Yue Yang signalled for Zhong Guan and the others to step aside as he went up to ask these two idiots in person.

“Even if you die, we won’t die either! Damn bastard, nasty rich boy! Even if you beat us up for another day, we will never give in— we will never surrender!” The older Bull Brother was still harsh with words as he spurted curses and exclamations upon seeing Yue Yang.

“We’re not going to surrender, boohoo!” The younger Bull Brother, who was also beaten into a pulp, cried very sadly. Even though he cried, he didn’t admit defeat.

“Actually… loyal, honest, simple, kind and brave warriors like you two are the types that I have always respected and admired. How many outstanding young people like you could there be in the Heavenly Splendour Territory? Apart from you brothers, I don’t believe there are any more out there! Do you think I’ll beat you as brutally and viciously as they do? How is it possible? I’ve always been against violence! I like reasoning the most, and of course, reasoning with the right person. Some unreasonable guys I really can’t reason with no matter what I do, but, for polite and loyal young people like you, I would feel uneasy even if I was forced to use violence against you!” As soon as Yue Yang opened his mouth, Ming Ri Hao almost fell to the ground.

Dear God, this brat could really make the dead live again just by angering them with his words!

“Ah, we, of course we are reasonable,” The boss of the Bull Brothers wanted to tell Yue Yang off, but when he heard the other party praise him for being loyal and honest, simple, kind and brave, he was very excited. When he heard the other party’s respect and admiration for them, even more blood surged and the adrenaline spiked. Finally, he heard him say that the brothers were polite and loyal, and with that, he no longer had the intentions to exclaim.

“You understand us too well!” The Bull Brothers’ younger sibling cried out as he found that he had never met a confidant like Yue Yang in his life.

“Yes, you two have always been misunderstood and I feel angry for you,” Yue Yang expressed his deep sympathy and condolences.

“Boohoo…” The younger brother cried like a child.

“You are actually very smart, and it’s not just ordinary cleverness, but great wisdom instead,” Yue Yang continued to praise them and the eyes of the older brother were moist.

“As expected of the Young Master!” Zhong Guan sighed. Among him and his companions, the seven of them attacked for a long time, but these brothers just didn’t give in. However, in a matter of minutes, the Young Master Titan was able to get them to yield— this was the gap between their abilities!

“What admiration!” Feng Ji and Jin Yun, who had just joined him, admired Yue Yang endlessly.

“Although your physical fitness is good, it’s obvious that you have exhausted your efforts to reach the state you are at today. I can see how hard you worked and how much sweat you shed…” Now, every time Yue Yang said a word, the older brother would just nod his head and wipe away his tears. In the end, Yue Yang showed them a kind smile, “I absolutely support you guys who are working so hard; I’ll support you two 100%! Today, when I saw you being knocked to the ground and taken prisoner in a prison cart, I felt that it was unfair and I felt sad for your sake!”

“That’s right, they use their power in numbers to overwhelm us and they also use a bunch of sneak attacks! Otherwise, we wouldn’t have been captured by mistake,” The older brother defended them hurriedly.

“They are so despicable!” His brother was also very angry.

“The enemy is always despicable. Think about it carefully— what sort of heinous crimes would the evil not dare to do? Therefore, when we fight against the evil enemy, we, who are kind, always have to suffer a little bit of loss. So how can a warrior like you two, who are brave and gallant, use your precious and simple hearts to deal with the various ugly methods of the enemy? As faithful believers of the Liberty Queen, you both are so kind and are so great, how can the enemy’s heinous evil tricks be something that you can defend against with your pure hearts?” Yue Yang said. The Bull Brothers felt that the other party really spoke to their inner voices too accurately. He was too precise because the brothers were truly at a disadvantage in this matter.

“Then what should we do?” The older brother of the Bulls felt that he had to turn to the young man in front of him— he seemed to be the one who knew them best!

“This…” Yue Yang groaned slightly.

“Just say it! We’ll do as you say because everything you said was right!” The younger brother also believed in Yue Yang, taking him as a confidant and friend without reservation. Ming Ri Hao hid his face as he cringed at the fact that these brothers were practically handing out their sole advantages to the other party. But sometimes, it was good to be a fool. At least they would not have to live in a dirty world of tricks and plots.

“If it was someone else, I definitely wouldn’t have bothered, but you two are too kind-hearted; loyal and honest Bull Brothers, who should I help you if I didn’t help you?! Listen to you two, not only will I help you deal with the enemy, I will also help you improve your strength. You are only at the 1st Level of the Heaven Rank and merely close to the 2nd Level of the Heaven Rank. I have decided to help you break through to the 2nd Level, no, to the 3rd Level of the Heaven Rank! I will give you the Ancient Dragon’s Blood to awaken the hidden energy in your body and turn you into powerful warriors like giant dragons. When the enemy sees you, they will tremble all over and no longer be able to use conspiracies and tricks! Don’t you want to rescue the Liberty Queen? With the blood of an Ancient Dragon coupled with your strong strengths, you can achieve it! Don’t you want to resolve the disaster in the Heavenly Splendour Territory and save the people? I will absolutely support both of you who are so great!” Yue Yang held the hands of the Bull Brothers. He was like a leader that went to a mining site to visit laboured workers, offering them consolement and words of encouragement.

“Waaaaa!” The younger sibling of the Bull Brothers was so excited that he couldn’t express his feelings properly. His teeth were trembling, his big lips were shaking and he couldn’t say a word before he finally burst into tears.

“No one, no one has ever supported us…” A man as strong as the older brother wiped away his tears.

They have followed the Liberty Queen for many years and have suffered so much. When did anyone support them like Yue Yang did today?

Even if they were also believers of the Liberty Queen, their teammates just laugh at the brothers for being stupid.

Brainless.

Who would ever think that they were brilliant?

Who would bear to take out the blood of the Ancient Dragon to help the two brothers improve their level and strength? They never had a friend who understood them so well and was so generous!

In the end, Yue Yang conjured up two vials of Ancient Dragon Blood. Deliberately using a very serious expression, he looked at the brothers and said everything else word by word, “It will be very painful to integrate the Ancient Dragon Blood, it will be very painful even for tough guys like you twoo. It is extremely difficult, so answer me, brave Bull Brothers—do you have the confidence to challenge yourself and surpass yourself?”

Although Yue Yang’s expression was very serious, the older brother could see that in his friend’s eyes, the light of encouragement was as warm as the sun.

They wiped away the hot tears on their faces and shouted with all their strength, “Yes!”

Seeing this, Ming Ri Hao swore in his heart that he would never quarrel with this kid Yue Yang in the future. This kid’s mouth was the most terrifying weapon. Perhaps there might come a day where he would be fooled into his plans— just like the Bull Brothers were doing now.

Of course, he also admitted that although the method was a cruelly large trip, this was the best way to deal with the bull brothers.

Moreover, this kid Yue Yang was also rather good to the Bulls.

At least, a stingy guy like him would generously bring out two bottles of Ancient Dragon Blood to help them improve. Damn, he didn’t even have this kind of benefit!

========================================================================

chapters.title: Chapter 942
chapters.body:
Chapter 942

Chapter 942: Now This Feels Like Home

Zhong Guan and others were drooling with envy, but this kind of Ancient Dragon Blood could not be tolerated by everyone’s physique.

They preferred the Martial Spirit Pills.

Although the Ancient Dragon’s Blood was good, once the Bull Brothers fused with it, they became two giants with muscles.

Fortunately, the Bull Brothers were so ugly that they didn’t care about their appearances at all. As long as their strength could increase, everything else didn’t matter.

Of course, though the Martial Spirit Pill was good in its own right as well, it was something that had to be earned by the hard workers under him. In short, they needed to put in the effort to obtain prizes like these. Lazy workers shouldn’t ever dream of obtaining it; inversely, that would mark the start of their punishments.

“Is this the Divine Power extracted from the Bull Brothers?” Yue Yang returned to the Grimoire World, where Drunken Cat Yu Jie was a little curious. How could the Bull Brothers have supernatural powers in their bodies?

“The Liberty Queen,” Princess Qian Qian was so smart that she guessed the answer at once.

“Possibly, the Bull Brothers were seriously injured before and were about to die, so the Liberty Queen used this power to save their lives,” For Yue Yu, who was extremely talented in healing, she felt that this kind of unknown Divine Power was actually a mass of healing energy. Its function was not to fight at all, but to restore life. What sealed her judgement at this point was that there was no spiritual sense left in the Divine Power condensed in Yue Yang’s hands. Generally, only Divine Powers with healing properties were able to give off such a characteristic.

“Yes, this is indeed a healing energy,” Yue Yang nodded.

“If the Divine Power was really so useful to the Bull Brothers, why did you extract it?” Drunken Cat Yu Jie asked with a bit of confusion.

“This is the Divine Power of the Yin attributes, which the Bull Brothers are not suitable for. Especially the younger brother who had the most Divine Power in his body— he had subtly transformed into a woman in terms of behaviour and characteristics, of course, unconsciously. The one who gave them the Divine Power to heal knew that it was no good, but there was no better way. It might also be that they do not know about the truth and mistakenly input this life-saving Divine Power to the Bull Brothers. No matter what, this Divine Power’ existence which not only hindered the growth and breakthrough of the Bull Brothers, but also affected their characters invisibly. I extracted them, which meant that I did a big favour for them! Moreover, I didn’t want their Divine Power for nothing; didn’t I give them the Ancient Dragon Blood in exchange?” Yue Yang laughed like a profiteer.

Ancient Dragon Blood for Divine Power?

That is to say, he was truly the Third Young Master of the Yue family who was very shameless. Only he could say such a thing with dignity and awe.

Princess Qian Qian, Yue Yu and Drunken Cat Yu Jie have long been used to seeing this behaviour of his and they were too lazy to complain. In fact, it would be odd if Yue Yang wasn’t proclaiming himself as a saint like that!

However, what was the use of Yue Yang’s extraction of this Divine Power? He would definitely not use this kind of weird Divine Power that had the ability to change men into pseudo-women. Could it be that he wanted to curse this onto some unfortunate person?

Seeing the suspicious eyes of the three girls, Yue Yang immediately exclaimed out of the injustice he felt, “Can’t you guys think of the good stuff? I’m a good person!”

Then, the transmigrated man said that he helped an old woman to cross the road when he was a child. Although the woman never intended to cross the road at all, he urged himself to do it because he wanted to do a good deed. Finally, he told the kindergarten teacher about it and got a little red flower, admiring its beauty for an entire week. Studying hard every day and growing up, preparing to be a good scientist that worked hard for the construction of the modernization of the world, how could it be possible for him to use the Divine Power to harm others?

Totally impossible!

The Divine Power was such a good find; he didn’t want to give it out at all!

“Who do you want to leave it to? I don’t want it!” Although the Divine Power had been purified by the Nirvana Flame, as long as she thought about the fact that it was extracted from the body of the Bull Brothers, Princess Qian Qian felt that she had a psychological barrier towards it, fearing it as if it was a snake or scorpion.

“Tigress, you don’t even know what a good thing is,” Although Yue Yang criticised Princess Qian Qian, he didn’t use a harsh tone. Although this Divine Power was a good thing, he would not leave it to his woman that casually. It was better for her to cultivate the Double Cultivation without needing any third-party help and interference. Besides, this Divine Power was not something that anyone would be able to use.

“Are you going to use it for the War Beasts?” Yue Yu knew Yue Yang’s intentions very well and he immediately reacted when she thought about it.

“To be precise, it’s the Earth Divine Soldier. With the Di Gui Yin Flame, Red Sky DIvine Flames and the Blood Pool that I got before, I just wanted to improve the Tao Tie. Otherwise, it would be a bit slow to wait for it to improve on its own. Not only the talents of Tao Tie and the Star Gathering Heavenly Scorpion, but also everyone’s Guardian Beasts and the various subordinate beasts of the Guardian Beast have not improved quickly. Now we have the Divine Blood, and the two halves of the God, Red Sky River. There is no reason to let the treasures sit idly and waste a good opportunity when the Blood Pool formed by the Red Sky River after the sacrifice of Divine Blood can be utilised,” Yue Yang could say that this improvement plan of his had been conceived for a long time, but it was delayed because there are not enough conditions met to implement it before.

Until now.

“It’s true, many War Beasts can’t cultivate and improve on their own like Xiao Wen Li, Duo Duo, Red, Ah Man, Jiang Ying and Phoenix Sisters. In the Tong Tian Tower, one might get by, but when it comes to the Heaven Realm, everyone is strong there. If we don’t improve ourselves, we’d be left behind,” Princess Qian Qian also agreed.

“If you want everyone to improve quickly, it’s not enough to stay at the Heaven Stairway, you have to explore the God’s Ruins and get more treasures,” Drunken Cat Yu Jie sighed slightly.

“Don’t think about it yet,” Princess Qian Qian felt that speaking of the God’s Ruins was still a little too far and it was most practical to use the current treasures to improve.

Everyone said that Yue Yang had many treasures and there was indeed a big bottle of Divine Blood.

However, it was not enough to subdivide it.

In order not to hold back, beasts like Duo Duo, Red, Ah Man, Ika, and Jiang Ying, who could simply rely on their own efforts to cultivate and improve, gave more treasures and opportunities to their companions who have not fully unlocked their wisdom to cultivate on their own such as the Reaper Mantis, Chaotic Ghost, Tao Tie, Star Gathering Heavenly Scorpion, the Metal Beast and Hui Tai Lang, etc. In addition to Yueyang’s war beasts, there were also war beasts from Xue Wu Xia, Princess Qian Qian, Luo Hua, Yi Nan, Yue Bing, Yue Shuang, the Phoenix Beauty etc. No one wanted to be a bad person, but not being a bad person meant that there would be no way out. In the end, only the greatest student Yue Yang could do it himself.

Yue Yu and the others understood this painstaking effort. In fact, they knew about it themselves.

Therefore, no matter what Yue Yang did, they all supported it and never raised objections in the general direction.

More often than not, they hoped that Yue Yang would let go of his thoughts of common improvement and use the treasures to maximise his own strengths. After all, he was the most important backbone of the Tong Tian Tower and his strength directly represented all that the tower is. The stronger his strength, the higher the Tong Tian Tower would rise. With that, everyone could follow him to advance to a higher realm…

“Tao Tie, what kind of gluttony are you going to turn into? The Heaven Fury Gluttony or the Red Sky Gluttony?”

The reason why Drunken Cat Yu Jie would ask that was because Yue Yang possessed many kinds of flames.

In addition to possessing the world’s first Nirvana Flame, in the process of growing up, Yue Yang had learned a lot of various fire energies, such as the Heaven’s Fury Fire Lotus which was learned in the battle of the Scarlet Emperor and the Scarlet Concubine to this day.

There were also some fire energies which were very special and completely Yin attributed, such as the Flames of the Sky. This was the first time Yue Yang went to the Heaven Realm after chasing the enemy in the Ancient Arena, learned from the battle with Yan Zun and Yan Zong. There was also the Fire of Red Sky, whose power was close to that of the Fire God. It was obtained during the recent battle with Red Sky River. After engulfing and absorbing it, Yue Yang merged the power of small Laws, ancient runes and the Power of Calamity to create a brand-new and more powerful ‘Red Sky Divine Rage’.

The Red Sky Divine Rage was close to the real Divine Fire.

But after all, Yue Yang was not a Divine Supreme being, so this Red Sky Divine Rage could only be called a Quasi-Sacred fire at best. Its power was slightly stronger than that of the Heaven;s Fury Fire Lotus and the Flames of the Sky, but Yue Yang found that its greatest effect seems to be used for refining treasures. Or rather, it was better used to improve the beasts as it would not reflect the greatest value if it was only used for battle.

Among the many fire energies, the most difficult thing for Yue Yang was the Di Gui Yin Flame.

It was such a quiet flame.

It was an existence that could not break the balance at all. Once there were energy fluctuations, it was bound to explode with a destructive power ten million times stronger.

It was unrealistic to use Di Gui Yin Flame to enhance Tao Tie, which was what Yue Yang was still pondering about. So, Drunken Cat Yu JIe asked Yue Yang if he planned to use the Heaven’s Fury Fire Lotus or the Fire of the Red Sky to help the Tao Tie rise in the levels.

“This Divine Power can be coupled with the Lord of Fire’s Fire Eukaryote, the Red Sky Divine Flame, and Chaotic Energy,” Yue Yang was usually stingy, but he spared no effort in improving the beasts. This was not limited to Tao Tie as there were more beasts like the Hui Tai Lang and the Metal Beast, even more so for those like Duo Duo and Xiao Wen Li.

“If you have time, let’s improve Qian Qian’s Water-Repellent Golden Eyed Goblin. That little thing is about to evolve into a Holy Beast,” Yue Yu made a suggestion. Of course, before that, she also proposed to upgrade the panda girl Niu Niu, but Yue Yang felt that she had to lay a solid foundation and should not improve too quickly. It was best for her to learn slowly like a child and not to participate in various wars too early so as not to affect her natural growth. In Yue Yang’s mind, Niu Niu was the same as the little girl Yue Shuang. If he let them go out to fight this early in their childhood, it would be his failure as a brother.

“That slacker has been brought up under the bad influence of Hui Tai Lang,” Princess Qian Qian didn’t want to say anything about it, but she got angry when it was mentioned.

“I think the little one is quite diligent. As soon as he enters the door, he will help with arranging the slippers and also fill some water for the owner to wash her face… Niuniu is not that good!” Drunken Cat Yu Jie was very envious.

“Qian Qian’s disciplinary requirements are extremely strict,” Yue Yu was also snickering. The little beast with golden eyes was usually naughty, but when he saw Princess Qian Qian, he would be so frightened that he wouldn’t dare to breathe.

“Okay, it’s not enough for now so let’s wait for a little longer, I’ll raise Tao Tie first,” Yue Yang used the Three Realm Compass to return to the Tong Tian Tower and took Tao Tie that he left in the Soaring Dragon Continent. Hui Tai Lang was in charge of supervising Fatty Hai and the others in their practice. When he saw him, he practically followed along.

In the end, he wasn’t the only one who trailed after Yue Yang.

There were also the Star Gathering Scorpion and the Metal Beast running up to him.

They have no opinions towards Yue Yang wanting to improve Tao Tie, but good things must be shared, even if what they got were merely a tiny bit of the good. Otherwise, they would look at Yue Yang with pitiful eyes until he softens.

A prodigal family!

It’s an unforgivable sin if they just eat and don’t work, but they even started to act cute in public…

Yue Yang scolded them loudly whereas Hui Tai Lang and the others bowed their heads and acted as if they were trained, pretending to have the ‘I will change’ attitude.

The last drop of Divine Blood flowed outside happily, the others absorbing it while showing off to each other, never caring about their companion, Tao Tie. In fact, Tao Tie was also the most bullied one amongst them. They let him do all the hard and dirty work, just like the reincarnation of the sand monk. After the birth of Tao Tie from the Ash Blade to the Earth Divine Soldier, Hui Tai Lang finally had a younger brother. Because of his lack of wisdom, the Star Gathering Scorpion who was born in the later periods was also more cunning than the honest and hardworking Tao Tie, let alone the Metal Beast that were the Tong Tian War Beasts.

Tao Tie, who never complained or expressed lethargy, was Yue Yang’s most admired hardworking beast and he always encouraged everyone to learn from Tao Tie.

Tao Tie’s ascension would naturally be thought of as soon as there was a chance.

Tao Tie grinned and smiled silently.

Who says being honest isn’t a good thing?

They let Hui Tai Lang and the small Metal Beast drooled over the Fire Eukaryote, allowing Yue Yang to lay it on the forehead of Tao Tie. The combination of Divine Power, Red Sky Divine Flame and the Chaotic Energy formed the energy base of the Fire Eukaryote on his forehead. Through Yue Yang’s Nirvana Flame, the Earth Divine Soldier Tao Tie was reborn again, and, in this rebirth, he made it direct to a perfect state…

As soon as Yue Yang stretched out his hand, it was no longer called the Hui Jin Magic Blade. Instead, the Tao Tie Blade was born and it was no longer an artifact.

Swinging it gently, the sky also split into a space-time crack.

When Yue Yang let it go, Tao Tie was transformed from the perfect state of the Earth Divine Soldier to a gluttonous monster. The body evolved even more peculiarly with horns protruding from its head and a roar as deafening as a crash of thunder.

Even Hui Tai Lang, who was absorbing the Divine Blood from outside, felt a heavy pressure.

He opened his eyes abruptly, full of light.

After the increased rank of the Tao Tie Blade, Yue Yang gave rewards to the Golden Tiger Shark King, Blood Python King, Flame Bee Mother and the other war beasts who have been doing dirty work and tiring labour. What he gave was not ordinary flesh and blood, but the remains of the God Red Sky River. The slander made Hui Tai Lang’s saliva flow like a waterfall and the Star Gathering Heavenly Scorpion was anxiously crawling all over the floor as well, but they just didn’t have their share.

Only the little Metal Beast twisted its backside and continued to sleep, preferring to eat crystals or gem energies. The allure of flesh and blood was obviously not worth a lot.

If Yue Yang took out the Sun Gem, it would probably drool like a little pug.

“Do you want to eat too?” Yue Yang asked with a smile.

“Mmmm,” Hui Tai Lang’s head nodded like a chicken pecking at rice and the Star Gathering Heavenly Scorpion behind him also shook his head and waved his tail as if it was also a watchdog!

“Then why don’t you go to work for me? I don’t feed a bunch of useless idiots!” Yue Yang was suddenly furious and his anger was like a volcano erupting, frightening both Hui Tai Lang and the Star Gathering Heavenly Scorpion to both shrink into a ball and tremble. Fortunately, Yue Yu was there and saved their lives. Otherwise, they would have to let Yue Yang scold them to their deaths. Immediately afterwards, both of them were seen with the words ‘hardworking’ tied to their heads. They were holding buckets and brooms, cleaning the interiors and exteriors, clearing away the icebergs that they had not had time to completely remove after absorbing the residual iceberg the last time.

Even the little Metal Beast, the little thing that was most favoured by Qian Qian and the others, didn’t dare to sleep in. Instead, it ran to the kitchen obediently, performing the small claw method of chopping vegetables and helped to cook.

As for whether it could really help or actually cause another wave of trouble, anyone could tell by looking at the little slave’s expression that cried and laughed at the same time.

Seeing this scene, Yue Yu showed a smile, “This is nice; this feels like home!”

Princess Qian Qian looked at Yue Yu and smiled. She pointedly said, “Yeah, it’s lively when there are many people. Now this, feels like home…”

chapters.title: Chapter 943
chapters.body:
Chapter 943

Chapter 943: Can You Possibly Be Even More Of A Pervert?

After raising the level of the War Beasts, Yue Yang turned to his own cultivation.

From Ming Ri Hao’s source of information, the war in the Heavenly Splendour Territory had been secretly manipulated by some people from the Central Palace. Among those behind-the-scenes manipulators, there were powerful enemies comparable to Ji Wu Ri, whose strength was close to the Gods. Those people were eyeing the Divine Grimoire that was hidden in the Heavenly Splendour Territory. With such an opponent, Yue Yang felt that he must become stronger. Otherwise, even if he truly obtained the Divine Grimoire, it would be difficult to reap his profits. Whether it was the Tong Tian Tower or the Heaven Realm itself, things could be summarised by a very realistic sentence— your strength determines everything.

Without strength, one was nothing.

Everything was built on great strength before it extended to others.

“Apart from the Divine Power that has healing attributes, I also discovered a secret in the Bull Brothers. It may not be of much use to us, but it will be a pretty good benefit for the other warriors,” Before cultivating, Yue Yang explained the situation to Princess Qian Qian and the others.

“Secret? What kind of change would that be?” Princess Qian Qian asked.

“It’s a special way to break through the acupuncture points around the meridians of the human body. I guess the Bull Brothers are not aware of it and it’s just an action that’s used on them. This method of breaking through the acupoints is similar to the previous incomplete cultivation method of the Tong Tian Tower. Similar, but kind of different. It is also different from our Double Cultivation— although it is a breakthrough, it is not as good as our whole body cultivation with meridians. However, for some who are unable to progress who are unable to achieve a breakthrough or the warriors who couldn’t use conventional means to train, this was a pretty good method to achieve a breakthrough,” Yue Yang explained the principle of the acupuncture points and listed the special types of energy stored in certain acupoints along with their special ways of existence.

For example, Bai Hui, located at the highest point of the human body, was the focal point where all the meridians of the whole body intersect and meet.

If it was not penetrated, cultivations would definitely be stagnant.

Another example was the Yong Quan point, which was located under the foot of the human body. If it was penetrated, it would be easier to absorb energy between the Heavens and the earth. It would also be easier to restore oneself and also make the body more balanced while strengthening the lower limbs. Another example was the Lao Gong that were situated at the middle of the palms; if they were connected, the energy could be casted or absorbed at will.

Of course, the mysteries of acupoints were definitely not limited to these. It was also a very profound knowledge— the deeper you go, the more you would discover.
